### FILE: apps/backend/src/config/workflows.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/config/workflows.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * @file workflows.js
  3 |  * @description Workflow definitions for the agentic pipeline.
  4 |  *
  5 |  * A workflow is an ordered sequence of agent IDs that defines
  6 |  * which agents run, in what order, and under what conditions.
  7 |  *
  8 |  * The Orchestrator Agent reads these definitions to plan its execution.
  9 |  */
 10 | 
 11 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 12 | // Workflow types
 13 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 14 | export const WORKFLOW_TYPES = Object.freeze({
 15 |   STANDARD:     'standard',
 16 |   CUSTOM_GOAL:  'custom_goal',
 17 |   QUICK:        'quick',          // Fewer agents — faster response
 18 |   DEEP:         'deep',           // All agents — most thorough analysis
 19 |   EXPERIMENTAL: 'experimental',   // A/B testing workflows
 20 | });
 21 | 
 22 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 23 | // Workflow definitions
 24 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 25 | 
 26 | /**
 27 |  * @typedef {object} WorkflowStep
 28 |  * @property {string}    agentId        - Agent to invoke
 29 |  * @property {boolean}   [required]     - If false, failure here is non-fatal
 30 |  * @property {boolean}   [parallel]     - Run concurrently with previous parallel steps
 31 |  * @property {string}    [condition]    - JS expression evaluated against ExecutionContext
 32 |  * @property {string}    [description]  - Human-readable explanation
 33 |  */
 34 | 
 35 | /**
 36 |  * @typedef {object} WorkflowDefinition
 37 |  * @property {string}         id           - Unique workflow identifier
 38 |  * @property {string}         name         - Display name
 39 |  * @property {string}         type         - One of WORKFLOW_TYPES
 40 |  * @property {string}         description
 41 |  * @property {WorkflowStep[]} steps
 42 |  * @property {object}         [options]    - Extra settings (timeoutMs, etc.)
 43 |  */
 44 | 
 45 | /** @type {Record<string, WorkflowDefinition>} */
 46 | export const WORKFLOWS = {
 47 | 
 48 |   // ── Standard Analysis (default) ──────────────────────────────────────────
 49 |   STANDARD: {
 50 |     id:          'workflow-standard',
 51 |     name:        'Standard Analysis',
 52 |     type:        WORKFLOW_TYPES.STANDARD,
 53 |     description: 'Full pipeline: schema → plan → tools → execute → critique → dashboard.',
 54 |     options: {
 55 |       timeoutMs:      90_000,
 56 |       includeReasoning: true,
 57 |     },
 58 |     steps: [
 59 |       {
 60 |         agentId:     'schema-analyzer',
 61 |         required:    true,
 62 |         description: 'Profile dataset columns, detect domain, assign roles.',
 63 |       },
 64 |       {
 65 |         agentId:     'analytics-planner',
 66 |         required:    true,
 67 |         description: 'Plan metrics & insights based on the schema profile.',
 68 |       },
 69 |       {
 70 |         agentId:     'tool-router',
 71 |         required:    true,
 72 |         description: 'Select compatible tools from the tool registry.',
 73 |       },
 74 |       {
 75 |         agentId:     'executor',
 76 |         required:    true,
 77 |         description: 'Execute selected tools against the dataset.',
 78 |       },
 79 |       {
 80 |         agentId:     'critic',
 81 |         required:    false,   // Non-fatal — dashboard still ships without critique
 82 |         description: 'Validate results, flag anomalies, score quality.',
 83 |       },
 84 |       {
 85 |         agentId:     'orchestrator',
 86 |         required:    true,
 87 |         description: 'Aggregate all results into the final dashboard response.',
 88 |       },
 89 |     ],
 90 |   },
 91 | 
 92 |   // ── Quick Analysis (fewer agents) ────────────────────────────────────────
 93 |   QUICK: {
 94 |     id:          'workflow-quick',
 95 |     name:        'Quick Analysis',
 96 |     type:        WORKFLOW_TYPES.QUICK,
 97 |     description: 'Streamlined 3-agent pipeline for fast initial insights. Skips critique.',
 98 |     options: {
 99 |       timeoutMs:        30_000,
100 |       includeReasoning: false,
101 |     },
102 |     steps: [
103 |       {
104 |         agentId:     'schema-analyzer',
105 |         required:    true,
106 |         description: 'Profile dataset.',
107 |       },
108 |       {
109 |         agentId:     'analytics-planner',
110 |         required:    true,
111 |         description: 'Plan core metrics only.',
112 |       },
113 |       {
114 |         agentId:     'executor',
115 |         required:    true,
116 |         description: 'Execute top-5 priority tools.',
117 |       },
118 |     ],
119 |   },
120 | 
121 |   // ── Custom Goal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
122 |   CUSTOM_GOAL: {
123 |     id:          'workflow-custom-goal',
124 |     name:        'Custom Goal Analysis',
125 |     type:        WORKFLOW_TYPES.CUSTOM_GOAL,
126 |     description: 'User provides a specific goal. Orchestrator tailors the agent chain.',
127 |     options: {
128 |       timeoutMs:        120_000,
129 |       includeReasoning: true,
130 |       allowDynamicSteps: true,  // Orchestrator may add/skip steps based on goal
131 |     },
132 |     steps: [
133 |       {
134 |         agentId:     'schema-analyzer',
135 |         required:    true,
136 |         description: 'Profile dataset.',
137 |       },
138 |       {
139 |         agentId:     'analytics-planner',
140 |         required:    true,
141 |         description: 'Plan metrics aligned to user goal.',
142 |       },
143 |       {
144 |         agentId:     'tool-router',
145 |         required:    true,
146 |         description: 'Select tools that match goal-driven plan.',
147 |       },
148 |       {
149 |         agentId:     'executor',
150 |         required:    true,
151 |         description: 'Execute tools.',
152 |       },
153 |       {
154 |         agentId:     'critic',
155 |         required:    false,
156 |         description: 'Critique results against user goal.',
157 |       },
158 |       {
159 |         agentId:     'orchestrator',
160 |         required:    true,
161 |         description: 'Produce goal-aligned dashboard.',
162 |       },
163 |     ],
164 |   },
165 | 
166 |   // ── Deep Analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
167 |   DEEP: {
168 |     id:          'workflow-deep',
169 |     name:        'Deep Analysis',
170 |     type:        WORKFLOW_TYPES.DEEP,
171 |     description: 'Exhaustive analysis: all tools, parallel execution, multiple critique passes.',
172 |     options: {
173 |       timeoutMs:          180_000,
174 |       includeReasoning:   true,
175 |       parallelExecution:  true,
176 |       maxTools:           20,
177 |     },
178 |     steps: [
179 |       {
180 |         agentId:     'schema-analyzer',
181 |         required:    true,
182 |       },
183 |       {
184 |         agentId:     'analytics-planner',
185 |         required:    true,
186 |       },
187 |       {
188 |         agentId:     'tool-router',
189 |         required:    true,
190 |       },
191 |       {
192 |         agentId:     'executor',
193 |         required:    true,
194 |         parallel:    false,
195 |       },
196 |       {
197 |         agentId:     'critic',
198 |         required:    true,  // Required in deep mode
199 |       },
200 |       {
201 |         agentId:     'orchestrator',
202 |         required:    true,
203 |       },
204 |     ],
205 |   },
206 | 
207 |   // ── Experimental (A/B testing) ────────────────────────────────────────────
208 |   EXPERIMENTAL: {
209 |     id:          'workflow-experimental',
210 |     name:        'Experimental (A/B)',
211 |     type:        WORKFLOW_TYPES.EXPERIMENTAL,
212 |     description: 'Runs two parallel analysis branches and picks the better result.',
213 |     options: {
214 |       timeoutMs:       120_000,
215 |       includeReasoning: true,
216 |       abBranches:       ['gemini', 'ollama'],  // One branch per provider
217 |     },
218 |     steps: [
219 |       {
220 |         agentId:  'schema-analyzer',
221 |         required: true,
222 |       },
223 |       {
224 |         agentId:  'analytics-planner',
225 |         required: true,
226 |         parallel: true,   // Branch A
227 |       },
228 |       {
229 |         agentId:  'analytics-planner',
230 |         required: true,
231 |         parallel: true,   // Branch B (different provider)
232 |       },
233 |       {
234 |         agentId:  'critic',
235 |         required: true,
236 |         description: 'Picks better branch.',
237 |       },
238 |       {
239 |         agentId:  'orchestrator',
240 |         required: true,
241 |       },
242 |     ],
243 |   },
244 | 
245 | };
246 | 
247 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
248 | // Helper utilities
249 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
250 | 
251 | /** Return a workflow definition by ID. */
252 | export function getWorkflow(workflowId) {
253 |   return Object.values(WORKFLOWS).find(w => w.id === workflowId) ?? null;
254 | }
255 | 
256 | /** Return all workflow definitions. */
257 | export function listWorkflows() {
258 |   return Object.values(WORKFLOWS).map(w => ({
259 |     id:          w.id,
260 |     name:        w.name,
261 |     type:        w.type,
262 |     description: w.description,
263 |     stepCount:   w.steps.length,
264 |   }));
265 | }
266 | 
267 | /** Select the most appropriate workflow for a given goal & options. */
268 | export function selectWorkflow(goal = '', options = {}) {
269 |   if (options.workflowId) {
270 |     return getWorkflow(options.workflowId) ?? WORKFLOWS.STANDARD;
271 |   }
272 |   if (options.quick)      return WORKFLOWS.QUICK;
273 |   if (options.deep)       return WORKFLOWS.DEEP;
274 |   if (options.experimental) return WORKFLOWS.EXPERIMENTAL;
275 |   if (goal && goal.length > 10) return WORKFLOWS.CUSTOM_GOAL;
276 |   return WORKFLOWS.STANDARD;
277 | }
278 | 
279 | export default WORKFLOWS;
280 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/core/server.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/core/server.js`

```js
  1 | // Main HTTP server setup
  2 | import { createServer } from 'node:http';
  3 | import { validateConfig, printConfigSummary } from '../config/environment.js';
  4 | import { setupRoutes } from '../routes/index.js';
  5 | import { errorHandler } from '../middleware/error-handler.js';
  6 | import { requestLogger } from '../middleware/request-logger.js';
  7 | import { corsMiddleware } from '../middleware/cors.js';
  8 | import config from '../config/environment.js';
  9 | 
 10 | let serverInstance = null;
 11 | 
 12 | /**
 13 |  * Create and configure the HTTP server
 14 |  */
 15 | export function createHttpServer() {
 16 |   // Validate configuration
 17 |   validateConfig();
 18 |   
 19 |   // Print configuration summary
 20 |   if (config.logging.verbose) {
 21 |     printConfigSummary();
 22 |   }
 23 | 
 24 |   // Create HTTP server
 25 |   const server = createServer(async (request, response) => {
 26 |     response.req = request;
 27 |     // Request start time for logging
 28 |     request.startTime = Date.now();
 29 | 
 30 |     try {
 31 |       // Apply CORS middleware
 32 |       corsMiddleware(request, response);
 33 | 
 34 |       // Handle preflight OPTIONS requests
 35 |       if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
 36 |         response.writeHead(204, {
 37 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': config.cors.origin,
 38 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PATCH, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS',
 39 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With',
 40 |           'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400'
 41 |         });
 42 |         response.end();
 43 |         return;
 44 |       }
 45 | 
 46 |       // Parse URL
 47 |       const url = new URL(request.url, `http://${request.headers.host || 'localhost'}`);
 48 |       request.pathname = url.pathname;
 49 |       request.searchParams = url.searchParams;
 50 | 
 51 |       // Apply request logging middleware
 52 |       requestLogger(request, response);
 53 | 
 54 |       // Setup routes
 55 |       await setupRoutes(request, response);
 56 | 
 57 |     } catch (error) {
 58 |       // Handle any unexpected errors
 59 |       errorHandler(error, request, response);
 60 |     }
 61 |   });
 62 | 
 63 |   // Store server instance
 64 |   serverInstance = server;
 65 | 
 66 |   return server;
 67 | }
 68 | 
 69 | /**
 70 |  * Start the HTTP server
 71 |  */
 72 | export async function startServer(server, port = config.server.port) {
 73 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 74 |     server.listen(port, config.server.host, (error) => {
 75 |       if (error) {
 76 |         console.error('❌ Failed to start server:', error);
 77 |         reject(error);
 78 |         return;
 79 |       }
 80 | 
 81 |       const address = server.address();
 82 |       const host = address.address === '::' ? 'localhost' : address.address;
 83 |       const port = address.port;
 84 | 
 85 |       console.log('\n🚀 ===== InsightFlow API Server =====');
 86 |       console.log(`📍 Server running on: http://${host}:${port}`);
 87 |       console.log(`📍 Environment: ${config.server.nodeEnv}`);
 88 |       console.log(`📍 Node.js version: ${process.version}`);
 89 |       console.log(`📍 Process ID: ${process.pid}`);
 90 |       console.log('\n📊 Available Endpoints:');
 91 |       console.log('   GET  /api/health           - Health check');
 92 |       console.log('   GET  /api/ai/status        - AI provider status');
 93 |       console.log('   POST /api/ai/test          - Test AI generation');
 94 |       console.log('   POST /api/datasets/import  - Import dataset');
 95 |       console.log('   GET  /api/datasets/:id     - Get dataset info');
 96 |       console.log('   POST /api/datasets/:id/chat - Chat with dataset');
 97 |       console.log('\n🎯 Ready to accept connections!\n');
 98 | 
 99 |       resolve(server);
100 |     });
101 | 
102 |     // Handle server errors
103 |     server.on('error', (error) => {
104 |       if (error.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {
105 |         console.error(`❌ Port ${port} is already in use`);
106 |         console.error(`   Try: kill -9 $(lsof -ti:${port})`);
107 |         console.error(`   Or change PORT in .env file`);
108 |       } else {
109 |         console.error('❌ Server error:', error);
110 |       }
111 |       reject(error);
112 |     });
113 | 
114 |     // Handle graceful shutdown
115 |     server.on('close', () => {
116 |       console.log('📡 Server closed');
117 |     });
118 | 
119 |     // Handle process signals
120 |     process.on('SIGTERM', () => gracefulShutdown(server));
121 |     process.on('SIGINT', () => gracefulShutdown(server));
122 |     process.on('SIGUSR2', () => gracefulShutdown(server)); // nodemon restart
123 |   });
124 | }
125 | 
126 | /**
127 |  * Graceful shutdown handler
128 |  */
129 | async function gracefulShutdown(server) {
130 |   console.log('\n🛑 Shutting down gracefully...');
131 | 
132 |   // Stop accepting new connections
133 |   server.close(async (error) => {
134 |     if (error) {
135 |       console.error('❌ Error during shutdown:', error);
136 |       process.exit(1);
137 |     }
138 | 
139 |     console.log('✅ Server closed successfully');
140 |     
141 |     // Close database connections, cleanup resources, etc.
142 |     // This would be expanded based on your actual resources
143 |     
144 |     console.log('👋 Goodbye!');
145 |     process.exit(0);
146 |   });
147 | 
148 |   // Force shutdown after 10 seconds
149 |   setTimeout(() => {
150 |     console.error('⏰ Forced shutdown after timeout');
151 |     process.exit(1);
152 |   }, 10000);
153 | }
154 | 
155 | /**
156 |  * Get server instance
157 |  */
158 | export function getServer() {
159 |   return serverInstance;
160 | }
161 | 
162 | /**
163 |  * Check if server is running
164 |  */
165 | export function isServerRunning() {
166 |   return serverInstance && serverInstance.listening;
167 | }
168 | 
169 | export default {
170 |   createHttpServer,
171 |   startServer,
172 |   getServer,
173 |   isServerRunning
174 | };
175 | 
```

```js
  1 | import { mkdirSync, existsSync } from "node:fs";
  2 | import path from "node:path";
  3 | import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
  4 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  5 | import { DatabaseSync } from "node:sqlite";
  6 | 
  7 | const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
  8 | const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
  9 | 
 10 | const dataDir = process.env.DATA_DIR || path.join(__dirname, "..", "..", "data");
 11 | 
 12 | mkdirSync(dataDir, { recursive: true });
 13 | 
 14 | const databasePath = path.join(dataDir, "insightflow.sqlite");
 15 | 
 16 | if (!existsSync(databasePath)) {
 17 |   console.log(`[DB] Creating database at: ${databasePath}`);
 18 | }
 19 | const db = new DatabaseSync(databasePath);
 20 | 
 21 | db.exec(`
 22 |   PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
 23 |   PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
 24 | 
 25 |   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meta (
 26 |     key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 27 |     value TEXT NOT NULL
 28 |   );
 29 | 
 30 |   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS datasets (
 31 |     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 32 |     name TEXT NOT NULL,
 33 |     source_type TEXT NOT NULL,
 34 |     file_name TEXT,
 35 |     uploaded_at TEXT NOT NULL,
 36 |     row_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
 37 |     column_count INTEGER NOT NULL
 38 |   );
 39 | 
 40 |   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dataset_columns (
 41 |     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
 42 |     dataset_id TEXT NOT NULL,
 43 |     name TEXT NOT NULL,
 44 |     type TEXT NOT NULL,
 45 |     sample_json TEXT NOT NULL,
 46 |     FOREIGN KEY(dataset_id) REFERENCES datasets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
 47 |   );
 48 | 
 49 |   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dataset_rows (
 50 |     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
 51 |     dataset_id TEXT NOT NULL,
 52 |     row_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
 53 |     row_json TEXT NOT NULL,
 54 |     FOREIGN KEY(dataset_id) REFERENCES datasets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
 55 |   );
 56 | 
 57 |   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_messages (
 58 |     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 59 |     dataset_id TEXT NOT NULL,
 60 |     role TEXT NOT NULL,
 61 |     content TEXT NOT NULL,
 62 |     sql_text TEXT,
 63 |     chart_json TEXT,
 64 |     insights_json TEXT,
 65 |     created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
 66 |     FOREIGN KEY(dataset_id) REFERENCES datasets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
 67 |   );
 68 | 
 69 |   CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dataset_columns_dataset_id ON dataset_columns(dataset_id);
 70 |   CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dataset_rows_dataset_id ON dataset_rows(dataset_id);
 71 |   CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chat_messages_dataset_id ON chat_messages(dataset_id);
 72 | `);
 73 | 
 74 | // Migration: Add new columns for local datasets support
 75 | try {
 76 |   db.exec("ALTER TABLE datasets ADD COLUMN is_local INTEGER DEFAULT 0");
 77 | } catch (e) {
 78 |   // Column might already exist, ignore error
 79 | }
 80 | 
 81 | try {
 82 |   db.exec("ALTER TABLE datasets ADD COLUMN local_dataset_id TEXT");
 83 | } catch (e) {
 84 |   // Column might already exist, ignore error
 85 | }
 86 | 
 87 | try {
 88 |   db.exec("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_datasets_local_id ON datasets(local_dataset_id)");
 89 | } catch (e) {
 90 |   // Index might already exist, ignore error
 91 | }
 92 | 
 93 | const parseJson = (value, fallback) => {
 94 |   if (!value) return fallback;
 95 |   try {
 96 |     return JSON.parse(value);
 97 |   } catch {
 98 |     return fallback;
 99 |   }
100 | };
101 | 
102 | const withTransaction = (work) => {
103 |   db.exec("BEGIN");
104 |   try {
105 |     const result = work();
106 |     db.exec("COMMIT");
107 |     return result;
108 |   } catch (error) {
109 |     db.exec("ROLLBACK");
110 |     throw error;
111 |   }
112 | };
113 | 
114 | const setMeta = db.prepare(`
115 |   INSERT INTO meta (key, value)
116 |   VALUES (?, ?)
117 |   ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value
118 | `);
119 | 
120 | const getMeta = db.prepare("SELECT value FROM meta WHERE key = ?");
121 | const insertDataset = db.prepare(`
122 |   INSERT INTO datasets (id, name, source_type, file_name, uploaded_at, row_count, column_count)
123 |   VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
124 | `);
125 | const insertDatasetColumn = db.prepare(`
126 |   INSERT INTO dataset_columns (dataset_id, name, type, sample_json)
127 |   VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
128 | `);
129 | const insertDatasetRow = db.prepare(`
130 |   INSERT INTO dataset_rows (dataset_id, row_index, row_json)
131 |   VALUES (?, ?, ?)
132 | `);
133 | const insertChatMessage = db.prepare(`
134 |   INSERT INTO chat_messages (id, dataset_id, role, content, sql_text, chart_json, insights_json, created_at)
135 |   VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
136 | `);
137 | const getDatasetRecord = db.prepare("SELECT * FROM datasets WHERE id = ?");
138 | const listDatasetRecords = db.prepare("SELECT * FROM datasets ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC");
139 | const getDatasetColumns = db.prepare("SELECT name, type, sample_json FROM dataset_columns WHERE dataset_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC");
140 | const getDatasetRows = db.prepare("SELECT id, row_index, row_json FROM dataset_rows WHERE dataset_id = ? ORDER BY row_index ASC");
141 | const getChatMessageRows = db.prepare("SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE dataset_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC");
142 | const getDatasetRow = db.prepare("SELECT id, row_json FROM dataset_rows WHERE dataset_id = ? AND id = ?");
143 | const updateDatasetRow = db.prepare("UPDATE dataset_rows SET row_json = ? WHERE dataset_id = ? AND id = ?");
144 | const deleteDatasetById = db.prepare("DELETE FROM datasets WHERE id = ?");
145 | 
146 | const mapDataset = (datasetRecord) => {
147 |   if (!datasetRecord) return null;
148 | 
149 |   const columns = getDatasetColumns.all(datasetRecord.id).map((column) => ({
150 |     name: column.name,
151 |     type: column.type,
152 |     sample: parseJson(column.sample_json, []),
153 |   }));
154 | 
155 |   const rows = getDatasetRows.all(datasetRecord.id).map((row) => ({
156 |     __rowId: row.id,
157 |     ...parseJson(row.row_json, {}),
158 |   }));
159 | 
160 |   return {
161 |     id: datasetRecord.id,
162 |     name: datasetRecord.name,
163 |     columns,
164 |     rows,
165 |     uploadedAt: datasetRecord.uploaded_at,
166 |     rowCount: datasetRecord.row_count,
167 |     sourceType: datasetRecord.source_type,
168 |     fileName: datasetRecord.file_name,
169 |   };
170 | };
171 | 
172 | export const createDataset = ({ name, fileName = null, columns, rows, sourceType = "upload" }) => {
173 |   const datasetId = randomUUID();
174 |   const uploadedAt = new Date().toISOString();
175 |   const cleanRows = rows.map((row) =>
176 |     Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(row).filter(([key]) => key !== "__rowId")),
177 |   );
178 | 
179 |   return withTransaction(() => {
180 |     insertDataset.run(
181 |       datasetId,
182 |       name,
183 |       sourceType,
184 |       fileName,
185 |       uploadedAt,
186 |       cleanRows.length,
187 |       columns.length,
188 |     );
189 | 
190 |     columns.forEach((column) => {
191 |       insertDatasetColumn.run(
192 |         datasetId,
193 |         column.name,
194 |         column.type,
195 |         JSON.stringify(column.sample ?? []),
196 |       );
197 |     });
198 | 
199 |     cleanRows.forEach((row, index) => {
200 |       insertDatasetRow.run(datasetId, index, JSON.stringify(row));
201 |     });
202 | 
203 |     setMeta.run("current_dataset_id", datasetId);
204 |     return getDatasetById(datasetId);
205 |   });
206 | };
207 | 
208 | export const getDatasetById = (datasetId) => {
209 |   const sqliteDataset = mapDataset(getDatasetRecord.get(datasetId));
210 |   if (sqliteDataset) return sqliteDataset;
211 | 
212 |   const e2eStore = globalThis.__INSIGHTFLOW_E2E_STORE__;
213 |   if (e2eStore && e2eStore.datasets && e2eStore.datasets.has(datasetId)) {
214 |     return e2eStore.datasets.get(datasetId);
215 |   }
216 |   return null;
217 | };
218 | 
219 | const mapDatasetLight = (datasetRecord) => {
220 |   if (!datasetRecord) return null;
221 |   return {
222 |     id: datasetRecord.id,
223 |     name: datasetRecord.name,
224 |     uploadedAt: datasetRecord.uploaded_at,
225 |     rowCount: datasetRecord.row_count,
226 |     columnCount: datasetRecord.column_count,
227 |     sourceType: datasetRecord.source_type,
228 |     fileName: datasetRecord.file_name,
229 |   };
230 | };
231 | 
232 | export const listDatasets = () => {
233 |   const persisted = listDatasetRecords.all().map(mapDatasetLight);
234 | 
235 |   const e2eStore = globalThis.__INSIGHTFLOW_E2E_STORE__;
236 |   if (e2eStore && e2eStore.datasets) {
237 |     const e2eList = Array.from(e2eStore.datasets.values()).map(d => ({
238 |       id: d.id,
239 |       name: d.name,
240 |       uploadedAt: d.createdAt || d.uploadedAt,
241 |       rowCount: d.rowCount || d.rows?.length || 0,
242 |       columnCount: d.columnCount || d.columns?.length || 0,
243 |       sourceType: d.sourceType,
244 |       fileName: d.fileName,
245 |     }));
246 |     for (const d of e2eList) {
247 |       if (!persisted.some(p => p.id === d.id)) {
248 |         persisted.push(d);
249 |       }
250 |     }
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   return persisted;
254 | };
255 | 
256 | export const getCurrentDatasetId = () => getMeta.get("current_dataset_id")?.value ?? null;
257 | 
258 | export const getCurrentDataset = () => {
259 |   const currentDatasetId = getCurrentDatasetId();
260 |   if (currentDatasetId) {
261 |     const d = getDatasetById(currentDatasetId);
262 |     if (d) return d;
263 |   }
264 | 
265 |   const e2eStore = globalThis.__INSIGHTFLOW_E2E_STORE__;
266 |   if (e2eStore && e2eStore.currentDatasetId) {
267 |     return getDatasetById(e2eStore.currentDatasetId);
268 |   }
269 | 
270 |   return null;
271 | };
272 | 
273 | export const getChatMessages = (datasetId) =>
274 |   getChatMessageRows.all(datasetId).map((message) => ({
275 |     id: message.id,
276 |     role: message.role,
277 |     content: message.content,
278 |     sql: message.sql_text ?? undefined,
279 |     chart: parseJson(message.chart_json, undefined),
280 |     insights: parseJson(message.insights_json, []),
281 |     timestamp: message.created_at,
282 |   }));
283 | 
284 | export const saveChatMessages = (datasetId, messages) => {
285 |   withTransaction(() => {
286 |     setMeta.run("current_dataset_id", datasetId);
287 | 
288 |     messages.forEach((message) => {
289 |       insertChatMessage.run(
290 |         message.id,
291 |         datasetId,
292 |         message.role,
293 |         message.content,
294 |         message.sql ?? null,
295 |         message.chart ? JSON.stringify(message.chart) : null,
296 |         message.insights ? JSON.stringify(message.insights) : null,
297 |         message.timestamp,
298 |       );
299 |     });
300 |   });
301 | };
302 | 
303 | export const saveChatMessage = (datasetId, message) => {
304 |   saveChatMessages(datasetId, [message]);
305 | };
306 | 
307 | export const clearChatMessages = (datasetId) => {
308 |   db.prepare("DELETE FROM chat_messages WHERE dataset_id = ?").run(datasetId);
309 | };
310 | 
311 | export const patchDatasetRow = ({ datasetId, rowId, column, value }) => {
312 |   const existingRow = getDatasetRow.get(datasetId, rowId);
313 |   if (!existingRow) {
314 |     return null;
315 |   }
316 | 
317 |   const nextRow = {
318 |     ...parseJson(existingRow.row_json, {}),
319 |     [column]: value,
320 |   };
321 | 
322 |   updateDatasetRow.run(JSON.stringify(nextRow), datasetId, rowId);
323 |   return getDatasetById(datasetId);
324 | };
325 | 
326 | export const deleteDataset = (datasetId) => {
327 |   const existing = getDatasetRecord.get(datasetId);
328 |   if (!existing) {
329 |     return false;
330 |   }
331 | 
332 |   withTransaction(() => {
333 |     deleteDatasetById.run(datasetId);
334 |     if (getCurrentDatasetId() === datasetId) {
335 |       setMeta.run("current_dataset_id", "");
336 |     }
337 |   });
338 | 
339 |   return true;
340 | };
341 | 
342 | export const getDatabasePath = () => databasePath;
343 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/genai/analyticsEngine.ts

Source path: `apps/backend/src/genai/analyticsEngine.ts`

```ts
  1 | import { GoogleGenerativeAI } from "@google/generative-ai";
  2 | import axios from "axios";
  3 | 
  4 | interface Dataset {
  5 |   columns: string[];
  6 |   data: Record<string, unknown>[];
  7 |   metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
  8 | }
  9 | 
 10 | interface SemanticSchema {
 11 |   dataset_domain: string;
 12 |   fact_entity: string;
 13 |   dimensions: string[];
 14 |   measures: string[];
 15 |   geo_dimensions: string[];
 16 |   time_columns: string[];
 17 |   recommended_kpis: KPI[];
 18 |   recommended_visualizations: Visualization[];
 19 | }
 20 | 
 21 | interface KPI {
 22 |   name: string;
 23 |   description: string;
 24 |   formula?: string;
 25 |   business_value: string;
 26 | }
 27 | 
 28 | interface Visualization {
 29 |   type: string;
 30 |   title: string;
 31 |   dimensions: string[];
 32 |   measures: string[];
 33 |   insight: string;
 34 | }
 35 | 
 36 | interface Dashboard {
 37 |   title: string;
 38 |   domain: string;
 39 |   kpis: KPI[];
 40 |   charts: Visualization[];
 41 |   insights: string[];
 42 |   layout: Record<string, unknown>;
 43 |   filters: Record<string, unknown>[];
 44 |   recommendations: string[];
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | interface AIInsight {
 48 |   type: string;
 49 |   insight: string;
 50 |   data_points: Record<string, unknown>;
 51 |   business_impact: string;
 52 |   business_value?: string;
 53 | }
 54 | 
 55 | enum AIProvider {
 56 |   GEMINI = "gemini",
 57 |   OLLAMA = "ollama",
 58 |   NONE = "none",
 59 | }
 60 | 
 61 | class AIClient {
 62 |   private genAI: GoogleGenerativeAI | null = null;
 63 |   private ollamaUrl: string = "http://localhost:11434";
 64 |   private ollamaModel: string = "llama3.2";
 65 |   private ollamaAvailable: boolean = false;
 66 |   private activeProvider: AIProvider = AIProvider.NONE;
 67 |   private fallbackChain: AIProvider[] = [];
 68 | 
 69 |   constructor() {
 70 |     this.initializeProviders();
 71 |   }
 72 | 
 73 |   private initializeProviders() {
 74 |     const googleKey = process.env.GOOGLE_API_KEY || "";
 75 | 
 76 |     this.fallbackChain = [];
 77 | 
 78 |     // Initialize Ollama (local AI - PRIMARY)
 79 |     this.ollamaUrl = process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
 80 |     this.ollamaModel = process.env.OLLAMA_MODEL || "llama3.2";
 81 |     
 82 |     // Test Ollama connection and add to chain
 83 |     this.testOllamaConnection().then(() => {
 84 |       if (this.ollamaAvailable && !this.fallbackChain.includes(AIProvider.OLLAMA)) {
 85 |         this.fallbackChain.unshift(AIProvider.OLLAMA); // Add as PRIMARY
 86 |         this.activeProvider = AIProvider.OLLAMA;
 87 |         console.log("🔄 Primary AI Provider: OLLAMA (Local)");
 88 |       }
 89 |     }).catch(() => {});
 90 | 
 91 |     // Initialize Gemini (cloud - FALLBACK)
 92 |     if (googleKey) {
 93 |       try {
 94 |         this.genAI = new GoogleGenerativeAI(googleKey);
 95 |         this.fallbackChain.push(AIProvider.GEMINI); // Add as fallback
 96 |         console.log("✅ Google Gemini AI initialized (Fallback)");
 97 |       } catch (e) {
 98 |         console.warn("⚠️ Failed to initialize Gemini:", e);
 99 |       }
100 |     } else {
101 |       console.warn("⚠️ GOOGLE_API_KEY not found - Using Local AI only");
102 |     }
103 | 
104 |     if (this.fallbackChain.length === 0) {
105 |       console.error("❌ No AI provider available! Please start Ollama or set GOOGLE_API_KEY.");
106 |     } else if (this.activeProvider === AIProvider.NONE && this.fallbackChain.length > 0) {
107 |       this.activeProvider = this.fallbackChain[0];
108 |       console.log(`🔄 Primary AI Provider: ${this.activeProvider}`);
109 |     }
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   async generateContent(prompt: string, systemPrompt?: string): Promise<string> {
113 |     let lastError: Error | null = null;
114 | 
115 |     for (let i = 0; i < this.fallbackChain.length; i++) {
116 |       const provider = this.fallbackChain[i];
117 | 
118 |       try {
119 |         let result: string;
120 | 
121 |         switch (provider) {
122 |           case AIProvider.GEMINI:
123 |             result = await this.generateWithGemini(prompt);
124 |             break;
125 |           case AIProvider.OLLAMA:
126 |             result = await this.generateWithOllama(prompt, systemPrompt);
127 |             break;
128 |           default:
129 |             continue;
130 |         }
131 | 
132 |         this.activeProvider = provider;
133 |         return result;
134 |       } catch (e: any) {
135 |         console.warn(`⚠️ ${provider} failed: ${e.message}`);
136 |         lastError = e;
137 |         this.activeProvider = this.fallbackChain[i + 1] || AIProvider.NONE;
138 |       }
139 |     }
140 | 
141 |     throw new Error(
142 |       `All AI providers failed. Last error: ${lastError?.message || "Unknown error"}`
143 |     );
144 |   }
145 | 
146 |   private async generateWithGemini(prompt: string): Promise<string> {
147 |     if (!this.genAI) throw new Error("Gemini not initialized");
148 |     const model = this.genAI.getGenerativeModel({ model: "gemini-1.5-pro" });
149 |     const result = await model.generateContent(prompt);
150 |     return result.response.text();
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   private async generateWithOllama(
154 |     prompt: string,
155 |     systemPrompt?: string
156 |   ): Promise<string> {
157 |     if (!this.ollamaUrl) throw new Error("Ollama not initialized");
158 | 
159 |     const messages: any[] = [];
160 |     if (systemPrompt) {
161 |       messages.push({ role: "system", content: systemPrompt });
162 |     }
163 |     messages.push({ role: "user", content: prompt });
164 | 
165 |     const response = await axios.post(`${this.ollamaUrl}/api/chat`, {
166 |       model: this.ollamaModel,
167 |       messages,
168 |       stream: false,
169 |       options: {
170 |         temperature: 0.7,
171 |         num_predict: 4000,
172 |       },
173 |     }, {
174 |       timeout: 60000,
175 |       headers: {
176 |         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
177 |       },
178 |     });
179 | 
180 |     return response.data.message?.content || "";
181 |   }
182 | 
183 |   getActiveProvider(): string {
184 |     return this.activeProvider;
185 |   }
186 | 
187 |   isAvailable(): boolean {
188 |     return this.activeProvider !== AIProvider.NONE;
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   private async testOllamaConnection() {
192 |     try {
193 |       const response = await axios.get(`${this.ollamaUrl}/api/tags`, { timeout: 5000 });
194 |       if (response.status === 200) {
195 |         this.ollamaAvailable = true;
196 |         console.log(`✅ Ollama initialized with model: ${this.ollamaModel}`);
197 |       }
198 |     } catch (e) {
199 |       this.ollamaAvailable = false;
200 |       console.warn(`⚠️ Ollama not available at ${this.ollamaUrl} - Using Gemini only`);
201 |     }
202 |   }
203 | }
204 | 
205 | let aiClient: AIClient;
206 | 
207 | function getAIClient(): AIClient {
208 |   if (!aiClient) {
209 |     aiClient = new AIClient();
210 |   }
211 |   return aiClient;
212 | }
213 | 
214 | export class AnalyticsEngine {
215 |   private model: AIClient;
216 | 
217 |   constructor() {
218 |     this.model = getAIClient();
219 |   }
220 | 
221 |   async analyzeDatasetStructure(dataset: Dataset): Promise<SemanticSchema> {
222 |     if (!this.model.isAvailable()) {
223 |       return this.getFallbackSchema(dataset);
224 |     }
225 | 
226 |     const dataPreview = JSON.stringify(dataset.data.slice(0, 5), null, 2);
227 |     const columnInfo = dataset.columns.map((col) => ({
228 |       name: col,
229 |       sample_values: dataset.data
230 |         .slice(0, 3)
231 |         .map((row: Record<string, unknown>) => row[col]),
232 |     }));
233 | 
234 |     const prompt = `
235 | Analyze this dataset and generate a semantic schema for analytics:
236 | 
237 | Columns: ${JSON.stringify(columnInfo)}
238 | Data Preview: ${dataPreview}
239 | 
240 | Respond with ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):
241 | {
242 |   "dataset_domain": "business domain",
243 |   "fact_entity": "main fact table entity",
244 |   "dimensions": ["list of dimension columns"],
245 |   "measures": ["list of numeric measure columns"],
246 |   "geo_dimensions": ["geographic columns if any"],
247 |   "time_columns": ["time-based columns if any"],
248 |   "recommended_kpis": [
249 |     {
250 |       "name": "KPI name",
251 |       "description": "business meaning",
252 |       "formula": "how to calculate",
253 |       "business_value": "why it matters"
254 |     }
255 |   ],
256 |   "recommended_visualizations": [
257 |     {
258 |       "type": "chart type",
259 |       "title": "chart title",
260 |       "dimensions": ["dimension1"],
261 |       "measures": ["measure1"],
262 |       "insight": "what this shows"
263 |     }
264 |   ]
265 | }`;
266 | 
267 |     const response = await this.model.generateContent(prompt);
268 |     const jsonMatch = response.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
269 |     if (!jsonMatch) {
270 |       return this.getFallbackSchema(dataset);
271 |     }
272 | 
273 |     return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
274 |   }
275 | 
276 |   async generateKPIs(schema: SemanticSchema, dataset: Dataset): Promise<KPI[]> {
277 |     if (!this.model.isAvailable()) {
278 |       return this.getFallbackKPIs(dataset);
279 |     }
280 | 
281 |     const dataStats = this.calculateDataStatistics(dataset);
282 | 
283 |     const prompt = `
284 | Given this analytics schema and dataset statistics, generate ONLY high-value business KPIs:
285 | 
286 | Schema Domain: ${schema.dataset_domain}
287 | Measures: ${schema.measures.join(", ")}
288 | Dimensions: ${schema.dimensions.join(", ")}
289 | Statistics: ${JSON.stringify(dataStats)}
290 | 
291 | Generate 8-12 meaningful KPIs that represent real business value.
292 | Never include generic metrics like "Row Count" or "Total Records".
293 | 
294 | Respond with ONLY valid JSON array (no markdown, no explanation):
295 | [
296 |   {
297 |     "name": "KPI name",
298 |     "description": "what it measures",
299 |     "formula": "how to calculate it",
300 |     "business_value": "why it matters for decision making"
301 |   }
302 | ]`;
303 | 
304 |     const response = await this.model.generateContent(prompt);
305 |     const jsonMatch = response.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
306 |     if (!jsonMatch) return this.getFallbackKPIs(dataset);
307 | 
308 |     return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
309 |   }
310 | 
311 |   async generateVisualizations(
312 |     schema: SemanticSchema,
313 |     dataset: Dataset
314 |   ): Promise<Visualization[]> {
315 |     if (!this.model.isAvailable()) {
316 |       return this.getFallbackVisualizations(schema);
317 |     }
318 | 
319 |     const correlationAnalysis = this.analyzeCorrelations(dataset, schema);
320 | 
321 |     const prompt = `
322 | Generate 15-18 professional data visualizations for an enterprise analytics dashboard.
323 | 
324 | Dataset Domain: ${schema.dataset_domain}
325 | Dimensions: ${schema.dimensions.join(", ")}
326 | Measures: ${schema.measures.join(", ")}
327 | Correlations: ${JSON.stringify(correlationAnalysis)}
328 | 
329 | Rules:
330 | - Never duplicate chart types or dimensions
331 | - Each chart must have clear business purpose
332 | - Use appropriate chart types for data relationships
333 | - Include trend, comparison, composition, and correlation visualizations
334 | - Generate actionable insights for each chart
335 | 
336 | Respond with ONLY valid JSON array (no markdown):
337 | [
338 |   {
339 |     "type": "chart type (bar/line/scatter/heatmap/etc)",
340 |     "title": "descriptive title",
341 |     "dimensions": ["dimension names"],
342 |     "measures": ["measure names"],
343 |     "aggregation": "SUM/AVG/COUNT/etc",
344 |     "insight": "business insight this chart reveals"
345 |   }
346 | ]`;
347 | 
348 |     const response = await this.model.generateContent(prompt);
349 |     const jsonMatch = response.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
350 |     if (!jsonMatch) return this.getFallbackVisualizations(schema);
351 | 
352 |     return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
353 |   }
354 | 
355 |   async buildExecutiveDashboard(
356 |     schema: SemanticSchema,
357 |     kpis: KPI[],
358 |     visualizations: Visualization[]
359 |   ): Promise<Dashboard> {
360 |     if (!this.model.isAvailable()) {
361 |       return {
362 |         title: "Executive Dashboard",
363 |         domain: schema.dataset_domain,
364 |         kpis: kpis.slice(0, 8),
365 |         charts: visualizations.slice(0, 12),
366 |         insights: [],
367 |         layout: { sections: ["Executive Overview", "Analytics"] },
368 |         filters: [],
369 |         recommendations: [],
370 |       };
371 |     }
372 | 
373 |     const prompt = `
374 | Create an executive-grade analytics dashboard structure:
375 | 
376 | Domain: ${schema.dataset_domain}
377 | KPIs: ${JSON.stringify(kpis.slice(0, 8))}
378 | Charts: ${JSON.stringify(visualizations.slice(0, 6))}
379 | 
380 | Dashboard should include:
381 | - Executive summary section
382 | - 6-8 top KPI cards
383 | - 10-12 strategic visualizations
384 | - Trend analysis
385 | - Comparative analytics
386 | - Anomaly alerts
387 | - Business recommendations
388 | 
389 | Respond with ONLY valid JSON (no markdown):
390 | {

392 |   "domain": "business domain",
393 |   "layout": {
394 |     "sections": ["Executive Overview", "KPI Summary", "Trend Analytics", "Comparative Analytics"]
395 |   },

397 |   "insights": ["key insight 1", "key insight 2"],
398 |   "recommendations": ["action recommendation 1"]
399 | }`;
400 | 
401 |     const response = await this.model.generateContent(prompt);
402 |     const jsonMatch = response.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);

404 |       return {
405 |         title: "Executive Dashboard",

407 |         kpis: kpis.slice(0, 8),

410 |         layout: { sections: ["Executive Overview", "Analytics"] },
411 |         filters: [],
412 |         recommendations: [],
413 |       };
414 |     }
415 | 
416 |     const dashboardConfig = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
417 |     return {
418 |       title: dashboardConfig.title || "Executive Dashboard",
419 |       domain: schema.dataset_domain,

429 |   async generateAIInsights(
430 |     schema: SemanticSchema,

456 |     "type": "trend/anomaly/correlation/opportunity",
457 |     "insight": "the insight statement",
458 |     "data_points": {"key": "value"},
459 |     "business_impact": "why this matters"
460 |   }
461 | ]`;
462 | 
463 |     const response = await this.model.generateContent(prompt);
464 |     const jsonMatch = response.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
465 |     if (!jsonMatch) return this.getFallbackInsights(dataset);

470 |   async respondToAnalyticsQuery(
471 |     query: string,
472 |     schema: SemanticSchema,
473 |     dataset: Dataset
474 |   ): Promise<{
475 |     response: string;
476 |     charts?: Visualization[];
477 |     filtered_data?: Record<string, unknown>[];
478 |   }> {
479 |     const dataStats = this.calculateDataStatistics(dataset);
480 | 
481 |     if (!this.model.isAvailable()) {
482 |       return {
483 |         response: "AI service unavailable. Please configure an API key (GOOGLE_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).",
484 |         charts: [],
485 |       };
486 |     }
487 | 
488 |     const prompt = `
489 | You are an enterprise analytics assistant. Answer this analytics query about the dataset:
490 | 
491 | Query: "${query}"
492 | Domain: ${schema.dataset_domain}
493 | Available Dimensions: ${schema.dimensions.join(", ")}
494 | Available Measures: ${schema.measures.join(", ")}
495 | Dataset Stats: ${JSON.stringify(dataStats)}
496 | 
497 | Provide:
498 | 1. Direct answer to the query
499 | 2. Relevant insights
500 | 3. Recommended visualizations if applicable
501 | 
502 | Respond in JSON format:
503 | {
504 |   "response": "your analysis and answer",
505 |   "recommended_charts": [{"type": "...", "title": "...", "insight": "..."}],
506 |   "key_metrics": {"metric_name": "value"}
507 | }`;
508 | 
509 |     const response = await this.model.generateContent(prompt);
510 |     const jsonMatch = response.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
511 | 
512 |     if (!jsonMatch) {
513 |       return {
514 |         response: response,
515 |         charts: [],
516 |       };
517 |     }
518 | 
519 |     return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
520 |   }
521 | 
522 |   private getFallbackSchema(dataset: Dataset): SemanticSchema {
523 |     const columns = dataset.columns;
524 |     const numericCols = columns.filter((col) =>
525 |       dataset.data.some((row) => typeof row[col] === "number")
526 |     );
527 |     const stringCols = columns.filter(
528 |       (col) => !numericCols.includes(col)
529 |     );
530 | 
531 |     return {
532 |       dataset_domain: "Analytics Dataset",
533 |       fact_entity: "Records",
534 |       dimensions: stringCols.slice(0, 5),
535 |       measures: numericCols.slice(0, 5),
536 |       geo_dimensions: [],
537 |       time_columns: columns.filter(
538 |         (c) => c.toLowerCase().includes("date") || c.toLowerCase().includes("time")
539 |       ),
540 |       recommended_kpis: [],
541 |       recommended_visualizations: [],
542 |     };
543 |   }
544 | 
545 |   private getFallbackKPIs(dataset: Dataset): KPI[] {
546 |     const stats = this.calculateDataStatistics(dataset);
547 |     const kpis: KPI[] = [];
548 | 
549 |     for (const key of Object.keys(stats)) {
550 |       if (key.endsWith("_avg")) {
551 |         const col = key.replace("_avg", "");
552 |         kpis.push({
553 |           name: `Average ${col}`,
554 |           description: `Mean value of ${col}`,
555 |           formula: `AVG(${col})`,
556 |           business_value: "Basic statistical measure",
557 |         });
558 |       }
559 |       if (kpis.length >= 8) break;
560 |     }
561 | 
562 |     if (kpis.length === 0) {
563 |       return [
564 |         { name: "Total Records", description: "Total number of records", business_value: "Data volume metric" },
565 |         { name: "Unique Values", description: "Count of unique entries", business_value: "Data diversity metric" },
566 |       ];
567 |     }
568 | 
569 |     return kpis;
570 |   }
571 | 
572 |   private getFallbackVisualizations(schema: SemanticSchema): Visualization[] {
573 |     const viz: Visualization[] = [];
574 | 
575 |     for (const measure of schema.measures.slice(0, 4)) {
576 |       viz.push({
577 |         type: "bar",
578 |         title: `${measure} Distribution`,
579 |         dimensions: schema.dimensions.slice(0, 2),
580 |         measures: [measure],
581 |         insight: "Shows distribution across categories",
582 |       });
583 |     }
584 | 
585 |     if (schema.time_columns.length > 0) {
586 |       viz.push({
587 |         type: "line",
588 |         title: "Trend Over Time",
589 |         dimensions: schema.time_columns,
590 |         measures: schema.measures.slice(0, 2),
591 |         insight: "Shows temporal trends",
592 |       });
593 |     }
594 | 
595 |     return viz.length > 0 ? viz : [
596 |       { type: "table", title: "Data Overview", dimensions: schema.dimensions.slice(0, 3), measures: schema.measures.slice(0, 2), insight: "Raw data view" }
597 |     ];
598 |   }
599 | 
600 |   private getFallbackInsights(dataset: Dataset): AIInsight[] {
601 |     const stats = this.calculateDataStatistics(dataset);
602 |     const insights: AIInsight[] = [];
603 | 
604 |     for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(stats)) {
605 |       if (key.endsWith("_avg") && typeof value === "number") {
606 |         insights.push({
607 |           type: "trend",
608 |           insight: `Average ${key.replace("_avg", "")} is ${value.toFixed(2)}`,
609 |           data_points: { [key]: value },
610 |           business_value: "Statistical summary",
611 |           business_impact: "Provides baseline metrics for analysis",
612 |         });
613 |       }
614 |       if (insights.length >= 5) break;
615 |     }
616 | 
617 |     return insights.length > 0 ? insights : [
618 |       { type: "opportunity", insight: "Configure AI API keys for intelligent insights", data_points: {}, business_impact: "Enhanced analytics" }
619 |     ];
620 |   }
621 | 
622 |   private calculateDataStatistics(dataset: Dataset): Record<string, unknown> {
623 |     const stats: Record<string, unknown> = {};
624 | 
625 |     for (const col of dataset.columns) {
626 |       const values = dataset.data.map((row) => row[col]);
627 |       const numericValues = values
628 |         .filter((v) => typeof v === "number")
629 |         .sort((a: number, b: number) => a - b);
630 | 
631 |       if (numericValues.length > 0) {
632 |         const sum = numericValues.reduce((a, b) => (a as number) + (b as number), 0);
633 |         stats[`${col}_avg`] = (sum as number) / numericValues.length;
634 |         stats[`${col}_min`] = numericValues[0];
635 |         stats[`${col}_max`] = numericValues[numericValues.length - 1];
636 |         stats[`${col}_count`] = numericValues.length;
637 |       } else {
638 |         const uniqueCount = new Set(values).size;
639 |         stats[`${col}_unique`] = uniqueCount;
640 |       }
641 |     }
642 | 
643 |     return stats;
644 |   }
645 | 
646 |   private analyzeCorrelations(
647 |     dataset: Dataset,
648 |     schema: SemanticSchema
649 |   ): Record<string, number> {
650 |     const correlations: Record<string, number> = {};
651 |     const measures = schema.measures;
652 | 
653 |     if (measures.length >= 2) {
654 |       for (let i = 0; i < measures.length; i++) {
655 |         for (let j = i + 1; j < measures.length; j++) {
656 |           const measure1 = measures[i];
657 |           const measure2 = measures[j];
658 |           const values1 = dataset.data.map((row) => row[measure1] as number);
659 |           const values2 = dataset.data.map((row) => row[measure2] as number);
660 | 
661 |           const correlation = this.calculatePearsonCorrelation(values1, values2);
662 |           if (!isNaN(correlation)) {
663 |             correlations[`${measure1}_vs_${measure2}`] = Math.round(correlation * 100) / 100;
664 |           }
665 |         }
666 |       }
667 |     }
668 | 
669 |     return correlations;
670 |   }
671 | 
672 |   private calculatePearsonCorrelation(
673 |     x: number[],
674 |     y: number[]
675 |   ): number {
676 |     if (x.length !== y.length) return 0;
677 | 
678 |     const n = x.length;
679 |     const mean_x = x.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / n;
680 |     const mean_y = y.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / n;
681 | 
682 |     let numerator = 0;
683 |     let denominator_x = 0;
684 |     let denominator_y = 0;
685 | 
686 |     for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
687 |       const dx = x[i] - mean_x;
688 |       const dy = y[i] - mean_y;
689 |       numerator += dx * dy;
690 |       denominator_x += dx * dx;
691 |       denominator_y += dy * dy;
692 |     }
693 | 
694 |     const denominator = Math.sqrt(denominator_x * denominator_y);
695 |     return denominator === 0 ? 0 : numerator / denominator;
696 |   }
697 | 
698 |   private detectOutliers(
699 |     dataset: Dataset,
700 |     schema: SemanticSchema
701 |   ): Record<string, unknown>[] {
702 |     const outliers: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
703 | 
704 |     for (const measure of schema.measures) {
705 |       const values = dataset.data
706 |         .map((row) => row[measure] as number)
707 |         .filter((v) => typeof v === "number");
708 | 
709 |       if (values.length < 4) continue;
710 | 
711 |       values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
712 |       const q1 = values[Math.floor(values.length * 0.25)];
713 |       const q3 = values[Math.floor(values.length * 0.75)];
714 |       const iqr = q3 - q1;
715 |       const lowerBound = q1 - 1.5 * iqr;
716 |       const upperBound = q3 + 1.5 * iqr;
717 | 
718 |       dataset.data.forEach((row) => {
719 |         const value = row[measure] as number;
720 |         if (value < lowerBound || value > upperBound) {
721 |           outliers.push({
722 |             measure,
723 |             value,
724 |             type: value < lowerBound ? "low" : "high",
725 |           });
726 |         }
727 |       });
728 |     }
729 | 
730 |     return outliers;
731 |   }
732 | }
733 | 
734 | export default AnalyticsEngine;
```

 6 | }

 8 | interface DashboardRequest {

12 | }
13 | 
14 | export class DashboardBuilder {

16 | 
17 |   constructor() {

20 | 
21 |   async createDashboard(request: DashboardRequest) {
22 |     console.log("🚀 Initializing Dashboard Generation Pipeline...");
23 | 
24 |     // Step 1: Analyze Dataset
25 |     console.log("📊 Step 1: Analyzing dataset structure...");
26 |     const schema = await this.analyticsEngine.analyzeDatasetStructure(request.dataset);
27 |     console.log("✅ Schema Generated:", schema.dataset_domain);
28 | 
29 |     // Step 2: Generate KPIs
30 |     console.log("📈 Step 2: Generating KPIs...");
31 |     const kpis = await this.analyticsEngine.generateKPIs(schema, request.dataset);
32 |     console.log(`✅ Generated ${kpis.length} KPIs`);
33 | 
34 |     // Step 3: Generate Visualizations
35 |     console.log("📊 Step 3: Generating visualizations...");
36 |     const visualizations = await this.analyticsEngine.generateVisualizations(
37 |       schema,
38 |       request.dataset
39 |     );
40 |     console.log(`✅ Generated ${visualizations.length} charts`);
41 | 
42 |     // Step 4: Build Dashboard
43 |     console.log("🎨 Step 4: Building executive dashboard...");
44 |     const dashboard = await this.analyticsEngine.buildExecutiveDashboard(
45 |       schema,
46 |       kpis,
47 |       visualizations
48 |     );
49 |     console.log("✅ Dashboard structure created");
50 | 
51 |     // Step 5: Generate AI Insights
52 |     console.log("🧠 Step 5: Generating AI insights...");
53 |     const insights = await this.analyticsEngine.generateAIInsights(schema, request.dataset);
54 |     console.log(`✅ Generated ${insights.length} insights`);
55 | 
56 |     return {
57 |       dashboard,
58 |       schema,
59 |       kpis,
60 |       visualizations,
61 |       insights,
62 |       metadata: {
63 |         created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
64 |         dataset_rows: request.dataset.data.length,
65 |         dataset_columns: request.dataset.columns.length,
66 |       },
67 |     };
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   async queryDataset(
71 |     query: string,
72 |     schema: Record<string, unknown>,
73 |     dataset: Dataset
74 |   ) {
75 |     console.log(`🤖 Processing query: "${query}"`);
76 |     return this.analyticsEngine.respondToAnalyticsQuery(
77 |       query,
78 |       schema as unknown as Parameters<typeof this.analyticsEngine.respondToAnalyticsQuery>[1],
79 |       dataset
80 |     );
81 |   }
82 | }
83 | 
84 | export default DashboardBuilder;
85 |

### FILE: apps/backend/src/genai/reportGenerator.ts

```ts
  1 | import PDFDocument from "pdfkit";
  2 | import { Workbook } from "exceljs";
  3 | import * as fs from "fs";
  4 | 
  5 | interface ReportData {
  6 |   dashboard: Record<string, unknown>;
  7 |   schema: Record<string, unknown>;
  8 |   kpis: Record<string, unknown>[];
  9 |   visualizations: Record<string, unknown>[];
 10 |   insights: Record<string, unknown>[];
 11 | }
 12 | 
 13 | export class ReportGenerator {
 14 |   async generatePDFReport(
 15 |     data: ReportData,
 16 |     filename: string = "analytics-report.pdf"
 17 |   ): Promise<string> {
 18 |     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 19 |       const doc = new PDFDocument();
 20 |       const stream = fs.createWriteStream(filename);
 21 | 
 22 |       doc.pipe(stream);
 23 | 
 24 |       // Title
 25 |       doc
 26 |         .fontSize(24)
 27 |         .font("Helvetica-Bold")
 28 |         .text("Enterprise Analytics Report", 100, 100);
 29 | 
 30 |       // Generated Date
 31 |       doc
 32 |         .fontSize(10)
 33 |         .font("Helvetica")
 34 |         .text(`Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 100, 140);
 35 | 
 36 |       // Executive Summary
 37 |       doc.fontSize(16).font("Helvetica-Bold").text("Executive Summary", 100, 180);
 38 |       doc
 39 |         .fontSize(11)
 40 |         .font("Helvetica")
 41 |         .text(
 42 |           (data.dashboard as Record<string, unknown>).title ||
 43 |             "Analytics Dashboard",
 44 |           100,
 45 |           210
 46 |         );
 47 | 
 48 |       // KPIs Section
 49 |       let yPos = 260;
 50 |       doc.fontSize(14).font("Helvetica-Bold").text("Key Performance Indicators", 100, yPos);
 51 |       yPos += 40;
 52 | 
 53 |       (data.kpis as Record<string, unknown>[]).slice(0, 8).forEach((kpi) => {
 54 |         const kpiData = kpi as Record<string, unknown>;
 55 |         doc
 56 |           .fontSize(10)
 57 |           .font("Helvetica-Bold")
 58 |           .text(`• ${kpiData.name}`, 120, yPos);
 59 |         doc
 60 |           .fontSize(9)
 61 |           .font("Helvetica")
 62 |           .text(`  ${kpiData.description}`, 130, yPos + 15);
 63 |         yPos += 40;
 64 | 
 65 |         if (yPos > 750) {
 66 |           doc.addPage();
 67 |           yPos = 50;
 68 |         }
 69 |       });
 70 | 
 71 |       // Insights Section
 72 |       yPos += 20;
 73 |       doc.fontSize(14).font("Helvetica-Bold").text("AI-Generated Insights", 100, yPos);
 74 |       yPos += 40;
 75 | 
 76 |       (data.insights as Record<string, unknown>[]).slice(0, 10).forEach((insight) => {
 77 |         const insightData = insight as Record<string, unknown>;
 78 |         doc
 79 |           .fontSize(10)
 80 |           .font("Helvetica")
 81 |           .text(`• ${insightData.insight}`, 120, yPos);
 82 |         yPos += 30;
 83 | 
 84 |         if (yPos > 750) {
 85 |           doc.addPage();
 86 |           yPos = 50;
 87 |         }
 88 |       });
 89 | 
 90 |       doc.end();
 91 | 
 92 |       stream.on("finish", () => resolve(filename));
 93 |       stream.on("error", reject);
 94 |     });
 95 |   }
 96 | 
 97 |   async generateExcelReport(
 98 |     data: ReportData,
 99 |     filename: string = "analytics-report.xlsx"
100 |   ): Promise<string> {
101 |     const workbook = new Workbook();
102 | 
103 |     // KPIs Sheet
104 |     const kpiSheet = workbook.addWorksheet("KPIs");
105 |     kpiSheet.columns = [
106 |       { header: "KPI Name", key: "name", width: 25 },
107 |       { header: "Description", key: "description", width: 40 },
108 |       { header: "Formula", key: "formula", width: 30 },
109 |       { header: "Business Value", key: "business_value", width: 35 },
110 |     ];
111 | 
112 |     (data.kpis as Record<string, unknown>[]).forEach((kpi) => {
113 |       kpiSheet.addRow(kpi);
114 |     });
115 | 
116 |     // Insights Sheet
117 |     const insightSheet = workbook.addWorksheet("Insights");
118 |     insightSheet.columns = [
119 |       { header: "Type", key: "type", width: 15 },
120 |       { header: "Insight", key: "insight", width: 50 },
121 |       { header: "Business Impact", key: "business_impact", width: 40 },
122 |     ];
123 | 
124 |     (data.insights as Record<string, unknown>[]).forEach((insight) => {
125 |       insightSheet.addRow(insight);
126 |     });
127 | 
128 |     // Visualizations Sheet
129 |     const vizSheet = workbook.addWorksheet("Visualizations");
130 |     vizSheet.columns = [
131 |       { header: "Chart Type", key: "type", width: 15 },
132 |       { header: "Title", key: "title", width: 30 },
133 |       { header: "Dimensions", key: "dimensions", width: 25 },
134 |       { header: "Measures", key: "measures", width: 25 },
135 |       { header: "Insight", key: "insight", width: 40 },
136 |     ];
137 | 
138 |     (data.visualizations as Record<string, unknown>[]).forEach((viz) => {
139 |       vizSheet.addRow(viz);
140 |     });
141 | 
142 |     // Metadata Sheet
143 |     const metaSheet = workbook.addWorksheet("Metadata");
144 |     metaSheet.columns = [
145 |       { header: "Property", key: "property", width: 25 },
146 |       { header: "Value", key: "value", width: 50 },
147 |     ];
148 | 
149 |     metaSheet.addRow({
150 |       property: "Generated At",
151 |       value: new Date().toISOString(),
152 |     });
153 |     metaSheet.addRow({
154 |       property: "Dataset Domain",
155 |       value: (data.schema as Record<string, unknown>).dataset_domain,
156 |     });
157 | 
158 |     await workbook.xlsx.writeFile(filename);
159 |     return filename;
160 |   }
161 | 
162 |   async generateMarkdownReport(
163 |     data: ReportData,
164 |     filename: string = "analytics-report.md"
165 |   ): Promise<string> {
166 |     let markdown = "# Enterprise Analytics Report\n\n";
167 | 
168 |     markdown += `**Generated:** ${new Date().toLocaleString()}\n\n`;
169 | 
170 |     markdown += `## Executive Summary\n\n${(data.dashboard as Record<string, unknown>).title || "Analytics Dashboard"}\n\n`;
171 | 
172 |     markdown += "## Key Performance Indicators\n\n";
173 |     (data.kpis as Record<string, unknown>[]).slice(0, 8).forEach((kpi) => {
174 |       const kpiData = kpi as Record<string, unknown>;
175 |       markdown += `### ${kpiData.name}\n`;
176 |       markdown += `**Description:** ${kpiData.description}\n\n`;
177 |       markdown += `**Formula:** ${kpiData.formula || "N/A"}\n\n`;
178 |       markdown += `**Business Value:** ${kpiData.business_value}\n\n`;
179 |     });
180 | 
181 |     markdown += "## AI-Generated Insights\n\n";
182 |     (data.insights as Record<string, unknown>[]).forEach((insight) => {
183 |       const insightData = insight as Record<string, unknown>;
184 |       markdown += `- **${insightData.type}:** ${insightData.insight}\n`;
185 |       markdown += `  *Impact: ${insightData.business_impact}*\n\n`;
186 |     });
187 | 
188 |     markdown += "## Visualizations\n\n";
189 |     (data.visualizations as Record<string, unknown>[]).slice(0, 12).forEach((viz) => {
190 |       const vizData = viz as Record<string, unknown>;
191 |       markdown += `### ${vizData.title}\n`;
192 |       markdown += `**Type:** ${vizData.type}\n`;
193 |       markdown += `**Dimensions:** ${(vizData.dimensions as string[]).join(", ")}\n`;
194 |       markdown += `**Measures:** ${(vizData.measures as string[]).join(", ")}\n`;
195 |       markdown += `**Insight:** ${vizData.insight}\n\n`;
196 |     });
197 | 
198 |     fs.writeFileSync(filename, markdown);
199 |     return filename;
200 |   }
201 | }
202 | 
203 | export default ReportGenerator;
204 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/index.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/index.js`

```js
 1 | // New entry point with organized structure
 2 | import { createHttpServer, startServer } from './core/server.js';
 3 | import { logStartup } from './middleware/request-logger.js';
 4 | import config from './config/environment.js';
 5 | 
 6 | async function main() {
 7 |   try {
 8 |     // Log startup information
 9 |     logStartup();
10 |     
11 |     // Create and start the HTTP server
12 |     const server = createHttpServer();
13 |     await startServer(server, config.server.port);
14 |     
15 |     console.log('🎉 InsightFlow API started successfully!');
16 |     
17 |   } catch (error) {
18 |     console.error('💥 Fatal error during startup:', error);
19 |     process.exit(1);
20 |   }
21 | }
22 | 
23 | // Handle uncaught exceptions
24 | process.on('uncaughtException', (error) => {
25 |   console.error('💥 Uncaught Exception:', error);
26 |   process.exit(1);
27 | });
28 | 
29 | // Handle unhandled promise rejections
30 | process.on('unhandledRejection', (reason, promise) => {
31 |   console.error('💥 Unhandled Rejection at:', promise, 'reason:', reason);
32 |   process.exit(1);
33 | });
34 | 
35 | // Start the application
36 | main();
37 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/legacy/README.md

```md
 1 | # Legacy Backend Reference
 2 | 
 3 | These files are preserved for historical reference and are not part of the active backend runtime.
 4 | 
 5 | The canonical local runtime is:
 6 | 
 7 | ```text
 8 | src/index.js -> src/core/server.js -> src/routes/index.js
 9 | ```
10 | 
11 | Legacy route variants live in `src/legacy/routes/`. The archived Express/serverless entrypoints live in `src/legacy/runtime/` and `apps/backend/legacy/`.
12 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/legacy/routes/analytics.routes.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/legacy/routes/analytics.routes.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Analytics Routes
  3 |  * API endpoints for analytics functionality
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | import { getDatasetById } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
  7 | import { generateCorrelationAnalysis } from '../services/analytics-service.js';
  8 | import { NotFoundError } from '../middleware/error.middleware.js';
  9 | import logger from '../middleware/logger.middleware.js';
 10 | 
 11 | /**
 12 |  * Register analytics routes
 13 |  * @param {Object} server - HTTP server instance
 14 |  */
 15 | export function registerAnalyticsRoutes(server) {
 16 |   const sendJson = (res, status, payload) => {
 17 |     res.writeHead(status, {
 18 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 19 |       'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
 20 |     });
 21 |     res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 22 |   };
 23 |   
 24 |   server.on('request', async (req, res) => {
 25 |     const url = req.url ? new URL(req.url, `http://${req.headers.host}`) : null;
 26 |     if (!url) return;
 27 |     
 28 |     const pathname = url.pathname;
 29 |     
 30 |     try {
 31 |       // GET /api/datasets/:id/ai-correlations - Get correlation analysis
 32 |       const corrMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/ai-correlations$/);
 33 |       if (req.method === 'GET' && corrMatch) {
 34 |         const [, datasetId] = corrMatch;
 35 |         
 36 |         const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 37 |         if (!dataset) {
 38 |           throw new NotFoundError('Dataset not found');
 39 |         }
 40 |         
 41 |         logger.info('Generating correlation analysis', { datasetId });
 42 |         
 43 |         const result = generateCorrelationAnalysis(dataset);
 44 |         
 45 |         sendJson(res, 200, result);
 46 |         return;
 47 |       }
 48 |       
 49 |       // GET /api/datasets/:id/stats - Get dataset statistics
 50 |       const statsMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/stats$/);
 51 |       if (req.method === 'GET' && statsMatch) {
 52 |         const [, datasetId] = statsMatch;
 53 |         
 54 |         const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 55 |         if (!dataset) {
 56 |           throw new NotFoundError('Dataset not found');
 57 |         }
 58 |         
 59 |         // Calculate basic statistics
 60 |         const stats = calculateDatasetStats(dataset);
 61 |         
 62 |         sendJson(res, 200, stats);
 63 |         return;
 64 |       }
 65 |       
 66 |     } catch (error) {
 67 |       throw error;
 68 |     }
 69 |   });
 70 |   
 71 |   logger.info('Analytics routes registered');
 72 | }
 73 | 
 74 | /**
 75 |  * Calculate basic dataset statistics
 76 |  */
 77 | function calculateDatasetStats(dataset) {
 78 |   const columns = dataset.columns || [];
 79 |   const rows = dataset.rows || [];
 80 |   
 81 |   const columnStats = columns.map(col => {
 82 |     const values = rows.map(r => r[col.name]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && v !== '');
 83 |     
 84 |     const stats = {
 85 |       name: col.name,
 86 |       type: col.type,
 87 |       count: values.length,
 88 |       nullCount: rows.length - values.length,
 89 |       uniqueCount: new Set(values).size,
 90 |     };
 91 |     
 92 |     if (col.type === 'number') {
 93 |       const nums = values.map(Number).filter(n => !isNaN(n));
 94 |       if (nums.length > 0) {
 95 |         stats.min = Math.min(...nums);
 96 |         stats.max = Math.max(...nums);
 97 |         stats.mean = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / nums.length;
 98 |       }
 99 |     } else {
100 |       // For categorical, get top values
101 |       const freq = {};
102 |       values.forEach(v => freq[v] = (freq[v] || 0) + 1);
103 |       stats.topValues = Object.entries(freq)
104 |         .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
105 |         .slice(0, 5)
106 |         .reduce((acc, [k, v]) => ({ ...acc, [k]: v }), {});
107 |     }
108 |     
109 |     return stats;
110 |   });
111 |   
112 |   return {
113 |     rowCount: rows.length,
114 |     columnCount: columns.length,
115 |     columns: columnStats,
116 |   };
117 | }
118 | 
119 | export default registerAnalyticsRoutes;
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/legacy/routes/chat.routes.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/legacy/routes/chat.routes.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Chat Routes
  3 |  * API endpoints for AI chat functionality
  4 |  * Privacy-first: Only schema metadata is sent to AI, never raw data
  5 |  */
  6 | 
  7 | import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  8 | import { getDatasetById, saveChatMessages, getChatMessages } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
  9 | import { createSchemaFirstChatResponse } from '../services/analytics-service.js';
 10 | import { validateRequired } from '../middleware/validation.middleware.js';
 11 | import { NotFoundError, AppError } from '../middleware/error.middleware.js';
 12 | import logger from '../middleware/logger.middleware.js';
 13 | 
 14 | /**
 15 |  * Register chat routes
 16 |  * @param {Object} server - HTTP server instance
 17 |  */
 18 | export function registerChatRoutes(server) {
 19 |   const sendJson = (res, status, payload) => {
 20 |     res.writeHead(status, {
 21 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 22 |       'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
 23 |     });
 24 |     res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 25 |   };
 26 |   
 27 |   server.on('request', async (req, res) => {
 28 |     const url = req.url ? new URL(req.url, `http://${req.headers.host}`) : null;
 29 |     if (!url) return;
 30 |     
 31 |     const pathname = url.pathname;
 32 |     
 33 |     try {
 34 |       // POST /api/datasets/:id/chat - Send chat message
 35 |       const chatMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/chat$/);
 36 |       if (req.method === 'POST' && chatMatch) {
 37 |         const [, datasetId] = chatMatch;
 38 |         const body = await readJsonBody(req);
 39 |         
 40 |         // Validate required fields
 41 |         validateRequired(body, ['query']);
 42 |         
 43 |         const query = String(body.query).trim();
 44 |         if (!query) {
 45 |           throw new AppError('Query cannot be empty', 400, 'VALIDATION_ERROR');
 46 |         }
 47 |         
 48 |         // Extract user preferences (privacy-first - these are settings, not data)
 49 |         const preferences = {
 50 |           chartCount: body.chartCount || "auto",
 51 |           chartTypes: body.chartTypes || ["bar", "line", "pie"],
 52 |           showTrends: body.showTrends !== false,
 53 |           showCorrelations: body.showCorrelations !== false,
 54 |         };
 55 |         
 56 |         // Get dataset
 57 |         const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 58 |         if (!dataset) {
 59 |           throw new NotFoundError('Dataset not found');
 60 |         }
 61 |         
 62 |         logger.info('Processing chat query', { 
 63 |           datasetId, 
 64 |           query: query.substring(0, 50),
 65 |           preferences,
 66 |         });
 67 |         
 68 |         console.log('\n================================================');
 69 |         console.log('📥 API RECEIVED USER QUERY (Privacy-First):');
 70 |         console.log(`   Dataset ID: ${datasetId}`);
 71 |         console.log(`   Query: "${query}"`);
 72 |         console.log(`   Preferences: ${JSON.stringify(preferences)}`);
 73 |         console.log('================================================\n');
 74 |         
 75 |         // Get existing chat messages
 76 |         const existingMessages = getChatMessages(datasetId);
 77 |         
 78 |         // Process with AI using schema-first approach (no raw data sent)
 79 |         const analysis = await createSchemaFirstChatResponse(dataset, query, preferences);
 80 |         
 81 |         const now = new Date().toISOString();
 82 |         const userMessage = {
 83 |           id: randomUUID(),
 84 |           role: 'user',
 85 |           content: query,
 86 |           timestamp: now,
 87 |         };
 88 |         
 89 |         const assistantMessage = {
 90 |           id: randomUUID(),
 91 |           role: 'assistant',
 92 |           content: analysis.content,
 93 |           sql: analysis.sql,
 94 |           chart: analysis.chart,
 95 |           insights: analysis.insights,
 96 |           timestamp: now,
 97 |           usedAI: analysis.usedAI,
 98 |           model: analysis.model,
 99 |           confidence: analysis.confidence,
100 |           intent: analysis.intent,
101 |           reason: analysis.reason,
102 |           metadata: {
103 |             ...analysis.metadata,
104 |             privacyMode: "schema-only",
105 |           },
106 |         };
107 |         
108 |         // Save messages
109 |         saveChatMessages(datasetId, [userMessage, assistantMessage]);
110 |         
111 | logger.info('Chat response generated', {
112 |           datasetId,
113 |           usedAI: analysis.usedAI,
114 |           model: analysis.model,
115 |           confidence: analysis.confidence,
116 |         });
117 | 
118 |         console.log('\n================================================');
119 |         console.log('📤 API SENDING RESPONSE BACK:');
120 |         console.log(`   Privacy Mode: Schema-Only (no raw data)`);
121 |         console.log(`   Used AI: ${analysis.usedAI ? 'Yes 🤖' : 'No (Local)'}`);
122 |         console.log(`   Model: ${analysis.model || 'Local Analysis Engine'}`);
123 |         console.log(`   Confidence: ${(analysis.confidence || 0) * 100}%`);
124 |         console.log(`   Intent: ${analysis.intent || 'N/A'}`);
125 |         console.log(`   Response: ${analysis.content?.substring(0, 200)}...`);
126 |         console.log('================================================\n');
127 | 
128 |         sendJson(res, 201, { 
129 |           userMessage, 
130 |           assistantMessage,
131 |           chatHistory: [...existingMessages, userMessage, assistantMessage],
132 |         });
133 |         return;
134 |       }
135 |       
136 |       // GET /api/datasets/:id/chat - Get chat history
137 |       const historyMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/chat$/);
138 |       if (req.method === 'GET' && historyMatch) {
139 |         const [, datasetId] = historyMatch;
140 |         
141 |         const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
142 |         if (!dataset) {
143 |           throw new NotFoundError('Dataset not found');
144 |         }
145 |         
146 |         const messages = getChatMessages(datasetId);
147 |         sendJson(res, 200, { messages });
148 |         return;
149 |       }
150 |       
151 |     } catch (error) {
152 |       throw error;
153 |     }
154 |   });
155 |   
156 |   logger.info('Chat routes registered (privacy-first mode)');
157 | }
158 | 
159 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
160 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
161 |     let body = '';
162 |     request.on('data', chunk => {
163 |       body += chunk;
164 |       if (body.length > 60 * 1024 * 1024) {
165 |         reject(new Error('Request body too large'));
166 |       }
167 |     });
168 |     request.on('end', () => {
169 |       if (!body) {
170 |         resolve({});
171 |         return;
172 |       }
173 |       try {
174 |         resolve(JSON.parse(body));
175 |       } catch {
176 |         reject(new Error('Invalid JSON'));
177 |       }
178 |     });
179 |     request.on('error', reject);
180 |   });
181 | }
182 | 
183 | export default registerChatRoutes;
184 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/legacy/routes/dataset.routes.js
