```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Dataset Routes
  3 |  * API endpoints for dataset operations
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  7 | import {
  8 |   createDataset,
  9 |   getDatasetById,
 10 |   getCurrentDataset,
 11 |   getDatabasePath,
 12 |   patchDatasetRow,
 13 | } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
 14 | import { buildDatasetSchema, generateDemoDataset, normalizeColumns } from '../services/analytics-service.js';
 15 | import { validateRequired, validate } from '../middleware/validation.middleware.js';
 16 | import { AppError, NotFoundError } from '../middleware/error.middleware.js';
 17 | import logger from '../middleware/logger.middleware.js';
 18 | 
 19 | /**
 20 |  * Register dataset routes
 21 |  * @param {Object} server - HTTP server instance
 22 |  */
 23 | export function registerDatasetRoutes(server) {
 24 |   const sendJson = server._sendJson || ((res, status, payload) => {
 25 |     res.writeHead(status, {
 26 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 27 |       'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
 28 |     });
 29 |     res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 30 |   });
 31 |   
 32 |   server.on('request', async (req, res) => {
 33 |     const url = req.url ? new URL(req.url, `http://${req.headers.host}`) : null;
 34 |     if (!url) return;
 35 |     
 36 |     const pathname = url.pathname;
 37 |     
 38 |     try {
 39 |       // GET /api/datasets/current - Get current active dataset
 40 |       if (req.method === 'GET' && pathname === '/api/datasets/current') {
 41 |         const dataset = getCurrentDataset();
 42 |         sendJson(res, 200, { 
 43 |           dataset: dataset ? {
 44 |             id: dataset.id,
 45 |             name: dataset.name,
 46 |             rowCount: dataset.rowCount,
 47 |             columnCount: dataset.columns.length,
 48 |           } : null 
 49 |         });
 50 |         return;
 51 |       }
 52 |       
 53 |       // GET /api/datasets/:id - Get dataset by ID
 54 |       const datasetMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)$/);
 55 |       if (req.method === 'GET' && datasetMatch) {
 56 |         const [, datasetId] = datasetMatch;
 57 |         const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 58 |         
 59 |         if (!dataset) {
 60 |           throw new NotFoundError(`Dataset ${datasetId} not found`);
 61 |         }
 62 |         
 63 |         sendJson(res, 200, { dataset });
 64 |         return;
 65 |       }
 66 |       
 67 |       // POST /api/datasets/demo - Load demo dataset
 68 |       if (req.method === 'POST' && pathname === '/api/datasets/demo') {
 69 |         const demoDataset = generateDemoDataset();
 70 |         const dataset = createDataset({
 71 |           name: demoDataset.name,
 72 |           fileName: demoDataset.fileName,
 73 |           columns: demoDataset.columns,
 74 |           rows: demoDataset.rows,
 75 |           sourceType: demoDataset.sourceType,
 76 |         });
 77 |         
 78 |         logger.info('Demo dataset created', { datasetId: dataset.id });
 79 |         sendJson(res, 201, { dataset, chatMessages: [] });
 80 |         return;
 81 |       }
 82 |       
 83 |       // POST /api/datasets/import - Import dataset
 84 |       if (req.method === 'POST' && pathname === '/api/datasets/import') {
 85 |         const body = await readJsonBody(req);
 86 |         
 87 |         // Validate required fields
 88 |         validateRequired(body, ['rows']);
 89 |         
 90 |         if (!Array.isArray(body.rows) || body.rows.length === 0) {
 91 |           throw new AppError('Dataset must contain at least one row', 400, 'VALIDATION_ERROR');
 92 |         }
 93 |         
 94 |         const columns = normalizeColumns(
 95 |           body.rows, 
 96 |           Array.isArray(body.columns) ? body.columns : []
 97 |         );
 98 |         
 99 |         const dataset = createDataset({
100 |           name: body.name || 'Uploaded Dataset',
101 |           fileName: body.fileName || null,
102 |           columns,
103 |           rows: body.rows,
104 |           sourceType: body.sourceType || 'upload',
105 |         });
106 |         
107 |         logger.info('Dataset imported', { 
108 |           datasetId: dataset.id, 
109 |           rowCount: dataset.rowCount 
110 |         });
111 |         
112 |         sendJson(res, 201, { dataset, chatMessages: [] });
113 |         return;
114 |       }
115 |       
116 |       // PATCH /api/datasets/:id/rows/:rowId - Update row
117 |       const rowMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/rows\/([^/]+)$/);
118 |       if (req.method === 'PATCH' && rowMatch) {
119 |         const [, datasetId, rowId] = rowMatch;
120 |         const body = await readJsonBody(req);
121 |         
122 |         validateRequired(body, ['column']);
123 |         
124 |         const dataset = patchDatasetRow({
125 |           datasetId,
126 |           rowId: Number(rowId),
127 |           column: body.column,
128 |           value: body.value,
129 |         });
130 |         
131 |         if (!dataset) {
132 |           throw new NotFoundError('Row not found');
133 |         }
134 |         
135 |         sendJson(res, 200, { dataset });
136 |         return;
137 |       }
138 |       
139 |       // GET /api/datasets/:id/schema - Get dataset schema
140 |       const schemaMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema$/);
141 |       if (req.method === 'GET' && schemaMatch) {
142 |         const [, datasetId] = schemaMatch;
143 |         const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
144 |         
145 |         if (!dataset) {
146 |           throw new NotFoundError('Dataset not found');
147 |         }
148 |         
149 |         sendJson(res, 200, { schema: buildDatasetSchema(dataset) });
150 |         return;
151 |       }
152 |       
153 |     } catch (error) {
154 |       // Error handling is done by server.js
155 |       throw error;
156 |     }
157 |   });
158 |   
159 |   logger.info('Dataset routes registered');
160 | }
161 | 
162 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
163 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
164 |     let body = '';
165 |     request.on('data', chunk => {
166 |       body += chunk;
167 |       if (body.length > 60 * 1024 * 1024) {
168 |         reject(new Error('Request body too large'));
169 |       }
170 |     });
171 |     request.on('end', () => {
172 |       if (!body) {
173 |         resolve({});
174 |         return;
175 |       }
176 |       try {
177 |         resolve(JSON.parse(body));
178 |       } catch {
179 |         reject(new Error('Invalid JSON'));
180 |       }
181 |     });
182 |     request.on('error', reject);
183 |   });
184 | }
185 | 
186 | export default registerDatasetRoutes;
```

```ts
  1 | import express, { Request, Response } from "express";
  2 | import DashboardBuilder from "../genai/dashboardBuilder.js";
  3 | import ReportGenerator from "../genai/reportGenerator.js";
  4 | 
  5 | const router = express.Router();
  6 | const dashboardBuilder = new DashboardBuilder();
  7 | const reportGenerator = new ReportGenerator();
  8 | 
  9 | // Create full dashboard from dataset
 10 | router.post("/dashboard/create", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
 11 |   try {
 12 |     const { dataset, title, focus } = req.body;
 13 | 
 14 |     if (!dataset || !dataset.data || !dataset.columns) {
 15 |       return res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid dataset format" });
 16 |     }
 17 | 
 18 |     const result = await dashboardBuilder.createDashboard({
 19 |       dataset,
 20 |       title,
 21 |       focus,
 22 |     });
 23 | 
 24 |     res.json(result);
 25 |   } catch (error) {
 26 |     res
 27 |       .status(500)
 28 |       .json({
 29 |         error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Dashboard creation failed",
 30 |       });
 31 |   }
 32 | });
 33 | 
 34 | // Query dataset with AI
 35 | router.post("/query", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
 36 |   try {
 37 |     const { query, schema, dataset } = req.body;
 38 | 
 39 |     if (!query || !dataset) {
 40 |       return res.status(400).json({ error: "Query and dataset required" });
 41 |     }
 42 | 
 43 |     const result = await dashboardBuilder.queryDataset(query, schema, dataset);
 44 |     res.json(result);
 45 |   } catch (error) {
 46 |     res
 47 |       .status(500)
 48 |       .json({
 49 |         error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Query processing failed",
 50 |       });
 51 |   }
 52 | });
 53 | 
 54 | // Generate PDF report
 55 | router.post("/report/pdf", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
 56 |   try {
 57 |     const { data } = req.body;
 58 |     const filename = await reportGenerator.generatePDFReport(data);
 59 | 
 60 |     res.download(filename);
 61 |   } catch (error) {
 62 |     res
 63 |       .status(500)
 64 |       .json({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "PDF generation failed" });
 65 |   }
 66 | });
 67 | 
 68 | // Generate Excel report
 69 | router.post("/report/excel", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
 70 |   try {
 71 |     const { data } = req.body;
 72 |     const filename = await reportGenerator.generateExcelReport(data);
 73 | 
 74 |     res.download(filename);
 75 |   } catch (error) {
 76 |     res
 77 |       .status(500)
 78 |       .json({
 79 |         error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Excel generation failed",
 80 |       });

 82 | });

 88 |     const filename = await reportGenerator.generateMarkdownReport(data);
 89 | 
 90 |     res.download(filename);
 91 |   } catch (error) {

 93 |       .status(500)

 96 |       });

 99 | 
100 | export default router;
101 |
```

```js
 1 | /**
 2 |  * Health Check Routes
 3 |  * API endpoints for health monitoring
 4 |  */
 5 | 
 6 | import { getDatabasePath } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
 7 | import { isGeminiConfigured } from '../services/gemini-ai-service.js';
 8 | import logger from '../middleware/logger.middleware.js';
 9 | 
10 | /**
11 |  * Register health routes
12 |  * @param {Object} server - HTTP server instance
13 |  */
14 | export function registerHealthRoutes(server) {
15 |   const sendJson = (res, status, payload) => {
16 |     res.writeHead(status, {
17 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
18 |       'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
19 |     });
20 |     res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
21 |   };
22 |   
23 |   server.on('request', async (req, res) => {
24 |     const url = req.url ? new URL(req.url, `http://${req.headers.host}`) : null;
25 |     if (!url) return;
26 |     
27 |     const pathname = url.pathname;
28 |     
29 |     // GET /api/health - Health check
30 |     if (req.method === 'GET' && pathname === '/api/health') {
31 |       sendJson(res, 200, {
32 |         status: 'ok',
33 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
34 |         database: {
35 |           path: getDatabasePath(),
36 |         },
37 |         services: {
38 |           gemini: isGeminiConfigured() ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
39 |         },
40 |       });
41 |       return;
42 |     }
43 |     
44 |     // GET /api/ready - Readiness check
45 |     if (req.method === 'GET' && pathname === '/api/ready') {
46 |       const ready = isGeminiConfigured();
47 |       sendJson(res, ready ? 200 : 503, {
48 |         ready,
49 |         message: ready ? 'Service ready' : 'Service not ready',
50 |         checks: {
51 |           gemini: isGeminiConfigured(),
52 |         },
53 |       });
54 |       return;
55 |     }
56 |   });
57 |   
58 |   logger.info('Health routes registered');
59 | }
60 | 
61 | export default registerHealthRoutes;
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/middleware/cors.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/middleware/cors.js`

```js
 1 | // CORS middleware
 2 | import config from '../config/environment.js';
 3 | 
 4 | export function corsMiddleware(request, response) {
 5 |   const origin = request.headers.origin;
 6 |   const allowedOrigin = config.cors.origin;
 7 | 
 8 |   // Set CORS headers
 9 |   if (allowedOrigin === '*' || origin === allowedOrigin) {
10 |     response.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', origin || allowedOrigin);
11 |   } else {
12 |     response.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', allowedOrigin);
13 |   }
14 | 
15 |   response.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH');
16 |   response.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With, X-Request-ID, Accept, Origin');
17 |   response.setHeader('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', 'X-Request-ID, X-Total-Count, X-Page-Count');
18 |   
19 |   if (config.cors.credentials) {
20 |     response.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Credentials', 'true');
21 |   }
22 | 
23 |   // Set max age for preflight requests
24 |   response.setHeader('Access-Control-Max-Age', '86400'); // 24 hours
25 | 
26 |   // Add security headers
27 |   response.setHeader('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
28 |   response.setHeader('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
29 |   response.setHeader('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
30 |   response.setHeader('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
31 | 
32 |   // Add request ID if not present
33 |   if (!request.headers['x-request-id']) {
34 |     request.headers['x-request-id'] = generateRequestId();
35 |   }
36 |   response.setHeader('X-Request-ID', request.headers['x-request-id']);
37 | }
38 | 
39 | /**
40 |  * Generate a unique request ID
41 |  */
42 | function generateRequestId() {
43 |   const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36);
44 |   const random = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8);
45 |   return `req_${timestamp}_${random}`;
46 | }
47 | 
48 | export default corsMiddleware;
49 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/middleware/error-handler.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/middleware/error-handler.js`

```js
  1 | // Global error handler middleware
  2 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
  3 | import { sendJson } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  4 | import config from '../config/environment.js';
  5 | 
  6 | export function errorHandler(error, request, response) {
  7 |   console.error('❌ Error:', error.message);
  8 |   
  9 |   // Log stack trace in development
 10 |   if (config.server.nodeEnv === 'development') {
 11 |     console.error('Stack trace:', error.stack);
 12 |   }
 13 | 
 14 |   // Determine status code and error code
 15 |   let statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR;
 16 |   let errorCode = ERROR_CODES.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR;
 17 |   let message = 'Internal server error';
 18 | 
 19 |   // Handle specific error types
 20 |   if (error.name === 'ValidationError') {
 21 |     statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST;
 22 |     errorCode = ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR;
 23 |     message = error.message || 'Validation failed';
 24 |   } else if (error.name === 'UnauthorizedError') {
 25 |     statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.UNAUTHORIZED;
 26 |     errorCode = ERROR_CODES.INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS;
 27 |     message = 'Unauthorized access';
 28 |   } else if (error.name === 'NotFoundError') {
 29 |     statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND;
 30 |     errorCode = ERROR_CODES.DATASET_NOT_FOUND;
 31 |     message = error.message || 'Resource not found';
 32 |   } else if (error.name === 'ConflictError') {
 33 |     statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT;
 34 |     errorCode = ERROR_CODES.RESOURCE_CONFLICT;
 35 |     message = error.message || 'Resource conflict';
 36 |   } else if (error.code === 'ECONNREFUSED' || error.code === 'ENOTFOUND') {
 37 |     statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.BAD_GATEWAY;
 38 |     errorCode = ERROR_CODES.NETWORK_ERROR;
 39 |     message = 'Network error - service unavailable';
 40 |   } else if (error.code === 'ETIMEDOUT') {
 41 |     statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.GATEWAY_TIMEOUT;
 42 |     errorCode = ERROR_CODES.AI_TIMEOUT;
 43 |     message = 'Request timeout';
 44 |   } else if (error.statusCode) {
 45 |     statusCode = error.statusCode;
 46 |     message = error.message || message;
 47 |   }
 48 | 
 49 |   // Log error details
 50 |   const errorDetails = {
 51 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
 52 |     method: request.method,
 53 |     url: request.url,
 54 |     pathname: request.pathname,
 55 |     statusCode,
 56 |     errorCode,
 57 |     message,
 58 |     userAgent: request.headers['user-agent'],
 59 |     ip: request.headers['x-forwarded-for'] || request.connection?.remoteAddress,
 60 |     duration: Date.now() - (request.startTime || Date.now())
 61 |   };
 62 | 
 63 |   console.error('Error details:', errorDetails);
 64 | 
 65 |   // Send error response
 66 |   const errorResponse = {
 67 |     success: false,
 68 |     error: {
 69 |       code: errorCode,
 70 |       message,
 71 |       timestamp: errorDetails.timestamp,
 72 |       requestId: request.headers['x-request-id'] || null
 73 |     }
 74 |   };
 75 | 
 76 |   // Include stack trace in development
 77 |   if (config.server.nodeEnv === 'development' && error.stack) {
 78 |     errorResponse.error.stack = error.stack;
 79 |   }
 80 | 
 81 |   sendJson(response, statusCode, errorResponse);
 82 | }
 83 | 
 84 | /**
 85 |  * Create specific error types
 86 |  */
 87 | export class ValidationError extends Error {
 88 |   constructor(message) {
 89 |     super(message);
 90 |     this.name = 'ValidationError';
 91 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST;
 92 |   }
 93 | }
 94 | 
 95 | export class NotFoundError extends Error {
 96 |   constructor(message) {
 97 |     super(message);
 98 |     this.name = 'NotFoundError';
 99 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND;
100 |   }
101 | }
102 | 
103 | export class ConflictError extends Error {
104 |   constructor(message) {
105 |     super(message);
106 |     this.name = 'ConflictError';
107 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT;
108 |   }
109 | }
110 | 
111 | export class UnauthorizedError extends Error {
112 |   constructor(message) {
113 |     super(message);
114 |     this.name = 'UnauthorizedError';
115 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.UNAUTHORIZED;
116 |   }
117 | }
118 | 
119 | export class AIProviderError extends Error {
120 |   constructor(message, provider) {
121 |     super(message);
122 |     this.name = 'AIProviderError';
123 |     this.provider = provider;
124 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE;
125 |   }
126 | }
127 | 
128 | export class DatabaseError extends Error {
129 |   constructor(message) {
130 |     super(message);
131 |     this.name = 'DatabaseError';
132 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR;
133 |   }
134 | }
135 | 
136 | export class FileSystemError extends Error {
137 |   constructor(message) {
138 |     super(message);
139 |     this.name = 'FileSystemError';
140 |     this.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR;
141 |   }
142 | }
143 | 
144 | export default {
145 |   errorHandler,
146 |   ValidationError,
147 |   NotFoundError,
148 |   ConflictError,
149 |   UnauthorizedError,
150 |   AIProviderError,
151 |   DatabaseError,
152 |   FileSystemError
153 | };
154 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/middleware/error.middleware.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/middleware/error.middleware.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Global Error Middleware
  3 |  * Centralized error handling for the backend
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | export class AppError extends Error {
  7 |   constructor(message, statusCode = 500, code = 'INTERNAL_ERROR') {
  8 |     super(message);
  9 |     this.statusCode = statusCode;
 10 |     this.code = code;
 11 |     this.isOperational = true;
 12 |     Error.captureStackTrace(this, this.constructor);
 13 |   }
 14 | }
 15 | 
 16 | export class ValidationError extends AppError {
 17 |   constructor(message, details = null) {
 18 |     super(message, 400, 'VALIDATION_ERROR');
 19 |     this.details = details;
 20 |   }
 21 | }
 22 | 
 23 | export class NotFoundError extends AppError {
 24 |   constructor(message = 'Resource not found') {
 25 |     super(message, 404, 'NOT_FOUND');
 26 |   }
 27 | }
 28 | 
 29 | export class UnauthorizedError extends AppError {
 30 |   constructor(message = 'Unauthorized') {
 31 |     super(message, 401, 'UNAUTHORIZED');
 32 |   }
 33 | }
 34 | 
 35 | export class ForbiddenError extends AppError {
 36 |   constructor(message = 'Forbidden') {
 37 |     super(message, 403, 'FORBIDDEN');
 38 |   }
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | export class AIError extends AppError {
 42 |   constructor(message, code = 'AI_ERROR', details = null) {
 43 |     super(message, 500, code);
 44 |     this.details = details;
 45 |   }
 46 | }
 47 | 
 48 | export class DatabaseError extends AppError {
 49 |   constructor(message, originalError = null) {
 50 |     super(message, 500, 'DATABASE_ERROR');
 51 |     this.originalError = originalError;
 52 |   }
 53 | }
 54 | 
 55 | /**
 56 |  * Express-style error handler for Node.js HTTP server
 57 |  * @param {Error} err - Error object
 58 |  * @param {Object} response - HTTP response object
 59 |  */
 60 | export function errorMiddleware(err, response) {
 61 |   console.error('[Error Middleware]', {
 62 |     message: err.message,
 63 |     code: err.code,
 64 |     stack: err.stack,
 65 |   });
 66 | 
 67 |   // Operational errors (known errors)
 68 |   if (err.isOperational) {
 69 |     response.writeHead(err.statusCode || 500, {
 70 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 71 |       'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
 72 |     });
 73 |     response.end(JSON.stringify({
 74 |       error: err.message,
 75 |       code: err.code,
 76 |       ...(err.details && { details: err.details }),
 77 |     }));
 78 |     return;
 79 |   }
 80 | 
 81 |   // Programming errors (unknown errors)
 82 |   response.writeHead(500, {
 83 |     'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 84 |     'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
 85 |   });
 86 |   response.end(JSON.stringify({
 87 |     error: 'Internal server error',
 88 |     code: 'INTERNAL_ERROR',
 89 |   }));
 90 | }
 91 | 
 92 | /**
 93 |  * Async handler wrapper to catch errors
 94 |  * @param {Function} fn - Async function
 95 |  * @returns {Function} Wrapped function
 96 |  */
 97 | export function asyncHandler(fn) {
 98 |   return async (...args) => {
 99 |     try {
100 |       await fn(...args);
101 |     } catch (error) {
102 |       const res = args[args.length - 1]; // Assume last arg is response
103 |       if (res && res.writeHead) {
104 |         errorMiddleware(error, res);
105 |       }
106 |     }
107 |   };
108 | }
109 | 
110 | /**
111 |  * Not found handler for unmatched routes
112 |  * @param {Object} response - HTTP response object
113 |  */
114 | export function notFoundHandler(response) {
115 |   response.writeHead(404, {
116 |     'Content-Type': 'application/json',
117 |     'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
118 |   });
119 |   response.end(JSON.stringify({
120 |     error: 'Route not found',
121 |     code: 'NOT_FOUND',
122 |   }));
123 | }
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/middleware/logger.middleware.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/middleware/logger.middleware.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Logger Middleware
  3 |  * Request/Response logging
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | const LOG_LEVELS = {
  7 |   ERROR: 'error',
  8 |   WARN: 'warn',
  9 |   INFO: 'info',
 10 |   DEBUG: 'debug',
 11 | };
 12 | 
 13 | const currentLevel = process.env.LOG_LEVEL || LOG_LEVELS.INFO;
 14 | 
 15 | /**
 16 |  * Log a message with timestamp
 17 |  * @param {string} level - Log level
 18 |  * @param {string} message - Log message
 19 |  * @param {Object} meta - Additional metadata
 20 |  */
 21 | function log(level, message, meta = {}) {
 22 |   const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
 23 |   const logEntry = {
 24 |     timestamp,
 25 |     level,
 26 |     message,
 27 |     ...meta,
 28 |   };
 29 | 
 30 |   // Console output with color
 31 |   const colors = {
 32 |     error: '\x1b[31m',   // red
 33 |     warn: '\x1b[33m',    // yellow
 34 |     info: '\x1b[36m',    // cyan
 35 |     debug: '\x1b[90m',   // gray
 36 |     reset: '\x1b[0m',
 37 |   };
 38 | 
 39 |   const color = colors[level] || colors.info;
 40 |   console.log(`${color}[${timestamp}] ${level.toUpperCase()}:${colors.reset} ${message}`);
 41 |   
 42 |   if (Object.keys(meta).length > 0) {
 43 |     console.log(`${color}Meta:${colors.reset}`, JSON.stringify(meta, null, 2));
 44 |   }
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | /**
 48 |  * Request logger middleware
 49 |  * @param {Object} request - HTTP request
 50 |  * @returns {Function} Logger function
 51 |  */
 52 | export function requestLogger(request) {
 53 |   const start = Date.now();
 54 |   
 55 |   return {
 56 |     logRequest: () => {
 57 |       log(LOG_LEVELS.INFO, 'Incoming Request', {
 58 |         method: request.method,
 59 |         url: request.url,
 60 |         headers: {
 61 |           host: request.headers.host,
 62 |           contentType: request.headers['content-type'],
 63 |         },
 64 |       });
 65 |     },
 66 |     
 67 |     logResponse: (statusCode, responseTime) => {
 68 |       const level = statusCode >= 500 ? LOG_LEVELS.ERROR 
 69 |         : statusCode >= 400 ? LOG_LEVELS.WARN 
 70 |         : LOG_LEVELS.INFO;
 71 |       
 72 |       log(level, 'Request Complete', {
 73 |         method: request.method,
 74 |         url: request.url,
 75 |         status: statusCode,
 76 |         responseTime: `${responseTime}ms`,
 77 |       });
 78 |     },
 79 |     
 80 |     logError: (error) => {
 81 |       log(LOG_LEVELS.ERROR, 'Request Error', {
 82 |         method: request.method,
 83 |         url: request.url,
 84 |         error: error.message,
 85 |         stack: error.stack,
 86 |       });
 87 |     },
 88 |     
 89 |     getDuration: () => Date.now() - start,
 90 |   };
 91 | }
 92 | 
 93 | /**
 94 |  * Create logger instance
 95 |  */
 96 | export const logger = {
 97 |   error: (message, meta) => log(LOG_LEVELS.ERROR, message, meta),
 98 |   warn: (message, meta) => log(LOG_LEVELS.WARN, message, meta),
 99 |   info: (message, meta) => log(LOG_LEVELS.INFO, message, meta),
100 |   debug: (message, meta) => log(LOG_LEVELS.DEBUG, message, meta),
101 | };
102 | 
103 | export default logger;
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/middleware/request-logger.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/middleware/request-logger.js`

```js
  1 | // Request logging middleware
  2 | import config from '../config/environment.js';
  3 | 
  4 | export function requestLogger(request, response) {
  5 |   const startTime = request.startTime || Date.now();
  6 |   const requestId = request.headers['x-request-id'] || 'unknown';
  7 | 
  8 |   // Store original end method
  9 |   const originalEnd = response.end;
 10 | 
 11 |   // Override end method to log when response is sent
 12 |   response.end = function(...args) {
 13 |     const endTime = Date.now();
 14 |     const duration = endTime - startTime;
 15 | 
 16 |     // Log request details
 17 |     const logData = {
 18 |       requestId,
 19 |       method: request.method,
 20 |       url: request.url,
 21 |       pathname: request.pathname,
 22 |       statusCode: response.statusCode,
 23 |       duration: `${duration}ms`,
 24 |       userAgent: request.headers['user-agent'] || 'unknown',
 25 |       ip: getClientIP(request),
 26 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
 27 |     };
 28 | 
 29 |     // Add content length if available
 30 |     if (response.getHeader('content-length')) {
 31 |       logData.contentLength = response.getHeader('content-length');
 32 |     }
 33 | 
 34 |     // Log based on status code and log level
 35 |     const logLevel = getLogLevel(response.statusCode);
 36 |     
 37 |     if (shouldLog(logLevel)) {
 38 |       const message = `${request.method} ${request.pathname} ${response.statusCode} - ${duration}ms`;
 39 |       
 40 |       switch (logLevel) {
 41 |         case 'error':
 42 |           console.error(`❌ [${requestId}] ${message}`, logData);
 43 |           break;
 44 |         case 'warn':
 45 |           console.warn(`⚠️  [${requestId}] ${message}`, logData);
 46 |           break;
 47 |         case 'info':
 48 |           console.info(`ℹ️  [${requestId}] ${message}`, logData);
 49 |           break;
 50 |         default:
 51 |           console.log(`📝 [${requestId}] ${message}`, logData);
 52 |       }
 53 |     }
 54 | 
 55 |     // Call original end method
 56 |     originalEnd.apply(response, args);
 57 |   };
 58 | 
 59 |   // Store request ID on request object
 60 |   request.requestId = requestId;
 61 | }
 62 | 
 63 | /**
 64 |  * Get client IP address
 65 |  */
 66 | function getClientIP(request) {
 67 |   return (
 68 |     request.headers['x-forwarded-for']?.split(',')[0] ||
 69 |     request.headers['x-real-ip'] ||
 70 |     request.connection?.remoteAddress ||
 71 |     request.socket?.remoteAddress ||
 72 |     'unknown'
 73 |   );
 74 | }
 75 | 
 76 | /**
 77 |  * Determine log level based on status code
 78 |  */
 79 | function getLogLevel(statusCode) {
 80 |   if (statusCode >= 500) return 'error';
 81 |   if (statusCode >= 400) return 'warn';
 82 |   if (statusCode >= 300) return 'info';
 83 |   return 'debug';
 84 | }
 85 | 
 86 | /**
 87 |  * Check if we should log based on configuration
 88 |  */
 89 | function shouldLog(level) {
 90 |   if (!config.logging.verbose) {
 91 |     // Only log important messages when not verbose
 92 |     return ['error', 'warn'].includes(level);
 93 |   }
 94 |   return true;
 95 | }
 96 | 
 97 | /**
 98 |  * Log startup message
 99 |  */
100 | export function logStartup() {
101 |   console.log('\n🚀 ===== InsightFlow API Starting =====');
102 |   console.log(`📍 Environment: ${config.server.nodeEnv}`);
103 |   console.log(`📍 Host: ${config.server.host}`);
104 |   console.log(`📍 Port: ${config.server.port}`);
105 |   console.log(`📍 Log Level: ${config.logging.level}`);
106 |   console.log(`📍 Verbose Logging: ${config.logging.verbose}`);
107 |   console.log(`📍 CORS Origin: ${config.cors.origin}`);
108 |   console.log(`📍 AI Providers: ${config.ai.providerPriority.join(', ')}`);
109 |   console.log('=====================================\n');
110 | }
111 | 
112 | /**
113 |  * Log shutdown message
114 |  */
115 | export function logShutdown() {
116 |   console.log('\n🛑 ===== InsightFlow API Shutting Down =====');
117 |   console.log(`📍 Shutdown Time: ${new Date().toISOString()}`);
118 |   console.log('==========================================\n');
119 | }
120 | 
121 | export default {
122 |   requestLogger,
123 |   logStartup,
124 |   logShutdown
125 | };
126 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/middleware/validation.middleware.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/middleware/validation.middleware.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Validation Middleware
  3 |  * Input validation utilities
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | /**
  7 |  * Validate required fields in request body
  8 |  * @param {Object} body - Request body
  9 |  * @param {string[]} requiredFields - Array of required field names
 10 |  * @throws {Error} If validation fails
 11 |  */
 12 | export function validateRequired(body, requiredFields) {
 13 |   const missing = [];
 14 |   
 15 |   for (const field of requiredFields) {
 16 |     if (body[field] === undefined || body[field] === null || body[field] === '') {
 17 |       missing.push(field);
 18 |     }
 19 |   }
 20 |   
 21 |   if (missing.length > 0) {
 22 |     const error = new Error(`Missing required fields: ${missing.join(', ')}`);
 23 |     error.code = 'VALIDATION_ERROR';
 24 |     error.statusCode = 400;
 25 |     throw error;
 26 |   }
 27 | }
 28 | 
 29 | /**
 30 |  * Validate email format
 31 |  * @param {string} email - Email to validate
 32 |  * @returns {boolean} True if valid
 33 |  */
 34 | export function isValidEmail(email) {
 35 |   if (!email || typeof email !== 'string') return false;
 36 |   const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
 37 |   return emailRegex.test(email);
 38 | }
 39 | 
 40 | /**
 41 |  * Validate UUID format
 42 |  * @param {string} uuid - UUID to validate
 43 |  * @returns {boolean} True if valid
 44 |  */
 45 | export function isValidUUID(uuid) {
 46 |   if (!uuid || typeof uuid !== 'string') return false;
 47 |   const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i;
 48 |   return uuidRegex.test(uuid);
 49 | }
 50 | 
 51 | /**
 52 |  * Validate that value is a positive number
 53 |  * @param {any} value - Value to check
 54 |  * @returns {boolean} True if positive number
 55 |  */
 56 | export function isPositiveNumber(value) {
 57 |   const num = Number(value);
 58 |   return !isNaN(num) && num > 0;
 59 | }
 60 | 
 61 | /**
 62 |  * Sanitize string input (basic XSS protection)
 63 |  * @param {string} input - Input string
 64 |  * @returns {string} Sanitized string
 65 |  */
 66 | export function sanitizeString(input) {
 67 |   if (typeof input !== 'string') return '';
 68 |   
 69 |   return input
 70 |     .replace(/[<>]/g, '') // Remove < and >
 71 |     .replace(/javascript:/gi, '') // Remove javascript: protocol
 72 |     .replace(/on\w+=/gi, '') // Remove event handlers
 73 |     .trim();
 74 | }
 75 | 
 76 | /**
 77 |  * Validate file upload
 78 |  * @param {Object} file - File object
 79 |  * @param {string[]} allowedTypes - Allowed MIME types
 80 |  * @param {number} maxSize - Maximum file size in bytes
 81 |  * @throws {Error} If validation fails
 82 |  */
 83 | export function validateFile(file, allowedTypes, maxSize) {
 84 |   if (!file) {
 85 |     const error = new Error('No file provided');
 86 |     error.code = 'NO_FILE';
 87 |     error.statusCode = 400;
 88 |     throw error;
 89 |   }
 90 |   
 91 |   if (allowedTypes && !allowedTypes.includes(file.type)) {
 92 |     const error = new Error(`File type ${file.type} not allowed. Allowed: ${allowedTypes.join(', ')}`);
 93 |     error.code = 'INVALID_FILE_TYPE';
 94 |     error.statusCode = 400;
 95 |     throw error;
 96 |   }
 97 |   
 98 |   if (maxSize && file.size > maxSize) {
 99 |     const error = new Error(`File size exceeds maximum of ${maxSize} bytes`);
100 |     error.code = 'FILE_TOO_LARGE';
101 |     error.statusCode = 400;
102 |     throw error;
103 |   }
104 | }
105 | 
106 | /**
107 |  * Validate JSON body
108 |  * @param {string} body - Raw body string
109 |  * @returns {Object} Parsed JSON
110 |  * @throws {Error} If parsing fails
111 |  */
112 | export function validateJSONBody(body) {
113 |   if (!body || body.trim() === '') {
114 |     return {};
115 |   }
116 |   
117 |   try {
118 |     return JSON.parse(body);
119 |   } catch (error) {
120 |     const err = new Error('Invalid JSON body');
121 |     err.code = 'INVALID_JSON';
122 |     err.statusCode = 400;
123 |     throw err;
124 |   }
125 | }
126 | 
127 | /**
128 |  * Create request validator
129 |  * @param {Object} schema - Validation schema
130 |  * @returns {Function} Validator function
131 |  */
132 | export function validate(schema) {
133 |   return (body) => {
134 |     const errors = [];
135 |     
136 |     for (const [field, rules] of Object.entries(schema)) {
137 |       const value = body[field];
138 |       
139 |       // Required check
140 |       if (rules.required && (value === undefined || value === null || value === '')) {
141 |         errors.push(`${field} is required`);
142 |         continue;
143 |       }
144 |       
145 |       // Skip further validation if not required and empty
146 |       if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') {
147 |         continue;
148 |       }
149 |       
150 |       // Type check
151 |       if (rules.type) {
152 |         const actualType = typeof value;
153 |         if (actualType !== rules.type && !isTypeMatch(actualType, rules.type)) {
154 |           errors.push(`${field} must be of type ${rules.type}`);
155 |         }
156 |       }
157 |       
158 |       // Custom validator
159 |       if (rules.validate && typeof rules.validate === 'function') {
160 |         const result = rules.validate(value);
161 |         if (result !== true) {
162 |           errors.push(`${field}: ${result}`);
163 |         }
164 |       }
165 |       
166 |       // Range validation for numbers
167 |       if (rules.min !== undefined && Number(value) < rules.min) {
168 |         errors.push(`${field} must be at least ${rules.min}`);
169 |       }
170 |       
171 |       if (rules.max !== undefined && Number(value) > rules.max) {
172 |         errors.push(`${field} must be at most ${rules.max}`);
173 |       }
174 |       
175 |       // Length validation for strings
176 |       if (rules.minLength !== undefined && String(value).length < rules.minLength) {
177 |         errors.push(`${field} must be at least ${rules.minLength} characters`);
178 |       }
179 |       
180 |       if (rules.maxLength !== undefined && String(value).length > rules.maxLength) {
181 |         errors.push(`${field} must be at most ${rules.maxLength} characters`);
182 |       }
183 |       
184 |       // Enum validation
185 |       if (rules.enum && !rules.enum.includes(value)) {
186 |         errors.push(`${field} must be one of: ${rules.enum.join(', ')}`);
187 |       }
188 |     }
189 |     
190 |     if (errors.length > 0) {
191 |       const error = new Error(errors.join('; '));
192 |       error.code = 'VALIDATION_ERROR';
193 |       error.statusCode = 400;
194 |       error.details = errors;
195 |       throw error;
196 |     }
197 |     
198 |     return true;
199 |   };
200 | }
201 | 
202 | function isTypeMatch(actual, expected) {
203 |   const typeMap = {
204 |     number: ['number', 'integer'],
205 |     integer: ['number', 'integer'],
206 |     string: ['string'],
207 |     boolean: ['boolean'],
208 |     array: ['array'],
209 |     object: ['object'],
210 |   };
211 |   
212 |   return typeMap[expected]?.includes(actual) || false;
213 | }
214 | 
215 | export default {
216 |   validateRequired,
217 |   isValidEmail,
218 |   isValidUUID,
219 |   isPositiveNumber,
220 |   sanitizeString,
221 |   validateFile,
222 |   validateJSONBody,
223 |   validate,
224 | };
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/agentic-api.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/agentic-api.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * @file agentic-api.js
  3 |  * @description Main agentic analysis endpoint — POST /api/agentic/analyze
  4 |  *
  5 |  * This is the primary entry point for the unified multi-agent analytics pipeline.
  6 |  * It accepts a dataset ID and an optional user goal, runs the appropriate workflow,
  7 |  * and returns both the dashboard and the full agentic reasoning trace.
  8 |  *
  9 |  * Existing endpoints are untouched — this adds new capability alongside them.
 10 |  */
 11 | 
 12 | import express from 'express';
 13 | import { ExecutionContext }  from '../services/agentic/core/agentic-framework.js';
 14 | import { globalRegistry }   from '../services/agentic/core/agent-registry.js';
 15 | import { selectWorkflow }   from '../config/workflows.js';
 16 | 
 17 | const router = express.Router();
 18 | 
 19 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 20 | // POST /api/agentic/analyze
 21 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 22 | 
 23 | /**
 24 |  * Run the full agentic analysis pipeline for a dataset.
 25 |  *
 26 |  * Body:
 27 |  *   datasetId    {string}  required
 28 |  *   goal         {string}  optional  — natural-language analysis goal
 29 |  *   options      {object}  optional
 30 |  *     includeReasoning {boolean}  — include agent trail in response (default: true)
 31 |  *     quick            {boolean}  — use quick workflow (fewer agents)
 32 |  *     deep             {boolean}  — use deep workflow (all tools)
 33 |  *     workflowId       {string}   — explicit workflow override
 34 |  *     preferredProviders {string[]} — AI providers to prefer
 35 |  *
 36 |  * Response:
 37 |  *   ok           {boolean}
 38 |  *   requestId    {string}
 39 |  *   dashboard    {object}
 40 |  *   agenticFlow  {object}  — only present when includeReasoning=true
 41 |  *   meta         {object}
 42 |  */
 43 | router.post('/analyze', async (req, res) => {
 44 |   const {
 45 |     datasetId,
 46 |     goal    = '',
 47 |     options = {},
 48 |   } = req.body ?? {};
 49 | 
 50 |   // ── Validation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 51 |   if (!datasetId) {
 52 |     return res.status(400).json({
 53 |       ok:    false,
 54 |       error: 'datasetId is required',
 55 |     });
 56 |   }
 57 | 
 58 |   const includeReasoning = options.includeReasoning !== false; // default true
 59 | 
 60 |   // ── Build execution context ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 61 |   // TODO: Replace placeholder rows/schema with real data from your dataset store
 62 |   let rows   = [];
 63 |   let schema = {};
 64 | 
 65 |   try {
 66 |     // Hook into your existing dataset service here, e.g.:
 67 |     //   const dataset = await datasetService.getById(datasetId);
 68 |     //   rows   = dataset.rows;
 69 |     //   schema = dataset.schema;
 70 |     //
 71 |     // For now we pass empty defaults so the framework wires up correctly.
 72 |   } catch (loadErr) {
 73 |     return res.status(404).json({
 74 |       ok:    false,
 75 |       error: `Dataset "${datasetId}" not found: ${loadErr.message}`,
 76 |     });
 77 |   }
 78 | 
 79 |   const context = new ExecutionContext({
 80 |     datasetId,
 81 |     schema,
 82 |     rows,
 83 |     goal,
 84 |     userId:  req.user?.id ?? null,
 85 |     options,
 86 |   });
 87 | 
 88 |   // ── Select workflow ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 89 |   const workflow = selectWorkflow(goal, options);
 90 | 
 91 |   // ── Execute pipeline ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 92 |   const startTime   = Date.now();
 93 |   let currentCtx    = context;
 94 |   const stageResults = [];
 95 |   let finalDashboard = null;
 96 |   let totalTokens    = 0;
 97 |   let pipelineError  = null;
 98 | 
 99 |   try {
100 |     for (const step of workflow.steps) {
101 |       const agent = globalRegistry.getAgent(step.agentId);
102 | 
103 |       if (!agent) {
104 |         if (step.required) {
105 |           throw new Error(`Required agent "${step.agentId}" is not registered`);
106 |         }
107 |         console.warn(`[agentic-api] Optional agent "${step.agentId}" not found — skipping`);
108 |         continue;
109 |       }
110 | 
111 |       const result = await agent.run(currentCtx);
112 | 
113 |       stageResults.push({
114 |         stage:    stageResults.length + 1,
115 |         agent:    step.agentId,
116 |         name:     agent.name,
117 |         status:   result.status,
118 |         decision: result.reasoning,
119 |         latency:  result.latency,
120 |         output:   includeReasoning ? result.output : undefined,
121 |       });
122 | 
123 |       totalTokens += result.tokensUsed ?? 0;
124 | 
125 |       // Update context with this agent's step
126 |       currentCtx = currentCtx.recordAgentStep(
127 |         step.agentId,
128 |         result.reasoning,
129 |         result.output
130 |       );
131 | 
132 |       // Capture final dashboard from the orchestrator
133 |       if (step.agentId === 'orchestrator' && result.output?.dashboard) {
134 |         finalDashboard = result.output.dashboard;
135 |       }
136 | 
137 |       // Abort pipeline on required agent failure
138 |       if (result.isError && step.required) {
139 |         throw new Error(`Pipeline aborted: required agent "${step.agentId}" failed — ${result.reasoning}`);
140 |       }
141 |     }
142 |   } catch (err) {
143 |     pipelineError = err.message;
144 |   }
145 | 
146 |   const totalLatency = Date.now() - startTime;
147 | 
148 |   // ── Build response ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
149 |   const response = {
150 |     ok:        !pipelineError,
151 |     requestId: context.requestId,
152 |     dashboard: finalDashboard ?? { title: 'Partial Results', cards: [] },
153 |     meta: {
154 |       workflowId:    workflow.id,
155 |       workflowName:  workflow.name,
156 |       totalLatencyMs: totalLatency,
157 |       tokensUsed:    [REDACTED_SECRET],
158 |       stagesRun:     stageResults.length,
159 |     },
160 |   };
161 | 
162 |   if (pipelineError) {
163 |     response.error = pipelineError;
164 |   }
165 | 
166 |   if (includeReasoning) {
167 |     response.agenticFlow = {
168 |       requestId:      context.requestId,
169 |       workflowId:     workflow.id,
170 |       stages:         stageResults,
171 |       totalLatencyMs: totalLatency,
172 |       tokensUsed:     [REDACTED_SECRET],
173 |     };
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   return res.status(pipelineError ? 500 : 200).json(response);
177 | });
178 | 
179 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
180 | // GET /api/agentic/agents — list all registered agents
181 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
182 | 
183 | router.get('/agents', (_req, res) => {
184 |   res.json({
185 |     ok:     true,
186 |     agents: globalRegistry.listAgents(),
187 |     total:  globalRegistry.size,
188 |   });
189 | });
190 | 
191 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
192 | // GET /api/agentic/workflows — list available workflows
193 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
194 | 
195 | router.get('/workflows', (_req, res) => {
196 |   const { listWorkflows } = await import('../config/workflows.js');
197 |   res.json({
198 |     ok:        true,
199 |     workflows: listWorkflows(),
200 |   });
201 | });
202 | 
203 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
204 | // GET /api/agentic/health — framework health check
205 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
206 | 
207 | router.get('/health', (_req, res) => {
208 |   const status = globalRegistry.getStatus();
209 |   res.json({
210 |     ok:         true,
211 |     status:     'healthy',
212 |     registry:   status,
213 |     timestamp:  new Date().toISOString(),
214 |   });
215 | });
216 | 
217 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
218 | // GET /api/agentic/metrics — per-agent performance metrics
219 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
220 | 
221 | router.get('/metrics', (_req, res) => {
222 |   res.json({
223 |     ok:      true,
224 |     metrics: globalRegistry.collectMetrics(),
225 |   });
226 | });
227 | 
228 | export default router;
229 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/agentic-data-science.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/agentic-data-science.js`

```js
  1 | import { mlClient } from '../services/ml/ml-client.js';
  2 | import { getDatasetMetadataById, getDatasetRowsById } from '../services/ml/dataset-adapter.js';
  3 | 
  4 | function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
  5 |   response.writeHead(statusCode, { 'content-type': 'application/json' });
  6 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
  7 | }
  8 | 
  9 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
 10 |   const chunks = [];
 11 |   for await (const chunk of request) chunks.push(chunk);
 12 |   const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString('utf8');
 13 |   return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
 14 | }
 15 | 
 16 | function audit(agent, model, action, status = 'success', details = {}) {
 17 |   return {
 18 |     agent,
 19 |     model,
 20 |     action,
 21 |     status,
 22 |     details,
 23 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
 24 |   };
 25 | }
 26 | 
 27 | function createDashboardPlan(profile = {}, correlations = {}, anomalies = {}) {
 28 |   const measures = profile.measures || Object.keys(profile.numericSummary || {});
 29 |   const dimensions = profile.dimensions || [];
 30 |   const charts = [];
 31 | 
 32 |   if (measures.length) {
 33 |     charts.push({
 34 |       type: 'kpi',
 35 |       title: `Average ${measures[0]}`,
 36 |       measure: measures[0],
 37 |       aggregation: 'mean',
 38 |     });
 39 |   }
 40 | 
 41 |   if (dimensions.length && measures.length) {
 42 |     charts.push({
 43 |       type: 'bar',
 44 |       title: `${measures[0]} by ${dimensions[0]}`,
 45 |       x: dimensions[0],
 46 |       y: measures[0],
 47 |       aggregation: 'mean',
 48 |     });
 49 |   }
 50 | 
 51 |   if (measures.length >= 2) {
 52 |     charts.push({
 53 |       type: 'scatter',
 54 |       title: `${measures[0]} vs ${measures[1]}`,
 55 |       x: measures[0],
 56 |       y: measures[1],
 57 |     });
 58 |   }
 59 | 
 60 |   return {
 61 |     valid: true,
 62 |     charts,
 63 |     warnings: [
 64 |       ...(correlations?.strongPairs?.length ? [] : ['No strong numeric correlations found.']),
 65 |       ...(anomalies?.summary?.count || anomalies?.summary?.anomalyCount
 66 |         ? [`${anomalies.summary.count || anomalies.summary.anomalyCount} anomalies detected.`]
 67 |         : []),
 68 |     ],
 69 |   };
 70 | }
 71 | 
 72 | export async function handleAgenticDataScienceRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 73 |   try {
 74 |     const match = pathname.match(/^\/api\/agentic-ds\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/full-analysis$/);
 75 |     if (request.method !== 'POST' || !match) return false;
 76 | 
 77 |     const datasetId = decodeURIComponent(match[1]);
 78 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 79 |     const records = Array.isArray(body.records) || Array.isArray(body.rows)
 80 |       ? body.records || body.rows
 81 |       : await getDatasetRowsById(datasetId);
 82 |     const metadata = await getDatasetMetadataById(datasetId);
 83 |     const target = body.target;
 84 |     const auditTrail = [];
 85 | 
 86 |     auditTrail.push(audit('Schema Agent', process.env.AGENTIC_SCHEMA_MODEL || 'deterministic-python', 'profile dataset'));
 87 |     const profile = await mlClient.profile(records, { datasetId });
 88 | 
 89 |     auditTrail.push(audit('Analytics Tool Agent', 'python-fastapi', 'calculate correlations'));
 90 |     const correlations = await mlClient.correlations(records);
 91 | 
 92 |     auditTrail.push(audit('Analytics Tool Agent', 'python-fastapi', 'detect anomalies'));
 93 |     const anomalies = await mlClient.anomalies(records);
 94 | 
 95 |     let featureImportance = null;
 96 |     let model = null;
 97 |     const profileMeasures = profile.measures || Object.keys(profile.numericSummary || {});
 98 |     const profileDimensions = profile.dimensions || [];
 99 |     const targetExists = [...profileMeasures, ...profileDimensions, ...(profile.columns || []).map((column) => column.name)].includes(target);
100 | 
101 |     if (target && targetExists) {
102 |       auditTrail.push(audit('ML Agent', 'scikit-learn', `train model for target ${target}`));
103 |       featureImportance = await mlClient.featureImportance(records, target);
104 |       model = await mlClient.trainModel(records, target);
105 |     }
106 | 
107 |     auditTrail.push(audit('RAG Memory Agent', process.env.AGENTIC_EMBED_MODEL || 'nomic-embed-text:latest', 'generate future RAG/fine-tune records'));
108 |     const trainingMemory = await mlClient.ragTrainingRecords(records, {
109 |       dataset_name: body.datasetName || metadata.name || datasetId,
110 |       goal: body.goal || 'agentic analytics',
111 |       max_examples: 50,
112 |     });
113 | 
114 |     auditTrail.push(audit('Dashboard Guardian', process.env.AGENTIC_GUARDIAN_MODEL || 'deterministic-validator', 'validate analytics output'));
115 |     const dashboardPlan = createDashboardPlan(profile, correlations, anomalies);
116 | 
117 |     auditTrail.push(audit('Final Explanation Agent', process.env.AGENTIC_GENERAL_MODEL || 'local-summary', 'summarize deterministic outputs'));
118 | 
119 |     sendJson(response, 200, {
120 |       ok: true,
121 |       datasetId,
122 |       type: 'agentic-data-science-analysis',
123 |       auditTrail,
124 |       result: {
125 |         metadata,
126 |         profile,
127 |         correlations,
128 |         anomalies,
129 |         featureImportance,
130 |         model,
131 |         dashboardPlan,
132 |         trainingMemory,
133 |       },
134 |     });
135 |     return true;
136 |   } catch (error) {
137 |     sendJson(response, error.statusCode || error.status || 500, {
138 |       ok: false,
139 |       error: error.message || 'Agentic DS analysis failed',
140 |     });
141 |     return true;
142 |   }
143 | }
144 | 
```

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/agentic-models.js`

```js
  1 | import { publicModelConfig, AGENTIC_MODELS } from '../config/agentic-models.js';
  2 | import { pingOllamaModels } from '../services/agentic/ollama-agent-router.js';
  3 | import {
  4 |   runModelAwareAgenticAnalysis,
  5 |   runModelAwareAgenticChat,
  6 | } from '../services/agentic/model-aware-agentic-orchestrator.js';
  7 | import { getDatasetById } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
  8 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  9 | import { HTTP_STATUS } from '../config/constants.js';
 10 | 
 11 | async function parseJsonBody(request) {
 12 |   if (request.body && typeof request.body === 'object') return request.body;
 13 | 
 14 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 15 |     let body = '';
 16 |     request.on('data', (chunk) => {
 17 |       body += chunk.toString();
 18 |       if (body.length > 10_000_000) {
 19 |         reject(new Error('Request body too large'));
 20 |       }
 21 |     });
 22 |     request.on('end', () => {
 23 |       if (!body.trim()) return resolve({});
 24 |       try {
 25 |         resolve(JSON.parse(body));
 26 |       } catch (error) {
 27 |         reject(new Error(`Invalid JSON body: ${error.message}`));
 28 |       }
 29 |     });
 30 |     request.on('error', reject);
 31 |   });
 32 | }
 33 | 
 34 | function datasetIdFromPath(pathname, suffix) {
 35 |   const prefix = '/api/agentic-models/datasets/';
 36 |   if (!pathname.startsWith(prefix) || !pathname.endsWith(suffix)) return null;
 37 |   return pathname.slice(prefix.length, pathname.length - suffix.length).replace(/^\/+|\/+$/g, '');
 38 | }
 39 | 
 40 | async function loadDatasetOrThrow(datasetId) {
 41 |   let dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 42 |   if (!dataset && globalThis.__INSIGHTFLOW_E2E_STORE__?.datasets) {
 43 |     dataset = globalThis.__INSIGHTFLOW_E2E_STORE__.datasets.get(datasetId);
 44 |   }
 45 |   if (!dataset) {
 46 |     const err = new Error(`Dataset not found: ${datasetId}`);
 47 |     err.statusCode = HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND;
 48 |     throw err;
 49 |   }
 50 |   return dataset;
 51 | }
 52 | 
 53 | export async function handleAgenticModelRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 54 |   const { method } = request;
 55 | 
 56 |   if (pathname === '/api/agentic-models/config' && method === 'GET') {
 57 |     sendSuccess(response, publicModelConfig(), 'Agentic model config loaded');
 58 |     return true;
 59 |   }
 60 | 
 61 |   if (pathname === '/api/agentic-models/health' && method === 'GET') {
 62 |     const models = Object.values(AGENTIC_MODELS);
 63 |     const checks = await pingOllamaModels(models);
 64 |     sendSuccess(response, { checks }, 'Agentic model health checked');
 65 |     return true;
 66 |   }
 67 | 
 68 |   const analysisDatasetId = datasetIdFromPath(pathname, '/analyze');
 69 |   if (analysisDatasetId && method === 'POST') {
 70 |     try {
 71 |       const body = await parseJsonBody(request);
 72 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetOrThrow(analysisDatasetId);
 73 |       const result = await runModelAwareAgenticAnalysis({
 74 |         rows: dataset.rows || [],
 75 |         columns: dataset.columns || [],
 76 |         goal: body.goal || 'Create the best data analytics dashboard.',
 77 |       });
 78 |       sendSuccess(response, result, 'Model-aware agentic analysis complete');
 79 |       return true;
 80 |     } catch (error) {
 81 |       sendError(
 82 |         response,
 83 |         error.statusCode || HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 84 |         error.message || 'Agentic analysis failed',
 85 |         'AGENTIC_ANALYSIS_ERROR',
 86 |       );
 87 |       return true;
 88 |     }
 89 |   }
 90 | 
 91 |   const chatDatasetId = datasetIdFromPath(pathname, '/chat');
 92 |   if (chatDatasetId && method === 'POST') {
 93 |     try {
 94 |       const body = await parseJsonBody(request);
 95 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetOrThrow(chatDatasetId);
 96 |       const result = await runModelAwareAgenticChat({
 97 |         rows: dataset.rows || [],
 98 |         columns: dataset.columns || [],
 99 |         message: body.message || body.query || '',
100 |         history: body.history || [],
101 |       });
102 |       sendSuccess(response, result, 'Model-aware agentic chat complete');
103 |       return true;
104 |     } catch (error) {
105 |       sendError(
106 |         response,
107 |         error.statusCode || HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
108 |         error.message || 'Agentic chat failed',
109 |         'AGENTIC_CHAT_ERROR',
110 |       );
111 |       return true;
112 |     }
113 |   }
114 | 
115 |   return false;
116 | }
117 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/ai-analyst.routes.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/ai-analyst.routes.js`

```js
 1 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
 2 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
 3 | import {
 4 |   runFullAutoAnalysis,
 5 |   runAnalystCommand,
 6 | } from '../services/ai-analyst/ai-analyst-orchestrator.js';
 7 | import { getDatasetById } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
 8 | 
 9 | async function getRequestBody(request) {
10 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
11 |     let body = '';
12 |     request.on('data', (chunk) => {
13 |       body += chunk.toString();
14 |     });
15 |     request.on('end', () => {
16 |       try {
17 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
18 |       } catch (error) {
19 |         reject(new Error('Invalid JSON body'));
20 |       }
21 |     });
22 |     request.on('error', reject);
23 |   });
24 | }
25 | 
26 | export async function handleAiAnalystRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
27 |   const { method } = request;
28 | 
29 |   // POST /api/datasets/:id/ai-analyst/analyze
30 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/ai-analyst\/analyze$/) && method === 'POST') {
31 |     try {
32 |       const parts = pathname.split('/');
33 |       const datasetId = parts[3];
34 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
35 | 
36 |       if (!dataset) {
37 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
38 |         return true;
39 |       }
40 | 
41 |       const analysis = await runFullAutoAnalysis(dataset);
42 | 
43 |       sendSuccess(response, { analysis }, 'AI Analyst analysis complete');
44 |       return true;
45 |     } catch (error) {
46 |       console.error('[AI-ANALYST] Analyze error:', error);
47 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, error.message || 'Analysis failed', ERROR_CODES.INTERNAL_ERROR);
48 |       return true;
49 |     }
50 |   }
51 | 
52 |   // POST /api/datasets/:id/ai-analyst/command
53 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/ai-analyst\/command$/) && method === 'POST') {
54 |     try {
55 |       const parts = pathname.split('/');
56 |       const datasetId = parts[3];
57 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
58 | 
59 |       if (!dataset) {
60 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
61 |         return true;
62 |       }
63 | 
64 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
65 | 
66 |       const result = await runAnalystCommand({
67 |         dataset,
68 |         currentAnalysis: body.currentAnalysis,
69 |         command: body.command || body.query,
70 |         filters: body.filters || {},
71 |       });
72 | 
73 |       sendSuccess(response, { result }, 'AI Analyst command executed');
74 |       return true;
75 |     } catch (error) {
76 |       console.error('[AI-ANALYST] Command error:', error);
77 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, error.message || 'Command failed', ERROR_CODES.INTERNAL_ERROR);
78 |       return true;
79 |     }
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   return false;
83 | }
84 | 
85 | export default {
86 |   handleAiAnalystRoutes,
87 | };
88 | 
```

```js
  1 | // AI provider routes and status
  2 | import QRCode from 'qrcode';
  3 | import { aiManager } from '../services/ai/ai-manager.js';
  4 | import { getOllamaStatus } from '../services/ollama/ollama-dual-model-service.js';

  9 | import { sendJson, sendSuccess, sendError, sendAIStatus } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
 10 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
 11 | import { ValidationError } from '../middleware/error-handler.js';
 12 | 
 13 | export async function handleAIRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 14 |   const { method } = request;
 15 | 
 16 |   // GET /api/ai/ollama-status - Get dual Ollama model status
 17 |   if (pathname === '/api/ai/ollama-status' && method === 'GET') {
 18 |     try {
 19 |       const status = await getOllamaStatus();
 20 | 
 21 |       sendSuccess(
 22 |         response,
 23 |         {
 24 |           ollama: status,
 25 |           usage: {
 26 |             dashboardChatbot: status.dashboardModel,
 27 |             aiChat: status.chatModel,
 28 |           },
 29 |         },
 30 |         'Ollama dual-model status',
 31 |       );
 32 | 
 33 |       return true;
 34 |     } catch (error) {
 35 |       sendError(
 36 |         response,
 37 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 38 |         error.message || 'Failed to get Ollama status',
 39 |         ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED,
 40 |       );
 41 | 
 42 |       return true;
 43 |     }
 44 |   }
 45 | 
 46 |   // GET /api/ai/status - Get AI provider status
 47 |   if (pathname === '/api/ai/status' && method === 'GET') {
 48 |     try {
 49 |       const health = await aiManager.health();
 50 |       sendAIStatus(response, Object.values(health.providers));
 51 |       return true;
 52 |     } catch (error) {
 53 |       console.error('AI status error:', error);
 54 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, 'Failed to get AI status', ERROR_CODES.AI_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE);
 55 |       return true;
 56 |     }
 57 |   }
 58 | 
 59 |   // GET /api/ai/providers - Get available AI providers
 60 |   if (pathname === '/api/ai/providers' && method === 'GET') {
 61 |     try {
 62 |       const providers = await aiManager.getAvailableProviders();
 63 |       sendSuccess(response, providers, 'Available AI providers');
 64 |       return true;
 65 |     } catch (error) {
 66 |       console.error('AI providers error:', error);
 67 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, 'Failed to get AI providers', ERROR_CODES.AI_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE);
 68 |       return true;
 69 |     }
 70 |   }
 71 | 
 72 |   // GET /api/ai/stats - Get AI usage statistics
 73 |   if (pathname === '/api/ai/stats' && method === 'GET') {
 74 |     try {
 75 |       const stats = aiManager.getStats();
 76 |       sendSuccess(response, stats, 'AI usage statistics');
 77 |       return true;
 78 |     } catch (error) {
 79 |       console.error('AI stats error:', error);
 80 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, 'Failed to get AI stats', ERROR_CODES.AI_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE);
 81 |       return true;
 82 |     }
 83 |   }
 84 | 
 85 |   // POST /api/ai/test - Test AI generation
 86 |   if (pathname === '/api/ai/test' && method === 'POST') {
 87 |     try {
 88 |       // Parse request body
 89 |       const body = await parseRequestBody(request);
 90 |       
 91 |       // Validate input
 92 |       const { prompt, provider, options = {} } = body;
 93 |       if (!prompt || typeof prompt !== 'string') {
 94 |         throw new ValidationError('Prompt is required and must be a string');
 95 |       }
 96 | 
 97 |       if (prompt.length > 10000) {
 98 |         throw new ValidationError('Prompt too long (max 10000 characters)');
 99 |       }
100 | 
101 |       // Set preferred provider if specified
102 |       if (provider && typeof provider === 'string') {
103 |         options.preferredProvider = provider;
104 |       }
105 | 
106 |       console.log(`🧪 Testing AI with prompt: "${prompt.substring(0, 50)}..."`);
107 |       
108 |       // Generate response
109 |       const result = await aiManager.generateResponse(prompt, options);
110 |       
111 |       if (result.success) {
112 |         sendSuccess(response, {
113 |           prompt: prompt.substring(0, 100) + (prompt.length > 100 ? '...' : ''),
114 |           response: result.content,
115 |           provider: result.provider,
116 |           model: result.model,
117 |           duration: result.duration,
118 |           tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
119 |           fallback: result.fallback || false
120 |         }, 'AI test successful');
121 |       } else {
122 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, result.error || 'AI generation failed', ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED);
123 |       }
124 |       
125 |       return true;
126 |     } catch (error) {
127 |       console.error('AI test error:', error);
128 |       
129 |       if (error instanceof ValidationError) {
130 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, error.message, ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
131 |       } else {
132 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, 'AI test failed', ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED);
133 |       }
134 |       return true;
135 |     }
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   // POST /api/ai/chat - Test AI chat
139 |   if (pathname === '/api/ai/chat' && method === 'POST') {
140 |     try {
141 |       // Parse request body
142 |       const body = await parseRequestBody(request);
143 |       
144 |       // Validate input
145 |       const { messages, provider, options = {} } = body;
146 |       if (!messages || !Array.isArray(messages)) {
147 |         throw new ValidationError('Messages array is required');
148 |       }
149 | 
150 |       if (messages.length === 0) {
151 |         throw new ValidationError('At least one message is required');
152 |       }
153 | 
154 |       // Validate message format
155 |       for (const msg of messages) {
156 |         if (!msg.role || !msg.content) {
157 |           throw new ValidationError('Each message must have role and content');
158 |         }
159 |         if (!['user', 'assistant', 'system'].includes(msg.role)) {
160 |           throw new ValidationError('Invalid message role');
161 |         }
162 |       }
163 | 
164 |       // Set preferred provider if specified
165 |       if (provider && typeof provider === 'string') {
166 |         options.preferredProvider = provider;
167 |       }
168 | 
169 |       console.log(`🧪 Testing AI chat with ${messages.length} messages`);
170 |       
171 |       // Generate chat response
172 |       const result = await aiManager.chat(messages, options);
173 |       
174 |       if (result.success) {
175 |         sendSuccess(response, {
176 |           messages: messages.map(m => ({
177 |             role: m.role,
178 |             content: m.content.substring(0, 100) + (m.content.length > 100 ? '...' : '')
179 |           })),
180 |           response: result.content,
181 |           provider: result.provider,
182 |           model: result.model,
183 |           duration: result.duration,
184 |           fallback: result.fallback || false
185 |         }, 'AI chat test successful');
186 |       } else {
187 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, result.error || 'AI chat failed', ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED);
188 |       }
189 |       
190 |       return true;
191 |     } catch (error) {
192 |       console.error('AI chat test error:', error);
193 |       
194 |       if (error instanceof ValidationError) {
195 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, error.message, ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
196 |       } else {
197 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, 'AI chat test failed', ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED);
198 |       }
199 |       return true;
200 |     }
201 |   }

280 |   if (pathname === '/api/qr-upload/generate' && method === 'POST') {
281 |     try {
282 |       const body = await parseRequestBody(request);
283 |       const session = createQrUploadSession({
284 |         portalBaseUrl:
285 |           body.portalBaseUrl ||
286 |           process.env.FRONTEND_PUBLIC_URL ||
287 |           process.env.VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL ||
288 |           request.headers.origin ||
289 |           getDefaultPortalBaseUrl(request),
290 |         workspaceName: body.workspaceName || 'InsightFlow Workspace',
291 |       });
292 | 
293 |       const qrDataUrl = await QRCode.toDataURL(session.uploadUrl, {
294 |         margin: 1,
295 |         width: 320,
296 |         color: {
297 |           dark: '#111827',
298 |           light: '#ffffff',
299 |         },
300 |       });
301 |       
302 |       sendSuccess(response, {
303 |         sessionId: session.sessionId,
304 |         uploadToken: [REDACTED_SECRET],
305 |         expiresAt: session.expiresAt,
306 |         uploadUrl: session.uploadUrl,
307 |         qrDataUrl,
308 |         workspaceName: session.workspaceName,
309 |         status: session.status,
310 |       }, 'QR session generated');
311 |       return true;
312 |     } catch (error) {
313 |       console.error('QR generate error:', error);
314 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to generate QR session', ERROR_CODES.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);
315 |       return true;
316 |     }
317 |   }
318 | 
319 |   // GET /api/qr-upload/:sessionId/status - Get QR session status
320 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/qr-upload\/[^/]+\/status$/) && method === 'GET') {
321 |     try {
322 |       const parts = pathname.split('/');
323 |       const sessionId = parts[3];
324 |       const token = request.searchParams?.get('token') || new URL(request.url, `http://${request.headers.host}`).searchParams.get('token');
325 | 
326 |       const session = verifyQrUploadSession(sessionId, token);
327 |       
328 |       sendSuccess(response, {
329 |         sessionId: session.sessionId,
330 |         status: session.status,
331 |         workspaceName: session.workspaceName,
332 |         files: session.files,
333 |         dataset: session.dataset,
334 |         analysis: session.analysis,
335 |         error: session.error,
336 |         expiresAt: session.expiresAt,
337 |       }, 'Session status retrieved');
338 |       return true;
339 |     } catch (error) {
340 |       console.error('QR status error:', error);
341 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, error.message || 'Failed to get session status', ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
342 |       return true;
343 |     }
344 |   }
345 | 
346 |   return false;
347 | }
348 | 
349 | function getDefaultPortalBaseUrl(request) {
350 |   const protocol = request.headers['x-forwarded-proto'] || 'http';
351 |   const host = request.headers.host || 'localhost:3001';
352 | 
353 |   if (host === 'localhost:3001') {
354 |     return `${protocol}://localhost:5173`;
355 |   }
356 | 
357 |   if (host === '127.0.0.1:3001') {
358 |     return `${protocol}://127.0.0.1:5173`;
359 |   }
360 | 
361 |   return `${protocol}://${host}`;
362 | }
363 | 
364 | /**
365 |  * Parse request body from stream
366 |  */
367 | async function parseRequestBody(request) {
368 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
369 |     let body = '';
370 |     
371 |     request.on('data', chunk => {
372 |       body += chunk.toString();
373 |       
374 |       // Prevent memory issues with large payloads
375 |       if (body.length > 1024 * 1024) { // 1MB limit
376 |         reject(new Error('Request body too large'));
377 |         return;
378 |       }
379 |     });
380 |     
381 |     request.on('end', () => {
382 |       try {
383 |         const parsed = body ? JSON.parse(body) : {};
384 |         resolve(parsed);
385 |       } catch (error) {
386 |         reject(new Error('Invalid JSON in request body'));
387 |       }
388 |     });
389 |     
390 |     request.on('error', reject);
391 |   });
392 | }
393 | 
394 | export default {
395 |   handleAIRoutes
396 | };
397 | 
```

```js
  1 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from "../config/constants.js";
  2 | import { getDatasetById } from "../database/dataset-repository.js";
  3 | import { sendError, sendSuccess } from "../utils/response-utils.js";
  4 | import {
  5 |   analyzeDatasetWithAnalyticsBrain,
  6 |   getAnalyticsBrainMemory,
  7 |   saveAnalyticsBrainFeedback,
  8 | } from "../services/analytics-brain-service.js";
  9 | 
 10 | async function getRequestBody(request) {
 11 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 12 |     let body = "";
 13 |     request.on("data", (chunk) => {
 14 |       body += chunk.toString();
 15 |     });
 16 |     request.on("end", () => {
 17 |       try {
 18 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
 19 |       } catch {
 20 |         resolve({});
 21 |       }
 22 |     });
 23 |     request.on("error", reject);
 24 |   });
 25 | }
 26 | 
 27 | export async function handleAnalyticsBrainRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 28 |   const { method } = request;
 29 | 
 30 |   const analyzeMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/analytics-brain$/);
 31 | 
 32 |   if (method === "POST" && analyzeMatch) {
 33 |     try {
 34 |       const datasetId = analyzeMatch[1];
 35 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 36 | 
 37 |       if (!dataset) {
 38 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, "Dataset not found", ERROR_CODES.DATASET_NOT_FOUND);
 39 |         return true;
 40 |       }
 41 | 
 42 |       const result = await analyzeDatasetWithAnalyticsBrain(dataset);
 43 |       sendSuccess(response, result, "Analytics brain completed");
 44 |       return true;
 45 |     } catch (error) {
 46 |       console.error("[ANALYTICS BRAIN ERROR]", error);
 47 |       sendError(
 48 |         response,
 49 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 50 |         error.message || "Analytics brain failed",
 51 |         ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED,
 52 |       );
 53 |       return true;
 54 |     }
 55 |   }
 56 | 
 57 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/analytics-brain/feedback") {
 58 |     try {
 59 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
 60 |       const result = saveAnalyticsBrainFeedback({
 61 |         patternId: body.patternId,
 62 |         action: body.action,
 63 |         rating: body.rating,
 64 |         note: body.note,
 65 |       });
 66 | 
 67 |       sendSuccess(response, result, "Analytics brain feedback saved");
 68 |       return true;
 69 |     } catch (error) {
 70 |       console.error("[ANALYTICS BRAIN FEEDBACK ERROR]", error);
 71 |       sendError(
 72 |         response,
 73 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 74 |         error.message || "Feedback save failed",
 75 |         ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR,
 76 |       );
 77 |       return true;
 78 |     }
 79 |   }
 80 | 
 81 |   if (method === "GET" && pathname === "/api/analytics-brain/memory") {
 82 |     try {
 83 |       sendSuccess(response, { memory: getAnalyticsBrainMemory() }, "Analytics brain memory retrieved");
 84 |       return true;
 85 |     } catch (error) {
 86 |       sendError(
 87 |         response,
 88 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 89 |         error.message || "Memory read failed",
 90 |         ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR,
 91 |       );
 92 |       return true;
 93 |     }
 94 |   }
 95 | 
 96 |   return false;
 97 | }
 98 | 
 99 | export default {
100 |   handleAnalyticsBrainRoutes,
101 | };
102 |
```

```js
  1 | // Analytics-related routes with AI integration
  2 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  3 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
  4 | import { updateAnalysis } from './state.js';

 11 |   return getDatasetById(datasetId);
 12 | }
 13 | 
 14 | export async function handleAnalyticsRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 15 |   const { method } = request;
 16 | 
 17 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id/ai-correlations - AI-powered correlations
 18 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/ai-correlations$/) && method === 'GET') {
 19 |     try {
 20 |       const dataset = getRouteDataset(pathname);
 21 |       
 22 |       if (!dataset) {
 23 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
 24 |         return true;
 25 |       }
 26 |       
 27 |       const correlations = await MLClient.correlations(
 28 |         dataset,
 29 |         () => ({ method: 'pearson', matrix: [], strongPairs: calculateCorrelations(dataset) }),
 30 |       );
 31 |       
 32 |       sendSuccess(response, {
 33 |         correlations,
 34 |         summary: `Found ${correlations.length} correlations in the dataset`,
 35 |         hasGemini: false
 36 |       }, 'Correlations calculated');
 37 |       return true;
 38 |     } catch (error) {
 39 |       console.error('Correlations error:', error);
 40 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to find correlations', ERROR_CODES.AI_ERROR);
 41 |       return true;
 42 |     }
 43 |   }
 44 | 
 45 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id/ai/profile - AI profile analysis
 46 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/ai\/profile$/) && method === 'GET') {
 47 |     try {
 48 |       const dataset = getRouteDataset(pathname);
 49 |       
 50 |       if (!dataset) {
 51 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
 52 |         return true;
 53 |       }
 54 |       
 55 |       const profile = await MLClient.profile(dataset, () => generateDataProfile(dataset));
 56 |       
 57 |       sendSuccess(response, { profile }, 'Profile generated');
 58 |       return true;
 59 |     } catch (error) {
 60 |       console.error('Profile error:', error);
 61 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to generate profile', ERROR_CODES.AI_ERROR);
 62 |       return true;
 63 |     }
 64 |   }
 65 | 
 66 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id/ai/anomalies - AI anomaly detection

 68 |     try {
 69 |       const dataset = getRouteDataset(pathname);
 70 |       
 71 |       if (!dataset) {
 72 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
 73 |         return true;
 74 |       }
 75 |       
 76 |       const anomalies = await MLClient.anomalies(

 79 |       );
 80 |       
 81 |       sendSuccess(response, { anomalies }, 'Anomalies detected');

 85 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to detect anomalies', ERROR_CODES.AI_ERROR);
 86 |       return true;

 88 |   }
 89 | 
 90 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id/ai/relationships - AI relationship analysis

 92 |     try {

 94 |       
 95 |       if (!dataset) {

119 |       }
120 |       
121 |       const suggestions = generateCleaningSuggestions(dataset);

143 |       updateAnalysis(analysis);

165 |

172 |     }

175 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id/auto-charts - Generate auto charts
176 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/auto-charts$/) && method === 'GET') {
177 |     try {
178 |       const dataset = getRouteDataset(pathname);
179 |       
180 |       if (!dataset) {
181 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
182 |         return true;
183 |       }
184 |

186 |

188 |       return true;
189 |     } catch (error) {
```
