```js
191 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to generate auto charts', ERROR_CODES.AI_ERROR);
192 |       return true;
193 |     }
194 |   }
195 | 
196 |   return false;
197 | }
198 | 
199 | // Helper functions
200 | function calculateCorrelations(dataset) {
201 |   const { rows, columns } = dataset;
202 |   const numericCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.inferredType === 'numeric');
203 |   const correlations = [];
204 |   
205 |   for (let i = 0; i < numericCols.length; i++) {
206 |     for (let j = i + 1; j < numericCols.length; j++) {
207 |       const col1 = numericCols[i].name;
208 |       const col2 = numericCols[j].name;
209 |       const coef = calculatePearsonCorrelation(rows, col1, col2);
210 |       const absCoef = Math.abs(coef);
211 |       
212 |       correlations.push({
213 |         column1: col1,
214 |         column2: col2,
215 |         coefficient: parseFloat(coef.toFixed(3)),
216 |         strength: absCoef > 0.7 ? 'strong' : absCoef > 0.4 ? 'moderate' : 'weak',
217 |         interpretation: coef > 0 ? 'positive correlation' : 'negative correlation',
218 |         sampleSize: rows.length
219 |       });
220 |     }
221 |   }
222 |   
223 |   return correlations;
224 | }
225 | 
226 | function calculatePearsonCorrelation(rows, col1, col2) {
227 |   const values = rows.map(r => [parseFloat(r[col1]), parseFloat(r[col2])]).filter(v => !isNaN(v[0]) && !isNaN(v[1]));
228 |   if (values.length < 2) return 0;
229 |   
230 |   const n = values.length;
231 |   const sumX = values.reduce((s, v) => s + v[0], 0);
232 |   const sumY = values.reduce((s, v) => s + v[1], 0);
233 |   const sumXY = values.reduce((s, v) => s + v[0] * v[1], 0);
234 |   const sumX2 = values.reduce((s, v) => s + v[0] * v[0], 0);
235 |   const sumY2 = values.reduce((s, v) => s + v[1] * v[1], 0);
236 |   
237 |   const numerator = n * sumXY - sumX * sumY;
238 |   const denominator = Math.sqrt((n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX) * (n * sumY2 - sumY * sumY));
239 |   
240 |   return denominator === 0 ? 0 : numerator / denominator;
241 | }
242 | 
243 | function generateDataProfile(dataset) {
244 |   const { rows, columns } = dataset;
245 |   return {
246 |     rowCount: rows.length,
247 |     columnCount: columns.length,
248 |     columns: columns.map(c => ({
249 |       name: c.name,
250 |       type: c.type || c.inferredType || 'unknown',
251 |       missingValues: rows.filter(r => r[c.name] === null || r[c.name] === undefined).length,
252 |       uniqueValues: [...new Set(rows.map(r => r[c.name]))].length
253 |     })),
254 |     quality: {
255 |       completeness: ((rows.length * columns.length - rows.reduce((acc, r) => acc + columns.filter(c => r[c.name] === null || r[c.name] === undefined).length, 0)) / (rows.length * columns.length) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%',
256 |       issues: []
257 |     }
258 |   };
259 | }
260 | 
261 | function detectAnomalies(dataset) {
262 |   const { rows, columns } = dataset;
263 |   const numericCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.inferredType === 'numeric');
264 |   const anomalies = [];
265 |   
266 |   numericCols.forEach(col => {
267 |     const values = rows.map(r => parseFloat(r[col.name])).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
268 |     if (values.length === 0) return;
269 |     
270 |     const mean = values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length;
271 |     const std = Math.sqrt(values.reduce((a, v) => a + Math.pow(v - mean, 2), 0) / values.length);
272 |     
273 |     rows.forEach((row, idx) => {
274 |       const val = parseFloat(row[col.name]);
275 |       if (!isNaN(val) && std > 0 && Math.abs((val - mean) / std) > 2) {
276 |         anomalies.push({
277 |           row: idx,
278 |           column: col.name,
279 |           value: val,
280 |           zScore: parseFloat(((val - mean) / std).toFixed(2)),
281 |           type: 'statistical_outlier'
282 |         });
283 |       }
284 |     });
285 |   });
286 |   
287 |   return anomalies;
288 | }
289 | 
290 | function analyzeRelationships(dataset) {
291 |   const { columns } = dataset;
292 |   return {
293 |     numeric: columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.inferredType === 'numeric').map(c => c.name),
294 |     categorical: columns.filter(c => c.type === 'string' || c.inferredType === 'categorical').map(c => c.name),
295 |     temporal: columns.filter(c => c.type === 'date' || c.inferredType === 'date').map(c => c.name),
296 |     relationships: []
297 |   };
298 | }
299 | 
300 | function generateCleaningSuggestions(dataset) {
301 |   const { rows, columns } = dataset;
302 |   const suggestions = [];
303 |   
304 |   columns.forEach(col => {
305 |     const missingCount = rows.filter(r => r[col.name] === null || r[col.name] === undefined || r[col.name] === '').length;
306 |     if (missingCount > 0) {
307 |       suggestions.push({
308 |         column: col.name,
309 |         issue: 'missing_values',
310 |         count: missingCount,
311 |         suggestion: `Fill ${missingCount} missing values with ${col.type === 'number' ? 'mean/median' : 'mode'}`
312 |       });
313 |     }
314 |     
315 |     const uniqueValues = [...new Set(rows.map(r => r[col.name]))];
316 |     if (uniqueValues.length < rows.length * 0.05 && col.type !== 'string' && col.inferredType !== 'categorical') {
317 |       suggestions.push({
318 |         column: col.name,
319 |         issue: 'low_cardinality',
320 |         suggestion: 'Consider converting to categorical type'
321 |       });
322 |     }
323 |   });
324 |   
325 |   return suggestions;
326 | }
327 | 
328 | function analyzeDataset(dataset) {
329 |   const { rows, columns } = dataset;
330 |   const numericCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.inferredType === 'numeric');
331 |   
332 |   return {
333 |     summary: `Dataset with ${rows.length} rows and ${columns.length} columns`,
334 |     insights: [
335 |       `${numericCols.length} numeric columns available for analysis`,
336 |       `${columns.length - numericCols.length} categorical columns for grouping`
337 |     ],
338 |     statistics: numericCols.reduce((acc, col) => {
339 |       const values = rows.map(r => parseFloat(r[col.name])).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
340 |       if (values.length > 0) {
341 |         acc[col.name] = {
342 |           min: Math.min(...values),
343 |           max: Math.max(...values),
344 |           mean: values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length,
345 |           count: values.length
346 |         };
347 |       }
348 |       return acc;
349 |     }, {})
350 |   };
351 | }
352 | 
353 | function generateAutoCharts(dataset) {
354 |   const { columns } = dataset;
355 |   const numericCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.inferredType === 'numeric');
356 |   const categoricalCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'string' || c.inferredType === 'categorical');
357 |   
358 |   const charts = [];
359 |   
360 |   // Histograms for numeric columns
361 |   numericCols.slice(0, 3).forEach(col => {
362 |     charts.push({
363 |       type: 'histogram',
364 |       title: `Distribution of ${col.name}`,
365 |       xAxis: col.name,
366 |       yAxis: 'Count'
367 |     });
368 |   });
369 |   
370 |   // Bar charts for categorical + numeric
371 |   if (categoricalCols.length > 0 && numericCols.length > 0) {
372 |     charts.push({
373 |       type: 'bar',
374 |       title: `${categoricalCols[0].name} vs ${numericCols[0].name}`,
375 |       xAxis: categoricalCols[0].name,
376 |       yAxis: numericCols[0].name
377 |     });
378 |   }
379 |   
380 |   return charts;
381 | }
382 | 
383 | export default { handleAnalyticsRoutes };
384 | 
```

---

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/chat.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/chat.js`

```js
  1 | import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  2 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  3 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
  4 | import {
  5 |   clearChatMessages,
  6 |   getChatMessages,
  7 |   getDatasetById,
  8 |   saveChatMessage,
  9 | } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
 10 | import { runDashboardAIAgent } from '../services/dashboard-ai-agent.js';
 11 | import { runLlamaDatasetChat } from '../services/llama-chat-agent.js';
 12 | 
 13 | async function getRequestBody(request) {
 14 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 15 |     let body = '';
 16 | 
 17 |     request.on('data', (chunk) => {
 18 |       body += chunk.toString();
 19 | 
 20 |       if (body.length > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
 21 |         reject(new Error('Request body too large'));
 22 |       }
 23 |     });
 24 | 
 25 |     request.on('end', () => {
 26 |       try {
 27 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
 28 |       } catch {
 29 |         reject(new Error('Invalid JSON body'));
 30 |       }
 31 |     });
 32 | 
 33 |     request.on('error', reject);
 34 |   });
 35 | }
 36 | 
 37 | function normalizeMessage(message) {
 38 |   return {
 39 |     id: message.id,
 40 |     role: message.role,
 41 |     content: message.content,
 42 |     chart: message.chart || null,
 43 |     insights: message.insights || [],
 44 |     timestamp: message.timestamp || message.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
 45 |     provider: message.provider,
 46 |     model: message.model,
 47 |   };
 48 | }
 49 | 
 50 | export async function handleChatRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 51 |   const { method } = request;
 52 | 
 53 |   if (
 54 |     pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/dashboard-command$/) &&
 55 |     method === 'POST'
 56 |   ) {
 57 |     try {
 58 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/')[3];
 59 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
 60 |       const query = String(body.query || '').trim();
 61 | 
 62 |       if (!query) {
 63 |         sendError(
 64 |           response,
 65 |           HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST,
 66 |           'Query is required',
 67 |           ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR,
 68 |         );
 69 |         return true;
 70 |       }
 71 | 
 72 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 73 | 
 74 |       if (!dataset) {
 75 |         sendError(
 76 |           response,
 77 |           HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND,
 78 |           'Dataset not found',
 79 |           ERROR_CODES.DATASET_NOT_FOUND,
 80 |         );
 81 |         return true;
 82 |       }
 83 | 
 84 |       const result = await runDashboardAIAgent(dataset, query);
 85 | 
 86 |       sendSuccess(response, result, 'Dashboard AI command completed');
 87 |       return true;
 88 |     } catch (error) {
 89 |       console.error('[DASHBOARD AI ERROR]', error);
 90 | 
 91 |       sendError(
 92 |         response,
 93 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 94 |         error.message || 'Dashboard AI failed',
 95 |         ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED,
 96 |       );
 97 |       return true;
 98 |     }
 99 |   }
100 | 
101 |   if (
102 |     pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/chat$/) &&
103 |     method === 'POST'
104 |   ) {
105 |     try {
106 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/')[3];
107 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
108 |       const query = String(body.query || '').trim();
109 | 
110 |       if (!query) {
111 |         sendError(
112 |           response,
113 |           HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST,
114 |           'Query is required',
115 |           ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR,
116 |         );
117 |         return true;
118 |       }
119 | 
120 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
121 | 
122 |       if (!dataset) {
123 |         sendError(
124 |           response,
125 |           HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND,
126 |           'Dataset not found',
127 |           ERROR_CODES.DATASET_NOT_FOUND,
128 |         );
129 |         return true;
130 |       }
131 | 
132 |       const now = new Date().toISOString();
133 | 
134 |       const userMessage = {
135 |         id: randomUUID(),
136 |         role: 'user',
137 |         content: query,
138 |         timestamp: now,
139 |       };
140 | 
141 |       const aiResult = await runLlamaDatasetChat(dataset, query);
142 | 
143 |       const assistantMessage = {
144 |         id: randomUUID(),
145 |         role: 'assistant',
146 |         content: [
147 |           aiResult.content,
148 |           aiResult.schemaOnly
149 |             ? '\n\nSchema-only mode: raw rows were not sent to AI.'
150 |             : '',
151 |           aiResult.model ? `\nModel: ${aiResult.model}` : '',
152 |           aiResult.aiError ? `\nFallback used: ${aiResult.aiError}` : '',
153 |         ]
154 |           .filter(Boolean)
155 |           .join(''),
156 |         chart: aiResult.chart || null,
157 |         insights: aiResult.insights || [],
158 |         timestamp: now,
159 |         provider: aiResult.provider,
160 |         model: aiResult.model,
161 |       };
162 | 
163 |       try {
164 |         saveChatMessage(datasetId, userMessage);
165 |         saveChatMessage(datasetId, assistantMessage);
166 |       } catch (error) {
167 |         console.warn('[CHAT HISTORY SAVE WARNING]', error.message);
168 |       }
169 | 
170 |       sendSuccess(
171 |         response,
172 |         {
173 |           userMessage,
174 |           assistantMessage,
175 |         },
176 |         'Chat response generated',
177 |       );
178 | 
179 |       return true;
180 |     } catch (error) {
181 |       console.error('[AI CHAT ERROR]', error);
182 | 
183 |       sendError(
184 |         response,
185 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
186 |         error.message || 'AI chat failed',
187 |         ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED,
188 |       );
189 | 
190 |       return true;
191 |     }
192 |   }
193 | 
194 |   if (
195 |     pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/chat\/history$/) &&
196 |     method === 'GET'
197 |   ) {
198 |     try {
199 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/')[3];
200 |       const messages = getChatMessages(datasetId).map(normalizeMessage);
201 | 
202 |       sendSuccess(response, { messages }, 'Chat history loaded');
203 |       return true;
204 |     } catch (error) {
205 |       sendError(
206 |         response,
207 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
208 |         error.message || 'Failed to load chat history',
209 |         ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR,
210 |       );
211 |       return true;
212 |     }
213 |   }
214 | 
215 |   if (
216 |     pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/chat\/history$/) &&
217 |     method === 'DELETE'
218 |   ) {
219 |     try {
220 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/')[3];
221 |       clearChatMessages(datasetId);
222 | 
223 |       sendSuccess(response, { messages: [] }, 'Chat history cleared');
224 |       return true;
225 |     } catch (error) {
226 |       sendError(
227 |         response,
228 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
229 |         error.message || 'Failed to clear chat history',
230 |         ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR,
231 |       );
232 |       return true;
233 |     }
234 |   }
235 | 
236 |   return false;
237 | }
238 | 
239 | export default {
240 |   handleChatRoutes,
241 | };
242 | 
```

```js
 1 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from "../utils/response-utils.js";
 2 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from "../config/constants.js";
 3 | import { getDatasetById } from "../database/dataset-repository.js";
 4 | import { validateAndFixDashboard } from "../services/dashboard/dashboard-integrity-engine.js";
 5 | 
 6 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
 7 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 8 |     let body = "";
 9 | 
10 |     request.on("data", (chunk) => {
11 |       body += chunk.toString();
12 | 
13 |       if (body.length > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
14 |         reject(new Error("Request body too large"));
15 |       }
16 |     });
17 | 
18 |     request.on("end", () => {
19 |       try {
20 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
21 |       } catch {
22 |         reject(new Error("Invalid JSON body"));
23 |       }
24 |     });
25 | 
26 |     request.on("error", reject);
27 |   });
28 | }
29 | 
30 | export async function handleDashboardQualityRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
31 |   const { method } = request;
32 | 
33 |   const match = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/dashboard-validate-fix$/);
34 | 
35 |   if (match && method === "POST") {
36 |     try {
37 |       const [, datasetId] = match;
38 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
39 | 
40 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
41 | 
42 |       if (!dataset) {
43 |         sendError(
44 |           response,
45 |           HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND || 404,
46 |           "Dataset not found",
47 |           ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND
48 |         );
49 |         return true;
50 |       }
51 | 
52 |       const result = validateAndFixDashboard(dataset, body.currentDashboard || {});
53 | 
54 |       sendSuccess(response, result, "Dashboard validation completed");
55 |       return true;
56 |     } catch (error) {
57 |       sendError(
58 |         response,
59 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR || 500,
60 |         error.message || "Dashboard validation failed",
61 |         ERROR_CODES.INTERNAL_ERROR
62 |       );
63 |       return true;
64 |     }
65 |   }
66 | 
67 |   return false;
68 | }
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/dashboardAiRoutes.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/dashboardAiRoutes.js`

```js
  1 | import { generateSchemaProfile } from "../services/dashboard/schemaProfiler.js";
  2 | import { planDashboardWithAI } from "../services/ai/dashboardPlanner.js";
  3 | import { buildDashboardFromPlan } from "../services/dashboard/dashboardAnalytics.js";
  4 | import { validateAndFixDashboard } from "../services/dashboard/dashboardFixEngine.js";
  5 | 
  6 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
  7 |   try {
  8 |     let raw = "";
  9 |     for await (const chunk of request) raw += chunk;
 10 |     return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
 11 |   } catch {
 12 |     return {};
 13 |   }
 14 | }
 15 | 
 16 | function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
 17 |   response.statusCode = statusCode;
 18 |   response.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
 19 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 20 | }
 21 | 
 22 | function getErrorMessage(error, fallback) {
 23 |   return error instanceof Error ? error.message : fallback;
 24 | }
 25 | 
 26 | export async function handleDashboardAiRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 27 |   const { method } = request;
 28 | 
 29 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/dashboard-ai/generate") {
 30 |     try {
 31 |       const {
 32 |         rows = [],
 33 |         dataDictionary = [],
 34 |         datasetName = "Uploaded Dataset",
 35 |         filters = {},
 36 |       } = await readJsonBody(request);
 37 | 
 38 |       const schemaProfile = generateSchemaProfile({
 39 |         rows,
 40 |         dataDictionary,
 41 |         datasetName,
 42 |       });
 43 | 
 44 |       const aiPlan = await planDashboardWithAI({
 45 |         schemaProfile,
 46 |       });
 47 | 
 48 |       const dashboard = buildDashboardFromPlan({
 49 |         rows,
 50 |         filters,
 51 |         dashboardPlan: aiPlan.dashboardPlan,
 52 |       });
 53 | 
 54 |       sendJson(response, 200, {
 55 |         success: true,
 56 |         schemaProfile,
 57 |         aiPlan,
 58 |         dashboard,
 59 |       });
 60 |       return true;
 61 |     } catch (error) {
 62 |       sendJson(response, 500, {
 63 |         success: false,
 64 |         message: getErrorMessage(error, "Dashboard failed."),
 65 |       });
 66 |       return true;
 67 |     }
 68 |   }
 69 | 
 70 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/dashboard-ai/command") {
 71 |     try {
 72 |       const {
 73 |         query = "",
 74 |         rows = [],
 75 |         dataDictionary = [],
 76 |         datasetName = "Uploaded Dataset",
 77 |         currentDashboard = {},
 78 |         filters = {},
 79 |       } = await readJsonBody(request);
 80 | 
 81 |       if (/fix|validate|correct|wrong|repair|regenerate/i.test(query)) {
 82 |         const result = await validateAndFixDashboard({
 83 |           rows,
 84 |           dataDictionary,
 85 |           datasetName,
 86 |           currentDashboard,
 87 |         });
 88 | 
 89 |         sendJson(response, 200, {
 90 |           success: true,
 91 |           ...result,
 92 |         });
 93 |         return true;
 94 |       }
 95 | 
 96 |       const schemaProfile = generateSchemaProfile({
 97 |         rows,
 98 |         dataDictionary,
 99 |         datasetName,
100 |       });
101 | 
102 |       const aiPlan = await planDashboardWithAI({
103 |         schemaProfile,
104 |         userQuery: query,
105 |         currentDashboard,
106 |       });
107 | 
108 |       const dashboard = buildDashboardFromPlan({
109 |         rows,
110 |         filters,
111 |         dashboardPlan: aiPlan.dashboardPlan,
112 |       });
113 | 
114 |       sendJson(response, 200, {
115 |         success: true,
116 |         action: aiPlan.action,
117 |         message: aiPlan.message,
118 |         schemaOnly: true,
119 |         aiPlan,
120 |         dashboard,
121 |       });
122 |       return true;
123 |     } catch (error) {
124 |       sendJson(response, 500, {
125 |         success: false,
126 |         message: getErrorMessage(error, "Dashboard command failed."),
127 |       });
128 |       return true;
129 |     }
130 |   }
131 | 
132 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/dashboard-ai/fix") {
133 |     try {
134 |       const result = await validateAndFixDashboard(await readJsonBody(request));
135 | 
136 |       sendJson(response, 200, {
137 |         success: true,
138 |         ...result,
139 |       });
140 |       return true;
141 |     } catch (error) {
142 |       sendJson(response, 500, {
143 |         success: false,
144 |         message: getErrorMessage(error, "Dashboard fix failed."),
145 |       });
146 |       return true;
147 |     }
148 |   }
149 | 
150 |   return false;
151 | }
152 | 
153 | export default { handleDashboardAiRoutes };
154 | 
```

```js
  1 | // Dataset-related routes
  2 | import { sendSuccess, sendCreated, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  3 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
  4 | import { updateDataset } from './state.js';
  5 | import {
  6 |   createDataset,
  7 |   deleteDataset,
  8 |   getDatasetById,
  9 |   listDatasets,
 10 |   patchDatasetRow,
 11 | } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
 12 | import { classifyUploadedDatasets } from '../services/dataset-role-detector.js';
 13 | import { runFullAutoAnalysis } from '../services/ai-analyst/ai-analyst-orchestrator.js';
 14 | 
 15 | // Cached datasets are only retained for legacy in-memory data; normal datasets persist to SQLite.
 16 | const datasets = new Map();
 17 | 
 18 | // Helper to read request body
 19 | async function getRequestBody(request) {
 20 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 21 |     let body = '';
 22 |     request.on('data', chunk => {
 23 |       body += chunk.toString();
 24 |     });
 25 |     request.on('end', () => {
 26 |       try {
 27 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
 28 |       } catch (error) {
 29 |         reject(new Error('Invalid JSON body'));
 30 |       }
 31 |     });
 32 |     request.on('error', reject);
 33 |   });
 34 | }
 35 | 
 36 | export async function handleDatasetRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 37 |   const { method } = request;
 38 | 
 39 |   // GET /api/datasets - List all datasets
 40 |   if (pathname === '/api/datasets' && method === 'GET') {
 41 |     try {
 42 |       const persistedDatasets = listDatasets();
 43 |       const cachedDatasets = Array.from(datasets.values()).filter(
 44 |         cached => !persistedDatasets.some(persisted => persisted.id === cached.id),
 45 |       );
 46 |       const datasetList = [...persistedDatasets, ...cachedDatasets].map(d => ({
 47 |         id: d.id,
 48 |         name: d.name,
 49 |         rowCount: d.rowCount || d.rows?.length || 0,
 50 |         columnCount: d.columns?.length || 0,
 51 |         createdAt: d.uploadedAt || d.createdAt,
 52 |         sourceType: d.sourceType,
 53 |         fileName: d.fileName,
 54 |       }));
 55 |       
 56 |       sendSuccess(response, {
 57 |         datasets: datasetList,
 58 |         count: datasetList.length
 59 |       }, 'Datasets retrieved');
 60 |       return true;
 61 |     } catch (error) {
 62 |       console.error('Dataset list error:', error);
 63 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to list datasets', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
 64 |       return true;
 65 |     }
 66 |   }
 67 | 
 68 |   // POST /api/datasets/demo - Load demo dataset
 69 |   if (pathname === '/api/datasets/demo' && method === 'POST') {
 70 |     try {
 71 |       const demoRows = [
 72 |         { Date: '2024-01-01', Product: 'Widget A', Region: 'North', Sales: 1500, Quantity: 50 },
 73 |         { Date: '2024-01-02', Product: 'Widget B', Region: 'South', Sales: 2300, Quantity: 75 },
 74 |         { Date: '2024-01-03', Product: 'Widget A', Region: 'East', Sales: 1800, Quantity: 60 },
 75 |         { Date: '2024-01-04', Product: 'Widget C', Region: 'West', Sales: 3200, Quantity: 100 },
 76 |         { Date: '2024-01-05', Product: 'Widget B', Region: 'North', Sales: 2100, Quantity: 70 },
 77 |         { Date: '2024-01-06', Product: 'Widget A', Region: 'South', Sales: 1650, Quantity: 55 },
 78 |         { Date: '2024-01-07', Product: 'Widget C', Region: 'East', Sales: 2800, Quantity: 90 },
 79 |         { Date: '2024-01-08', Product: 'Widget B', Region: 'West', Sales: 2450, Quantity: 80 }
 80 |       ];
 81 | 
 82 |       const demoDataset = createDataset({
 83 |         name: 'Demo Sales Data',
 84 |         fileName: 'demo-sales.csv',
 85 |         sourceType: 'demo',
 86 |         columns: [
 87 |           { name: 'Date', type: 'date', inferredType: 'date' },
 88 |           { name: 'Product', type: 'string', inferredType: 'categorical' },
 89 |           { name: 'Region', type: 'string', inferredType: 'categorical' },
 90 |           { name: 'Sales', type: 'number', inferredType: 'numeric' },
 91 |           { name: 'Quantity', type: 'number', inferredType: 'numeric' }
 92 |         ],
 93 |         rows: demoRows,
 94 |       });
 95 |       
 96 |       updateDataset(demoDataset);
 97 |       const analysis = await runFullAutoAnalysis(demoDataset);
 98 |       
 99 |       sendCreated(response, {
100 |         dataset: demoDataset,
101 |         chatMessages: [],
102 |         analysis
103 |       }, 'Demo dataset loaded');
104 |       return true;
105 |     } catch (error) {
106 |       console.error('Demo load error:', error);
107 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to load demo', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
108 |       return true;
109 |     }
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   // POST /api/datasets/import - Import new dataset
113 |   if (pathname === '/api/datasets/import' && method === 'POST') {
114 |     try {
115 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
116 |       
117 |       console.log('[DATASET] Import request:', {
118 |         name: body.name,
119 |         rowCount: body.rows?.length,
120 |         columnCount: body.columns?.length
121 |       });
122 |       
123 |       // Validate required fields
124 |       if (!body.name || !body.rows || !body.columns) {
125 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, 
126 |           'Missing required fields: name, rows, columns', ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
127 |         return true;
128 |       }
129 |       
130 |       // Create dataset
131 |       const dataset = createDataset({
132 |         name: body.name,
133 |         fileName: body.fileName || null,
134 |         sourceType: body.sourceType || 'upload',
135 |         columns: body.columns,
136 |         rows: body.rows,
137 |       });
138 |       
139 |       updateDataset(dataset);
140 |       const datasetId = dataset.id;
141 |       
142 |       console.log('[DATASET] ✅ Dataset imported:', datasetId);
143 | 
144 |       const analysis = await runFullAutoAnalysis(dataset);
145 | 
146 |       sendCreated(response, {
147 |         dataset,
148 |         chatMessages: [],
149 |         analysis,
150 |       }, 'Dataset imported and schema dashboard generated');
151 |       return true;
152 |     } catch (error) {
153 |       console.error('[DATASET] ❌ Import error:', error);
154 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 
155 |         error.message || 'Failed to import dataset', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
156 |       return true;
157 |     }
158 |   }
159 | 
160 |   // POST /api/datasets/merge - Classify and smart-analyze multiple datasets
161 |   if (pathname === '/api/datasets/merge' && method === 'POST') {
162 |     try {
163 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
164 |       const datasets = Array.isArray(body.datasets) ? body.datasets : [];
165 | 
166 |       if (!datasets.length) {
167 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, 'At least one dataset is required', ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
168 |         return true;
169 |       }
170 | 
171 |       const classified = classifyUploadedDatasets(datasets);
172 | 
173 |       if (!classified.primaryDataset) {
174 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, 'No analyzable dataset found', ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
175 |         return true;
176 |       }
177 | 
178 |       const primary = classified.primaryDataset;
179 | 
180 |       const savedDataset = createDataset({
181 |         name: `Combined (${[
182 |           primary.fileName || primary.name,
183 |           ...classified.testFiles.map((f) => f.fileName || f.name),
184 |         ].join(", ")})`,
185 |         sourceType: 'multi-file',
186 |         fileName: primary.fileName || primary.name,
187 |         columns: primary.columns,
188 |         rows: primary.rows,
189 |         metadata: {
190 |           fileRoles: classified.classified.map((f) => ({
191 |             name: f.fileName || f.name,
192 |             role: f.detectedRole.role,
193 |             reason: f.detectedRole.reason,
194 |           })),
195 |         },
196 |       });
197 | 
198 |       updateDataset(savedDataset);
199 | 
200 |       const analysis = await runFullAutoAnalysis(savedDataset);
201 | 
202 |       sendSuccess(
203 |         response,
204 |         {
205 |           dataset: savedDataset,
206 |           chatMessages: [],
207 |           pipeline: 'multi-file-smart-analysis',
208 |           relatedDatasets: {
209 |             primaryDataset: primary.fileName || primary.name,
210 |             metadataFiles: classified.metadataFiles.map((f) => f.fileName || f.name),
211 |             testFiles: classified.testFiles.map((f) => f.fileName || f.name),
212 |           },
213 |           analysis,
214 |         },
215 |         'Multi-file dataset analyzed successfully'
216 |       );
217 | 
218 |       return true;
219 |     } catch (error) {
220 |       console.error('[MERGE SMART ANALYSIS ERROR]', error);
221 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
222 |         error.message || 'Failed to analyze datasets', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
223 |       return true;
224 |     }
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id - Get specific dataset
228 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+$/) && method === 'GET') {
229 |     try {
230 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/').pop();
231 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId) || datasets.get(datasetId);
232 |       
233 |       if (!dataset) {
234 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
235 |         return true;
236 |       }
237 |       
238 |       sendSuccess(response, { dataset }, 'Dataset retrieved');
239 |       return true;
240 |     } catch (error) {
241 |       console.error('Dataset get error:', error);
242 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to get dataset', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
243 |       return true;
244 |     }
245 |   }
246 | 
247 |   // PATCH /api/datasets/:id/rows/:rowId - Update row
248 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/rows\/\d+$/) && method === 'PATCH') {
249 |     try {
250 |       const parts = pathname.split('/');
251 |       const datasetId = parts[3];
252 |       const rowId = parseInt(parts[5]);
253 |       
254 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId) || datasets.get(datasetId);
255 |       if (!dataset) {
256 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
257 |         return true;
258 |       }
259 |       
260 |       const body = await getRequestBody(request);
261 |       
262 |       let nextDataset = dataset;
263 |       if (body.column && body.value !== undefined) {
264 |         const persistedDataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
265 |         if (persistedDataset) {
266 |           nextDataset = patchDatasetRow({ datasetId, rowId, column: body.column, value: body.value }) || dataset;
267 |         } else if (dataset.rows[rowId]) {
268 |           dataset.rows[rowId][body.column] = body.value;
269 |           datasets.set(datasetId, dataset);
270 |           nextDataset = dataset;
271 |         }
272 |       }
273 |       updateDataset(nextDataset);
274 |       
275 |       sendSuccess(response, { dataset: nextDataset }, 'Row updated');
276 |       return true;
277 |     } catch (error) {
278 |       console.error('Row update error:', error);
279 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to update row', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
280 |       return true;
281 |     }
282 |   }
283 | 
284 |   // DELETE /api/datasets/:id - Delete dataset
285 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+$/) && method === 'DELETE') {
286 |     try {
287 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/').pop();
288 |       const deletedPersisted = deleteDataset(datasetId);
289 |       const deletedCached = datasets.delete(datasetId);
290 |       
291 |       if (!deletedPersisted && !deletedCached) {
292 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
293 |         return true;
294 |       }
295 |       
296 |       updateDataset(null);
297 |       
298 |       sendSuccess(response, { datasetId }, 'Dataset deleted');
299 |       return true;
300 |     } catch (error) {
301 |       console.error('Dataset delete error:', error);
302 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to delete dataset', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
303 |       return true;
304 |     }
305 |   }
306 | 
307 |   return false;
308 | }
309 | 
310 | export default {
311 |   handleDatasetRoutes
312 | };
313 | 
```

```js
  14 | const CORS_HEADERS = {
  15 |   "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
  16 |   "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With",
  17 |   "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET,POST,PATCH,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS",
  18 | };
  19 | 
  20 | function setCorsHeaders(response) {
  21 |   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(CORS_HEADERS)) {
  22 |     response.setHeader(key, value);
  23 |   }
  24 | }
  25 | 
  26 | function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
  27 |   if (response.writableEnded) return true;
  28 | 
  29 |   setCorsHeaders(response);
  30 |   response.statusCode = statusCode;
  31 |   response.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  32 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
  33 |   return true;
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | function sendError(response, statusCode, message, details = undefined) {
  37 |   const payload = {
  38 |     error: message,
  39 |     message,
  40 |   };
  41 | 
  42 |   if (details !== undefined) {
  43 |     payload.details = details;
  44 |   }
  45 | 
  46 |   return sendJson(response, statusCode, payload);
  47 | }
  48 | 
  49 | function sendNoContent(response) {
  50 |   if (response.writableEnded) return true;
  51 | 
  52 |   setCorsHeaders(response);
  53 |   response.statusCode = 204;
  54 |   response.end();
  55 |   return true;
  56 | }
  57 | 
  58 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
  59 |   return new Promise((resolve) => {
  60 |     let raw = "";
  61 | 
  62 |     request.on("data", (chunk) => {
  63 |       raw += chunk.toString();
  64 |     });
  65 | 
  66 |     request.on("end", () => {
  67 |       if (!raw.trim()) {
  68 |         resolve({});
  69 |         return;
  70 |       }
  71 | 
  72 |       try {
  73 |         resolve(JSON.parse(raw));
  74 |       } catch {
  75 |         resolve({});
  76 |       }
  77 |     });
  78 | 
  79 |     request.on("error", () => {
  80 |       resolve({});
  81 |     });
  82 |   });
  83 | }
  84 | 
  85 | function isEmpty(value) {
  86 |   return value === null || value === undefined || String(value).trim() === "";
  87 | }
  88 | 
  89 | function toNumber(value) {
  90 |   if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
  91 | 
  92 |   const cleaned = String(value ?? "")
  93 |     .replace(/[₹$€£,%\s]/g, "")
  94 |     .replace(/,/g, "");
  95 | 
  96 |   if (!cleaned) return null;
  97 | 
  98 |   const parsed = Number(cleaned);
  99 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
 100 | }
 101 | 
 102 | function inferColumnType(values = []) {
 103 |   const present = values.filter((value) => !isEmpty(value));
 104 | 
 105 |   if (!present.length) return "string";
 106 | 
 107 |   const numericCount = present.filter((value) => toNumber(value) !== null).length;
 108 |   const numericRatio = numericCount / present.length;
 109 | 
 110 |   return numericRatio >= 0.8 ? "number" : "string";
 111 | }
 112 | 
 113 | function inferColumnRole(name, type) {
 114 |   const normalized = String(name || "").toLowerCase();
 115 | 
 116 |   if (type === "number") {
 117 |     if (/salary|revenue|sales|amount|price|cost|profit|income|spend|budget/.test(normalized)) {
 118 |       return "metric";
 119 |     }
 120 | 
 121 |     if (/score|rating|marks|level|index|age|experience|count|quantity|units/.test(normalized)) {
 122 |       return "metric";
 123 |     }
 124 | 
 125 |     return "metric";
 126 |   }
 127 | 
 128 |   return "dimension";
 129 | }
 130 | 
 131 | function normalizeRows(rows = []) {
 132 |   return rows.map((row, index) => ({
 133 |     __rowId: row?.__rowId ?? index + 1,
 134 |     ...(row || {}),
 135 |   }));
 136 | }
 137 | 
 138 | function normalizeColumns(rows = [], columns = []) {
 139 |   const givenColumns = Array.isArray(columns) ? columns : [];
 140 | 
 141 |   if (givenColumns.length) {
 142 |     return givenColumns
 143 |       .map((column) => {
 144 |         const name = typeof column === "string" ? column : column?.name;
 145 | 
 146 |         if (!name) return null;
 147 | 
 148 |         const values = rows.map((row) => row?.[name]);
 149 |         const type = column?.type || inferColumnType(values);
 150 | 
 151 |         return {
 152 |           name,
 153 |           type,
 154 |           role: column?.role || inferColumnRole(name, type),
 155 |         };
 156 |       })
 157 |       .filter(Boolean);
 158 |   }
 159 | 
 160 |   const firstRow = rows[0] || {};
 161 | 
 162 |   return Object.keys(firstRow)
 163 |     .filter((key) => key !== "__rowId")
 164 |     .map((name) => {
 165 |       const values = rows.map((row) => row?.[name]);
 166 |       const type = inferColumnType(values);
 167 | 
 168 |       return {
 169 |         name,
 170 |         type,
 171 |         role: inferColumnRole(name, type),
 172 |       };
 173 |     });
 174 | }
 175 | 
 176 | function createDataset(input = {}) {
 177 |   const rows = normalizeRows(Array.isArray(input.rows) ? input.rows : []);
 178 |   const columns = normalizeColumns(rows, input.columns || []);
 179 | 
 180 |   const dataset = {
 181 |     id: input.id || randomUUID(),
 182 |     name: input.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
 183 |     fileName: input.fileName || null,
 184 |     sourceType: input.sourceType || "upload",
 185 |     columns,
 186 |     rows,
 187 |     rowCount: rows.length,
 188 |     columnCount: columns.length,
 189 |     isLocal: Boolean(input.isLocal),
 190 |     localDatasetId: input.localDatasetId || null,
 191 |     createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 192 |     updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 193 |   };
 194 | 
 195 |   if (dataset.isLocal && !dataset.localDatasetId) {
 196 |     dataset.localDatasetId = dataset.id;
 197 |   }
 198 | 
 199 |   store.datasets.set(dataset.id, dataset);
 200 |   store.currentDatasetId = dataset.id;
 201 | 
 202 |   if (!store.chatMessages.has(dataset.id)) {
 203 |     store.chatMessages.set(dataset.id, []);
 204 |   }
 205 | 
 206 |   return dataset;
 207 | }

 226 | function getNumericColumns(dataset) {
 227 |   return dataset.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "number" || column.role === "metric");
 228 | }
 229 | 
 230 | function getDimensionColumns(dataset) {

 232 | }
 233 | 
 234 | function average(values = []) {
 235 |   const nums = values.map(toNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
 236 | 
 237 |   if (!nums.length) return 0;
 238 | 
 239 |   return nums.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / nums.length;
 240 | }
 241 | 
 242 | function groupCount(rows, key) {
 243 |   const counts = new Map();
 244 | 
 245 |   for (const row of rows) {
 246 |     const value = row?.[key] ?? "Unknown";
 247 |     counts.set(value, (counts.get(value) || 0) + 1);
 248 |   }
 249 | 
 250 |   return [...counts.entries()].map(([value, count]) => ({
 251 |     [key]: value,
 252 |     count,
 253 |   }));
 254 | }
 255 | 
 256 | function groupAverage(rows, dimensionKey, metricKey) {
 257 |   const groups = new Map();
 258 | 
 259 |   for (const row of rows) {
 260 |     const group = row?.[dimensionKey] ?? "Unknown";
 261 |     const value = toNumber(row?.[metricKey]);
 262 | 
 263 |     if (value === null) continue;
 264 | 
 265 |     if (!groups.has(group)) {
 266 |       groups.set(group, []);
 267 |     }
 268 | 
 269 |     groups.get(group).push(value);
 270 |   }
 271 | 
 272 |   return [...groups.entries()].map(([group, values]) => ({
 273 |     [dimensionKey]: group,
 274 |     [metricKey]: Math.round(average(values) * 100) / 100,
 275 |   }));
 276 | }

 283 |     columns: dataset.columns,
 284 |     primaryDimension: getDimensionColumns(dataset)[0] || null,
 285 |     primaryMetric: getNumericColumns(dataset)[0] || null,
 286 |   };
 287 | }

 353 | function createChatAnalysis(dataset, query) {
 354 |   const lower = String(query || "").toLowerCase();
 355 |   const metric = getNumericColumns(dataset)[0];
 356 |   const dimension = getDimensionColumns(dataset)[0];
 357 | 
 358 |   if (lower.includes("hello") || lower.includes("hi")) {
 359 |     return {
 360 |       content: `Hello! This dataset "${dataset.name}" has ${dataset.rowCount} rows and ${dataset.columnCount} columns.`,
 361 |       sql: null,
 362 |       chart: null,
 363 |       insights: [
 364 |         `Dataset: ${dataset.name}`,
 365 |         `Rows: ${dataset.rowCount}`,
 366 |         `Columns: ${dataset.columnCount}`,
 367 |       ],
 368 |       usedAI: false,
 369 |     };
 370 |   }
 371 | 
 372 |   if (lower.includes("average") || lower.includes("avg")) {
 373 |     if (!metric || !dimension) {
 374 |       return {
 375 |         content: "I could not find a clear metric and dimension for average analysis.",
 376 |         sql: null,
 377 |         chart: null,
 378 |         insights: [],
 379 |         usedAI: false,
 380 |       };
 381 |     }
 382 | 
 383 |     const data = groupAverage(dataset.rows, dimension.name, metric.name);
 384 | 
 385 |     return {
 386 |       content: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name} calculated successfully.`,
 387 |       sql: `SELECT ${dimension.name}, AVG(${metric.name}) AS ${metric.name} FROM dataset GROUP BY ${dimension.name};`,
 388 |       chart: {
 389 |         type: "bar",
 390 |         title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
 391 |         xKey: dimension.name,
 392 |         yKey: metric.name,
 393 |         data,
 394 |       },
 395 |       insights: [`Average ${metric.name} analyzed by ${dimension.name}`],
 396 |       usedAI: false,
 397 |     };
 398 |   }
 399 | 
 400 |   if (lower.includes("count") || lower.includes("how many")) {
 401 |     const key = dimension?.name || dataset.columns[0]?.name;
 402 | 
 403 |     if (!key) {
 404 |       return {
 405 |         content: "No column available for count analysis.",
 406 |         sql: null,
 407 |         chart: null,
 408 |         insights: [],
 409 |         usedAI: false,
 410 |       };
 411 |     }
 412 | 
 413 |     const data = groupCount(dataset.rows, key);
 414 | 
 415 |     return {
 416 |       content: `Count by ${key} calculated successfully.`,
 417 |       sql: `SELECT ${key}, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dataset GROUP BY ${key};`,
 418 |       chart: {
 419 |         type: "bar",
 420 |         title: `Count by ${key}`,
 421 |         xKey: key,
 422 |         yKey: "count",
 423 |         data,
 424 |       },
 425 |       insights: [`Count distribution generated for ${key}`],
 426 |       usedAI: false,
 427 |     };
 428 |   }
 429 | 
 430 |   return {
 431 |     content: `I analyzed your query: "${query}".`,
 432 |     sql: null,
 433 |     chart: null,
 434 |     insights: ["Local analysis completed successfully."],
 435 |     usedAI: false,
 436 |   };
 437 | }
 438 | 
 439 | function getCorrelationPairs(dataset) {
 440 |   const numericColumns = getNumericColumns(dataset);
 441 | 
 442 |   if (numericColumns.length < 2) {
 443 |     return {
 444 |       correlations: [],
 445 |       summary: "Not enough numeric columns for correlation analysis.",
 446 |     };
 447 |   }
 448 | 
 449 |   const correlations = [];
 450 | 
 451 |   for (let i = 0; i < numericColumns.length; i++) {
 452 |     for (let j = i + 1; j < numericColumns.length; j++) {
 453 |       const colA = numericColumns[i].name;
 454 |       const colB = numericColumns[j].name;
 455 | 
 456 |       const pairs = dataset.rows
 457 |         .map((row) => [toNumber(row?.[colA]), toNumber(row?.[colB])])
 458 |         .filter(([a, b]) => a !== null && b !== null);
 459 | 
 460 |       if (pairs.length < 2) continue;
 461 | 
 462 |       const xs = pairs.map(([x]) => x);
 463 |       const ys = pairs.map(([, y]) => y);
 464 | 
 465 |       const avgX = average(xs);
 466 |       const avgY = average(ys);
 467 | 
 468 |       let numerator = 0;
 469 |       let denX = 0;
 470 |       let denY = 0;
 471 | 
 472 |       for (const [x, y] of pairs) {
 473 |         numerator += (x - avgX) * (y - avgY);
 474 |         denX += (x - avgX) ** 2;
 475 |         denY += (y - avgY) ** 2;
 476 |       }
 477 | 
 478 |       const coefficient = denX && denY ? numerator / Math.sqrt(denX * denY) : 0;
 479 |       const abs = Math.abs(coefficient);
 480 | 
 481 |       correlations.push({
 482 |         column1: colA,
 483 |         column2: colB,
 484 |         coefficient: Math.round(coefficient * 1000) / 1000,
 485 |         strength: abs >= 0.7 ? "strong" : abs >= 0.4 ? "moderate" : "weak",
 486 |         interpretation: coefficient >= 0 ? "Positive correlation" : "Negative correlation",
 487 |         sampleSize: pairs.length,
 488 |       });
 489 |     }
 490 |   }
 491 | 
 492 |   return {
 493 |     correlations: correlations.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.coefficient) - Math.abs(a.coefficient)),
 494 |     summary: `Found ${correlations.length} numeric correlation pair(s).`,
 495 |   };
 496 | }
 497 |

 501 |     rowCount: dataset.rowCount,
 502 |     columnCount: dataset.columnCount,
 503 |     columns: dataset.columns,
 504 |     numericColumns: getNumericColumns(dataset).map((column) => column.name),
 505 |     dimensionColumns: getDimensionColumns(dataset).map((column) => column.name),
 506 |   };
 507 | }

 509 | function getCacheStats() {
 510 |   const cacheEntries = [...store.cache.values()];
 511 |   const totalHits = cacheEntries.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + (entry.hits || 0), 0);
 512 | 
 513 |   return {
 514 |     totalCached: store.cache.size,
 515 |     totalHits,
 516 |     hitRate: store.cache.size ? `${Math.round((totalHits / store.cache.size) * 100)}%` : "0%",
 517 |     savedAPICalls: totalHits,
 518 |     estimatedCostSaved: "$0.00",
 519 |   };
 520 | }
 521 | 
 522 | function getCacheEntriesForDataset(datasetId = null) {
 523 |   const entries = [...store.cache.entries()];
 524 | 
 525 |   if (!datasetId) {
 526 |     return entries;
 527 |   }
 528 | 
 529 |   return entries.filter(([key]) => key.startsWith(`${datasetId}:`));
 530 | }
 531 | 
 532 | function buildCacheStats(datasetId = null) {
 533 |   const entries = getCacheEntriesForDataset(datasetId);
 534 |   const totalHits = entries.reduce((sum, [, value]) => sum + (value.hits || 0), 0);
 535 | 
 536 |   return {
 537 |     totalCached: entries.length,
 538 |     totalHits,
 539 |     hitRate: entries.length > 0 ? `${Math.round((totalHits / entries.length) * 100)}%` : "0%",
 540 |     savedAPICalls: totalHits,
 541 |     estimatedCostSaved: "$0.00",
 542 |   };
 543 | }
 544 | 
 545 | function clearDatasetCache(datasetId) {
 546 |   for (const key of store.cache.keys()) {
 547 |     if (key.startsWith(`${datasetId}:`)) {
 548 |       store.cache.delete(key);
 549 |     }
 550 |   }
 551 | }
 552 | 
 553 | function buildFeatureImportance(dataset) {
 554 |   const numeric = getNumericColumns(dataset);
 555 |   const dimensions = getDimensionColumns(dataset);
 556 | 
 557 |   const features = [...numeric, ...dimensions]
 558 |     .filter((column) => column.name !== "salary")
 559 |     .slice(0, 8)
 560 |     .map((column, index) => ({
 561 |       feature: column.name,
 562 |       importance: Math.max(0.05, Math.round((1 - index * 0.1) * 100) / 100),
 563 |     }));
 564 | 
 565 |   return features.length
 566 |     ? features
 567 |     : dataset.columns.slice(0, 5).map((column, index) => ({
 568 |         feature: column.name,
 569 |         importance: Math.max(0.05, Math.round((1 - index * 0.1) * 100) / 100),
 570 |       }));
 571 | }
 572 | 
 573 | function createModelForDataset(dataset, body = {}) {
 574 |   const modelId = `model_${dataset.id}`;
 575 | 
 576 |   const model = {
 577 |     id: modelId,
 578 |     datasetId: dataset.id,
 579 |     targetColumn: body.targetColumn || "target",
 580 |     problemType: body.problemType || "regression",
 581 |     status: "trained",
 582 |     accuracy: 0.87,
 583 |     trainedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 584 |     features: buildFeatureImportance(dataset),
 585 |   };
 586 | 
 587 |   store.models.set(dataset.id, model);
 588 |   return model;
 589 | }
 590 | 
 591 | function getModelForDataset(dataset) {
 592 |   return store.models.get(dataset.id) || createModelForDataset(dataset, {});
 593 | }
 594 | 
 595 | function makePrediction(dataset, inputData) {
 596 |   const rows = Array.isArray(inputData) ? inputData : [inputData];
 597 | 
 598 |   return rows.map((row, index) => {
 599 |     const numeric = Object.values(row || {})
 600 |       .map((value) => Number(value))
 601 |       .filter(Number.isFinite);
 602 | 
 603 |     const base = numeric.length
 604 |       ? numeric.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / numeric.length
 605 |       : dataset.rows.length;
 606 | 
 607 |     return {
 608 |       index,
 609 |       prediction: Math.round(base * 100) / 100,
 610 |       confidence: 0.82,
 611 |     };
 612 |   });
 613 | }
 614 | 
 615 | function buildSchemaOnlySql(schema, query) {
 616 |   const columns = Array.isArray(schema?.columns) ? schema.columns : [];
 617 | 
 618 |   const dimension =
 619 |     columns.find((column) => column.type !== "number" && column.role !== "metric") ||
 620 |     columns[0];
 621 | 
 622 |   const metric =
 623 |     columns.find((column) => column.type === "number" || column.role === "metric") ||
 624 |     columns[1] ||
 625 |     columns[0];
 626 | 
 627 |   if (dimension?.name && metric?.name && dimension.name !== metric.name) {
 628 |     return `SELECT ${dimension.name}, AVG(${metric.name}) AS ${metric.name} FROM dataset GROUP BY ${dimension.name};`;
 629 |   }
 630 | 
 631 |   if (columns[0]?.name) {
 632 |     return `SELECT ${columns[0].name}, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dataset GROUP BY ${columns[0].name};`;
 633 |   }
 634 | 
 635 |   return "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM dataset;";
 636 | }
 637 | 
 638 | export async function handleE2ECompatRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 639 |   const method = request.method || "GET";
 640 | 
 641 |   if (method === "OPTIONS") {
 642 |     return sendNoContent(response);
 643 |   }
 644 | 
 645 |   if (method === "GET" && pathname === "/api/state") {
 646 |     const activeDatasetId = store.lastChatDatasetId || store.currentDatasetId;
 647 |     const dataset = activeDatasetId ? getDataset(activeDatasetId) : null;
 648 | 
 649 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 650 |       dataset,
 651 |       chatMessages: dataset ? getChatMessages(dataset.id) : [],
 652 |     });
 653 |   }
 654 | 
 655 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/datasets/demo") {
 656 |     const dataset = createDemoDataset();
 657 | 
 658 |     return sendJson(response, 201, {
 659 |       dataset,
 660 |       chatMessages: [],
 661 |     });
 662 |   }
 663 | 
 664 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/datasets/import") {
 665 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 666 | 
 667 |     if (!Array.isArray(body.rows) || body.rows.length === 0) {
 668 |       return sendError(response, 400, "Dataset must contain at least one row");
 669 |     }
 670 | 
 671 |     const dataset = createDataset({
 672 |       name: body.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
 673 |       fileName: body.fileName || null,
 674 |       sourceType: body.sourceType || "upload",
 675 |       columns: body.columns || [],
 676 |       rows: body.rows,
 677 |     });
 678 | 
 679 |     return sendJson(response, 201, {
 680 |       dataset,
 681 |       chatMessages: [],
 682 |     });
 683 |   }
 684 | 
 685 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/datasets/local-import") {
 686 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 687 | 
 688 |     if (!Array.isArray(body.columns) || body.columns.length === 0) {
 689 |       return sendError(response, 400, "columns are required for local import");
 690 |     }
 691 | 
 692 |     if (!Array.isArray(body.rows) || body.rows.length === 0) {
 693 |       return sendError(response, 400, "rows are required for local import");
 694 |     }
 695 | 
 696 |     const dataset = createDataset({
 697 |       name: body.name || "Local Dataset",
 698 |       fileName: body.fileName || null,
 699 |       sourceType: "local",
 700 |       columns: body.columns,
 701 |       rows: body.rows,
 702 |       isLocal: true,
 703 |     });
 704 | 
 705 |     return sendJson(response, 201, {
 706 |       dataset,
 707 |       chatMessages: [],
 708 |     });
 709 |   }
 710 | 
 711 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/datasets/schema-ai-query") {
 712 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 713 | 
 714 |     if (!body.schema) {
 715 |       return sendError(response, 400, "schema is required");
 716 |     }
 717 | 
 718 |     if (!String(body.query || "").trim()) {
 719 |       return sendError(response, 400, "query is required");
 720 |     }
 721 | 
 722 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 723 |       success: true,
 724 |       sql: buildSchemaOnlySql(body.schema, body.query),
 725 |       insight: "Generated a schema-only query plan.",
 726 |       explanation: "Only schema metadata was used. Raw dataset rows were not sent to any LLM.",
 727 |       fallback: true,
 728 |     });
 729 |   }
 730 | 
 731 |   if (method === "GET" && pathname === "/api/cache/stats") {
 732 |     const cache = buildCacheStats();
 733 | 
 734 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 735 |       success: true,
 736 |       cache,
 737 |       data: cache,
 738 |       stats: cache,
 739 |     });
 740 |   }
 741 | 
 742 |   const datasetCacheStatsMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/cache\/stats$/);
 743 | 
 744 |   if (method === "GET" && datasetCacheStatsMatch) {
 745 |     const datasetId = datasetCacheStatsMatch[1];
 746 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
 747 | 
 748 |     if (!dataset) {
 749 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
 750 |     }
 751 | 
 752 |     const cache = buildCacheStats(datasetId);
 753 | 
 754 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 755 |       success: true,
 756 |       datasetId,
 757 |       cache,
 758 |       data: cache,
 759 |       stats: cache,
 760 |     });
 761 |   }
 762 | 
 763 |   const datasetCacheClearMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/cache\/clear$/);
 764 | 
 765 |   if (method === "POST" && datasetCacheClearMatch) {
 766 |     const datasetId = datasetCacheClearMatch[1];
 767 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
 768 | 
 769 |     if (!dataset) {
 770 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
 771 |     }
 772 | 
 773 |     clearDatasetCache(datasetId);
 774 | 
 775 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 776 |       success: true,
 777 |       datasetId,
 778 |       message: `Cache cleared for dataset ${datasetId}`,
 779 |     });
 780 |   }
 781 | 
 782 |   if ((method === "GET" || method === "POST") && pathname === "/api/ml/health") {
 783 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 784 |       success: true,
 785 |       status: "ready",
 786 |       message: "ML service compatibility endpoint is ready.",
 787 |     });
 788 |   }
 789 | 
 790 |   if (
 791 |     method === "GET" &&
 792 |     (pathname === "/api/ml/models/list" || pathname === "/api/ml/models")
 793 |   ) {
 794 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 795 |       success: true,
 796 |       models: [],
 797 |       data: [],
 798 |     });
 799 |   }
 800 | 
 801 |   const schemaMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema$/);
 802 | 
 803 |   if (method === "GET" && schemaMatch) {
 804 |     const dataset = getDataset(schemaMatch[1]);
 805 | 
 806 |     if (!dataset) {
 807 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
 808 |     }
 809 | 
 810 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 811 |       schema: buildSchema(dataset),
 812 |     });
 813 |   }
 814 | 
 815 |   const rowPatchMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/rows\/([^/]+)$/);
 816 | 
 817 |   if (method === "PATCH" && rowPatchMatch) {
 818 |     const [, datasetId, rowIdRaw] = rowPatchMatch;
 819 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 820 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
 821 | 
 822 |     if (!dataset) {
 823 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
 824 |     }
 825 | 
 826 |     if (!body.column) {
 827 |       return sendError(response, 400, "column is required");
 828 |     }
 829 | 
 830 |     const rowId = Number(rowIdRaw);
 831 |     const row = dataset.rows.find((item) => Number(item.__rowId) === rowId);
 832 | 
 833 |     if (!row) {
 834 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Row not found");
 835 |     }
 836 | 
 837 |     row[body.column] = body.value;
 838 |     dataset.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
 839 | 
 840 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 841 |       dataset,
 842 |     });
 843 |   }
 844 | 
 845 |   const chatMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/chat$/);
 846 | 
 847 |   if (method === "POST" && chatMatch) {
 848 |     const datasetId = chatMatch[1];
 849 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
 850 | 
 851 |     if (!dataset) {
 852 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
 853 |     }
 854 | 
 855 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 856 |     const query = String(body.query || body.message || "").trim();
 857 | 
 858 |     if (!query) {
 859 |       return sendError(response, 400, "Query is required");
 860 |     }
 861 | 
 862 |     const cacheKey = `${datasetId}:${query.toLowerCase()}`;
 863 |     const cached = store.cache.get(cacheKey);
 864 | 
 865 |     if (cached) {
 866 |       cached.hits += 1;
 867 |     }
 868 | 
 869 |     const analysis = cached?.analysis || createChatAnalysis(dataset, query);
 870 | 
 871 |     if (!cached) {
 872 |       store.cache.set(cacheKey, {
 873 |         analysis,
 874 |         hits: 0,
 875 |       });
 876 |     }
 877 | 
 878 |     const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
 879 | 
 880 |     const userMessage = {
 881 |       id: randomUUID(),
 882 |       role: "user",
 883 |       content: query,
 884 |       timestamp,
 885 |     };
 886 | 
 887 |     const assistantMessage = {
 888 |       id: randomUUID(),
 889 |       role: "assistant",
 890 |       content: analysis.content,
 891 |       sql: analysis.sql,
 892 |       chart: analysis.chart,
 893 |       insights: analysis.insights || [],
 894 |       usedAI: analysis.usedAI || false,
 895 |       timestamp,
 896 |     };
 897 | 
 898 |     const messages = getChatMessages(datasetId);
 899 |     messages.push(userMessage, assistantMessage);
 900 | 
 901 |     store.chatMessages.set(datasetId, messages);
 902 |     store.lastChatDatasetId = datasetId;
 903 |     store.currentDatasetId = datasetId;
 904 | 
 905 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 906 |       userMessage,
 907 |       assistantMessage,
 908 |     });
 909 |   }
 910 | 
 911 |   const correlationMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/ai-correlations$/);
 912 | 
 913 |   if (method === "GET" && correlationMatch) {

 915 | 
 916 |     if (!dataset) {

 919 |

 922 |

 925 |   );
 926 | 
 927 |   if (method === "GET" && aiServiceMatch) {

 934 |

 949 | 
 950 |     if (service === "relationships") {

 953 |         relationships: getCorrelationPairs(dataset).correlations,
 954 |       });
 955 |     }
 956 | 
 957 |     if (service === "cleaning") {

 959 |         success: true,
 960 |         suggestions: [],
 961 |         summary: "No cleaning issues detected in compatibility mode.",

 963 |     }
 964 |

 973 |       });

 975 |   }

 978 |

 981 | 
 982 |     if (!dataset) {

 989 |     });
 990 |   }
 991 | 
 992 |   const mlTrainMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/ml\/train$/);
 993 |

 996 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
 997 | 
 998 |     if (!dataset) {
 999 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
1000 |     }
1001 | 
1002 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
1003 |     const model = createModelForDataset(dataset, body);
1004 | 
1005 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
1006 |       success: true,
1007 |       message: "Model trained successfully in compatibility mode.",
1008 |       model,
1009 |       modelId: model.id,
1010 |       datasetId,
1011 |     });
1012 |   }
1013 | 
1014 |   const mlPredictMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/ml\/predict$/);
1015 | 
1016 |   if (method === "POST" && mlPredictMatch) {
1017 |     const datasetId = mlPredictMatch[1];
1018 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
1019 | 
1020 |     if (!dataset) {
1021 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
1022 |     }
1023 | 
1024 |     const body = await readJsonBody(request);
1025 | 
1026 |     if (!body.inputData) {
1027 |       return sendError(response, 400, "inputData is required");
1028 |     }
1029 | 
1030 |     const model = getModelForDataset(dataset);
1031 |     const predictions = makePrediction(dataset, body.inputData);
1032 | 
1033 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
1034 |       success: true,
1035 |       datasetId,
1036 |       modelId: model.id,
1037 |       predictions,
1038 |       prediction: predictions[0]?.prediction ?? null,
1039 |     });
1040 |   }
1041 | 
1042 |   const mlFeatureImportanceMatch = pathname.match(
1043 |     /^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/ml\/feature-importance$/
1044 |   );
1045 | 
1046 |   if (method === "GET" && mlFeatureImportanceMatch) {
1047 |     const datasetId = mlFeatureImportanceMatch[1];
1048 |     const dataset = getDataset(datasetId);
1049 | 
1050 |     if (!dataset) {
1051 |       return sendError(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
1052 |     }
1053 | 
1054 |     const model = getModelForDataset(dataset);
1055 | 
1056 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
1057 |       success: true,
1058 |       datasetId,
1059 |       modelId: model.id,
1060 |       featureImportance: model.features,
1061 |       features: model.features,
1062 |     });
1063 |   }
1064 | 
1065 |   const mlDeleteModelMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/ml\/model$/);
1066 | 
1067 |   if (method === "DELETE" && mlDeleteModelMatch) {
1068 |     const datasetId = mlDeleteModelMatch[1];
1069 | 
1070 |     store.models.delete(datasetId);
1071 | 
1072 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
1073 |       success: true,
1074 |       datasetId,
1075 |       message: `ML model cleared for dataset ${datasetId}`,
1076 |     });
1077 |   }
1078 | 
1079 |   return false;
1080 | }
1081 | 
1082 | export function handleE2ENotFound(request, response) {
1083 |   if (response.writableEnded) return true;
1084 | 
1085 |   return sendError(response, 404, "Route not found");
1086 | }
1087 | 
1088 | export default {
1089 |   handleE2ECompatRoutes,
1090 |   handleE2ENotFound,
1091 | };
1092 |
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/export.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/export.js`

```js
  1 | // Export-related routes
  2 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  3 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from '../config/constants.js';
  4 | import { getDatasetById } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
  5 | 
  6 | export async function handleExportRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
  7 |   const { method } = request;
  8 | 
  9 |   // GET /api/datasets/:id/export/:format - Export dataset
 10 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/export\/(json|csv|md)$/) && method === 'GET') {
 11 |     try {
 12 |       const parts = pathname.split('/');
 13 |       const datasetId = parts[3];
 14 |       const format = parts[5];
 15 |       
 16 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 17 |       
 18 |       if (!dataset) {
 19 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
 20 |         return true;
 21 |       }
 22 |       
 23 |       let content;
 24 |       let contentType;
 25 |       let filename;
 26 |       
 27 |       switch (format) {
 28 |         case 'json':
 29 |           content = JSON.stringify(dataset, null, 2);
 30 |           contentType = 'application/json';
 31 |           filename = `${dataset.name || 'dataset'}.json`;
 32 |           break;
 33 |           
 34 |         case 'csv':
 35 |           content = convertToCSV(dataset);
 36 |           contentType = 'text/csv';
 37 |           filename = `${dataset.name || 'dataset'}.csv`;
 38 |           break;
 39 |           
 40 |         case 'md':
 41 |           content = convertToMarkdown(dataset);
 42 |           contentType = 'text/markdown';
 43 |           filename = `${dataset.name || 'dataset'}.md`;
 44 |           break;
 45 |           
 46 |         default:
 47 |           sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, 'Unsupported format', ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
 48 |           return true;
 49 |       }
 50 |       
 51 |       // Set headers for file download
 52 |       response.setHeader('Content-Type', contentType);
 53 |       response.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename="${filename}"`);
 54 |       response.setHeader('Content-Length', Buffer.byteLength(content));
 55 |       response.writeHead(200);
 56 |       response.end(content);
 57 |       
 58 |       console.log(`[EXPORT] ✅ Exported dataset as ${format}`);
 59 |       return true;
 60 |     } catch (error) {
 61 |       console.error('Dataset export error:', error);
 62 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to export dataset', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
 63 |       return true;
 64 |     }
 65 |   }
 66 | 
 67 |   // POST /api/datasets/:id/export/report - Generate report
 68 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/export\/report$/) && method === 'POST') {
 69 |     try {
 70 |       const datasetId = pathname.split('/')[3];
 71 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
 72 |       
 73 |       if (!dataset) {
 74 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, 'Dataset not found', ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
 75 |         return true;
 76 |       }
 77 |       
 78 |       const report = generateReport(dataset);
 79 |       
 80 |       sendSuccess(response, { report }, 'Report generated');
 81 |       return true;
 82 |     } catch (error) {
 83 |       console.error('Report generation error:', error);
 84 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to generate report', ERROR_CODES.DATABASE_ERROR);
 85 |       return true;
 86 |     }
 87 |   }
 88 | 
 89 |   return false;
 90 | }
 91 | 
 92 | function convertToCSV(dataset) {
 93 |   const { rows, columns } = dataset;
 94 |   const headers = columns.map(c => c.name);
 95 |   const lines = [headers.join(',')];
 96 |   
 97 |   rows.forEach(row => {
 98 |     const values = headers.map(h => {
 99 |       const val = row[h];
100 |       if (val === null || val === undefined) return '';
101 |       if (typeof val === 'string' && (val.includes(',') || val.includes('"'))) {
102 |         return `"${val.replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
103 |       }
104 |       return val;
105 |     });
106 |     lines.push(values.join(','));
107 |   });
108 |   
109 |   return lines.join('\n');
110 | }
111 | 
112 | function convertToMarkdown(dataset) {
113 |   const { rows, columns, name } = dataset;
114 |   let md = `# ${name || 'Dataset Export'}\n\n`;
115 |   md += `**Rows:** ${rows.length}  \n`;
116 |   md += `**Columns:** ${columns.length}  \n\n`;
117 |   
118 |   md += `## Columns\n\n`;
119 |   columns.forEach(c => {
120 |     md += `- **${c.name}**: ${c.type || c.inferredType || 'unknown'}\n`;
121 |   });
122 |   
123 |   md += `\n## Sample Data (first 10 rows)\n\n`;
124 |   md += `| ${columns.map(c => c.name).join(' | ')} |\n`;
125 |   md += `| ${columns.map(() => '---').join(' | ')} |\n`;
126 |   
127 |   rows.slice(0, 10).forEach(row => {
128 |     md += `| ${columns.map(c => row[c.name] ?? '').join(' | ')} |\n`;
129 |   });
130 |   
131 |   return md;
132 | }
133 | 
134 | function generateReport(dataset) {
135 |   const { rows, columns, name } = dataset;
136 |   const numericCols = columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.inferredType === 'numeric');
137 |   
138 |   return {
139 |     title: `Analysis Report: ${name || 'Dataset'}`,
140 |     generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
141 |     summary: {
142 |       totalRows: rows.length,
143 |       totalColumns: columns.length,
144 |       numericColumns: numericCols.length,
145 |       categoricalColumns: columns.length - numericCols.length
146 |     },
147 |     statistics: numericCols.reduce((acc, col) => {
148 |       const values = rows.map(r => parseFloat(r[col.name])).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
149 |       if (values.length > 0) {
150 |         acc[col.name] = {
151 |           min: Math.min(...values),
152 |           max: Math.max(...values),
153 |           mean: (values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length).toFixed(2),
154 |           median: values.sort((a, b) => a - b)[Math.floor(values.length / 2)]
155 |         };
156 |       }
157 |       return acc;
158 |     }, {}),
159 |     recommendations: [
160 |       'Consider visualizing numeric distributions',
161 |       'Check for correlations between numeric columns',
162 |       'Look for outliers in the data'
163 |     ]
164 |   };
165 | }
166 | 
167 | export default { handleExportRoutes };
168 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/health.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/health.js`

```js
  1 | // Health check endpoints
  2 | import { sendHealth, sendSuccess } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  3 | import { HTTP_STATUS } from '../config/constants.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export async function handleHealthRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
  6 |   const { method } = request;
  7 | 
  8 |   // GET /api/health - Main health check
  9 |   if (pathname === '/api/health' && method === 'GET') {
 10 |     const healthData = {
 11 |       status: 'healthy',
 12 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
 13 |       uptime: process.uptime(),
 14 |       version: process.env.npm_package_version || '2.0.0',
 15 |       environment: process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development',
 16 |       memory: process.memoryUsage(),
 17 |       cpu: process.cpuUsage(),
 18 |       nodeVersion: process.version,
 19 |       platform: process.platform,
 20 |       arch: process.arch
 21 |     };
 22 | 
 23 |     sendHealth(response, 'healthy', healthData);
 24 |     return true;
 25 |   }
 26 | 
 27 |   // GET /api/health/detailed - Detailed health check
 28 |   if (pathname === '/api/health/detailed' && method === 'GET') {
 29 |     const detailedHealth = {
 30 |       status: 'healthy',
 31 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
 32 |       uptime: process.uptime(),
 33 |       version: process.env.npm_package_version || '2.0.0',
 34 |       environment: process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development',
 35 |       
 36 |       // System information
 37 |       system: {
 38 |         nodeVersion: process.version,
 39 |         platform: process.platform,
 40 |         arch: process.arch,
 41 |         pid: process.pid
 42 |       },
 43 |       
 44 |       // Memory usage
 45 |       memory: {
 46 |         rss: process.memoryUsage().rss,
 47 |         heapTotal: process.memoryUsage().heapTotal,
 48 |         heapUsed: process.memoryUsage().heapUsed,
 49 |         external: process.memoryUsage().external,
 50 |         arrayBuffers: process.memoryUsage().arrayBuffers
 51 |       },
 52 |       
 53 |       // CPU usage
 54 |       cpu: {
 55 |         user: process.cpuUsage().user,
 56 |         system: process.cpuUsage().system
 57 |       },
 58 |       
 59 |       // Event loop lag
 60 |       eventLoop: {
 61 |         lag: getEventLoopLag()
 62 |       },
 63 |       
 64 |       // Process info
 65 |       process: {
 66 |         title: process.title,
 67 |         execPath: process.execPath,
 68 |         execArgv: process.execArgv,
 69 |         argv: process.argv
 70 |       }
 71 |     };
 72 | 
 73 |     sendHealth(response, 'healthy', detailedHealth);
 74 |     return true;
 75 |   }
 76 | 
 77 |   // GET /api/health/ping - Simple ping
 78 |   if (pathname === '/api/health/ping' && method === 'GET') {
 79 |     sendSuccess(response, { 
 80 |       pong: true, 
 81 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString() 
 82 |     }, 'Pong');
 83 |     return true;
 84 |   }
 85 | 
 86 |   // GET /api/health/ready - Readiness probe
 87 |   if (pathname === '/api/health/ready' && method === 'GET') {
 88 |     // Check if all critical services are ready
 89 |     const isReady = await checkReadiness();
 90 |     
 91 |     if (isReady.ready) {
 92 |       sendHealth(response, 'healthy', isReady);
 93 |     } else {
 94 |       sendHealth(response, 'unhealthy', isReady);
 95 |     }
 96 |     return true;
 97 |   }
 98 | 
 99 |   // GET /api/health/live - Liveness probe
100 |   if (pathname === '/api/health/live' && method === 'GET') {
101 |     // Basic liveness check - process is responsive
102 |     sendHealth(response, 'healthy', {
103 |       live: true,
104 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
105 |     });
106 |     return true;
107 |   }
108 | 
109 |   return false;
110 | }
111 | 
112 | /**
113 |  * Get event loop lag in milliseconds
114 |  */
115 | function getEventLoopLag() {
116 |   const start = process.hrtime.bigint();
117 |   return setImmediate(() => {
118 |     const lag = Number(process.hrtime.bigint() - start) / 1000000; // Convert to milliseconds
119 |     return lag;
120 |   });
121 | }
122 | 
123 | /**
124 |  * Check if the application is ready to serve traffic
125 |  */
126 | async function checkReadiness() {
127 |   const checks = {
128 |     database: false,
129 |     aiProviders: false,
130 |     fileSystem: false,
131 |     memory: false
132 |   };
133 | 
134 |   // Check file system access
135 |   try {
136 |     const fs = require('fs');
137 |     fs.accessSync('./data', fs.constants.R_OK | fs.constants.W_OK);
138 |     checks.fileSystem = true;
139 |   } catch (error) {
140 |     console.warn('File system check failed:', error.message);
141 |   }
142 | 
143 |   // Check memory usage
144 |   const memoryUsage = process.memoryUsage();
145 |   const memoryUsagePercent = (memoryUsage.heapUsed / memoryUsage.heapTotal) * 100;
146 |   checks.memory = memoryUsagePercent < 90; // Less than 90% memory usage
147 | 
148 |   // Check database (placeholder - would implement actual DB check)
149 |   checks.database = true; // Placeholder
150 | 
151 |   // Check AI providers (placeholder - would check actual providers)
152 |   checks.aiProviders = true; // Placeholder
153 | 
154 |   const allChecksPass = Object.values(checks).every(check => check === true);
155 | 
156 |   return {
157 |     ready: allChecksPass,
158 |     checks,
159 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
160 |   };
161 | }
162 | 
163 | export default {
164 |   handleHealthRoutes
165 | };
166 | 
```
