```js
  1 | // Main route aggregator
  2 | import { handleDatasetRoutes } from './datasets.js';
  3 | import { handleChatRoutes } from './chat.js';
  4 | import { handleAnalyticsRoutes } from './analytics.js';
  5 | import { handleAnalyticsBrainRoutes } from './analytics-brain.js';
  6 | import { handleAIRoutes } from './ai.js';
  7 | import { handleHealthRoutes } from './health.js';
  8 | import { handleExportRoutes } from './export.js';
  9 | import { handleMLRoutes } from './machine-learning.js';
 10 | import { handleMlAnalyticsRoutes } from './ml-analytics.js';
 11 | import { handleStateRoutes } from './state.js';
 12 | import { handleQrUploadRoutes } from './qr-upload.js';
 13 | import { handlePlaybookAnalysisRoutes } from './playbook-analysis.js';
 14 | import { handlePdfRoutes } from './pdf.js';
 15 | import { handleAiAnalystRoutes } from './ai-analyst.routes.js';
 16 | import { handleSchemaTrainedAIRoutes } from './schema-trained-ai.routes.js';
 17 | import { handleDashboardQualityRoutes } from './dashboard-quality.js';
 18 | import { handleDashboardAiRoutes } from './dashboardAiRoutes.js';
 19 | import { handleAgenticModelRoutes } from './agentic-models.js';
 20 | import { handleAgenticDataScienceRoutes } from './agentic-data-science.js';
 21 | import { handleSchemaAgentRoutes } from './schema-agent.js';
 22 | import {
 23 |   handleE2ECompatRoutes,
 24 |   handleE2ENotFound,
 25 | } from './e2e-compat.routes.js';
 26 | import { sendError, sendSuccess, sendJson } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
 27 | import { HTTP_STATUS } from '../config/constants.js';
 28 | 
 29 | export async function setupRoutes(request, response) {
 30 |   const { method, pathname } = request;
 31 | 
 32 |   try {
 33 |     // Python ML gateway and agentic data science routes should run before
 34 |     // compatibility routes because the E2E shim owns a few legacy /api/ml paths.
 35 |     if (await handleMlAnalyticsRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 36 |       return;
 37 |     }
 38 | 
 39 |     if (await handleAgenticDataScienceRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 40 |       return;
 41 |     }
 42 | 
 43 |     if (await handleE2ECompatRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 44 |       return;
 45 |     }
 46 | 
 47 |     // State routes (for frontend state management)
 48 |     if (await handleStateRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 49 |       return;
 50 |     }
 51 | 
 52 |     // Health check routes (highest priority)
 53 |     if (await handleHealthRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 54 |       return;
 55 |     }
 56 | 
 57 |     // Model-aware agentic routes before older AI/dashboard handlers
 58 |     if (await handleAgenticModelRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 59 |       return;
 60 |     }
 61 | 
 62 |     // Schema-trained dashboard/chat/RAG routes before legacy dashboard/chat handlers
 63 |     if (await handleSchemaTrainedAIRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 64 |       return;
 65 |     }
 66 | 
 67 |     // Dashboard quality validation routes
 68 |     if (await handleDashboardQualityRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 69 |       return;
 70 |     }
 71 | 
 72 |     // Schema Agent: schema profiling, memory/RAG, dashboard planning, deterministic calculation
 73 |     if (await handleSchemaAgentRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 74 |       return;
 75 |     }
 76 | 
 77 |     // Schema-only AI dashboard planner + local analytics engine
 78 |     if (await handleDashboardAiRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 79 |       return;
 80 |     }
 81 | 
 82 |     // QR upload routes
 83 |     if (await handleQrUploadRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 84 |       return;
 85 |     }
 86 | 
 87 |     // AI provider routes
 88 |     if (await handleAIRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 89 |       return;
 90 |     }
 91 | 
 92 |     // PDF import and PDF Q&A routes
 93 |     if (await handlePdfRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 94 |       return;
 95 |     }
 96 | 
 97 |     // Dataset routes
 98 |     if (await handleDatasetRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
 99 |       return;
100 |     }
101 | 
102 |     // Chat routes
103 |     if (await handleChatRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
104 |       return;
105 |     }
106 | 
107 |     // Analytics routes
108 |     if (await handleAnalyticsRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
109 |       return;
110 |     }
111 | 
112 |     // Python-backed deterministic analytics routes
113 |     if (await handleMlAnalyticsRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
114 |       return;
115 |     }
116 | 
117 |     // DataAnalyticsProjects playbook route
118 |     if (await handlePlaybookAnalysisRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
119 |       return;
120 |     }
121 | 
122 |     // AI Analyst routes
123 |     if (await handleAiAnalystRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
124 |       return;
125 |     }
126 | 
127 |     // Schema-safe analytics brain routes
128 |     if (await handleAnalyticsBrainRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
129 |       return;
130 |     }
131 | 
132 |     // Export routes
133 |     if (await handleExportRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
134 |       return;
135 |     }
136 | 
137 |     // ML/AutoML routes
138 |     if (await handleMLRoutes(request, response, pathname)) {
139 |       return;
140 |     }
141 | 
142 |     // Route not found
143 |     if (method === 'GET' && pathname === '/') {
144 |       // Root endpoint
145 |       const rootData = {
146 |         name: 'InsightFlow API',
147 |         version: '2.0.0',
148 |         description: 'AI-powered data analytics platform',
149 |         endpoints: {
150 |           health: '/api/health',
151 |           ai: '/api/ai/*',
152 |           datasets: '/api/datasets/*',
153 |           chat: '/api/datasets/:id/chat',
154 |           analytics: '/api/datasets/:id/analyze',
155 |           export: '/api/datasets/:id/export'
156 |         },
157 |         documentation: '/api/docs',
158 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
159 |       };
160 |       sendJson(response, 200, rootData);
161 |     } else {
162 |       // 404 Not Found
163 |       handleE2ENotFound(request, response);
164 |     }
165 | 
166 |   } catch (error) {
167 |     console.error('Route setup error:', error);
168 |     sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Internal server error', 'ROUTE_ERROR');
169 |   }
170 | }
171 | 
172 | export default {
173 |   setupRoutes
174 | };
175 | 
```

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * ML Routes - AutoML endpoint handlers
  3 |  */
  4 | import { automlService } from '../services/ml/automl-service.js';
  5 | import MLClient from '../services/ml-client.js';
  6 | import { sendJson } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  7 | 
  8 | async function readJson(request) {
  9 |   let body = '';
 10 |   for await (const chunk of request) {
 11 |     body += chunk;
 12 |   }
 13 |   return body ? JSON.parse(body) : {};
 14 | }
 15 | 
 16 | export async function handleMLRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 17 |   const url = new URL(pathname, `http://${request.headers.host}`);
 18 |   const pathParts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
 19 | 
 20 |   // GET /api/ml/health
 21 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/health' && request.method === 'GET') {
 22 |     const python = await MLClient.health();
 23 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
 24 |       success: true,
 25 |       status: 'ready',
 26 |       message: 'Node ML gateway is ready',
 27 |       python,
 28 |       availableModels: automlService.listModels().length
 29 |     });
 30 |   }
 31 | 
 32 |   const gatewayEndpoints = {
 33 |     '/api/ml/profile': (data) => MLClient.profile(data),
 34 |     '/api/ml/correlations': (data) => MLClient.correlations(data, null, data.method || 'pearson'),
 35 |     '/api/ml/anomalies': (data) => MLClient.anomalies(data, null, data.method),
 36 |     '/api/ml/feature-importance': (data) => MLClient.featureImportance(data, data.target || data.target_column),
 37 |     '/api/ml/train-model': (data) => MLClient.trainModel(data, data.target || data.target_column, data),
 38 |     '/api/ml/predict': (data) => MLClient.predict(data.modelId || data.model_id, data.rows || data.input_data || []),
 39 |   };
 40 | 
 41 |   if (gatewayEndpoints[pathname] && request.method === 'POST') {
 42 |     try {
 43 |       const data = await readJson(request);
 44 |       const result = await gatewayEndpoints[pathname](data);
 45 |       return sendJson(response, result.success === false ? 503 : 200, result);
 46 |     } catch (error) {
 47 |       return sendJson(response, 500, { success: false, error: error.message });
 48 |     }
 49 |   }
 50 | 
 51 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/compare-datasets' && request.method === 'POST') {
 52 |     try {
 53 |       const data = await readJson(request);
 54 |       const result = await MLClient.compareDatasets(data.left, data.right);
 55 |       return sendJson(response, 200, { success: true, ...result });
 56 |     } catch (error) {
 57 |       return sendJson(response, 500, { success: false, error: error.message });
 58 |     }
 59 |   }
 60 | 
 61 |   // POST /api/ml/train - Train a model
 62 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/train' && request.method === 'POST') {
 63 |     let body = '';
 64 |     
 65 |     for await (const chunk of request) {
 66 |       body += chunk;
 67 |     }
 68 |     
 69 |     try {
 70 |       const data = JSON.parse(body);
 71 |       const { dataset_id, rows, target_column, problem_type } = data;
 72 |       
 73 |       if (!dataset_id || !rows || !target_column) {
 74 |         return sendJson(response, 400, {
 75 |           success: false,
 76 |           error: 'Missing required fields: dataset_id, rows, target_column'
 77 |         });
 78 |       }
 79 | 
 80 |       const result = await automlService.trainModel(
 81 |         dataset_id,
 82 |         rows,
 83 |         target_column,
 84 |         problem_type || 'auto'
 85 |       );
 86 | 
 87 |       if (result.success) {
 88 |         return sendJson(response, 200, result);
 89 |       } else {
 90 |         return sendJson(response, 500, result);
 91 |       }
 92 |     } catch (error) {
 93 |       return sendJson(response, 500, {
 94 |         success: false,
 95 |         error: error.message
 96 |       });
 97 |     }
 98 |   }
 99 | 
100 |   // POST /api/ml/predict - Make predictions
101 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/predict' && request.method === 'POST') {
102 |     let body = '';
103 |     
104 |     for await (const chunk of request) {
105 |       body += chunk;
106 |     }
107 |     
108 |     try {
109 |       const data = JSON.parse(body);
110 |       const { dataset_id, input_data } = data;
111 |       
112 |       if (!dataset_id || !input_data) {
113 |         return sendJson(response, 400, {
114 |           success: false,
115 |           error: 'Missing required fields: dataset_id, input_data'
116 |         });
117 |       }
118 | 
119 |       const result = await automlService.predict(dataset_id, input_data);
120 | 
121 |       if (result.success) {
122 |         return sendJson(response, 200, result);
123 |       } else {
124 |         return sendJson(response, 404, result);
125 |       }
126 |     } catch (error) {
127 |       return sendJson(response, 500, {
128 |         success: false,
129 |         error: error.message
130 |       });
131 |     }
132 |   }
133 | 
134 |   // GET /api/ml/models - List all models
135 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/models' && request.method === 'GET') {
136 |     return sendJson(response, 200, {
137 |       success: true,
138 |       models: automlService.listModels()
139 |     });
140 |   }
141 | 
142 |   // GET /api/ml/models/:id - Get model info
143 |   if (pathParts[2] === 'models' && pathParts[3] && request.method === 'GET') {
144 |     const datasetId = pathParts[3];
145 |     const modelInfo = automlService.getModelInfo(datasetId);
146 |     
147 |     if (modelInfo) {
148 |       return sendJson(response, 200, {
149 |         success: true,
150 |         model: modelInfo
151 |       });
152 |     } else {
153 |       return sendJson(response, 404, {
154 |         success: false,
155 |         error: 'Model not found'
156 |       });
157 |     }
158 |   }
159 | 
160 |   // DELETE /api/ml/models/:id - Delete model
161 |   if (pathParts[2] === 'models' && pathParts[3] && request.method === 'DELETE') {
162 |     const datasetId = pathParts[3];
163 |     const result = automlService.deleteModel(datasetId);
164 |     
165 |     if (result.success) {
166 |       return sendJson(response, 200, result);
167 |     } else {
168 |       return sendJson(response, 404, result);
169 |     }
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   // POST /api/ml/cluster - Cluster analysis
173 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/cluster' && request.method === 'POST') {
174 |     let body = '';
175 |     
176 |     for await (const chunk of request) {
177 |       body += chunk;
178 |     }
179 |     
180 |     try {
181 |       const data = JSON.parse(body);
182 |       const { rows, feature_columns, num_clusters } = data;
183 |       
184 |       if (!rows || !feature_columns) {
185 |         return sendJson(response, 400, {
186 |           success: false,
187 |           error: 'Missing required fields: rows, feature_columns'
188 |         });
189 |       }
190 | 
191 |       const result = await automlService.clusterAnalysis(
192 |         rows,
193 |         feature_columns,
194 |         num_clusters || 3
195 |       );
196 | 
197 |       return sendJson(response, result.success ? 200 : 500, result);
198 |     } catch (error) {
199 |       return sendJson(response, 500, {
200 |         success: false,
201 |         error: error.message
202 |       });
203 |     }
204 |   }
205 | 
206 |   // POST /api/ml/pca - PCA analysis
207 |   if (pathname === '/api/ml/pca' && request.method === 'POST') {
208 |     let body = '';
209 |     
210 |     for await (const chunk of request) {
211 |       body += chunk;
212 |     }
213 |     
214 |     try {
215 |       const data = JSON.parse(body);
216 |       const { rows, feature_columns, n_components } = data;
217 |       
218 |       if (!rows || !feature_columns) {
219 |         return sendJson(response, 400, {
220 |           success: false,
221 |           error: 'Missing required fields: rows, feature_columns'
222 |         });
223 |       }
224 | 
225 |       const result = await automlService.pcaAnalysis(
226 |         rows,
227 |         feature_columns,
228 |         n_components || 2
229 |       );
230 | 
231 |       return sendJson(response, result.success ? 200 : 500, result);
232 |     } catch (error) {
233 |       return sendJson(response, 500, {
234 |         success: false,
235 |         error: error.message
236 |       });
237 |     }
238 |   }
239 | 
240 |   return false;
241 | }
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/ml-analytics.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/ml-analytics.js`

```js
  1 | import { mlClient, MlServiceError } from '../services/ml/ml-client.js';
  2 | import { analyticsCache } from '../services/ml/analytics-cache.js';
  3 | import { createCacheKey, createDatasetFingerprint } from '../services/ml/dataset-fingerprint.js';
  4 | import { fallbackCorrelations, fallbackProfile } from '../services/ml/js-fallback-analytics.js';
  5 | import { getDatasetMetadataById, getDatasetRowsById } from '../services/ml/dataset-adapter.js';
  6 | 
  7 | const MAX_BODY_BYTES = Number(process.env.MAX_JSON_BODY_BYTES || 20 * 1024 * 1024);
  8 | 
  9 | function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
 10 |   response.writeHead(statusCode, { 'content-type': 'application/json' });
 11 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 12 | }
 13 | 
 14 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
 15 |   const chunks = [];
 16 |   let size = 0;
 17 | 
 18 |   for await (const chunk of request) {
 19 |     size += chunk.length;
 20 |     if (size > MAX_BODY_BYTES) {
 21 |       const error = new Error('Request body too large');
 22 |       error.statusCode = 413;
 23 |       throw error;
 24 |     }
 25 |     chunks.push(chunk);
 26 |   }
 27 | 
 28 |   const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString('utf8');
 29 |   return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
 30 | }
 31 | 
 32 | async function rowsFromDatasetOrBody(datasetId, body = {}) {
 33 |   if (Array.isArray(body.records)) return body.records;
 34 |   if (Array.isArray(body.rows)) return body.rows;
 35 | 
 36 |   if (!datasetId) {
 37 |     const error = new Error('records, rows, or datasetId is required');
 38 |     error.statusCode = 400;
 39 |     throw error;
 40 |   }
 41 | 
 42 |   return getDatasetRowsById(datasetId);
 43 | }
 44 | 
 45 | async function withCache({ datasetId, records, metadata, operation, params, compute }) {
 46 |   const fingerprint = createDatasetFingerprint(records, metadata);
 47 |   const cacheKey = createCacheKey(datasetId || 'direct-records', operation, fingerprint, params);
 48 |   const cached = analyticsCache.get(cacheKey);
 49 | 
 50 |   if (cached) {
 51 |     return { ...cached, cache: { hit: true, fingerprint } };
 52 |   }
 53 | 
 54 |   const value = await compute();
 55 |   const wrapped = { ...value, cache: { hit: false, fingerprint } };
 56 |   analyticsCache.set(cacheKey, wrapped);
 57 |   return wrapped;
 58 | }
 59 | 
 60 | async function handleOperation({ request, response, datasetId, operation }) {
 61 |   const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 62 |   const records = await rowsFromDatasetOrBody(datasetId, body);
 63 |   const metadata = datasetId ? await getDatasetMetadataById(datasetId) : body.metadata || {};
 64 |   const { records: _records, rows: _rows, metadata: _metadata, ...params } = body;
 65 | 
 66 |   try {
 67 |     const result = await withCache({
 68 |       datasetId,
 69 |       records,
 70 |       metadata,
 71 |       operation,
 72 |       params,
 73 |       compute: async () => {
 74 |         switch (operation) {
 75 |           case 'profile':
 76 |             return mlClient.profile(records, params);
 77 |           case 'correlations':
 78 |             return mlClient.correlations(records, params);
 79 |           case 'anomalies':
 80 |             return mlClient.anomalies(records, params);
 81 |           case 'feature-importance':
 82 |             if (!body.target) {
 83 |               const error = new Error('target is required');
 84 |               error.statusCode = 400;
 85 |               throw error;
 86 |             }
 87 |             return mlClient.featureImportance(records, body.target, params);
 88 |           case 'train-model':
 89 |             if (!body.target) {
 90 |               const error = new Error('target is required');
 91 |               error.statusCode = 400;
 92 |               throw error;
 93 |             }
 94 |             return mlClient.trainModel(records, body.target, params);
 95 |           case 'cluster':
 96 |             return mlClient.cluster(records, params);
 97 |           case 'rag-training-records':
 98 |             return mlClient.ragTrainingRecords(records, params);
 99 |           default: {
100 |             const error = new Error(`Unknown ML operation: ${operation}`);
101 |             error.statusCode = 404;
102 |             throw error;
103 |           }
104 |         }
105 |       },
106 |     });
107 | 
108 |     sendJson(response, 200, { ok: true, operation, result });
109 |   } catch (error) {
110 |     if (error instanceof MlServiceError && operation === 'profile') {
111 |       sendJson(response, 200, {
112 |         ok: true,
113 |         operation,
114 |         result: fallbackProfile(records),
115 |         warning: error.message,
116 |       });
117 |       return;
118 |     }
119 | 
120 |     if (error instanceof MlServiceError && operation === 'correlations') {
121 |       sendJson(response, 200, {
122 |         ok: true,
123 |         operation,
124 |         result: fallbackCorrelations(records),
125 |         warning: error.message,
126 |       });
127 |       return;
128 |     }
129 | 
130 |     throw error;
131 |   }
132 | }
133 | 
134 | async function handleCompareDatasets(request, response) {
135 |   const body = await readJsonBody(request);
136 |   let leftRecords = body.left_records || body.leftRecords || body.left?.rows;
137 |   let rightRecords = body.right_records || body.rightRecords || body.right?.rows;
138 | 
139 |   if (!leftRecords && body.leftDatasetId) leftRecords = await getDatasetRowsById(body.leftDatasetId);
140 |   if (!rightRecords && body.rightDatasetId) rightRecords = await getDatasetRowsById(body.rightDatasetId);
141 | 
142 |   if (!Array.isArray(leftRecords) || !Array.isArray(rightRecords)) {
143 |     const error = new Error('Provide left/right records or leftDatasetId/rightDatasetId');
144 |     error.statusCode = 400;
145 |     throw error;
146 |   }
147 | 
148 |   const result = await mlClient.compareDatasets(leftRecords, rightRecords, {
149 |     leftName: body.leftName || body.leftDatasetId || 'left',
150 |     rightName: body.rightName || body.rightDatasetId || 'right',
151 |   });
152 | 
153 |   sendJson(response, 200, { ok: true, operation: 'compare-datasets', result });
154 | }
155 | 
156 | async function handlePredict(request, response, datasetId) {
157 |   const body = await readJsonBody(request);
158 |   const records = await rowsFromDatasetOrBody(datasetId, body);
159 | 
160 |   if (!body.target) {
161 |     const error = new Error('target is required');
162 |     error.statusCode = 400;
163 |     throw error;
164 |   }
165 | 
166 |   const predictRecords = body.predictRecords || body.predict_records;
167 |   if (!Array.isArray(predictRecords)) {
168 |     const error = new Error('predictRecords is required');
169 |     error.statusCode = 400;
170 |     throw error;
171 |   }
172 | 
173 |   const result = await mlClient.predict(records, body.target, predictRecords, body);
174 |   sendJson(response, 200, { ok: true, operation: 'predict', result });
175 | }
176 | 
177 | export async function handleMlAnalyticsRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
178 |   try {
179 |     if (request.method === 'GET' && pathname === '/api/ml/health') {
180 |       const result = await mlClient.health();
181 |       sendJson(response, 200, { ok: true, result });
182 |       return true;
183 |     }
184 | 
185 |     if (request.method === 'POST' && pathname === '/api/ml/compare-datasets') {
186 |       await handleCompareDatasets(request, response);
187 |       return true;
188 |     }
189 | 
190 |     if (request.method === 'POST' && pathname === '/api/ml/predict') {
191 |       await handlePredict(request, response, null);
192 |       return true;
193 |     }
194 | 
195 |     const directMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/ml\/(profile|correlations|anomalies|feature-importance|train-model|cluster|rag-training-records)$/);
196 |     if (request.method === 'POST' && directMatch) {
197 |       await handleOperation({ request, response, datasetId: null, operation: directMatch[1] });
198 |       return true;
199 |     }
200 | 
201 |     const datasetMatch = pathname.match(
202 |       /^\/api\/ml\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/(profile|correlations|anomalies|feature-importance|train-model|cluster|rag-training-records|predict)$/,
203 |     );
204 |     if (request.method === 'POST' && datasetMatch) {
205 |       const [, datasetId, operation] = datasetMatch;
206 | 
207 |       if (operation === 'predict') {
208 |         await handlePredict(request, response, decodeURIComponent(datasetId));
209 |       } else {
210 |         await handleOperation({
211 |           request,
212 |           response,
213 |           datasetId: decodeURIComponent(datasetId),
214 |           operation,
215 |         });
216 |       }
217 | 
218 |       return true;
219 |     }
220 | 
221 |     return false;
222 |   } catch (error) {
223 |     sendJson(response, error.statusCode || error.status || 500, {
224 |       ok: false,
225 |       error: error.message || 'ML analytics route failed',
226 |     });
227 |     return true;
228 |   }
229 | }
230 | 
```

```js
  1 | import fs from "node:fs";
  2 | import fsp from "node:fs/promises";
  3 | import path from "node:path";
  4 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  5 | import Busboy from "busboy";
  6 | 
  7 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from "../utils/response-utils.js";
  8 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from "../config/constants.js";
  9 | import { createDataset } from "../database/dataset-repository.js";
 10 | import { updateDataset, updateAnalysis } from "./state.js";
 11 | import { parsePdfWithOpenDataLoader } from "../services/pdf/pdf-loader-service.js";
 12 | import { buildPdfDataset } from "../services/pdf/pdf-dataset-builder.js";
 13 | import { getPdfKnowledgeBase, savePdfKnowledgeBase } from "../services/pdf/pdf-store.js";
 14 | import { answerPdfQuestion } from "../services/pdf/pdf-qa-service.js";
 15 | import { buildDataAnalyticsProjectsDashboard } from "../services/playbooks/playbook-dashboard-engine.js";
 16 | 
 17 | const uploadDir = path.resolve("data", "uploads", "pdfs");
 18 | await fsp.mkdir(uploadDir, { recursive: true });
 19 | 
 20 | function readJsonBody(request) {
 21 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 22 |     let body = "";
 23 | 
 24 |     request.on("data", (chunk) => {
 25 |       body += chunk.toString();
 26 | 
 27 |       if (body.length > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
 28 |         reject(new Error("Request body too large"));
 29 |       }
 30 |     });
 31 | 
 32 |     request.on("end", () => {
 33 |       try {
 34 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
 35 |       } catch {
 36 |         reject(new Error("Invalid JSON body"));
 37 |       }
 38 |     });
 39 | 
 40 |     request.on("error", reject);
 41 |   });
 42 | }
 43 | 
 44 | function parsePdfMultipart(request) {
 45 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 46 |     const contentType = request.headers["content-type"] || "";
 47 | 
 48 |     if (!contentType.includes("multipart/form-data")) {
 49 |       reject(new Error("Content-Type must be multipart/form-data"));
 50 |       return;
 51 |     }
 52 | 
 53 |     const busboy = Busboy({
 54 |       headers: request.headers,
 55 |       limits: {
 56 |         files: 1,
 57 |         fileSize: 30 * 1024 * 1024,
 58 |       },
 59 |     });
 60 | 
 61 |     let uploadedFile = null;
 62 |     let settled = false;
 63 |     const fields = {};
 64 |     const writeTasks = [];
 65 | 
 66 |     const fail = (error) => {
 67 |       if (settled) return;
 68 |       settled = true;
 69 |       reject(error);
 70 |     };
 71 | 
 72 |     busboy.on("field", (name, value) => {
 73 |       fields[name] = value;
 74 |     });
 75 | 
 76 |     busboy.on("file", (fieldName, file, info) => {
 77 |       const { filename, mimeType } = info;
 78 | 
 79 |       if (mimeType !== "application/pdf") {
 80 |         file.resume();
 81 |         fail(new Error("Only PDF files are allowed"));
 82 |         return;
 83 |       }
 84 | 
 85 |       const safeName = String(filename || "document.pdf").replace(/[^\w.-]+/g, "_");
 86 |       const storedName = `${randomUUID()}-${safeName}`;
 87 |       const filePath = path.join(uploadDir, storedName);
 88 |       const stream = fs.createWriteStream(filePath);
 89 | 
 90 |       uploadedFile = {
 91 |         fieldName,
 92 |         originalName: safeName,
 93 |         storedName,
 94 |         filePath,
 95 |         mimeType,
 96 |       };
 97 | 
 98 |       file.pipe(stream);
 99 | 
100 |       writeTasks.push(
101 |         new Promise((resolveStream, rejectStream) => {
102 |           stream.on("finish", resolveStream);
103 |           stream.on("error", rejectStream);
104 |           file.on("limit", () => rejectStream(new Error("PDF file is too large")));
105 |         }),
106 |       );
107 |     });
108 | 
109 |     busboy.on("error", fail);
110 | 
111 |     busboy.on("finish", async () => {
112 |       if (settled) return;
113 | 
114 |       try {
115 |         await Promise.all(writeTasks);
116 | 
117 |         if (!uploadedFile) {
118 |           fail(new Error("PDF file is required"));
119 |           return;
120 |         }
121 | 
122 |         settled = true;
123 |         resolve({ file: uploadedFile, fields });
124 |       } catch (error) {
125 |         fail(error);
126 |       }
127 |     });
128 | 
129 |     request.pipe(busboy);
130 |   });
131 | }
132 | 
133 | function safeNumber(value) {
134 |   const parsed = Number(String(value ?? "").replace(/[,$₹%]/g, ""));
135 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
136 | }
137 | 
138 | function buildFallbackAnalysis(dataset) {
139 |   const columns = dataset.columns || [];
140 |   const rows = dataset.rows || [];
141 |   const numeric = columns.find((column) => column.type === "number");
142 |   const dimension = columns.find((column) => column.type !== "number");
143 |   const kpis = [
144 |     {
145 |       id: randomUUID(),
146 |       title: "Extracted Rows",
147 |       value: rows.length.toLocaleString(),
148 |       metric: "*",
149 |       aggregation: "count",
150 |     },
151 |     {
152 |       id: randomUUID(),
153 |       title: "Extracted Columns",
154 |       value: columns.length.toLocaleString(),
155 |       metric: "*",
156 |       aggregation: "count",
157 |     },
158 |   ];
159 |   const chartRecommendations = [];
160 | 
161 |   if (dimension) {
162 |     const counts = new Map();
163 | 
164 |     for (const row of rows) {
165 |       const key = String(row[dimension.name] || "Unknown");
166 |       counts.set(key, (counts.get(key) || 0) + 1);
167 |     }
168 | 
169 |     chartRecommendations.push({
170 |       id: randomUUID(),
171 |       title: `Rows by ${dimension.name}`,
172 |       type: "bar",
173 |       xKey: dimension.name,
174 |       yKey: "count",
175 |       aggregation: "count",
176 |       data: [...counts.entries()]
177 |         .map(([label, count]) => ({ [dimension.name]: label, count }))
178 |         .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
179 |         .slice(0, 10),
180 |     });
181 |   }
182 | 
183 |   if (numeric && dimension) {
184 |     const groups = new Map();
185 | 
186 |     for (const row of rows) {
187 |       const key = String(row[dimension.name] || "Unknown");
188 |       const value = safeNumber(row[numeric.name]);
189 |       if (value === null) continue;
190 |       if (!groups.has(key)) groups.set(key, []);
191 |       groups.get(key).push(value);
192 |     }
193 | 
194 |     chartRecommendations.push({
195 |       id: randomUUID(),
196 |       title: `Average ${numeric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
197 |       type: "bar",
198 |       xKey: dimension.name,
199 |       yKey: numeric.name,
200 |       aggregation: "avg",
201 |       data: [...groups.entries()]
202 |         .map(([label, values]) => ({
203 |           [dimension.name]: label,
204 |           [numeric.name]: values.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / values.length,
205 |         }))
206 |         .sort((a, b) => b[numeric.name] - a[numeric.name])
207 |         .slice(0, 10),
208 |     });
209 |   }
210 | 
211 |   return {
212 |     dataType: "pdf_document",
213 |     dataTypeLabel: "PDF Extracted Dataset",
214 |     kpis,
215 |     chartRecommendations,
216 |     insights: [
217 |       {
218 |         type: "summary",
219 |         title: "PDF Imported",
220 |         message: `Extracted ${rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows and ${columns.length.toLocaleString()} columns from PDF tables.`,
221 |       },
222 |     ],
223 |     privacy: {
224 |       rawPdfSentToLLM: false,
225 |       schemaOnly: true,
226 |     },
227 |   };
228 | }
229 | 
230 | async function analyzePdfDataset(dataset) {
231 |   try {
232 |     const analysis = await buildDataAnalyticsProjectsDashboard(dataset);
233 |     if (analysis) return analysis;
234 |   } catch {
235 |     // fallback below
236 |   }
237 | 
238 |   return buildFallbackAnalysis(dataset);
239 | }
240 | 
241 | export async function handlePdfRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
242 |   const { method } = request;
243 | 
244 |   if (pathname === "/api/pdf/import" && method === "POST") {
245 |     try {
246 |       const { file } = await parsePdfMultipart(request);
247 |       const parsed = await parsePdfWithOpenDataLoader(file.filePath);
248 |       const { dataset: extractedDataset, knowledgeBase, tables } = buildPdfDataset({
249 |         fileName: file.originalName,
250 |         pdfJson: parsed.json,
251 |         markdown: parsed.markdown,
252 |       });
253 |       const pdfId = randomUUID();
254 |       const dataset = createDataset({
255 |         name: extractedDataset.name,
256 |         fileName: extractedDataset.fileName,
257 |         sourceType: "pdf",
258 |         columns: extractedDataset.columns,
259 |         rows: extractedDataset.rows,
260 |       });
261 |       const finalDataset = dataset || { ...extractedDataset, id: pdfId };
262 | 
263 |       updateDataset(finalDataset);
264 | 
265 |       savePdfKnowledgeBase(pdfId, {
266 |         pdfId,
267 |         datasetId: finalDataset.id,
268 |         fileName: file.originalName,
269 |         jobId: parsed.jobId,
270 |         outputDir: parsed.outputDir,
271 |         knowledgeBase,
272 |         tables,
273 |       });
274 | 
275 |       const analysis = await analyzePdfDataset(finalDataset);
276 |       updateAnalysis(analysis);
277 | 
278 |       sendSuccess(
279 |         response,
280 |         {
281 |           pdf: {
282 |             id: pdfId,
283 |             datasetId: finalDataset.id,
284 |             fileName: file.originalName,
285 |             jobId: parsed.jobId,
286 |             tableCount: tables.length,
287 |             chunkCount: knowledgeBase.chunks.length,
288 |             textElementCount: knowledgeBase.textElements.length,
289 |           },
290 |           dataset: finalDataset,
291 |           analysis,
292 |           knowledgeBaseSummary: {
293 |             tableCount: tables.length,
294 |             chunkCount: knowledgeBase.chunks.length,
295 |             textElementCount: knowledgeBase.textElements.length,
296 |           },
297 |           privacy: {
298 |             rawPdfSentToLLM: false,
299 |             extractedTextCanBeUsedForRAG: true,
300 |             dashboardValuesCalculatedLocally: true,
301 |           },
302 |         },
303 |         "PDF imported and analyzed",
304 |       );
305 | 
306 |       return true;
307 |     } catch (error) {
308 |       sendError(
309 |         response,
310 |         HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST,
311 |         error.message || "PDF import failed",
312 |         ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR,
313 |       );
314 | 
315 |       return true;
316 |     }
317 |   }
318 | 
319 |   const askMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/pdf\/([^/]+)\/ask$/);
320 | 
321 |   if (askMatch && method === "POST") {
322 |     try {
323 |       const [, pdfId] = askMatch;
324 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
325 | 
326 |       if (!body.query) {
327 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST, "Query is required", ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR);
328 |         return true;
329 |       }
330 | 
331 |       const stored = getPdfKnowledgeBase(pdfId);
332 | 
333 |       if (!stored) {
334 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, "PDF knowledge base not found", ERROR_CODES.DATASET_NOT_FOUND);
335 |         return true;
336 |       }
337 | 
338 |       const result = await answerPdfQuestion({
339 |         query: body.query,
340 |         knowledgeBase: stored.knowledgeBase,
341 |       });
342 | 
343 |       sendSuccess(response, result, "PDF question answered");
344 |       return true;
345 |     } catch (error) {
346 |       sendError(
347 |         response,
348 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
349 |         error.message || "PDF question failed",
350 |         ERROR_CODES.AI_GENERATION_FAILED,
351 |       );
352 | 
353 |       return true;
354 |     }
355 |   }
356 | 
357 |   return false;
358 | }
359 |
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/playbook-analysis.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/playbook-analysis.js`

```js
 1 | import { getDatasetById } from "../database/dataset-repository.js";
 2 | import { buildDataAnalyticsProjectsDashboard } from "../services/playbooks/playbook-dashboard-engine.js";
 3 | import { HTTP_STATUS, ERROR_CODES } from "../config/constants.js";
 4 | import { sendError, sendSuccess } from "../utils/response-utils.js";
 5 | 
 6 | export async function handlePlaybookAnalysisRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 7 |   const { method } = request;
 8 | 
 9 |   if (pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/[^/]+\/playbook-analysis$/) && method === "POST") {
10 |     try {
11 |       const datasetId = pathname.split("/")[3];
12 |       const dataset = getDatasetById(datasetId);
13 | 
14 |       if (!dataset) {
15 |         sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND, "Dataset not found", ERROR_CODES.NOT_FOUND);
16 |         return true;
17 |       }
18 | 
19 |       const analysis = await buildDataAnalyticsProjectsDashboard(dataset);
20 |       sendSuccess(response, analysis, "Playbook analysis generated");
21 |       return true;
22 |     } catch (error) {
23 |       console.error("[PLAYBOOK ANALYSIS] Error:", error);
24 |       sendError(
25 |         response,
26 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
27 |         error.message || "Failed to generate playbook analysis",
28 |         ERROR_CODES.AI_ERROR,
29 |       );
30 |       return true;
31 |     }
32 |   }
33 | 
34 |   return false;
35 | }
36 | 
37 | export default {
38 |   handlePlaybookAnalysisRoutes,
39 | };
40 |
```

```js
 19 | function readJsonBody(request) {
 20 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 21 |     let body = "";
 22 | 
 23 |     request.on("data", (chunk) => {
 24 |       body += chunk.toString();
 25 | 
 26 |       if (body.length > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
 27 |         reject(new Error("Request body too large."));
 28 |       }
 29 |     });
 30 | 
 31 |     request.on("end", () => {
 32 |       try {
 33 |         resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {});
 34 |       } catch {
 35 |         reject(new Error("Invalid JSON body."));
 36 |       }
 37 |     });
 38 | 
 39 |     request.on("error", reject);
 40 |   });
 41 | }
 42 | 
 43 | function getRequestUrl(request) {
 44 |   return new URL(request.url, `http://${request.headers.host}`);
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | function getPortalBaseUrl(request) {
 48 |   const configuredBaseUrl =
 49 |     process.env.FRONTEND_PUBLIC_URL ||
 50 |     process.env.VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL ||
 51 |     process.env.PUBLIC_APP_URL ||
 52 |     process.env.CLIENT_ORIGIN ||
 53 |     (process.env.CORS_ORIGIN && process.env.CORS_ORIGIN !== "*"
 54 |       ? process.env.CORS_ORIGIN
 55 |       : "");
 56 | 
 57 |   if (configuredBaseUrl) {
 58 |     return configuredBaseUrl.replace(/\/$/, "");
 59 |   }
 60 | 
 61 |   if (request.headers.origin) {
 62 |     return request.headers.origin.replace(/\/$/, "");
 63 |   }
 64 | 
 65 |   const protocol = request.headers["x-forwarded-proto"] || "http";
 66 |   const host = request.headers.host || "localhost:3001";
 67 | 
 68 |   if (host === "localhost:3001") {
 69 |     return `${protocol}://localhost:5173`;
 70 |   }
 71 | 
 72 |   if (host === "127.0.0.1:3001") {
 73 |     return `${protocol}://127.0.0.1:5173`;
 74 |   }
 75 | 
 76 |   return `${protocol}://${host}`;
 77 | }
 78 | 
 79 | function buildMobilePortalUrl(request, sessionId, token) {
 80 |   const redirectUrl = new URL(
 81 |     `/mobile-upload/${encodeURIComponent(sessionId)}`,
 82 |     getPortalBaseUrl(request)
 83 |   );
 84 | 
 85 |   if (token) {
 86 |     redirectUrl.searchParams.set("token", token);
 87 |   }
 88 | 
 89 |   return redirectUrl.toString();
 90 | }
 91 | 
 92 | function parseMultipartFiles(request) {
 93 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 94 |     const busboy = Busboy({
 95 |       headers: request.headers,
 96 |       limits: {
 97 |         files: 10,
 98 |         fileSize: 80 * 1024 * 1024,
 99 |       },
100 |     });
101 | 
102 |     const fileTasks = [];
103 | 
104 |     busboy.on("file", (fieldName, file, info) => {
105 |       const chunks = [];
106 |       const filename = String(info.filename || "dataset").replace(/[^\w.-]+/g, "_");
107 | 
108 |       file.on("data", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));
109 |       file.on("limit", () => reject(new Error(`${filename} is too large.`)));
110 | 
111 |       fileTasks.push(
112 |         new Promise((resolveFile, rejectFile) => {
113 |           file.on("end", () => {
114 |             resolveFile({
115 |               fieldName,
116 |               filename,
117 |               mimeType: info.mimeType,
118 |               buffer: Buffer.concat(chunks),
119 |             });
120 |           });
121 | 
122 |           file.on("error", rejectFile);
123 |         })
124 |       );
125 |     });
126 | 
127 |     busboy.on("finish", async () => {
128 |       try {
129 |         const files = await Promise.all(fileTasks);
130 | 
131 |         if (!files.length) {
132 |           reject(new Error("No files uploaded."));
133 |           return;
134 |         }
135 | 
136 |         resolve({ files });
137 |       } catch (error) {
138 |         reject(error);
139 |       }
140 |     });
141 | 
142 |     busboy.on("error", reject);
143 |     request.pipe(busboy);
144 |   });
145 | }
146 | 
147 | function safeNumber(value) {
148 |   const parsed = Number(String(value ?? "").replace(/[,$₹%]/g, ""));
149 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
150 | }
151 | 
152 | function buildBasicAnalysis(dataset) {
153 |   const rows = dataset.rows || [];
154 |   const columns = dataset.columns || [];
155 | 
156 |   const metric =
157 |     columns.find((column) =>
158 |       ["salary", "salary_usd", "revenue", "sales", "amount", "score", "price"].some((key) =>
159 |         column.name.toLowerCase().includes(key)
160 |       )
161 |     ) || columns.find((column) => column.type === "number");
162 | 
163 |   const dimension =
164 |     columns.find((column) =>
165 |       ["country", "region", "education", "product", "category", "company"].some((key) =>
166 |         column.name.toLowerCase().includes(key)
167 |       )
168 |     ) || columns.find((column) => column.type !== "number");
169 | 
170 |   const kpis = [
171 |     {
172 |       id: randomUUID(),
173 |       title: "Total Records",
174 |       value: rows.length.toLocaleString(),
175 |       metric: "*",
176 |       aggregation: "count",
177 |     },
178 |     {
179 |       id: randomUUID(),
180 |       title: "Columns",
181 |       value: columns.length.toLocaleString(),
182 |       metric: "*",
183 |       aggregation: "count",
184 |     },
185 |   ];
186 | 
187 |   if (metric) {
188 |     const nums = rows
189 |       .map((row) => safeNumber(row[metric.name]))
190 |       .filter((value) => value !== null);
191 | 
192 |     if (nums.length) {
193 |       kpis.push(
194 |         {
195 |           id: randomUUID(),
196 |           title: `Average ${metric.name}`,
197 |           value: Number((nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / nums.length).toFixed(2)).toLocaleString(),
198 |           metric: metric.name,
199 |           aggregation: "avg",
200 |         },
201 |         {
202 |           id: randomUUID(),
203 |           title: `Highest ${metric.name}`,
204 |           value: Math.max(...nums).toLocaleString(),
205 |           metric: metric.name,
206 |           aggregation: "max",
207 |         }
208 |       );
209 |     }
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   const chartRecommendations = [];
213 | 
214 |   if (dimension) {
215 |     const counts = new Map();
216 | 
217 |     for (const row of rows) {
218 |       const label = String(row[dimension.name] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
219 |       counts.set(label, (counts.get(label) || 0) + 1);
220 |     }
221 | 
222 |     chartRecommendations.push({
223 |       id: randomUUID(),
224 |       type: "bar",
225 |       title: `Rows by ${dimension.name}`,
226 |       xKey: dimension.name,
227 |       yKey: "count",
228 |       aggregation: "count",
229 |       data: [...counts.entries()]
230 |         .map(([label, count]) => ({
231 |           [dimension.name]: label,
232 |           count,
233 |         }))
234 |         .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
235 |         .slice(0, 10),
236 |     });
237 |   }
238 | 
239 |   return {
240 |     dataType: "qr_upload_dataset",
241 |     dataTypeLabel: "QR Uploaded Dataset",
242 |     kpis,
243 |     chartRecommendations,
244 |     insights: [
245 |       {
246 |         type: "summary",
247 |         title: "Dataset Uploaded",
248 |         message: `Uploaded ${rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows and ${columns.length.toLocaleString()} columns from QR/mobile upload.`,
249 |       },
250 |     ],
251 |     privacy: {
252 |       schemaOnly: true,
253 |       dashboardValuesCalculatedLocally: true,
254 |     },
255 |   };
256 | }
257 | 
258 | export async function handleQrUploadRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
259 |   const { method } = request;
260 |   const url = getRequestUrl(request);
261 | 
262 |   if (pathname === "/api/qr-upload/generate" && method === "POST") {
263 |     try {
264 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
265 | 
266 |       const portalBaseUrl =
267 |         body.portalBaseUrl ||
268 |         process.env.FRONTEND_PUBLIC_URL ||
269 |         request.headers.origin ||
270 |         `http://${request.headers.host}`;
271 | 
272 |       const session = createQrUploadSession({
273 |         portalBaseUrl,
274 |         workspaceName: body.workspaceName || "InsightFlow Workspace",
275 |       });
276 | 
277 |       const qrDataUrl = await QRCode.toDataURL(session.uploadUrl, {
278 |         margin: 1,
279 |         width: 320,
280 |         color: {
281 |           dark: "#111827",
282 |           light: "#ffffff",
283 |         },
284 |       });
285 | 
286 |       sendSuccess(
287 |         response,
288 |         {
289 |           sessionId: session.sessionId,
290 |           uploadToken: [REDACTED_SECRET],
291 |           uploadUrl: session.uploadUrl,
292 |           qrDataUrl,
293 |           workspaceName: session.workspaceName,
294 |           status: session.status,
295 |           expiresAt: session.expiresAt,
296 |         },
297 |         "QR upload session generated"
298 |       );
299 | 
300 |       return true;
301 |     } catch (error) {
302 |       sendError(
303 |         response,
304 |         HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
305 |         error.message || "Failed to generate QR session",
306 |         ERROR_CODES.INTERNAL_ERROR
307 |       );
308 | 
309 |       return true;
310 |     }
311 |   }
312 | 
313 |   const statusMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/qr-upload\/([^/]+)\/status$/);
314 | 
315 |   if (statusMatch && method === "GET") {
316 |     try {
317 |       const [, sessionId] = statusMatch;
318 |       const token = url.searchParams.get("token");
319 |       const session = verifyQrUploadSession(sessionId, token);
320 | 
321 |       sendSuccess(
322 |         response,
323 |         {
324 |           sessionId: session.sessionId,
325 |           status: session.status,
326 |           workspaceName: session.workspaceName,
327 |           files: session.files,
328 |           dataset: session.dataset,
329 |           analysis: session.analysis,
330 |           error: session.error,
331 |           expiresAt: session.expiresAt,
332 |         },
333 |         "QR session status"
334 |       );
335 | 
336 |       return true;
337 |     } catch (error) {
338 |       sendError(
339 |         response,
340 |         HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST,
341 |         error.message || "QR session status failed",
342 |         ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR
343 |       );
344 | 
345 |       return true;
346 |     }
347 |   }
348 | 
349 |   const uploadMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/qr-upload\/([^/]+)\/upload$/);
350 | 
351 |   if (uploadMatch && method === "GET") {
352 |     const [, sessionId] = uploadMatch;
353 |     const token = url.searchParams.get("token");
354 |     const session = getQrUploadSession(sessionId);
355 | 
356 |     sendRedirect(
357 |       response,
358 |       session?.uploadUrl || buildMobilePortalUrl(request, sessionId, token),
359 |       302
360 |     );
361 | 
362 |     return true;
363 |   }
364 | 
365 |   if (uploadMatch && method === "POST") {
366 |     const [, sessionId] = uploadMatch;
367 |     const token = url.searchParams.get("token");
368 | 
369 |     try {
370 |       verifyQrUploadSession(sessionId, token);
371 | 
372 |       updateQrUploadSession(sessionId, {
373 |         status: "uploading",
374 |       });
375 | 
376 |       const { files } = await parseMultipartFiles(request);
377 | 
378 |       const parsedFiles = files.map((file) => {
379 |         const parsed = parseDatasetFile({
380 |           filename: file.filename,
381 |           buffer: file.buffer,
382 |         });
383 | 
384 |         return {
385 |           ...parsed,
386 |           sizeBytes: file.buffer.length,
387 |           status: "uploaded",
388 |         };
389 |       });
390 | 
391 |       const merged = mergeParsedDatasets(parsedFiles);
392 | 
393 |       const savedResult = createDataset({
394 |         name: merged.name,
395 |         fileName: merged.fileName,
396 |         sourceType: merged.sourceType,
397 |         columns: merged.columns,
398 |         rows: merged.rows,
399 |       });
400 | 
401 |       const dataset =
402 |         savedResult?.dataset ||
403 |         savedResult || {
404 |           id: randomUUID(),
405 |           ...merged,
406 |           uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
407 |         };
408 | 
409 |       const analysis = buildBasicAnalysis(dataset);
410 | 
411 |       try {
412 |         updateDataset(dataset);
413 |         updateAnalysis(analysis);
414 |       } catch {
415 |         // keep response working
416 |       }
417 | 
418 |       const updated = updateQrUploadSession(sessionId, {
419 |         status: "completed",
420 |         files: parsedFiles.map((file) => ({
421 |           name: file.fileName,
422 |           rowCount: file.rowCount,
423 |           columnCount: file.columnCount,
424 |           sizeBytes: file.sizeBytes,
425 |           status: "uploaded",
426 |         })),
427 |         dataset,
428 |         analysis,
429 |       });
430 | 
431 |       sendSuccess(
432 |         response,
433 |         {
434 |           sessionId,
435 |           status: updated.status,
436 |           workspaceName: updated.workspaceName,
437 |           expiresAt: updated.expiresAt,
438 |           files: updated.files,
439 |           dataset,
440 |           analysis,
441 |         },
442 |         "Files uploaded and dataset synced"
443 |       );
444 | 
445 |       return true;
446 |     } catch (error) {
447 |       updateQrUploadSession(sessionId, {
448 |         status: "error",
449 |         error: error.message,
450 |       });
451 | 
452 |       sendError(
453 |         response,
454 |         HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST,
455 |         error.message || "QR upload failed",
456 |         ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR
457 |       );
458 | 
459 |       return true;
460 |     }
461 |   }
462 | 
463 |   return false;
464 | }
465 | 
466 | export default {
467 |   handleQrUploadRoutes,
468 | };
469 | 
```

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/schema-agent.js`

```js
  1 | import { profileRows } from '../services/schema-agent/schema-profiler.js';
  2 | import { buildDashboardSpec } from '../services/schema-agent/dashboard-planner.js';
  3 | import { calculateDashboard } from '../services/schema-agent/dashboard-calculator.js';
  4 | import { buildTrainingExamples } from '../services/schema-agent/training-example-builder.js';
  5 | import { rememberSchema, findSimilarSchemas, memoryStats } from '../services/schema-agent/schema-memory-store.js';
  6 | import { validateDashboardSpec } from '../services/schema-agent/dashboard-guardian.js';
  7 | import { getDatasetRowsById } from '../services/schema-agent/dataset-adapter.js';
  8 | import { buildAnalyticsAgentPlan } from '../services/agentic/analytics-agent-planner.js';
  9 | import { routeAnalyticsTools } from '../services/agentic/analytics-tool-router.js';
 10 | import { critiqueDashboard } from '../services/agentic/analytics-critic-agent.js';
 11 | import { runChiefAnalystOrchestrator } from '../services/agentic/chief-analyst-orchestrator.js';
 12 | 
 13 | function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
 14 |   response.writeHead(statusCode, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });
 15 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 16 | }
 17 | 
 18 | function matchDatasetPath(pathname, action) {
 19 |   const pattern = new RegExp(`^/api/schema-agent/datasets/([^/]+)/${action}$`);
 20 |   const match = pathname.match(pattern);
 21 |   return match ? decodeURIComponent(match[1]) : null;
 22 | }
 23 | 
 24 | export async function handleSchemaAgentRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 25 |   if (request.method === 'GET' && pathname === '/api/schema-agent/memory/stats') {
 26 |     const stats = await memoryStats();
 27 |     sendJson(response, 200, { ok: true, stats });
 28 |     return true;
 29 |   }
 30 | 
 31 |   const trainDatasetId = matchDatasetPath(pathname, 'train-schema');
 32 |   if (request.method === 'POST' && trainDatasetId) {
 33 |     const rows = await getDatasetRowsById(trainDatasetId);
 34 |     const profile = profileRows(rows, {
 35 |       datasetId: trainDatasetId,
 36 |       datasetName: trainDatasetId,
 37 |     });
 38 | 
 39 |     const similarSchemas = await findSimilarSchemas(profile);
 40 |     const dashboardSpec = buildDashboardSpec(profile, { similarSchemas });
 41 |     const guardian = validateDashboardSpec(profile, dashboardSpec);
 42 |     const trainingExamples = buildTrainingExamples(profile, dashboardSpec);
 43 |     const memoryRecord = await rememberSchema(profile, dashboardSpec, trainingExamples);
 44 | 
 45 |     sendJson(response, 200, {
 46 |       ok: true,
 47 |       profile,
 48 |       similarSchemas: similarSchemas.map((s) => ({
 49 |         id: s.id,
 50 |         similarity: s.similarity,
 51 |         datasetName: s.datasetName,
 52 |         primaryTarget: s.primaryTarget,
 53 |       })),
 54 |       dashboardSpec,
 55 |       guardian,
 56 |       memoryRecordId: memoryRecord.id,
 57 |       trainingExamplesCount: trainingExamples.length,
 58 |       message: 'Schema trained and saved to memory.',
 59 |     });
 60 |     return true;
 61 |   }
 62 | 
 63 |   const specDatasetId = matchDatasetPath(pathname, 'dashboard-spec');
 64 |   if (request.method === 'POST' && specDatasetId) {
 65 |     const rows = await getDatasetRowsById(specDatasetId);
 66 |     const profile = profileRows(rows, {
 67 |       datasetId: specDatasetId,
 68 |       datasetName: specDatasetId,
 69 |     });
 70 | 
 71 |     const similarSchemas = await findSimilarSchemas(profile);
 72 |     const baseDashboardSpec = buildDashboardSpec(profile, { similarSchemas });
 73 |     
 74 |     // Multi-Agent Orchestration Layer (Phase 2, 3, 8)
 75 |     const { dashboardSpec, ontologyMapping } = runChiefAnalystOrchestrator(profile, baseDashboardSpec);
 76 | 
 77 |     // Agentic Loop Integration
 78 |     const agentPlan = buildAnalyticsAgentPlan({ schemaProfile: profile, userGoal: "Generate actionable analytics dashboard" });
 79 |     const agentTools = routeAnalyticsTools(agentPlan);
 80 |     const critic = critiqueDashboard({ schemaProfile: profile, dashboardPlan: dashboardSpec });
 81 | 
 82 |     const guardian = validateDashboardSpec(profile, dashboardSpec);
 83 |     const calculatedDashboard = calculateDashboard(rows, profile, dashboardSpec);
 84 | 
 85 |     sendJson(response, 200, {
 86 |       ok: true,
 87 |       profile,
 88 |       agentPlan,
 89 |       agentTools,
 90 |       critic,
 91 |       ontologyMapping,
 92 |       dashboardSpec,
 93 |       guardian,
 94 |       calculatedDashboard,
 95 |       message: 'Dashboard spec generated and values calculated from real rows.',
 96 |     });
 97 |     return true;
 98 |   }
 99 | 
100 |   return false;
101 | }
102 | 
```

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/schema-trained-ai.routes.js`

```js
  1 | import {
  2 |   generateSchemaDashboard,
  3 |   runDashboardCommand,
  4 |   runSchemaChat,
  5 |   trainSchemaDashboard,
  6 |   trainSchemaRagDashboard,
  7 | } from "../services/ai-analyst/schema-trained-ai-service.js";
  8 | import { getMemoryStats, readSchemaTrainingMemory, trainManySchemaExamples } from "../services/ai-analyst/schema-training-store.js";
  9 | import { validateAndFixDashboard } from "../services/dashboard/dashboard-integrity-engine.js";
 10 | import { buildSchemaProfile } from "../services/ai-analyst/schema-fingerprint.js";
 11 | import {
 12 |   getSchemaRagStats,
 13 |   readSchemaRagMemory,
 14 | } from "../services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-store.js";
 15 | import {
 16 |   retrieveSchemaRagMemories,
 17 |   trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset,
 18 | } from "../services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-retriever.js";
 19 | import {
 20 |   buildSmartDashboardTrainingContext,
 21 |   explainDatasetSchemaForUser,
 22 |   trainSmartRagFromApprovedDashboard,
 23 | } from "../services/ai-analyst/smart-rag-training-service.js";
 24 | 
 25 | async function readJsonBody(request) {
 26 |   try {
 27 |     if (request.body && typeof request.body === "object" && !request.readable) return request.body;
 28 |     let raw = "";
 29 |     for await (const chunk of request) raw += chunk;
 30 |     return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
 31 |   } catch {
 32 |     return {};
 33 |   }
 34 | }
 35 | 
 36 | function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
 37 |   response.statusCode = statusCode;
 38 |   response.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
 39 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
 40 | }
 41 | 
 42 | function ok(response, data, message = "OK") {
 43 |   sendJson(response, 200, { success: true, data, message });
 44 | }
 45 | 
 46 | function fail(response, statusCode, message, details) {
 47 |   sendJson(response, statusCode, { success: false, error: { message, details } });
 48 | }
 49 | 
 50 | async function tryCall(fn) {
 51 |   try { return await fn(); } catch { return null; }
 52 | }
 53 | 
 54 | async function loadDatasetById(datasetId, body = {}) {
 55 |   if (body.dataset?.rows) return body.dataset;
 56 |   if (Array.isArray(body.rows)) return { id: datasetId, name: body.name || datasetId, columns: body.columns || [], rows: body.rows, dictionaryRows: body.dictionaryRows || [] };
 57 | 
 58 |   const repo = await tryCall(() => import("../database/dataset-repository.js"));
 59 |   const localDb = await tryCall(() => import("../services/local-database-service.js"));
 60 | 
 61 |   const candidates = [
 62 |     repo?.getDatasetById,
 63 |     repo?.getDataset,
 64 |     repo?.datasetRepository?.getById,
 65 |     repo?.default?.getDatasetById,
 66 |     repo?.default?.getById,
 67 |     localDb?.getDatasetById,
 68 |     localDb?.getDataset,
 69 |     localDb?.default?.getDatasetById,
 70 |   ].filter(Boolean);
 71 | 
 72 |   for (const candidate of candidates) {
 73 |     const dataset = await tryCall(() => candidate(datasetId));
 74 |     if (dataset?.rows) return dataset;
 75 |     if (dataset?.data?.rows) return dataset.data;
 76 |   }
 77 | 
 78 |   return null;
 79 | }
 80 | 
 81 | export async function handleSchemaTrainedAIRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 82 |   const method = request.method;
 83 | 
 84 |   if (method === "GET" && pathname === "/api/ai/schema-training-memory") {
 85 |     ok(response, { stats: getMemoryStats(), memory: readSchemaTrainingMemory() }, "Schema training memory loaded");
 86 |     return true;
 87 |   }
 88 | 
 89 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/ai/schema-training/train-memory") {
 90 |     try {
 91 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
 92 |       const datasets = Array.isArray(body.datasets) ? body.datasets : [];
 93 |       if (!datasets.length) return fail(response, 400, "datasets[] is required");
 94 |       const trained = trainManySchemaExamples(datasets.map((dataset) => ({ dataset, dashboardPlan: dataset.dashboardPlan, rating: dataset.rating || "good", source: "bulk-api" })));
 95 |       ok(response, { trained, stats: getMemoryStats() }, "Schema memory trained");
 96 |       return true;
 97 |     } catch (error) {
 98 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Training failed");
 99 |       return true;
100 |     }
101 |   }
102 | 
103 |   if (method === "GET" && pathname === "/api/ai/schema-rag-memory") {
104 |     ok(
105 |       response,
106 |       {
107 |         stats: getSchemaRagStats(),
108 |         memory: readSchemaRagMemory().map((item) => {
109 |           const { embedding, ...safe } = item;
110 |           return safe;
111 |         }),
112 |       },
113 |       "Schema RAG memory loaded"
114 |     );
115 |     return true;
116 |   }
117 | 
118 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/ai/schema-rag/train") {
119 |     try {
120 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
121 |       const dataset = body.dataset;
122 | 
123 |       if (!dataset?.rows && !body.schemaProfile?.columns) {
124 |         return fail(response, 400, "dataset.rows or schemaProfile.columns is required");
125 |       }
126 | 
127 |       const result = await trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset({
128 |         dataset,
129 |         schemaProfile: body.schemaProfile,
130 |         acceptedDashboardPlan:
131 |           body.acceptedDashboardPlan || body.dashboardPlan || body.currentDashboard,
132 |         rating: body.rating || "good",
133 |         notes: body.notes || "",
134 |         source: body.source || "api",
135 |         useOllama: body.useOllama !== false,
136 |       });
137 | 
138 |       ok(response, result, "Schema RAG memory trained");
139 |       return true;
140 |     } catch (error) {
141 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Schema RAG training failed");
142 |       return true;
143 |     }
144 |   }
145 | 
146 |   if (method === "POST" && pathname === "/api/ai/schema-rag/retrieve") {
147 |     try {
148 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
149 |       const schemaProfile = body.schemaProfile?.columns
150 |         ? body.schemaProfile
151 |         : buildSchemaProfile(body.dataset || { rows: body.rows || [], columns: body.columns || [] });
152 | 
153 |       const result = await retrieveSchemaRagMemories(schemaProfile, {
154 |         limit: body.limit || 5,
155 |         threshold: body.threshold ?? 0.55,
156 |         useOllama: body.useOllama !== false,
157 |       });
158 | 
159 |       ok(response, result, "Schema RAG memories retrieved");
160 |       return true;
161 |     } catch (error) {
162 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Schema RAG retrieval failed");
163 |       return true;
164 |     }
165 |   }
166 | 
167 |   const ragTrainMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema-rag-train$/);
168 |   if (method === "POST" && ragTrainMatch) {
169 |     try {
170 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
171 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(ragTrainMatch[1], body);
172 | 
173 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
174 | 
175 |       const result = await trainSchemaRagDashboard(dataset, {
176 |         acceptedDashboardPlan:
177 |           body.acceptedDashboardPlan || body.dashboardPlan || body.currentDashboard,
178 |         rating: body.rating || "good",
179 |         notes: body.notes || "",
180 |         source: "dashboard-user-feedback",
181 |         useOllama: body.useOllama !== false,
182 |       });
183 | 
184 |       ok(response, result, "Current dashboard pattern saved to RAG memory");
185 |       return true;
186 |     } catch (error) {
187 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Dataset RAG training failed");
188 |       return true;
189 |     }
190 |   }
191 | 
192 |   const understandMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema-understand$/);
193 |   if (method === "POST" && understandMatch) {
194 |     try {
195 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
196 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(understandMatch[1], body);
197 | 
198 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
199 | 
200 |       const result = await explainDatasetSchemaForUser(dataset);
201 | 
202 |       ok(response, result, "Schema understanding generated");
203 |       return true;
204 |     } catch (error) {
205 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Schema understanding failed");
206 |       return true;
207 |     }

209 | 
210 |   const smartDashboardMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/smart-rag-dashboard$/);
211 |   if (method === "POST" && smartDashboardMatch) {
212 |     try {
213 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
214 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(smartDashboardMatch[1], body);
215 | 
216 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
217 | 
218 |       const result = await buildSmartDashboardTrainingContext(dataset, {
219 |         ragThreshold: body.ragThreshold ?? 0.55,
220 |         ragLimit: body.ragLimit ?? 5,
221 |         useOllama: body.useOllama !== false,
222 |         maxCharts: body.maxCharts ?? 7,
223 |         maxKpis: body.maxKpis ?? 8,
224 |       });
225 | 
226 |       ok(response, result, "Smart RAG dashboard generated");
227 |       return true;
228 |     } catch (error) {
229 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Smart RAG dashboard failed");
230 |       return true;
231 |     }
232 |   }
233 | 
234 |   const smartTrainMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/smart-rag-train$/);
235 |   if (method === "POST" && smartTrainMatch) {
236 |     try {
237 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
238 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(smartTrainMatch[1], body);
239 | 
240 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
241 | 
242 |       const result = await trainSmartRagFromApprovedDashboard({
243 |         dataset,
244 |         dashboardPlan: body.acceptedDashboardPlan || body.dashboardPlan || body.currentDashboard,
245 |         rating: body.rating || "good",
246 |         notes: body.notes || "User approved dashboard pattern.",
247 |         source: "smart-dashboard-feedback",
248 |         useOllama: body.useOllama !== false,
249 |       });
250 | 
251 |       ok(response, result, "Smart RAG memory trained");
252 |       return true;
253 |     } catch (error) {
254 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Smart RAG training failed");
255 |       return true;
256 |     }
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   const dashboardMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema-dashboard$/);
260 |   if (method === "POST" && dashboardMatch) {
261 |     try {
262 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
263 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(dashboardMatch[1], body);
264 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found. Pass {rows, columns} in body or check dataset repository integration.");
265 |       const result = await generateSchemaDashboard(dataset, {
266 |         useLlm: body.useLlm !== false,
267 |         threshold: body.threshold,
268 |         ragThreshold: body.ragThreshold,
269 |         ragLimit: body.ragLimit,
270 |         useRagEmbedding: body.useRagEmbedding !== false,
271 |       });
272 |       ok(response, result, "Schema-trained RAG dashboard generated");
273 |       return true;
274 |     } catch (error) {
275 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Dashboard generation failed");
276 |       return true;
277 |     }
278 |   }
279 | 
280 |   const trainMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema-train$/);
281 |   if (method === "POST" && trainMatch) {
282 |     try {
283 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
284 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(trainMatch[1], body);
285 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
286 |       const entry = trainSchemaDashboard(dataset, {
287 |         dashboardPlan: body.dashboardPlan || body.acceptedDashboard,
288 |         rating: body.rating || "good",
289 |         notes: body.notes || "",
290 |         source: "user-feedback",
291 |       });
292 |       ok(response, { entry, stats: getMemoryStats() }, "Schema pattern trained");
293 |       return true;
294 |     } catch (error) {
295 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Schema training failed");
296 |       return true;
297 |     }
298 |   }
299 | 
300 |   const commandMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/dashboard-command$/);
301 |   if (method === "POST" && commandMatch) {
302 |     try {
303 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
304 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(commandMatch[1], body);
305 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
306 |       const query = String(body.query || "").trim();
307 |       if (!query) return fail(response, 400, "query is required");
308 | 
309 |       if (
310 |         /fix|validate|correct|wrong|repair|regenerate/i.test(query) &&
311 |         /dashboard|chart|charts|kpi|broken|invalid|wrong/i.test(query)
312 |       ) {
313 |         const result = validateAndFixDashboard(dataset, body.currentDashboard || {});
314 |         ok(response, {
315 |           action: "FIX_DASHBOARD",
316 |           message: result.message,
317 |           issues: result.issues,
318 |           observations: result.observations,
319 |           correctedDashboard: result.correctedDashboard,
320 |           schemaOnly: true,
321 |           provider: "local-integrity-engine",
322 |           model: "local-calculation",
323 |         }, "Dashboard fixed");
324 |         return true;
325 |       }
326 | 
327 |       const result = await runDashboardCommand({ dataset, query, currentDashboard: body.currentDashboard || {}, useLlm: body.useLlm !== false });
328 |       ok(response, result, "Dashboard command processed");
329 |       return true;
330 |     } catch (error) {
331 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "Dashboard command failed");
332 |       return true;
333 |     }
334 |   }
335 | 
336 |   const chatMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/datasets\/([^/]+)\/schema-chat$/);
337 |   if (method === "POST" && chatMatch) {
338 |     try {
339 |       const body = await readJsonBody(request);
340 |       const dataset = await loadDatasetById(chatMatch[1], body);
341 |       if (!dataset) return fail(response, 404, "Dataset not found");
342 |       const query = String(body.query || body.message || "").trim();
343 |       if (!query) return fail(response, 400, "query is required");
344 |       const result = await runSchemaChat({ dataset, query, useLlm: body.useLlm !== false });
345 |       ok(response, {
346 |         userMessage: { role: "user", content: query, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
347 |         assistantMessage: { role: "assistant", content: result.answer, model: result.model, provider: result.provider, schemaOnly: true, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
348 |       }, "AI chat response generated");
349 |       return true;
350 |     } catch (error) {
351 |       fail(response, 500, error.message || "AI chat failed");
352 |       return true;
353 |     }
354 |   }
355 | 
356 |   return false;
357 | }
358 | 
359 | export default { handleSchemaTrainedAIRoutes };
360 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/routes/state.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/routes/state.js`

```js
  1 | // Application state endpoint
  2 | import { sendSuccess, sendError } from '../utils/response-utils.js';
  3 | import { HTTP_STATUS } from '../config/constants.js';
  4 | import { getChatMessages, getCurrentDataset } from '../database/dataset-repository.js';
  5 | 
  6 | // In-memory UI state. Datasets and chat history hydrate from SQLite; analysis
  7 | // remains in memory until a persisted analysis store exists.
  8 | let appState = {
  9 |   dataset: null,
 10 |   chatMessages: [],
 11 |   analysis: null
 12 | };
 13 | 
 14 | export async function handleStateRoutes(request, response, pathname) {
 15 |   const { method } = request;
 16 | 
 17 |   // GET /api/state - Get current application state
 18 |   if (pathname === '/api/state' && method === 'GET') {
 19 |     try {
 20 |       const persistedDataset = getCurrentDataset();
 21 |       if (persistedDataset) {
 22 |         appState.dataset = persistedDataset;
 23 |         appState.chatMessages = getChatMessages(persistedDataset.id);
 24 |       }
 25 | 
 26 |       sendSuccess(response, {
 27 |         dataset: appState.dataset,
 28 |         chatMessages: appState.chatMessages,
 29 |         analysis: appState.analysis
 30 |       }, 'Application state retrieved');
 31 |       return true;
 32 |     } catch (error) {
 33 |       console.error('Error getting state:', error);
 34 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to get state', 'STATE_ERROR');
 35 |       return true;
 36 |     }
 37 |   }
 38 | 
 39 |   // POST /api/state/reset - Reset application state
 40 |   if (pathname === '/api/state/reset' && method === 'POST') {
 41 |     try {
 42 |       appState = {
 43 |         dataset: null,
 44 |         chatMessages: [],
 45 |         analysis: null
 46 |       };
 47 |       
 48 |       sendSuccess(response, appState, 'Application state reset');
 49 |       return true;
 50 |     } catch (error) {
 51 |       console.error('Error resetting state:', error);
 52 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to reset state', 'STATE_ERROR');
 53 |       return true;
 54 |     }
 55 |   }
 56 | 
 57 |   // PUT /api/state - Update application state
 58 |   if (pathname === '/api/state' && method === 'PUT') {
 59 |     try {
 60 |       let body = '';
 61 |       
 62 |       for await (const chunk of request) {
 63 |         body += chunk.toString();
 64 |       }
 65 |       
 66 |       const updates = JSON.parse(body);
 67 |       
 68 |       // Update state with provided values
 69 |       if (updates.dataset !== undefined) {
 70 |         appState.dataset = updates.dataset;
 71 |       }
 72 |       if (updates.chatMessages !== undefined) {
 73 |         appState.chatMessages = updates.chatMessages;
 74 |       }
 75 |       if (updates.analysis !== undefined) {
 76 |         appState.analysis = updates.analysis;
 77 |       }
 78 |       
 79 |       sendSuccess(response, appState, 'Application state updated');
 80 |       return true;
 81 |     } catch (error) {
 82 |       console.error('Error updating state:', error);
 83 |       sendError(response, HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, 'Failed to update state', 'STATE_ERROR');
 84 |       return true;
 85 |     }
 86 |   }
 87 | 
 88 |   return false;
 89 | }
 90 | 
 91 | // Export state manager for use in other routes
 92 | export function getState() {
 93 |   return appState;
 94 | }
 95 | 
 96 | export function setState(newState) {
 97 |   appState = { ...appState, ...newState };
 98 | }
 99 | 
100 | export function updateDataset(dataset) {
101 |   appState.dataset = dataset;
102 | }
103 | 
104 | export function updateChatMessages(messages) {
105 |   appState.chatMessages = messages;
106 | }
107 | 
108 | export function updateAnalysis(analysis) {
109 |   appState.analysis = analysis;
110 | }
111 | 
112 | export function addChatMessage(message) {
113 |   appState.chatMessages.push(message);
114 | }
115 | 
116 | export function clearChat() {
117 |   appState.chatMessages = [];
118 | }
119 | 
120 | export default {
121 |   handleStateRoutes,
122 |   getState,
123 |   setState,
124 |   updateDataset,
125 |   updateChatMessages,
126 |   updateAnalysis,
127 |   addChatMessage,
128 |   clearChat
129 | };
130 | 
```

```js
  7 | } from "../schema-only-dashboard-engine.js";

  9 | describe("schema-only dashboard engine", () => {
 10 |   afterEach(() => {
 11 |     vi.restoreAllMocks();
 12 |   });
 13 | 
 14 |   const dataset = {
 15 |     id: "dataset-1",
 16 |     name: "Sensitive Upload",
 17 |     rowCount: 3,
 18 |     columns: [
 19 |       { name: "email", type: "string" },
 20 |       { name: "full_name", type: "string" },
 21 |       { name: "api_token", type: "string" },
 22 |       { name: "department", type: "string" },
 23 |       { name: "sales", type: "number" },
 24 |     ],
 25 |     rows: [
 26 |       {
 27 |         email: "alice@example.com",
 28 |         full_name: "Alice Secret",
 29 |         api_token: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 30 |         department: "Sales",
 31 |         sales: 100,
 32 |       },
 33 |       {
 34 |         email: "bob@example.com",
 35 |         full_name: "Bob Hidden",
 36 |         api_token: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 37 |         department: "Support",
 38 |         sales: 200,
 39 |       },
 40 |       {
 41 |         email: "carol@example.com",
 42 |         full_name: "Carol Private",
 43 |         api_token: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 44 |         department: "Sales",
 45 |         sales: 50,
 46 |       },
 47 |     ],
 48 |   };
 49 | 
 50 |   it("sends only the safe schema packet to the LLM", async () => {
 51 |     let requestBody = "";
 52 |     vi.stubGlobal("fetch", vi.fn(async (_url, init) => {
 53 |       requestBody = String(init?.body || "");
 54 |       return {
 55 |         ok: true,
 56 |         json: async () => ({
 57 |           message: {
 58 |             content: JSON.stringify({
 59 |               action: "GENERATE_CHART",
 60 |               chart: {
 61 |                 type: "bar",
 62 |                 xKey: "department",
 63 |                 yKey: "sales",
 64 |                 aggregation: "sum",
 65 |                 title: "Sales by Department",
 66 |               },
 67 |             }),
 68 |           },
 69 |         }),
 70 |       };
 71 |     }));
 72 | 
 73 |     const schemaPacket = await buildSafeSchemaPacket(dataset);
 74 |     await callSchemaOnlyLLMPlanner(schemaPacket, "create a chart");
 75 | 
 76 |     expect(requestBody).toContain("Safe schema packet");
 77 |     expect(requestBody).not.toContain('"rows"');
 78 |     expect(requestBody).not.toContain("alice@example.com");
 79 |     expect(requestBody).not.toContain("Alice Secret");
 80 |     expect(requestBody).not.toContain("[REDACTED_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY]_TOKEN");
 81 |     expect(schemaPacket.columns.find((column) => column.name === "email")?.allowedForAI).toBe(false);
 82 |     expect(schemaPacket.columns.find((column) => column.name === "api_token")?.topValues).toEqual([]);
 83 |   });
 84 | 
 85 |   it("validates and executes chart plans locally", async () => {
 86 |     const schemaPacket = await buildSafeSchemaPacket(dataset);
 87 |     const plan = {
 88 |       type: "bar",
 89 |       xKey: "department",
 90 |       yKey: "sales",
 91 |       aggregation: "sum",
 92 |       limit: 10,
 93 |       title: "Sales by Department",
 94 |     };
 95 | 
 96 |     expect(validateChartPlan(schemaPacket, plan)).toEqual({ ok: true });
 97 |     const chart = executeChartPlan(dataset, plan);
 98 | 
 99 |     expect(chart.data).toEqual([
100 |       { department: "Sales", sales: 150 },
101 |       { department: "Support", sales: 200 },
102 |     ].sort((left, right) => right.sales - left.sales));
103 |   });
104 | });
```
