```js
  3 | const DASHBOARD_MODEL =
  4 |   process.env.DASHBOARD_LLM_MODEL ||
  5 |   process.env.DASHBOARD_MASTER_MODEL ||
  6 |   "insightflow-master";
  7 | 
  8 | const dashboardSchema = {
  9 |   type: "object",
 10 |   additionalProperties: false,
 11 |   required: ["action", "schemaOnly", "message", "dashboardPlan"],
 12 |   properties: {
 13 |     action: {
 14 |       type: "string",
 15 |       enum: [
 16 |         "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
 17 |         "GENERATE_CHART",
 18 |         "MODIFY_CHART",
 19 |         "DELETE_CHART",
 20 |         "GENERATE_KPI",
 21 |         "FILTER",
 22 |         "CLEAR_FILTERS",
 23 |         "ANSWER",
 24 |       ],
 25 |     },
 26 |     schemaOnly: { type: "boolean" },
 27 |     message: { type: "string" },
 28 |     dashboardPlan: {
 29 |       type: "object",
 30 |       additionalProperties: false,
 31 |       required: ["kpis", "charts", "filters"],
 32 |       properties: {
 33 |         kpis: {
 34 |           type: "array",
 35 |           maxItems: 6,
 36 |           items: {
 37 |             type: "object",
 38 |             additionalProperties: false,
 39 |             required: ["title", "aggregation"],
 40 |             properties: {
 41 |               id: { type: "string" },
 42 |               title: { type: "string" },
 43 |               metric: { type: "string" },
 44 |               aggregation: {
 45 |                 type: "string",
 46 |                 enum: [
 47 |                   "count",
 48 |                   "sum",
 49 |                   "avg",
 50 |                   "min",
 51 |                   "max",
 52 |                   "median",
 53 |                   "count_unique",
 54 |                 ],
 55 |               },
 56 |               format: {
 57 |                 type: "string",
 58 |                 enum: ["number", "currency", "percent", "text"],
 59 |               },
 60 |             },
 61 |           },
 62 |         },
 63 |         charts: {
 64 |           type: "array",
 65 |           maxItems: 7,
 66 |           items: {
 67 |             type: "object",
 68 |             additionalProperties: false,
 69 |             required: ["type", "title", "xKey", "aggregation"],
 70 |             properties: {
 71 |               id: { type: "string" },
 72 |               type: {
 73 |                 type: "string",
 74 |                 enum: [
 75 |                   "bar",
 76 |                   "line",
 77 |                   "area",
 78 |                   "pie",
 79 |                   "donut",
 80 |                   "histogram",
 81 |                   "scatter",
 82 |                 ],
 83 |               },
 84 |               title: { type: "string" },
 85 |               xKey: { type: "string" },
 86 |               yKey: { type: "string" },
 87 |               aggregation: {
 88 |                 type: "string",
 89 |                 enum: [
 90 |                   "count",
 91 |                   "sum",
 92 |                   "avg",
 93 |                   "min",
 94 |                   "max",
 95 |                   "median",
 96 |                   "count_unique",
 97 |                 ],
 98 |               },
 99 |               limit: { type: "number" },
100 |             },
101 |           },
102 |         },
103 |         filters: {
104 |           type: "array",
105 |           maxItems: 6,
106 |           items: {
107 |             type: "object",
108 |             additionalProperties: false,
109 |             required: ["key", "label", "type"],
110 |             properties: {
111 |               key: { type: "string" },
112 |               label: { type: "string" },
113 |               type: {
114 |                 type: "string",
115 |                 enum: ["select", "dateRange", "numberRange"],
116 |               },
117 |             },
118 |           },
119 |         },
120 |       },
121 |     },
122 |   },
123 | };
124 | 
125 | function compactSchema(schemaProfile) {
126 |   return {
127 |     datasetName: schemaProfile.datasetName,
128 |     rowCount: schemaProfile.rowCount,
129 |     columnCount: schemaProfile.columnCount,
130 |     columns: schemaProfile.columns.map((column) => ({
131 |       name: column.name,
132 |       type: column.type,
133 |       role: column.role,
134 |       description: column.description || "",
135 |       uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount || 0,
136 |       missingPct: column.missingPct || 0,
137 |       topValues: Array.isArray(column.topValues)
138 |         ? column.topValues.slice(0, 8)
139 |         : [],
140 |       stats: column.stats || null,
141 |     })),
142 |   };
143 | }
144 | 
145 | function getColumns(schemaProfile) {
146 |   return new Set(schemaProfile.columns.map((column) => column.name));
147 | }
148 | 
149 | function fallbackDashboardPlan(schemaProfile) {
150 |   const metrics = schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "metric");
151 |   const dimensions = schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "dimension");
152 |   const dates = schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "date");
153 | 
154 |   const metric = metrics[0];
155 |   const metric2 = metrics[1];
156 |   const dimension = dimensions[0];
157 |   const dimension2 = dimensions[1];
158 |   const date = dates[0];
159 | 
160 |   const kpis = [
161 |     {
162 |       id: "kpi-total-records",
163 |       title: "Total Records",
164 |       aggregation: "count",
165 |       format: "number",
166 |     },
167 |   ];
168 | 
169 |   if (metric) {
170 |     kpis.push(
171 |       {
172 |         id: "kpi-average",
173 |         title: `Average ${metric.name}`,
174 |         metric: metric.name,
175 |         aggregation: "avg",
176 |         format: "number",
177 |       },
178 |       {
179 |         id: "kpi-highest",
180 |         title: `Highest ${metric.name}`,
181 |         metric: metric.name,
182 |         aggregation: "max",
183 |         format: "number",
184 |       }
185 |     );
186 |   }
187 | 
188 |   if (dimension) {
189 |     kpis.push({
190 |       id: "kpi-unique-dimension",
191 |       title: `Unique ${dimension.name}`,
192 |       metric: dimension.name,
193 |       aggregation: "count_unique",
194 |       format: "number",
195 |     });
196 |   }
197 | 
198 |   const charts = [];
199 | 
200 |   if (dimension && metric) {
201 |     charts.push({
202 |       id: "chart-main-bar",
203 |       type: "bar",
204 |       title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
205 |       xKey: dimension.name,
206 |       yKey: metric.name,
207 |       aggregation: "avg",
208 |       limit: 10,
209 |     });
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   if (metric) {
213 |     charts.push({
214 |       id: "chart-distribution",
215 |       type: "histogram",
216 |       title: `${metric.name} Distribution`,
217 |       xKey: metric.name,
218 |       yKey: metric.name,
219 |       aggregation: "count",
220 |       limit: 8,
221 |     });
222 |   }
223 | 
224 |   if (dimension) {
225 |     charts.push({
226 |       id: "chart-donut",
227 |       type: "donut",
228 |       title: `Records by ${dimension.name}`,
229 |       xKey: dimension.name,
230 |       aggregation: "count",
231 |       limit: 8,
232 |     });
233 |   }
234 | 
235 |   if (date && metric) {
236 |     charts.push({
237 |       id: "chart-trend",
238 |       type: "line",
239 |       title: `${metric.name} Trend`,
240 |       xKey: date.name,
241 |       yKey: metric.name,
242 |       aggregation: "sum",
243 |       limit: 30,
244 |     });
245 |   }
246 | 
247 |   if (dimension2 && metric) {
248 |     charts.push({
249 |       id: "chart-second-category",
250 |       type: "bar",
251 |       title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension2.name}`,
252 |       xKey: dimension2.name,
253 |       yKey: metric.name,
254 |       aggregation: "avg",
255 |       limit: 10,
256 |     });
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   if (metric && metric2) {
260 |     charts.push({
261 |       id: "chart-scatter",
262 |       type: "scatter",
263 |       title: `${metric.name} vs ${metric2.name}`,
264 |       xKey: metric.name,
265 |       yKey: metric2.name,
266 |       aggregation: "count",
267 |       limit: 200,
268 |     });
269 |   }
270 | 
271 |   for (const dim of dimensions) {
272 |     if (charts.length >= 7) break;
273 | 
274 |     charts.push({
275 |       id: `chart-top-${dim.name}`,
276 |       type: "bar",
277 |       title: `Top ${dim.name}`,
278 |       xKey: dim.name,
279 |       aggregation: "count",
280 |       limit: 10,
281 |     });
282 |   }
283 | 
284 |   return {
285 |     action: "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
286 |     schemaOnly: true,
287 |     message: "Dashboard generated using local fallback rules.",
288 |     dashboardPlan: {
289 |       kpis: kpis.slice(0, 6),
290 |       charts: charts.slice(0, 7),
291 |       filters: [
292 |         ...dimensions.slice(0, 4).map((column) => ({
293 |           key: column.name,
294 |           label: column.name,
295 |           type: "select",
296 |         })),
297 |         ...dates.slice(0, 1).map((column) => ({
298 |           key: column.name,
299 |           label: column.name,
300 |           type: "dateRange",
301 |         })),
302 |       ],
303 |     },
304 |   };
305 | }
306 | 
307 | function validatePlan(plan, schemaProfile) {
308 |   const columnSet = getColumns(schemaProfile);
309 | 
310 |   const safeKpis = (plan.dashboardPlan?.kpis || [])
311 |     .filter((kpi) => !kpi.metric || columnSet.has(kpi.metric))
312 |     .slice(0, 6);
313 | 
314 |   const safeCharts = (plan.dashboardPlan?.charts || [])
315 |     .filter((chart) => columnSet.has(chart.xKey))
316 |     .filter((chart) => !chart.yKey || columnSet.has(chart.yKey))
317 |     .map((chart, index) => ({
318 |       ...chart,
319 |       id: chart.id || `chart-${index + 1}`,
320 |       limit: chart.limit || 10,
321 |     }))
322 |     .slice(0, 7);
323 | 
324 |   const safeFilters = (plan.dashboardPlan?.filters || [])
325 |     .filter((filter) => columnSet.has(filter.key))
326 |     .slice(0, 6);
327 | 
328 |   const validated = {
329 |     action: plan.action || "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
330 |     schemaOnly: true,
331 |     message: plan.message || "Dashboard plan generated.",
332 |     dashboardPlan: {
333 |       kpis: safeKpis,
334 |       charts: safeCharts,
335 |       filters: safeFilters,
336 |     },
337 |   };
338 | 
339 |   if (!validated.dashboardPlan.kpis.length || !validated.dashboardPlan.charts.length) {
340 |     return fallbackDashboardPlan(schemaProfile);
341 |   }
342 | 
343 |   return validated;
344 | }
345 | 
346 | export async function planDashboardWithAI({
347 |   schemaProfile,
348 |   userQuery = "Generate a complete dashboard with KPIs, filters, and 7 useful charts.",
349 |   currentDashboard = null,
350 | }) {
351 |   try {
352 |     const result = await callOllamaJson({
353 |       model: DASHBOARD_MODEL,
354 |       schema: dashboardSchema,
355 |       messages: [
356 |         {
357 |           role: "system",
358 |           content:
359 |             "Return strict JSON only. Never return chart.data. Use schema columns only.",
360 |         },
361 |         {
362 |           role: "user",
363 |           content: JSON.stringify(
364 |             {
365 |               userQuery,
366 |               schemaOnly: true,
367 |               schemaProfile: compactSchema(schemaProfile),
368 |               currentDashboard,
369 |             },
370 |             null,
371 |             2
372 |           ),
373 |         },
374 |       ],
375 |     });
376 | 
377 |     return validatePlan(result, schemaProfile);
378 |   } catch {
379 |     return fallbackDashboardPlan(schemaProfile);
380 |   }
381 | }
382 | 
```

```ts
  1 | type ColumnType = "number" | "string" | "date" | "boolean";
  2 | type ColumnRole = "metric" | "dimension" | "date" | "id" | "text";
  3 | 
  4 | type ChartType =
  5 |   | "bar"
  6 |   | "horizontalBar"
  7 |   | "line"
  8 |   | "area"
  9 |   | "pie"
 10 |   | "donut"
 11 |   | "histogram"
 12 |   | "scatter"
 13 |   | "heatmap";
 14 | 
 15 | type Aggregation =
 16 |   | "count"
 17 |   | "sum"
 18 |   | "avg"
 19 |   | "min"
 20 |   | "max"
 21 |   | "median"
 22 |   | "count_unique";
 23 | 
 24 | export interface SchemaColumn {
 25 |   name: string;
 26 |   type: ColumnType;
 27 |   role: ColumnRole;
 28 |   description?: string;
 29 |   uniqueCount?: number;
 30 |   missingPct?: number;
 31 |   topValues?: string[];
 32 |   stats?: {
 33 |     min?: number;
 34 |     max?: number;
 35 |     avg?: number;
 36 |     median?: number;
 37 |   };
 38 | }
 39 | 
 40 | export interface SchemaProfile {
 41 |   datasetName: string;
 42 |   rowCount: number;
 43 |   columnCount: number;
 44 |   domain?: string;
 45 |   columns: SchemaColumn[];
 46 | }
 47 | 
 48 | export interface ChartSpec {
 49 |   id?: string;
 50 |   type: ChartType;
 51 |   title: string;
 52 |   xKey: string;
 53 |   yKey?: string;
 54 |   aggregation: Aggregation;
 55 |   limit?: number;
 56 | }
 57 | 
 58 | export interface KpiSpec {
 59 |   id?: string;
 60 |   title: string;
 61 |   metric?: string;
 62 |   aggregation: Aggregation;
 63 |   format?: "number" | "currency" | "percent" | "text";
 64 | }
 65 | 
 66 | export interface DashboardPlan {
 67 |   kpis: KpiSpec[];
 68 |   charts: ChartSpec[];
 69 |   filters: Array<{
 70 |     key: string;
 71 |     label: string;
 72 |     type: "select" | "dateRange" | "numberRange";
 73 |   }>;
 74 |   executiveSummary?: {
 75 |     overview?: string;
 76 |     topTrend?: string | null;
 77 |     biggestOpportunity?: string | null;
 78 |     biggestRisk?: string | null;
 79 |     businessRecommendation?: string;
 80 |     confidenceScore?: number;
 81 |   };
 82 |   geoAnalysis?: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 83 |   insights?: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 84 |   recommendations?: Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
 85 |   storyMode?: {
 86 |     whatHappened?: string;
 87 |     whyItHappened?: string;
 88 |     whatWillHappen?: string;
 89 |     recommendedAction?: string;
 90 |   };
 91 |   confidenceScore?: number;
 92 | }
 93 | 
 94 | export interface MasterPlannerResponse {
 95 |   action: "BUILD_DASHBOARD" | "MODIFY_DASHBOARD" | "ANSWER";
 96 |   schemaOnly: true;
 97 |   message: string;
 98 |   dashboardPlan?: DashboardPlan;
 99 | }
100 | 
101 | const OLLAMA_BASE_URL =
102 |   process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
103 | 
104 | const MASTER_MODEL =
105 |   process.env.DASHBOARD_MASTER_MODEL || "insightflow-master";
106 | 
107 | const dashboardPlanSchema = {
108 |   type: "object",
109 |   additionalProperties: false,
110 |   required: ["action", "schemaOnly", "message", "dashboardPlan"],
111 |   properties: {
112 |     action: {
113 |       type: "string",
114 |       enum: ["BUILD_DASHBOARD", "MODIFY_DASHBOARD", "ANSWER"],
115 |     },
116 |     schemaOnly: {
117 |       type: "boolean",
118 |     },

120 |       type: "string",

127 |         kpis: {
128 |           type: "array",
129 |           maxItems: 6,
130 |           items: {
131 |             type: "object",
132 |             additionalProperties: false,
133 |             required: ["title", "aggregation"],
134 |             properties: {
135 |               id: { type: "string" },
136 |               title: { type: "string" },
137 |               metric: { type: "string" },
138 |               aggregation: {
139 |                 type: "string",
140 |                 enum: [
141 |                   "count",
142 |                   "sum",
143 |                   "avg",
144 |                   "min",
145 |                   "max",
146 |                   "median",
147 |                   "count_unique",
148 |                 ],
149 |               },
150 |               format: {
151 |                 type: "string",
152 |                 enum: ["number", "currency", "percent", "text"],
153 |               },
154 |             },
155 |           },
156 |         },
157 |         charts: {
158 |           type: "array",
159 |           maxItems: 7,
160 |           items: {
161 |             type: "object",
162 |             additionalProperties: false,
163 |             required: ["type", "title", "xKey", "aggregation"],
164 |             properties: {
165 |               id: { type: "string" },
166 |               type: {
167 |                 type: "string",
168 |                 enum: [
169 |                   "bar",
170 |                   "horizontalBar",
171 |                   "line",
172 |                   "area",
173 |                   "pie",
174 |                   "donut",
175 |                   "histogram",
176 |                   "scatter",
177 |                   "heatmap",
178 |                 ],
179 |               },
180 |               title: { type: "string" },
181 |               xKey: { type: "string" },
182 |               yKey: { type: "string" },
183 |               aggregation: {
184 |                 type: "string",
185 |                 enum: [
186 |                   "count",
187 |                   "sum",
188 |                   "avg",
189 |                   "min",
190 |                   "max",
191 |                   "median",
192 |                   "count_unique",
193 |                 ],
194 |               },
195 |               limit: { type: "number" },
196 |             },
197 |           },
198 |         },
199 |         filters: {
200 |           type: "array",
201 |           maxItems: 6,
202 |           items: {
203 |             type: "object",
204 |             additionalProperties: false,
205 |             required: ["key", "label", "type"],
206 |             properties: {
207 |               key: { type: "string" },
208 |               label: { type: "string" },
209 |               type: {
210 |                 type: "string",
211 |                 enum: ["select", "dateRange", "numberRange"],
212 |               },
213 |             },
214 |           },
215 |         },
216 |         executiveSummary: {
217 |           type: "object",
218 |           additionalProperties: true,
219 |         },
220 |         geoAnalysis: {
221 |           type: "array",
222 |           items: { type: "object", additionalProperties: true },
223 |         },
224 |         insights: {
225 |           type: "array",
226 |           items: { type: "object", additionalProperties: true },
227 |         },
228 |         recommendations: {
229 |           type: "array",
230 |           items: { type: "object", additionalProperties: true },
231 |         },
232 |         storyMode: {
233 |           type: "object",
234 |           additionalProperties: true,
235 |         },
236 |         confidenceScore: {
237 |           type: "number",
238 |         },
239 |       },
240 |     },
241 |   },
242 | };
243 | 
244 | function compactSchema(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
245 |   return {
246 |     datasetName: schemaProfile.datasetName,
247 |     rowCount: schemaProfile.rowCount,
248 |     columnCount: schemaProfile.columnCount,
249 |     domain: schemaProfile.domain || "unknown",
250 |     columns: schemaProfile.columns.map((column) => ({
251 |       name: column.name,
252 |       type: column.type,
253 |       role: column.role,
254 |       description: column.description || "",
255 |       uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount ?? 0,
256 |       missingPct: column.missingPct ?? 0,
257 |       topValues: Array.isArray(column.topValues)
258 |         ? column.topValues.slice(0, 8)
259 |         : [],
260 |       stats: column.stats || null,
261 |     })),
262 |   };
263 | }
264 | 
265 | function getColumnSet(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
266 |   return new Set(schemaProfile.columns.map((column) => column.name));
267 | }
268 | 
269 | function getMetricColumns(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
270 |   return schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "metric");
271 | }
272 | 
273 | function getDimensionColumns(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
274 |   return schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "dimension");
275 | }
276 | 
277 | function getDateColumns(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
278 |   return schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "date");
279 | }
280 | 
281 | function removeUnsafeChartData(value: unknown): unknown {
282 |   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
283 |     return value.map(removeUnsafeChartData);
284 |   }
285 | 
286 |   if (value && typeof value === "object") {
287 |     const cleaned: Record<string, unknown> = {};
288 | 
289 |     for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(value)) {
290 |       if (key.toLowerCase() === "data") continue;
291 |       cleaned[key] = removeUnsafeChartData(item);
292 |     }
293 | 
294 |     return cleaned;
295 |   }
296 | 
297 |   return value;
298 | }
299 | 
300 | function validatePlan(
301 |   response: MasterPlannerResponse,
302 |   schemaProfile: SchemaProfile
303 | ): MasterPlannerResponse {
304 |   const columns = getColumnSet(schemaProfile);
305 | 
306 |   const safeCharts = (response.dashboardPlan?.charts || [])
307 |     .filter((chart) => columns.has(chart.xKey))
308 |     .filter((chart) => !chart.yKey || columns.has(chart.yKey))
309 |     .slice(0, 7)
310 |     .map((chart, index) => ({
311 |       ...chart,
312 |       id: chart.id || `chart-${index + 1}`,
313 |       limit: chart.limit || 10,
314 |     }));
315 | 
316 |   const safeKpis = (response.dashboardPlan?.kpis || [])
317 |     .filter((kpi) => !kpi.metric || columns.has(kpi.metric))
318 |     .slice(0, 6)
319 |     .map((kpi, index) => ({
320 |       ...kpi,
321 |       id: kpi.id || `kpi-${index + 1}`,
322 |       format: kpi.format || "number",
323 |     }));
324 | 
325 |   const safeFilters = (response.dashboardPlan?.filters || [])
326 |     .filter((filter) => columns.has(filter.key))
327 |     .slice(0, 6);
328 | 
329 |   return {
330 |     action: response.action || "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
331 |     schemaOnly: true,
332 |     message: response.message || "Dashboard plan generated.",
333 |     dashboardPlan: {
334 |       kpis: safeKpis,
335 |       charts: safeCharts,
336 |       filters: safeFilters,
337 |       executiveSummary: response.dashboardPlan?.executiveSummary,
338 |       geoAnalysis: response.dashboardPlan?.geoAnalysis || [],
339 |       insights: response.dashboardPlan?.insights || [],
340 |       recommendations: response.dashboardPlan?.recommendations || [],
341 |       storyMode: response.dashboardPlan?.storyMode,
342 |       confidenceScore: response.dashboardPlan?.confidenceScore,
343 |     },
344 |   };
345 | }
346 | 
347 | function fallbackPlan(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile): MasterPlannerResponse {
348 |   const metrics = getMetricColumns(schemaProfile);
349 |   const dimensions = getDimensionColumns(schemaProfile);
350 |   const dates = getDateColumns(schemaProfile);
351 | 
352 |   const metric = metrics[0];
353 |   const metric2 = metrics[1];
354 |   const dimension = dimensions[0];
355 |   const dimension2 = dimensions[1];
356 |   const date = dates[0];
357 | 
358 |   const kpis: KpiSpec[] = [
359 |     {
360 |       id: "kpi-total-records",
361 |       title: "Total Records",
362 |       aggregation: "count",
363 |       format: "number",
364 |     },
365 |   ];
366 | 
367 |   if (metric) {
368 |     kpis.push(
369 |       {
370 |         id: "kpi-average",
371 |         title: `Average ${metric.name}`,
372 |         metric: metric.name,
373 |         aggregation: "avg",
374 |         format: "number",
375 |       },
376 |       {
377 |         id: "kpi-highest",
378 |         title: `Highest ${metric.name}`,
379 |         metric: metric.name,
380 |         aggregation: "max",
381 |         format: "number",
382 |       }
383 |     );
384 |   }
385 | 
386 |   if (dimension) {
387 |     kpis.push({
388 |       id: "kpi-unique-dimension",
389 |       title: `Unique ${dimension.name}`,
390 |       metric: dimension.name,
391 |       aggregation: "count_unique",
392 |       format: "number",
393 |     });
394 |   }
395 | 
396 |   const charts: ChartSpec[] = [];
397 | 
398 |   if (dimension && metric) {
399 |     charts.push({
400 |       id: "chart-metric-by-dimension",
401 |       type: "bar",
402 |       title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
403 |       xKey: dimension.name,
404 |       yKey: metric.name,
405 |       aggregation: "avg",
406 |       limit: 10,
407 |     });
408 |   }
409 | 
410 |   if (metric) {
411 |     charts.push({
412 |       id: "chart-distribution",
413 |       type: "histogram",
414 |       title: `${metric.name} Distribution`,
415 |       xKey: metric.name,
416 |       yKey: metric.name,
417 |       aggregation: "count",
418 |       limit: 10,
419 |     });
420 |   }
421 | 
422 |   if (dimension) {
423 |     charts.push({
424 |       id: "chart-category-share",
425 |       type: "donut",
426 |       title: `Records by ${dimension.name}`,
427 |       xKey: dimension.name,
428 |       aggregation: "count",
429 |       limit: 8,
430 |     });
431 |   }
432 | 
433 |   if (date && metric) {
434 |     charts.push({
435 |       id: "chart-trend",
436 |       type: "line",
437 |       title: `${metric.name} Trend`,
438 |       xKey: date.name,
439 |       yKey: metric.name,
440 |       aggregation: "sum",
441 |       limit: 30,
442 |     });
443 |   }
444 | 
445 |   if (dimension2 && metric) {
446 |     charts.push({
447 |       id: "chart-second-dimension",
448 |       type: "bar",
449 |       title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension2.name}`,
450 |       xKey: dimension2.name,
451 |       yKey: metric.name,
452 |       aggregation: "avg",
453 |       limit: 10,
454 |     });
455 |   }
456 | 
457 |   if (metric && metric2) {
458 |     charts.push({
459 |       id: "chart-scatter",
460 |       type: "scatter",
461 |       title: `${metric.name} vs ${metric2.name}`,
462 |       xKey: metric.name,
463 |       yKey: metric2.name,
464 |       aggregation: "count",
465 |       limit: 200,
466 |     });
467 |   }
468 | 
469 |   for (const dim of dimensions) {
470 |     if (charts.length >= 7) break;
471 | 
472 |     charts.push({
473 |       id: `chart-top-${dim.name}`,
474 |       type: "bar",
475 |       title: `Top ${dim.name}`,
476 |       xKey: dim.name,
477 |       aggregation: "count",
478 |       limit: 10,
479 |     });
480 |   }
481 | 
482 |   return {
483 |     action: "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
484 |     schemaOnly: true,
485 |     message: "Dashboard generated using local fallback rules.",
486 |     dashboardPlan: {
487 |       kpis: kpis.slice(0, 6),
488 |       charts: charts.slice(0, 7),
489 |       filters: [
490 |         ...dimensions.slice(0, 4).map((column) => ({
491 |           key: column.name,
492 |           label: column.name,
493 |           type: "select" as const,
494 |         })),
495 |         ...dates.slice(0, 1).map((column) => ({
496 |           key: column.name,
497 |           label: column.name,
498 |           type: "dateRange" as const,
499 |         })),
500 |       ],
501 |     },
502 |   };
503 | }
504 | 
505 | export async function generateMasterDashboardPlan({
506 |   schemaProfile,
507 |   userGoal = "Generate a complete dashboard with KPIs, filters, and 7 useful charts.",
508 | }: {
509 |   schemaProfile: SchemaProfile;
510 |   userGoal?: string;
511 | }): Promise<MasterPlannerResponse> {
512 |   const schemaOnlyPacket = compactSchema(schemaProfile);
513 | 
514 |   try {
515 |     const response = await fetch(`${OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/chat`, {
516 |       method: "POST",
517 |       headers: {
518 |         "Content-Type": "application/json",
519 |       },
520 |       body: JSON.stringify({
521 |         model: MASTER_MODEL,
522 |         stream: false,
523 |         keep_alive: "2m",
524 |         format: dashboardPlanSchema,
525 |         options: {
526 |           temperature: 0.05,
527 |           num_ctx: 4096,
528 |           num_predict: 1200,
529 |         },
530 |         messages: [
531 |           {
532 |             role: "system",
533 |             content:
534 |               "You are InsightFlow AI, a Chief Data Analyst, RAG-aware Schema Engine, and dashboard architect. You do not see raw rows. Return strict JSON only. Never include chart.data, KPI values, fake numbers, sample records, or raw rows. Use only schema columns. Infer business KPIs, charts, executive summary, geo analysis only when location fields exist, AI insights, recommendations, story mode, and confidence from schema semantics.",
535 |           },
536 |           {
537 |             role: "user",
538 |             content: JSON.stringify(
539 |               {
540 |                 userGoal,
541 |                 schemaOnly: true,
542 |                 schemaProfile: schemaOnlyPacket,
543 |               },
544 |               null,
545 |               2
546 |             ),
547 |           },
548 |         ],
549 |       }),
550 |     });
551 | 
552 |     if (!response.ok) {
553 |       return fallbackPlan(schemaProfile);
554 |     }
555 | 
556 |     const payload = await response.json();
557 |     const content = payload?.message?.content || "{}";
558 | 
559 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(content);
560 |     const cleaned = removeUnsafeChartData(parsed) as MasterPlannerResponse;
561 | 
562 |     return validatePlan(cleaned, schemaProfile);
563 |   } catch {
564 |     return fallbackPlan(schemaProfile);
565 |   }
566 | }
567 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/ollamaClient.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/ollamaClient.js`

```js
 1 | const OLLAMA_BASE_URL =
 2 |   process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
 3 | 
 4 | export async function callOllamaJson({
 5 |   model,
 6 |   messages,
 7 |   schema,
 8 |   temperature = 0.05,
 9 |   numCtx = 4096,
10 |   numPredict = 1200,
11 |   timeoutMs = Number(process.env.DASHBOARD_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS || 45000),
12 | }) {
13 |   const controller = new AbortController();
14 |   const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
15 | 
16 |   const response = await fetch(`${OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/chat`, {
17 |     method: "POST",
18 |     signal: controller.signal,
19 |     headers: {
20 |       "Content-Type": "application/json",
21 |     },
22 |     body: JSON.stringify({
23 |       model,
24 |       stream: false,
25 |       keep_alive: "60s",
26 |       format: schema,
27 |       options: {
28 |         temperature,
29 |         num_ctx: numCtx,
30 |         num_predict: numPredict,
31 |       },
32 |       messages,
33 |     }),
34 |   }).finally(() => clearTimeout(timeout));
35 | 
36 |   if (!response.ok) {
37 |     throw new Error(`Ollama HTTP ${response.status}`);
38 |   }
39 | 
40 |   const payload = await response.json();
41 |   const content = payload?.message?.content || "{}";
42 | 
43 |   try {
44 |     return JSON.parse(content);
45 |   } catch {
46 |     return {
47 |       action: "ANSWER",
48 |       message: "AI returned invalid JSON.",
49 |       schemaOnly: true,
50 |     };
51 |   }
52 | }
53 | 
54 | export async function createEmbedding(text) {
55 |   const model = process.env.EMBEDDING_MODEL || "nomic-embed-text:latest";
56 | 
57 |   const response = await fetch(`${OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/embeddings`, {
58 |     method: "POST",
59 |     headers: {
60 |       "Content-Type": "application/json",
61 |     },
62 |     body: JSON.stringify({
63 |       model,
64 |       prompt: text,
65 |     }),
66 |   });
67 | 
68 |   if (!response.ok) {
69 |     throw new Error(`Embedding HTTP ${response.status}`);
70 |   }
71 | 
72 |   const payload = await response.json();
73 |   return payload.embedding || [];
74 | }
75 | 
```

```js
  1 | // Anthropic Claude API provider
  2 | import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
  3 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export class AnthropicProvider {
  6 |   constructor(config) {
  7 |     this.name = 'Anthropic Claude';
  8 |     this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
  9 |     this.model = config.model;
 10 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 11 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 12 |     this.available = false;
 13 |     this.client = null;
 14 |     this.initialized = false;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   async initialize() {
 18 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 19 | 
 20 |     if (!this.apiKey) {
 21 |       console.warn('⚠️  Anthropic API key not configured');
 22 |       this.available = false;
 23 |       this.initialized = true;
 24 |       return;
 25 |     }
 26 | 
 27 |     try {
 28 |       console.log('🧠 Initializing Anthropic Provider...');
 29 |       this.client = new Anthropic({
 30 |         apiKey: this.apiKey,
 31 |         timeout: this.timeout
 32 |       });
 33 |       this.available = true;
 34 |       this.initialized = true;
 35 |       console.log('✅ Anthropic initialized successfully');
 36 |     } catch (error) {
 37 |       console.error('❌ Anthropic initialization failed:', error.message);
 38 |       this.available = false;
 39 |       this.initialized = true;
 40 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Anthropic initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'anthropic');
 41 |     }
 42 |   }
 43 | 
 44 |   async checkAvailability() {
 45 |     if (!this.apiKey) return false;
 46 | 
 47 |     try {
 48 |       // Test with a simple message
 49 |       await this.client.messages.create({
 50 |         model: this.model,
 51 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 52 |         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Hi' }]
 53 |       });
 54 |       this.available = true;
 55 |       return true;
 56 |     } catch (error) {
 57 |       console.warn('⚠️  Anthropic availability check failed:', error.message);
 58 |       this.available = false;
 59 |       return false;
 60 |     }
 61 |   }
 62 | 
 63 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 64 |     if (!this.available) {
 65 |       throw new AIProviderError('Anthropic service not available', 'anthropic');
 66 |     }
 67 | 
 68 |     try {
 69 |       console.log('🧠 Anthropic generating response...');
 70 |       const startTime = Date.now();
 71 | 
 72 |       const message = await this.client.messages.create({
 73 |         model: this.model,
 74 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 75 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
 76 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
 77 |         top_k: options.topK,
 78 |         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],
 79 |         stream: false
 80 |       });
 81 | 
 82 |       const text = message.content[0]?.text || '';
 83 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
 84 |       
 85 |       console.log(`✅ Anthropic response received in ${duration}s`);
 86 | 
 87 |       return {
 88 |         success: true,
 89 |         content: text,
 90 |         model: this.model,
 91 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
 92 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 93 |         provider: 'anthropic',
 94 |         error: null
 95 |       };
 96 |     } catch (error) {
 97 |       console.error('❌ Anthropic generation error:', error.message);
 98 |       
 99 |       // Handle specific Anthropic errors
100 |       if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
101 |         throw new AIProviderError('Invalid Anthropic API key', 'anthropic');
102 |       } else if (error.message.includes('rate limit')) {
103 |         throw new AIProviderError('Anthropic rate limit exceeded', 'anthropic');
104 |       } else if (error.message.includes('content filter')) {
105 |         throw new AIProviderError('Content blocked by Anthropic content filter', 'anthropic');
106 |       } else {
107 |         throw new AIProviderError(`Anthropic generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'anthropic');
108 |       }
109 |     }
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
113 |     if (!this.available) {
114 |       throw new AIProviderError('Anthropic service not available', 'anthropic');
115 |     }
116 | 
117 |     try {
118 |       console.log('💬 Anthropic chat with messages...');
119 |       const startTime = Date.now();
120 | 
121 |       const message = await this.client.messages.create({
122 |         model: this.model,
123 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
124 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
125 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
126 |         top_k: options.topK,
127 |         messages: messages,
128 |         stream: false
129 |       });
130 | 
131 |       const text = message.content[0]?.text || '';
132 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
133 |       
134 |       console.log(`✅ Anthropic chat response received in ${duration}s`);
135 | 
136 |       return {
137 |         success: true,
138 |         content: text,
139 |         model: this.model,
140 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
141 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
142 |         provider: 'anthropic',
143 |         error: null
144 |       };
145 |     } catch (error) {
146 |       console.error('❌ Anthropic chat error:', error.message);
147 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Anthropic chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'anthropic');
148 |     }
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   async health() {
152 |     try {
153 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
154 |       return {
155 |         name: this.name,
156 |         available: isAvailable,
157 |         model: this.model,
158 |         apiKey: this.apiKey ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
159 |         initialized: this.initialized,
160 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
161 |       };
162 |     } catch (error) {
163 |       return {
164 |         name: this.name,
165 |         available: false,
166 |         error: error.message,
167 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
168 |       };
169 |     }
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   async isAvailable() {
173 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   getCapabilities() {
177 |     return {
178 |       textGeneration: true,
179 |       chat: true,
180 |       streaming: true,
181 |       models: [this.model, 'claude-3-haiku-20240307'],
182 |       features: ['large_context_window', 'reliable_output', 'safety_focused'],
183 |       limits: {
184 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
185 |         timeout: this.timeout,
186 |         rateLimit: '1000 requests per hour'
187 |       }
188 |     };
189 |   }
190 | }
191 | 
192 | export default AnthropicProvider;
193 |
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/providers/gemini-provider.js

```js
  1 | // Google Gemini API provider
  2 | import { GoogleGenerativeAI } from '@google/generative-ai';
  3 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export class GeminiProvider {
  6 |   constructor(config) {
  7 |     this.name = 'Google Gemini';
  8 |     this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
  9 |     this.model = config.model;
 10 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 11 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 12 |     this.available = false;
 13 |     this.client = null;
 14 |     this.initialized = false;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   async initialize() {
 18 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 19 | 
 20 |     if (!this.apiKey) {
 21 |       console.warn('⚠️  Google Gemini API key not configured');
 22 |       this.available = false;
 23 |       this.initialized = true;
 24 |       return;
 25 |     }
 26 | 
 27 |     try {
 28 |       console.log('🤖 Initializing Google Gemini Provider...');
 29 |       this.client = new GoogleGenerativeAI(this.apiKey);
 30 |       this.available = true;
 31 |       this.initialized = true;
 32 |       console.log('✅ Google Gemini initialized successfully');
 33 |     } catch (error) {
 34 |       console.error('❌ Gemini initialization failed:', error.message);
 35 |       this.available = false;
 36 |       this.initialized = true;
 37 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Gemini initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'gemini');
 38 |     }
 39 |   }
 40 | 
 41 |   async checkAvailability() {
 42 |     if (!this.apiKey) return false;
 43 | 
 44 |     try {
 45 |       // Test with a simple generation
 46 |       const model = this.client.getGenerativeModel({ model: this.model });
 47 |       const result = await model.generateContent('Hello');
 48 |       this.available = true;
 49 |       return true;
 50 |     } catch (error) {
 51 |       console.warn('⚠️  Gemini availability check failed:', error.message);
 52 |       this.available = false;
 53 |       return false;
 54 |     }
 55 |   }
 56 | 
 57 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 58 |     if (!this.available) {
 59 |       throw new AIProviderError('Gemini service not available', 'gemini');
 60 |     }
 61 | 
 62 |     try {
 63 |       console.log('🤖 Gemini generating response...');
 64 |       const startTime = Date.now();
 65 | 
 66 |       const model = this.client.getGenerativeModel({ 
 67 |         model: this.model,
 68 |         generationConfig: {
 69 |           temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
 70 |           maxOutputTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 71 |           topP: options.topP || 0.9,
 72 |           topK: options.topK || 40
 73 |         }
 74 |       });
 75 | 
 76 |       const result = await model.generateContent(prompt);
 77 |       const text = result.response.text();
 78 |       
 79 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
 80 |       console.log(`✅ Gemini response received in ${duration}s`);
 81 | 
 82 |       return {
 83 |         success: true,
 84 |         content: text,
 85 |         model: this.model,
 86 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
 87 |         provider: 'gemini',
 88 |         error: null
 89 |       };
 90 |     } catch (error) {
 91 |       console.error('❌ Gemini generation error:', error.message);
 92 |       
 93 |       // Handle specific Gemini errors
 94 |       if (error.message.includes('API_KEY')) {
 95 |         throw new AIProviderError('Invalid Gemini API key', 'gemini');
 96 |       } else if (error.message.includes('quota')) {
 97 |         throw new AIProviderError('Gemini API quota exceeded', 'gemini');
 98 |       } else if (error.message.includes('safety')) {
 99 |         throw new AIProviderError('Content blocked by Gemini safety filters', 'gemini');
100 |       } else {
101 |         throw new AIProviderError(`Gemini generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'gemini');
102 |       }
103 |     }
104 |   }
105 | 
106 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
107 |     if (!this.available) {
108 |       throw new AIProviderError('Gemini service not available', 'gemini');
109 |     }
110 | 
111 |     try {
112 |       console.log('💬 Gemini chat with messages...');
113 |       const startTime = Date.now();
114 | 
115 |       // Convert messages to Gemini format
116 |       const history = [];
117 |       const lastMessage = messages[messages.length - 1];
118 |       
119 |       // Build conversation history (excluding last message)
120 |       for (let i = 0; i < messages.length - 1; i++) {
121 |         const msg = messages[i];
122 |         if (msg.role === 'user') {
123 |           history.push({
124 |             role: 'user',
125 |             parts: [{ text: msg.content }]
126 |           });
127 |         } else if (msg.role === 'assistant') {
128 |           history.push({
129 |             role: 'model',
130 |             parts: [{ text: msg.content }]
131 |           });
132 |         }
133 |       }
134 | 
135 |       const model = this.client.getGenerativeModel({ 
136 |         model: this.model,
137 |         generationConfig: {
138 |           temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
139 |           maxOutputTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
140 |           topP: options.topP || 0.9,
141 |           topK: options.topK || 40
142 |         }
143 |       });
144 | 
145 |       const chat = model.startChat({ history });
146 |       const result = await chat.sendMessage(lastMessage.content);
147 |       const text = await result.response.text();
148 |       
149 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
150 |       console.log(`✅ Gemini chat response received in ${duration}s`);
151 | 
152 |       return {
153 |         success: true,
154 |         content: text,
155 |         model: this.model,
156 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
157 |         provider: 'gemini',
158 |         error: null
159 |       };
160 |     } catch (error) {
161 |       console.error('❌ Gemini chat error:', error.message);
162 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Gemini chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'gemini');
163 |     }
164 |   }
165 | 
166 |   async health() {
167 |     try {
168 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
169 |       return {
170 |         name: this.name,
171 |         available: isAvailable,
172 |         model: this.model,
173 |         apiKey: this.apiKey ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
174 |         initialized: this.initialized,
175 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
176 |       };
177 |     } catch (error) {
178 |       return {
179 |         name: this.name,
180 |         available: false,
181 |         error: error.message,
182 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
183 |       };
184 |     }
185 |   }
186 | 
187 |   async isAvailable() {
188 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   getCapabilities() {
192 |     return {
193 |       textGeneration: true,
194 |       chat: true,
195 |       streaming: false,
196 |       models: [this.model],
197 |       features: ['multimodal', 'safety_filters', 'context_window_large'],
198 |       limits: {
199 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
200 |         timeout: this.timeout,
201 |         rateLimit: '60 requests per minute'
202 |       }
203 |     };
204 |   }
205 | }
206 | 
207 | export default GeminiProvider;
208 | 
```

```js
  1 | // Ollama provider for local LLMs (Llama 3.2 & NeuralChat 7B)
  2 | import axios from 'axios';
  3 | import { performance } from 'perf_hooks';
  4 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  5 | 
  6 | export class OllamaProvider {
  7 |   constructor(config) {
  8 |     this.name = 'Ollama';
  9 |     this.baseUrl = config.baseUrl;
 10 |     this.primaryModel = config.primaryModel;
 11 |     this.chatModel = config.chatModel;
 12 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 13 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 14 |     this.temperature = config.temperature;
 15 |     this.topP = config.topP;
 16 |     this.frequencyPenalty = config.frequencyPenalty;
 17 |     this.available = false;
 18 |     this.models = [];
 19 |     this.initialized = false;
 20 |   }
 21 | 
 22 |   async initialize() {
 23 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 24 |     
 25 |     console.log('🦙 Initializing Ollama Provider...');
 26 |     console.log(`   Base URL: ${this.baseUrl}`);
 27 |     console.log(`   Primary Model: ${this.primaryModel}`);
 28 |     console.log(`   Chat Model: ${this.chatModel}`);
 29 |     
 30 |     try {
 31 |       await this.checkAvailability();
 32 |       await this.listModels();
 33 |       this.initialized = true;
 34 |       console.log('✅ Ollama Provider initialized successfully');
 35 |     } catch (error) {
 36 |       console.error('❌ Ollama initialization failed:', error.message);
 37 |       this.available = false;
 38 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Ollama initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
 39 |     }
 40 |   }
 41 | 
 42 |   async checkAvailability() {
 43 |     try {
 44 |       const response = await axios.get(`${this.baseUrl}/api/tags`, {
 45 |         timeout: 5000,
 46 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
 47 |       });
 48 |       this.available = response.status === 200;
 49 |       console.log(`✅ Ollama is available (${response.status})`);
 50 |       return this.available;
 51 |     } catch (error) {
 52 |       console.warn(`⚠️  Ollama not available at ${this.baseUrl}:`, error.message);
 53 |       this.available = false;
 54 |       return false;
 55 |     }
 56 |   }
 57 | 
 58 |   async listModels() {
 59 |     try {
 60 |       const response = await axios.get(`${this.baseUrl}/api/tags`, {
 61 |         timeout: 5000,
 62 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
 63 |       });
 64 |       this.models = response.data.models || [];
 65 |       console.log(`📦 Available Ollama models: ${this.models.map(m => m.name).join(', ')}`);
 66 |       return this.models;
 67 |     } catch (error) {
 68 |       console.error('Error listing Ollama models:', error.message);
 69 |       return [];
 70 |     }
 71 |   }
 72 | 
 73 |   getAvailableModel(preferredModel = null) {
 74 |     if (!this.available || this.models.length === 0) return null;
 75 | 
 76 |     if (preferredModel) {
 77 |       const found = this.models.find(m => 
 78 |         m.name.includes(preferredModel) || m.name === preferredModel
 79 |       );
 80 |       if (found) return found.name;
 81 |     }
 82 | 
 83 |     // Try primary model
 84 |     if (this.models.some(m => m.name.includes(this.primaryModel))) {
 85 |       return this.primaryModel;
 86 |     }
 87 | 
 88 |     // Try chat model
 89 |     if (this.models.some(m => m.name.includes(this.chatModel))) {
 90 |       return this.chatModel;
 91 |     }
 92 | 
 93 |     // Return first available model
 94 |     return this.models[0]?.name || null;
 95 |   }
 96 | 
 97 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 98 |     if (!this.available) {
 99 |       throw new AIProviderError('Ollama service not available', 'ollama');
100 |     }
101 | 
102 |     const model = this.getAvailableModel(options.preferredModel);
103 |     if (!model) {
104 |       throw new AIProviderError('No Ollama models available', 'ollama');
105 |     }
106 | 
107 |     try {
108 |       console.log(`🦙 Ollama generating with model: ${model}`);
109 |       const startTime = performance.now();
110 | 
111 |       const response = await axios.post(
112 |         `${this.baseUrl}/api/generate`,
113 |         {
114 |           model,
115 |           prompt,
116 |           stream: false,
117 |           options: {
118 |             temperature: options.temperature || this.temperature,
119 |             top_p: options.topP || this.topP,
120 |             num_predict: options.maxTokens || this.maxTokens,
121 |             num_ctx: 4096,
122 |             repeat_penalty: 1.0 - (options.frequencyPenalty || this.frequencyPenalty)
123 |           }
124 |         },
125 |         {
126 |           timeout: options.timeout || this.timeout,
127 |           headers: {
128 |             'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129 |           }
130 |         }
131 |       );
132 | 
133 |       const endTime = performance.now();
134 |       const duration = ((endTime - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
135 | 
136 |       console.log(`✅ Ollama response received in ${duration}s`);
137 | 
138 |       return {
139 |         success: true,
140 |         content: response.data.response || '',
141 |         model,
142 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
143 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
144 |         provider: 'ollama',
145 |         error: null
146 |       };
147 |     } catch (error) {
148 |       console.error('❌ Ollama generation error:', error.message);
149 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Ollama generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
150 |     }
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
154 |     if (!this.available) {
155 |       throw new AIProviderError('Ollama service not available', 'ollama');
156 |     }
157 | 
158 |     const model = this.getAvailableModel(options.preferredModel || this.chatModel);
159 |     if (!model) {
160 |       throw new AIProviderError('No Ollama models available for chat', 'ollama');
161 |     }
162 | 
163 |     try {
164 |       console.log(`💬 Ollama chat with model: ${model}`);
165 |       const startTime = performance.now();
166 | 
167 |       const response = await axios.post(
168 |         `${this.baseUrl}/api/chat`,
169 |         {
170 |           model,
171 |           messages,
172 |           stream: false,
173 |           options: {
174 |             temperature: options.temperature || this.temperature,
175 |             top_p: options.topP || this.topP,
176 |             num_predict: options.maxTokens || this.maxTokens,
177 |             repeat_penalty: 1.0 - (options.frequencyPenalty || this.frequencyPenalty)
178 |           }
179 |         },
180 |         {
181 |           timeout: options.timeout || this.timeout,
182 |           headers: {
183 |             'Content-Type': 'application/json'
184 |           }
185 |         }
186 |       );
187 | 
188 |       const endTime = performance.now();
189 |       const duration = ((endTime - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
190 | 
191 |       console.log(`✅ Ollama chat response received in ${duration}s`);
192 | 
193 |       return {
194 |         success: true,
195 |         content: response.data.message?.content || '',
196 |         model,
197 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
198 |         provider: 'ollama',
199 |         error: null
200 |       };
201 |     } catch (error) {
202 |       console.error('❌ Ollama chat error:', error.message);
203 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Ollama chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
204 |     }
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   async pullModel(modelName) {
208 |     try {
209 |       console.log(`📥 Pulling model: ${modelName}`);
210 |       const response = await axios.post(
211 |         `${this.baseUrl}/api/pull`,
212 |         { name: modelName },
213 |         {
214 |           timeout: 600000, // 10 minutes for download
215 |           headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
216 |         }
217 |       );
218 |       console.log(`✅ Model pulled: ${modelName}`);
219 |       await this.listModels();
220 |       return true;
221 |     } catch (error) {
222 |       console.error(`❌ Failed to pull model ${modelName}:`, error.message);
223 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Failed to pull model ${modelName}: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
224 |     }
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   async health() {
228 |     try {
229 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
230 |       return {
231 |         name: this.name,
232 |         available: isAvailable,
233 |         baseUrl: this.baseUrl,
234 |         models: this.models.map(m => m.name),
235 |         primaryModel: this.primaryModel,
236 |         chatModel: this.chatModel,
237 |         initialized: this.initialized,
238 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
239 |       };
240 |     } catch (error) {
241 |       return {
242 |         name: this.name,
243 |         available: false,
244 |         error: error.message,
245 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
246 |       };
247 |     }
248 |   }
249 | 
250 |   async isAvailable() {
251 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
252 |   }
253 | 
254 |   getCapabilities() {
255 |     return {
256 |       textGeneration: true,
257 |       chat: true,
258 |       streaming: true,
259 |       models: this.models.map(m => m.name),
260 |       features: ['local_inference', 'no_api_keys', 'privacy_focused'],
261 |       limits: {
262 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
263 |         timeout: this.timeout
264 |       }
265 |     };
266 |   }
267 | }
268 | 
269 | export default OllamaProvider;
```

```js
  1 | // OpenAI API provider (GPT-4)
  2 | import OpenAI from 'openai';
  3 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export class OpenAIProvider {
  6 |   constructor(config) {
  7 |     this.name = 'OpenAI GPT-4';
  8 |     this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
  9 |     this.model = config.model;
 10 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 11 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 12 |     this.available = false;
 13 |     this.client = null;
 14 |     this.initialized = false;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   async initialize() {
 18 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 19 | 
 20 |     if (!this.apiKey) {
 21 |       console.warn('⚠️  OpenAI API key not configured');
 22 |       this.available = false;
 23 |       this.initialized = true;
 24 |       return;
 25 |     }
 26 | 
 27 |     try {
 28 |       console.log('🧠 Initializing OpenAI Provider...');
 29 |       this.client = new OpenAI({
 30 |         apiKey: this.apiKey,
 31 |         timeout: this.timeout
 32 |       });
 33 |       this.available = true;
 34 |       this.initialized = true;
 35 |       console.log('✅ OpenAI initialized successfully');
 36 |     } catch (error) {
 37 |       console.error('❌ OpenAI initialization failed:', error.message);
 38 |       this.available = false;
 39 |       this.initialized = true;
 40 |       throw new AIProviderError(`OpenAI initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'openai');
 41 |     }
 42 |   }
 43 | 
 44 |   async checkAvailability() {
 45 |     if (!this.apiKey) return false;
 46 | 
 47 |     try {
 48 |       // Test with a simple API call
 49 |       await this.client.models.list();
 50 |       this.available = true;
 51 |       return true;
 52 |     } catch (error) {
 53 |       console.warn('⚠️  OpenAI availability check failed:', error.message);
 54 |       this.available = false;
 55 |       return false;
 56 |     }
 57 |   }
 58 | 
 59 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 60 |     if (!this.available) {
 61 |       throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI service not available', 'openai');
 62 |     }
 63 | 
 64 |     try {
 65 |       console.log('🧠 OpenAI generating response...');
 66 |       const startTime = Date.now();
 67 | 
 68 |       const completion = await this.client.chat.completions.create({
 69 |         model: this.model,
 70 |         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],
 71 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 72 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
 73 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
 74 |         frequency_penalty: options.frequencyPenalty || 0,
 75 |         presence_penalty: options.presencePenalty || 0,
 76 |         stream: false
 77 |       });
 78 | 
 79 |       const text = completion.choices[0]?.message?.content || '';
 80 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
 81 |       
 82 |       console.log(`✅ OpenAI response received in ${duration}s`);
 83 | 
 84 |       return {
 85 |         success: true,
 86 |         content: text,
 87 |         model: this.model,
 88 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
 89 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 90 |         provider: 'openai',
 91 |         error: null
 92 |       };
 93 |     } catch (error) {
 94 |       console.error('❌ OpenAI generation error:', error.message);
 95 |       
 96 |       // Handle specific OpenAI errors
 97 |       if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
 98 |         throw new AIProviderError('Invalid OpenAI API key', 'openai');
 99 |       } else if (error.message.includes('quota')) {
100 |         throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI API quota exceeded', 'openai');
101 |       } else if (error.message.includes('rate limit')) {
102 |         throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI rate limit exceeded', 'openai');
103 |       } else if (error.message.includes('content filter')) {
104 |         throw new AIProviderError('Content blocked by OpenAI content filter', 'openai');
105 |       } else {
106 |         throw new AIProviderError(`OpenAI generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'openai');
107 |       }
108 |     }
109 |   }
110 | 
111 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
112 |     if (!this.available) {
113 |       throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI service not available', 'openai');
114 |     }
115 | 
116 |     try {
117 |       console.log('💬 OpenAI chat with messages...');
118 |       const startTime = Date.now();
119 | 
120 |       const completion = await this.client.chat.completions.create({
121 |         model: this.model,
122 |         messages: messages,
123 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
124 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
125 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
126 |         frequency_penalty: options.frequencyPenalty || 0,
127 |         presence_penalty: options.presencePenalty || 0,
128 |         stream: false
129 |       });
130 | 
131 |       const text = completion.choices[0]?.message?.content || '';
132 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
133 |       
134 |       console.log(`✅ OpenAI chat response received in ${duration}s`);
135 | 
136 |       return {
137 |         success: true,
138 |         content: text,
139 |         model: this.model,
140 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
141 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
142 |         provider: 'openai',
143 |         error: null
144 |       };
145 |     } catch (error) {
146 |       console.error('❌ OpenAI chat error:', error.message);
147 |       throw new AIProviderError(`OpenAI chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'openai');
148 |     }
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   async health() {
152 |     try {
153 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
154 |       return {
155 |         name: this.name,
156 |         available: isAvailable,
157 |         model: this.model,
158 |         apiKey: this.apiKey ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
159 |         initialized: this.initialized,
160 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
161 |       };
162 |     } catch (error) {
163 |       return {
164 |         name: this.name,
165 |         available: false,
166 |         error: error.message,
167 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
168 |       };
169 |     }
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   async isAvailable() {
173 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   getCapabilities() {
177 |     return {
178 |       textGeneration: true,
179 |       chat: true,
180 |       streaming: true,
181 |       models: [this.model, 'gpt-4-turbo', 'gpt-3.5-turbo'],
182 |       features: ['function_calling', 'json_mode', 'system_messages'],
183 |       limits: {
184 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
185 |         timeout: this.timeout,
186 |         rateLimit: '3500 requests per hour'
187 |       }
188 |     };
189 |   }
190 | }
191 | 
192 | export default OpenAIProvider;
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/prompt-templates.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/prompt-templates.js`

```js
  1 | // AI Prompt Templates for different use cases
  2 | 
  3 | export const PROMPT_TEMPLATES = {
  4 |   // Dataset analysis prompts
  5 |   datasetAnalysis: {
  6 |     schemaDetection: `Analyze this dataset and identify:
  7 | 1. Column types (numeric, categorical, date, text)
  8 | 2. Potential primary keys
  9 | 3. Relationships between columns
 10 | 4. Data quality issues
 11 | 5. Recommended visualizations
 12 | 
 13 | Dataset sample:
 14 | {data}
 15 | 
 16 | Respond in JSON format with keys: columns, relationships, quality, visualizations`,
 17 | 
 18 |     correlationAnalysis: `Find correlations and patterns in this dataset:
 19 | {data}
 20 | 
 21 | Focus on:
 22 | 1. Strong correlations (r > 0.7)
 23 | 2. Interesting patterns
 24 | 3. Anomalies or outliers
 25 | 4. Business insights
 26 | 
 27 | Respond in JSON format with keys: correlations, patterns, anomalies, insights`,
 28 | 
 29 |     summaryGeneration: `Generate a comprehensive summary of this dataset:
 30 | {data}
 31 | 
 32 | Include:
 33 | 1. Overview (row count, column count, memory usage)
 34 | 2. Key statistics
 35 | 3. Data distribution
 36 | 4. Notable patterns
 37 | 5. Recommendations for analysis
 38 | 
 39 | Respond in JSON format.`,
 40 | 
 41 |     outlierDetection: `Identify outliers in this dataset using statistical methods:
 42 | {data}
 43 | 
 44 | Methods to apply:
 45 | 1. Z-score analysis
 46 | 2. IQR method
 47 | 3. Isolation forest (if applicable)
 48 | 
 49 | Respond in JSON format with keys: outliers, method, threshold, affected_rows`
 50 |   },
 51 | 
 52 |   // Chat prompts
 53 |   chat: {
 54 |     systemPrompt: `You are an AI data analyst assistant for InsightFlow. You help users:
 55 | 1. Understand their data
 56 | 2. Generate insights
 57 | 3. Create visualizations
 58 | 4. Answer questions about datasets
 59 | 5. Provide recommendations
 60 | 
 61 | Always be helpful, accurate, and concise. When discussing data, reference specific values and patterns.`,
 62 | 
 63 |     contextPrompt: `Current dataset context:
 64 | - Dataset ID: {datasetId}
 65 | - Rows: {rowCount}
 66 | - Columns: {columnCount}
 67 | - Schema: {schema}
 68 | 
 69 | Previous conversation:
 70 | {conversationHistory}`,
 71 | 
 72 |     followUpPrompt: `Based on the previous analysis:
 73 | {previousAnalysis}
 74 | 
 75 | Answer this follow-up question:
 76 | {question}
 77 | 
 78 | Provide a detailed, data-driven response.`
 79 |   },
 80 | 
 81 |   // Visualization prompts
 82 |   visualization: {
 83 |     chartRecommendation: `Based on this dataset schema:
 84 | {schema}
 85 | 
 86 | Recommend the best charts to visualize:
 87 | 1. Distribution of values
 88 | 2. Relationships between variables
 89 | 3. Trends over time (if applicable)
 90 | 4. Comparisons
 91 | 
 92 | Respond in JSON format with keys: recommended_charts, reasoning, config`,
 93 | 
 94 |     colorScheme: `Suggest a color scheme for visualizing this data:
 95 | {data}
 96 | 
 97 | Consider:
 98 | 1. Data type (categorical, sequential, diverging)
 99 | 2. Accessibility (colorblind-friendly)
100 | 3. Aesthetic appeal
101 | 
102 | Respond with hex color codes in JSON format.`
103 |   },
104 | 
105 |   // Predictive analytics prompts
106 |   predictive: {
107 |     forecasting: `Analyze this time series data and forecast future values:
108 | {data}
109 | 
110 | Consider:
111 | 1. Trend analysis
112 | 2. Seasonality
113 | 3. Stationarity
114 | 4. Appropriate forecasting method
115 | 
116 | Provide forecast for next {periods} periods with confidence intervals.`,
117 | 
118 |     classification: `Based on this labeled dataset:
119 | {data}
120 | 
121 | Build a classification model to predict {target}.
122 | 
123 | Suggest:
124 | 1. Best algorithm
125 | 2. Feature importance
126 | 3. Expected accuracy
127 | 4. Potential issues`
128 |   },
129 | 
130 |   // Export prompts
131 |   export: {
132 |     reportGeneration: `Generate a professional report for this dataset analysis:
133 | {analysis}
134 | 
135 | Include:
136 | 1. Executive summary
137 | 2. Methodology
138 | 3. Key findings
139 | 4. Visualizations
140 | 5. Recommendations
141 | 6. Appendix with technical details
142 | 
143 | Format in Markdown.`
144 |   }
145 | };
146 | 
147 | // Helper function to fill templates
148 | export function fillTemplate(template, variables) {
149 |   let filled = template;
150 |   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(variables)) {
151 |     const placeholder = `{${key}}`;
152 |     filled = filled.replace(new RegExp(placeholder, 'g'), value);
153 |   }
154 |   return filled;
155 | }
156 | 
157 | // Get prompt by path
158 | export function getPrompt(path, variables = {}) {
159 |   const parts = path.split('.');
160 |   let current = PROMPT_TEMPLATES;
161 |   
162 |   for (const part of parts) {
163 |     if (current[part] === undefined) {
164 |       throw new Error(`Prompt template not found: ${path}`);
165 |     }
166 |     current = current[part];
167 |   }
168 |   
169 |   if (typeof current !== 'string') {
170 |     throw new Error(`Prompt template is not a string: ${path}`);
171 |   }
172 |   
173 |   return fillTemplate(current, variables);
174 | }
175 | 
176 | // Export default
177 | export default PROMPT_TEMPLATES;
178 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/response-parser.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/response-parser.js`

```js
  1 | // AI Response Parser Utilities
  2 | 
  3 | /**
  4 |  * Parse JSON from AI response, handling various formats
  5 |  */
  6 | export function parseJSONFromResponse(response) {
  7 |   if (!response || typeof response !== 'string') {
  8 |     return null;
  9 |   }
 10 | 
 11 |   // Try direct JSON parse first
 12 |   try {
 13 |     return JSON.parse(response);
 14 |   } catch (e) {
 15 |     // Continue to other methods
 16 |   }
 17 | 
 18 |   // Try extracting JSON from markdown code blocks
 19 |   const jsonMatch = response.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 20 |   if (jsonMatch) {
 21 |     try {
 22 |       return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[1].trim());
 23 |     } catch (e) {
 24 |       // Continue
 25 |     }
 26 |   }
 27 | 
 28 |   // Try finding JSON object in response
 29 |   const objectMatch = response.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
 30 |   if (objectMatch) {
 31 |     try {
 32 |       return JSON.parse(objectMatch[0]);
 33 |     } catch (e) {
 34 |       // Continue
 35 |     }
 36 |   }
 37 | 
 38 |   // Try finding JSON array in response
 39 |   const arrayMatch = response.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
 40 |   if (arrayMatch) {
 41 |     try {
 42 |       return JSON.parse(arrayMatch[0]);
 43 |     } catch (e) {
 44 |       // Continue
 45 |     }
 46 |   }
 47 | 
 48 |   console.warn('Failed to parse JSON from response');
 49 |   return null;
 50 | }
 51 | 
 52 | /**
 53 |  * Extract structured data from AI response
 54 |  */
 55 | export function extractStructuredData(response, schema = {}) {
 56 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
 57 |   
 58 |   if (!parsed) {
 59 |     return {
 60 |       success: false,
 61 |       data: null,
 62 |       raw: response
 63 |     };
 64 |   }
 65 | 
 66 |   // Validate against schema if provided
 67 |   if (Object.keys(schema).length > 0) {
 68 |     const validated = validateAgainstSchema(parsed, schema);
 69 |     return {
 70 |       success: true,
 71 |       data: validated,
 72 |       raw: response
 73 |     };
 74 |   }
 75 | 
 76 |   return {
 77 |     success: true,
 78 |     data: parsed,
 79 |     raw: response
 80 |   };
 81 | }
 82 | 
 83 | /**
 84 |  * Validate parsed data against schema
 85 |  */
 86 | function validateAgainstSchema(data, schema) {
 87 |   const result = {};
 88 |   
 89 |   for (const [key, type] of Object.entries(schema)) {
 90 |     if (data[key] !== undefined) {
 91 |       // Type checking
 92 |       if (type === 'number' && typeof data[key] === 'number') {
 93 |         result[key] = data[key];
 94 |       } else if (type === 'string' && typeof data[key] === 'string') {
 95 |         result[key] = data[key];
 96 |       } else if (type === 'boolean' && typeof data[key] === 'boolean') {
 97 |         result[key] = data[key];
 98 |       } else if (type === 'array' && Array.isArray(data[key])) {
 99 |         result[key] = data[key];
100 |       } else if (type === 'object' && typeof data[key] === 'object') {
101 |         result[key] = data[key];
102 |       } else {
103 |         console.warn(`Type mismatch for ${key}: expected ${type}, got ${typeof data[key]}`);
104 |         result[key] = data[key]; // Keep it anyway
105 |       }
106 |     }
107 |   }
108 |   
109 |   return result;
110 | }
111 | 
112 | /**
113 |  * Parse analysis results from AI response
114 |  */
115 | export function parseAnalysisResponse(response) {
116 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
117 |   
118 |   if (!parsed) {
119 |     return {
120 |       success: false,
121 |       summary: response,
122 |       insights: [],
123 |       recommendations: [],
124 |       raw: response
125 |     };
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   return {
129 |     success: true,
130 |     summary: parsed.summary || parsed.overview || '',
131 |     insights: parsed.insights || parsed.findings || [],
132 |     recommendations: parsed.recommendations || parsed.suggestions || [],
133 |     statistics: parsed.statistics || {},
134 |     visualizations: parsed.visualizations || parsed.charts || [],
135 |     raw: response
136 |   };
137 | }
138 | 
139 | /**
140 |  * Parse correlation results
141 |  */
142 | export function parseCorrelationResponse(response) {
143 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
144 |   
145 |   if (!parsed) {
146 |     return {
147 |       success: false,
148 |       correlations: [],
149 |       raw: response
150 |     };
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   // Normalize correlation data
154 |   const correlations = (parsed.correlations || []).map(corr => ({
155 |     variable1: corr.variable1 || corr.x || corr[0],
156 |     variable2: corr.variable2 || corr.y || corr[1],
157 |     coefficient: parseFloat(corr.coefficient || corr.r || corr.correlation || corr[2]),
158 |     strength: getCorrelationStrength(Math.abs(corr.coefficient || corr.r || corr.correlation || corr[2])),
159 |     type: (corr.coefficient || corr.r || corr.correlation || 0) >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'
160 |   }));
161 | 
162 |   return {
163 |     success: true,
164 |     correlations,
165 |     patterns: parsed.patterns || [],
166 |     anomalies: parsed.anomalies || [],
167 |     raw: response
168 |   };
169 | }
170 | 
171 | /**
172 |  * Get correlation strength description
173 |  */
174 | function getCorrelationStrength(value) {
175 |   if (value >= 0.7) return 'strong';
176 |   if (value >= 0.4) return 'moderate';
177 |   if (value >= 0.2) return 'weak';
178 |   return 'very weak';
179 | }
180 | 
181 | /**
182 |  * Parse visualization recommendations
183 |  */
184 | export function parseVisualizationResponse(response) {
185 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
186 |   
187 |   if (!parsed) {
188 |     return {
189 |       success: false,
190 |       charts: [],
191 |       raw: response
192 |     };
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   const charts = (parsed.recommended_charts || parsed.charts || parsed.visualizations || []).map(chart => ({
196 |     type: chart.type || chart.chartType,
197 |     title: chart.title || chart.name,
198 |     xAxis: chart.xAxis || chart.x,
199 |     yAxis: chart.yAxis || chart.y,
200 |     reasoning: chart.reasoning || chart.description || '',
201 |     config: chart.config || chart.options || {}
202 |   }));
203 | 
204 |   return {
205 |     success: true,
206 |     charts,
207 |     reasoning: parsed.reasoning || '',
208 |     raw: response
209 |   };
210 | }
211 | 
212 | /**
213 |  * Parse chat response
214 |  */
215 | export function parseChatResponse(response) {
216 |   // For chat, we usually want the raw text
217 |   // But try to extract structured data if present
218 |   
219 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
220 |   
221 |   if (parsed && parsed.response) {
222 |     return {
223 |       success: true,
224 |       message: parsed.response,
225 |       data: parsed,
226 |       raw: response
227 |     };
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   return {
231 |     success: true,
232 |     message: response,
233 |     data: null,
234 |     raw: response
235 |   };
236 | }
237 | 
238 | /**
239 |  * Clean and normalize AI response text
240 |  */
241 | export function cleanResponseText(text) {
242 |   if (!text) return '';
243 |   
244 |   return text
245 |     .replace(/```[\s\S]*?```/g, '') // Remove code blocks
246 |     .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') // Remove bold markdown
247 |     .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '$1') // Remove italic markdown
248 |     .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n') // Normalize line breaks
249 |     .trim();
250 | }
251 | 
252 | /**
253 |  * Extract key-value pairs from response
254 |  */
255 | export function extractKeyValuePairs(response) {
256 |   const pairs = {};
257 |   
258 |   // Match patterns like "key: value" or "key = value"
259 |   const regex = /([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_\s]*?)[:=]\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/g;
260 |   let match;
261 |   
262 |   while ((match = regex.exec(response)) !== null) {
263 |     const key = match[1].trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_');
264 |     const value = match[2].trim();
265 |     pairs[key] = value;
266 |   }
267 |   
268 |   return pairs;
269 | }
270 | 
271 | export default {
272 |   parseJSONFromResponse,
273 |   extractStructuredData,
274 |   parseAnalysisResponse,
275 |   parseCorrelationResponse,
276 |   parseVisualizationResponse,
277 |   parseChatResponse,
278 |   cleanResponseText,
279 |   extractKeyValuePairs
280 | };
281 | 
```
