```js
565 |     
566 |     if (ollamaAvailable) {
567 |       console.log('[analytics] Using Ollama + Mistral for AI analysis');
568 |       
569 |       // Prepare dataset for AI (schema-only)
570 |       const datasetForAI = {
571 |         name: dataset.name,
572 |         rowCount: dataset.rowCount,
573 |         columns: dataset.columns,
574 |       };
575 |       
576 |       const aiResponse = await callOllamaAI(datasetForAI, query);
577 |       
578 |       if (aiResponse.success && aiResponse.usedAI) {
579 |         console.log('[analytics] Ollama analysis successful');
580 |         
581 |         // Generate chart if AI suggested one
582 |         let chart = null;
583 |         if (aiResponse.chart_type && aiResponse.chart_type !== "table") {
584 |           const plan = buildPlanFromAIResponse(analyticsDataset, aiResponse);
585 |           chart = materializePlan(analyticsDataset, plan);
586 |         }
587 |         
588 |         return {
589 |           content: aiResponse.insight,
590 |           sql: aiResponse.sql,
591 |           chart,
592 |           insights: [
593 |             `Analysis type: ${aiResponse.intent}`,
594 |             `Confidence: ${(aiResponse.confidence * 100).toFixed(0)}%`,
595 |             aiResponse.reasoning,
596 |             `Using local Mistral model (schema-only analysis)`,
597 |           ],
598 |           schema,
599 |           aiProvider: 'ollama',
600 |           aiModel: aiResponse.model || 'mistral',
601 |           usedAI: true,
602 |           confidence: aiResponse.confidence,
603 |           intent: aiResponse.intent,
604 |         };
605 |       }
606 |     } else {
607 |       console.log('[analytics] Ollama not available, trying AI router fallback');
608 |       
609 |       // Fallback to existing AI router
610 |       const aiContext = {
611 |         dataset: {
612 |           name: dataset.name,
613 |           rowCount: dataset.rowCount,
614 |         },
615 |         schema,
616 |         query,
617 |       };
618 |       
619 |       const sanitizedContext = sanitizeQueryContext(aiContext);
620 |       const validation = validateSchemaOnlyContext(sanitizedContext);
621 |       
622 |       if (!validation.isValid) {
623 |         console.warn('Analytics service detected potential data leakage:', validation.violations);
624 |       }
625 |       
626 |       const aiResult = await aiRouter.generateResponse(query, sanitizedContext);
627 |       
628 |       if (aiResult.success) {
629 |         const plan = buildAnalysisPlan(analyticsDataset, schema, query);
630 |         const chart = materializePlan(analyticsDataset, plan);
631 |         
632 |         return {
633 |           content: aiResult.content,
634 |           sql: buildSqlForPlan(plan),
635 |           chart,
636 |           insights: buildInsightsFromSchema(schema, plan),
637 |           schema,
638 |           aiProvider: aiResult.provider,
639 |           aiModel: aiResult.model,
640 |           fallbackUsed: aiResult.fallbackUsed,
641 |         };
642 |       }
643 |     }
644 |   } catch (error) {
645 |     console.warn('AI response failed, falling back to traditional analysis:', error.message);
646 |   }
647 | 
648 |   // Fallback to traditional analysis
649 |   const plan = buildAnalysisPlan(analyticsDataset, schema, query);
650 |   const chart = materializePlan(analyticsDataset, plan);
651 | 
652 |   let content = `I analyzed the ${schema.datasetName} schema and used it to select an appropriate ${chart?.type ?? "summary"} view.`;
653 | 
654 |   if (plan.mode === "overview") {
655 |     content = buildOverviewContent(schema, chart);
656 |   } else if (plan.mode === "countMatchingValues" && plan.dimension && Array.isArray(plan.matchValues) && chart?.data?.length) {
657 |     const total = chart.data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item.count ?? 0), 0);
658 |     const breakdown = chart.data.map((item) => `${item[plan.dimension.name]}: ${Number(item.count ?? 0).toLocaleString()}`).join("; ");
659 |     const valueList = plan.matchValues.map((value) => `"${value}"`).join(" and ");
660 |     const percentage = ((total / schema.rowCount) * 100).toFixed(1);
661 |     content = `Found ${total.toLocaleString()} records (${percentage}%) matching ${humanize(plan.dimension.name)} = ${valueList} out of ${schema.rowCount.toLocaleString()} total records. Breakdown: ${breakdown}.`;
662 |   } else if (plan.mode === "countByDimension" && plan.dimension && chart?.data?.length) {
663 |     const total = chart.data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item.count ?? 0), 0);
664 |     const topItems = chart.data.slice(0, 5).map((item) => `${item[plan.dimension.name]}: ${Number(item.count ?? 0).toLocaleString()}`).join(", ");
665 |     content = `Counted ${total.toLocaleString()} records by ${humanize(plan.dimension.name)}. Top categories: ${topItems}.`;
666 |   } else if (plan.mode === "metricByDimension" && plan.metric && plan.dimension && chart?.data?.length) {
667 |     const total = chart.data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item[plan.metric.name] ?? 0), 0);
668 |     const avg = chart.data.length > 0 ? (total / chart.data.length).toFixed(2) : 0;
669 |     content = `Aggregated ${humanize(plan.metric.name)} by ${humanize(plan.dimension.name)} using ${plan.aggregation}. Total: ${Number(total).toLocaleString()}, Average: ${avg}.`;
670 |   }
671 | 
672 |   return {
673 |     content,
674 |     sql: buildSqlForPlan(plan),
675 |     chart,
676 |     insights: buildInsightsFromSchema(schema, plan),
677 |     schema,
678 |     aiProvider: 'traditional',
679 |   };
680 | };

682 | /**
683 |  * Build enhanced schema for HR/salary datasets
684 |  */
685 | const buildHRDatasetSchema = (dataset) => {
686 |   const columns = (dataset.columns || []).map(col => {
687 |     const name = col.name || '';
688 |     const type = col.type || 'string';
689 |     
690 |     let role = 'dimension';
691 |     
692 |     if (type === 'number' || type === 'integer') {
693 |       const lowerName = name.toLowerCase();
694 |       if (lowerName.includes('salary') || 
695 |           lowerName.includes('experience') ||
696 |           lowerName.includes('revenue') ||
697 |           lowerName.includes('amount') ||
698 |           lowerName.includes('count') ||
699 |           lowerName.includes('bonus') ||
700 |           lowerName.includes('pay') ||
701 |           lowerName.includes('cost') ||
702 |           lowerName.includes('age')) {
703 |         role = 'metric';
704 |       } else if (lowerName.includes('id') || 
705 |                  lowerName.includes('row') || 
706 |                  lowerName.includes('index') ||
707 |                  lowerName.includes('_id')) {
708 |         role = 'excluded';
709 |       }
710 |     }
711 |     
712 |     return {
713 |       name: col.name,
714 |       type: type,
715 |       role: role,
716 |     };
717 |   });
718 | 
719 |   return {
720 |     columns,
721 |     primaryMetric: columns.find(col => col.role === 'metric'),
722 |     primaryDimension: columns.find(col => col.role === 'dimension'),
723 |     secondaryMetric: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'metric')[1],
724 |     secondaryDimension: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'dimension')[1],
725 |   };
726 | };
727 | 
728 | /**
729 |  * Handle smart queries for HR data
730 |  */
731 | const handleHRDatasetQuery = (dataset, query) => {
732 |   const schema = buildHRDatasetSchema(dataset);
733 |   const q = query.toLowerCase();
734 |   const metrics = schema.columns.filter(c => c.role === 'metric');
735 |   const dimensions = schema.columns.filter(c => c.role === 'dimension');
736 |   
737 |   const primaryMetric = schema.primaryMetric || metrics[0];
738 |   const primaryDim = schema.primaryDimension || dimensions[0];
739 |   const secondaryDim = schema.secondaryDimension || dimensions[1];
740 |   
741 |   // Salary by category
742 |   if (q.includes('salary') && primaryMetric && primaryDim) {
743 |     const targetDim = dimensions.find(d => q.includes(d.name.toLowerCase())) || primaryDim;
744 |     return {
745 |       mode: 'metricByDimension',
746 |       metric: primaryMetric,
747 |       dimension: targetDim,
748 |       aggregation: q.includes('average') || q.includes('avg') ? 'average' : 'sum',
749 |       chartType: q.includes('pie') ? 'pie' : 'bar',
750 |       intent: 'aggregation',
751 |     };
752 |   }
753 |   
754 |   // Experience vs salary
755 |   if (q.includes('experience') && (q.includes('salary') || q.includes('vs'))) {
756 |     const expCol = schema.columns.find(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes('experience'));
757 |     if (expCol && primaryMetric) {
758 |       return {
759 |         mode: 'metricByDimension',
760 |         metric: primaryMetric,
761 |         dimension: expCol,
762 |         aggregation: 'average',
763 |         chartType: 'scatter',
764 |         intent: 'correlation',
765 |       };
766 |     }
767 |   }
768 |   
769 |   // Top/bottom
770 |   if (q.includes('top') || q.includes('highest') || q.includes('bottom') || q.includes('lowest')) {
771 |     if (primaryMetric && primaryDim) {
772 |       return {
773 |         mode: 'metricByDimension',
774 |         metric: primaryMetric,
775 |         dimension: primaryDim,
776 |         aggregation: 'sum',
777 |         chartType: 'bar',
778 |         intent: 'ranking',
779 |       };
780 |     }
781 |   }
782 |   
783 |   // Distribution
784 |   if (q.includes('distribution') || q.includes('breakdown') || q.includes('proportion')) {
785 |     if (primaryMetric && secondaryDim) {
786 |       return {
787 |         mode: 'metricByDimension',
788 |         metric: primaryMetric,
789 |         dimension: secondaryDim,
790 |         aggregation: 'sum',
791 |         chartType: 'pie',
792 |         intent: 'distribution',
793 |       };
794 |     }
795 |   }
796 |   
797 |   // Count by category
798 |   if (q.includes('count') || q.includes('how many')) {
799 |     if (primaryDim) {
800 |       return {
801 |         mode: 'countByDimension',
802 |         dimension: primaryDim,
803 |         chartType: 'bar',
804 |         intent: 'count',
805 |       };
806 |     }
807 |   }
808 |   
809 |   // Compare
810 |   if (q.includes('compare') || q.includes('vs') || q.includes('versus')) {
811 |     if (primaryMetric && primaryDim) {
812 |       return {
813 |         mode: 'metricByDimension',
814 |         metric: primaryMetric,
815 |         dimension: primaryDim,
816 |         aggregation: 'average',
817 |         chartType: 'bar',
818 |         intent: 'comparison',
819 |       };
820 |     }
821 |   }
822 |   
823 |   return null;
824 | };
825 | 
826 | /**
827 |  * Build analysis plan from AI response
828 |  */
829 | const buildPlanFromAIResponse = (analyticsDataset, aiResponse) => {
830 |   const { intent, columns_used, chart_type } = aiResponse;
831 |   
832 |   const dimensions = analyticsDataset.columns.filter(col => col.role === 'dimension');
833 |   const metrics = analyticsDataset.columns.filter(col => col.role === 'metric');
834 |   
835 |   let dimension = dimensions.find(col => columns_used.includes(col.name)) || dimensions[0];
836 |   let metric = metrics.find(col => columns_used.includes(col.name)) || metrics[0];
837 |   
838 |   let mode = 'summary';
839 |   let aggregation = 'sum';
840 |   
841 |   switch (intent) {
842 |     case 'aggregation':
843 |     case 'comparison':
844 |       mode = 'metricByDimension';
845 |       aggregation = 'average';
846 |       break;
847 |     case 'count':
848 |       mode = 'countByDimension';
849 |       break;
850 |     case 'trend':
851 |       mode = 'metricByDimension';
852 |       break;
853 |     case 'distribution':
854 |       mode = 'countByDimension';
855 |       break;
856 |     default:
857 |       mode = 'summary';
858 |   }
859 |   
860 |   return {
861 |     mode,
862 |     metric,
863 |     dimension,
864 |     aggregation,
865 |     chartType: chart_type || 'bar',
866 |     intent,
867 |   };
868 | };
869 | 
870 | export const generateCorrelationAnalysis = (dataset) => {
871 |   const analyticsDataset = prepareDatasetForAnalytics(dataset);
872 |   const numericColumns = analyticsDataset.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "number");
873 | 
874 |   if (numericColumns.length < 2) {
875 |     return {
876 |       correlations: [],
877 |       summary: "Not enough numeric columns for correlation analysis.",
878 |       hasGemini: false,
879 |     };
880 |   }
881 | 
882 |   const columnPairs = [];
883 |   for (let i = 0; i < numericColumns.length; i++) {
884 |     for (let j = i + 1; j < numericColumns.length; j++) {
885 |       columnPairs.push([numericColumns[i], numericColumns[j]]);
886 |     }
887 |   }
888 | 
889 |   const correlations = [];
890 |   for (const [col1, col2] of columnPairs) {
891 |     const x = [];
892 |     const y = [];
893 | 
894 |     analyticsDataset.rows.forEach((row) => {
895 |       const xVal = toNumber(row[col1.name]);
896 |       const yVal = toNumber(row[col2.name]);
897 |       if (xVal !== null && yVal !== null) {
898 |         x.push(xVal);
899 |         y.push(yVal);
900 |       }
901 |     });
902 | 
903 |     if (x.length >= 3) {
904 |       const correlation = calculatePearsonCorrelation(x, y);
905 |       if (correlation !== null) {
906 |         let strength = "weak";
907 |         let interpretation = "";
908 | 
909 |         const absCorr = Math.abs(correlation);
910 |         if (absCorr >= 0.7) {
911 |           strength = "strong";
912 |           interpretation = correlation > 0
913 |             ? `${col1.name} and ${col2.name} show a strong positive correlation.`
914 |             : `${col1.name} and ${col2.name} show a strong negative correlation.`;
915 |         } else if (absCorr >= 0.4) {
916 |           strength = "moderate";
917 |           interpretation = correlation > 0
918 |             ? `${col1.name} and ${col2.name} show moderate positive correlation.`
919 |             : `${col1.name} and ${col2.name} show moderate negative correlation.`;
920 |         } else {
921 |           interpretation = `${col1.name} and ${col2.name} show weak/no significant correlation.`;
922 |         }
923 | 
924 |         correlations.push({
925 |           column1: col1.name,
926 |           column2: col2.name,
927 |           coefficient: Number(correlation.toFixed(3)),
928 |           strength,
929 |           interpretation,
930 |           sampleSize: x.length,
931 |         });
932 |       }
933 |     }
934 |   }
935 | 
936 |   correlations.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.coefficient) - Math.abs(a.coefficient));
937 | 
938 |   return {
939 |     correlations,
940 |     summary: correlations.length > 0
941 |       ? `Found ${correlations.length} correlation(s) among ${numericColumns.length} numeric columns.`
942 |       : "No significant correlations found between numeric columns.",
943 |     hasGemini: false,
944 |   };
945 | };
946 | 
```

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/dashboard-ai-agent.js`

```js
  1 | import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
  2 | import {
  3 |   callDashboardPlanner,
  4 |   OLLAMA_MODELS,
  5 | } from './ollama/ollama-dual-model-service.js';
  6 | import {
  7 |   buildSchemaSummary,
  8 |   cleanRows,
  9 |   findColumn,
 10 |   safeNumber,
 11 | } from './ollama/dataset-schema-summary.js';
 12 | 
 13 | function aggregate(values = [], aggregation = 'count') {
 14 |   const present = values.filter(
 15 |     (value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== '',
 16 |   );
 17 | 
 18 |   if (aggregation === 'count') return present.length;
 19 | 
 20 |   const numbers = present.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
 21 | 
 22 |   if (!numbers.length) return 0;
 23 | 
 24 |   if (aggregation === 'sum') return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
 25 |   if (aggregation === 'avg') return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / numbers.length;
 26 |   if (aggregation === 'min') return Math.min(...numbers);
 27 |   if (aggregation === 'max') return Math.max(...numbers);
 28 | 
 29 |   if (aggregation === 'median') {
 30 |     const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 31 |     const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
 32 | 
 33 |     return sorted.length % 2
 34 |       ? sorted[mid]
 35 |       : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2;
 36 |   }
 37 | 
 38 |   return present.length;
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | function groupBy(rows, xKey, yKey, aggregation = 'count', limit = 10) {
 42 |   const groups = new Map();
 43 | 
 44 |   for (const row of rows) {
 45 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? 'Unknown').trim() || 'Unknown';
 46 | 
 47 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
 48 |     groups.get(label).push(yKey ? row[yKey] : label);
 49 |   }
 50 | 
 51 |   return [...groups.entries()]
 52 |     .map(([label, values]) => ({
 53 |       [xKey]: label,
 54 |       [aggregation === 'count' ? 'count' : yKey]: aggregate(values, aggregation),
 55 |     }))
 56 |     .sort((a, b) => Number(Object.values(b).at(-1)) - Number(Object.values(a).at(-1)))
 57 |     .slice(0, limit);
 58 | }
 59 | 
 60 | function histogram(rows, key, bins = 8) {
 61 |   const values = rows.map((row) => safeNumber(row[key])).filter((value) => value !== null);
 62 | 
 63 |   if (!values.length) return [];
 64 | 
 65 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
 66 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
 67 | 
 68 |   if (min === max) return [{ range: String(min), count: values.length }];
 69 | 
 70 |   const step = (max - min) / bins;
 71 | 
 72 |   const buckets = Array.from({ length: bins }, (_, index) => ({
 73 |     start: min + index * step,
 74 |     end: index === bins - 1 ? max : min + (index + 1) * step,
 75 |     count: 0,
 76 |   }));
 77 | 
 78 |   for (const value of values) {
 79 |     const index = Math.min(Math.floor((value - min) / step), bins - 1);
 80 |     buckets[index].count += 1;
 81 |   }
 82 | 
 83 |   return buckets.map((bucket) => ({
 84 |     range: `${Math.round(bucket.start).toLocaleString()}-${Math.round(bucket.end).toLocaleString()}`,
 85 |     count: bucket.count,
 86 |   }));
 87 | }
 88 | 
 89 | function splitCount(rows, key, limit = 10) {
 90 |   const counts = new Map();
 91 | 
 92 |   for (const row of rows) {
 93 |     String(row[key] ?? '')
 94 |       .split(/[,;/|]+/)
 95 |       .map((item) => item.trim())
 96 |       .filter(Boolean)
 97 |       .forEach((item) => counts.set(item, (counts.get(item) || 0) + 1));
 98 |   }
 99 | 
100 |   return [...counts.entries()]
101 |     .map(([label, count]) => ({
102 |       [key]: label,
103 |       count,
104 |     }))
105 |     .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
106 |     .slice(0, limit);
107 | }
108 | 
109 | function buildKpis(dataset, schema) {
110 |   const rows = cleanRows(dataset.rows || []);
111 | 
112 |   const metric =
113 |     findColumn(schema, ['salary', 'salary_usd', 'revenue', 'sales', 'amount', 'score'], 'metric') ||
114 |     findColumn(schema, [], 'metric');
115 | 
116 |   const kpis = [
117 |     {
118 |       id: randomUUID(),
119 |       title: 'Total Records',
120 |       value: rows.length.toLocaleString(),
121 |       metric: '*',
122 |       aggregation: 'count',
123 |       icon: 'database',
124 |     },
125 |   ];
126 | 
127 |   if (metric) {
128 |     const values = rows.map((row) => row[metric.name]);
129 | 
130 |     kpis.push(
131 |       {
132 |         id: randomUUID(),
133 |         title: `Average ${metric.name}`,
134 |         value: Number(aggregate(values, 'avg').toFixed(2)).toLocaleString(),
135 |         metric: metric.name,
136 |         aggregation: 'avg',
137 |         icon: 'bar-chart',
138 |       },
139 |       {
140 |         id: randomUUID(),
141 |         title: `Highest ${metric.name}`,
142 |         value: Number(aggregate(values, 'max').toFixed(2)).toLocaleString(),
143 |         metric: metric.name,
144 |         aggregation: 'max',
145 |         icon: 'trending-up',
146 |       },
147 |     );
148 |   }
149 | 
150 |   return kpis;
151 | }
152 | 
153 | function fallbackPlan(query, schema) {
154 |   const text = String(query || '').toLowerCase();
155 | 
156 |   if (/remove|delete/.test(text) && /chart|graph/.test(text)) {
157 |     return {
158 |       action: 'DELETE_CHART',
159 |       message: 'Removed the latest chart.',
160 |     };
161 |   }
162 | 
163 |   if (/reset|clear/.test(text) && /filter/.test(text)) {
164 |     return {
165 |       action: 'CLEAR_FILTERS',
166 |       message: 'Cleared all filters.',
167 |     };
168 |   }
169 | 
170 |   const filterMatch = String(query).match(
171 |     /(?:filter|where|show only)\s+([\w\s_-]+)\s*(?:=|is|:)\s*["']?([^"']+)["']?/i,
172 |   );
173 | 
174 |   if (filterMatch) {
175 |     const column = findColumn(schema, [filterMatch[1]], 'dimension');
176 | 
177 |     if (column) {
178 |       return {
179 |         action: 'FILTER',
180 |         message: `Applied filter ${column.name} = ${filterMatch[2].trim()}`,
181 |         filters: {
182 |           [column.name]: filterMatch[2].trim(),
183 |         },
184 |       };
185 |     }
186 |   }
187 | 
188 |   if (/kpi|summary|card/.test(text)) {
189 |     return {
190 |       action: 'GENERATE_KPI',
191 |       message: 'Generated KPI summary.',
192 |     };
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   const type =
196 |     /pie|donut/.test(text)
197 |       ? 'pie'
198 |       : /line|trend|time/.test(text)
199 |         ? 'line'
200 |         : /histogram|distribution/.test(text)
201 |           ? 'histogram'
202 |           : 'bar';
203 | 
204 |   const metric =
205 |     findColumn(schema, ['salary', 'salary_usd', 'revenue', 'sales', 'amount', 'score'], 'metric') ||
206 |     findColumn(schema, [], 'metric');
207 | 
208 |   const dimension =
209 |     findColumn(schema, ['country', 'region', 'education', 'product', 'category'], 'dimension') ||
210 |     findColumn(schema, [], 'dimension');
211 | 
212 |   return {
213 |     action: 'GENERATE_CHART',
214 |     message: 'Created chart using local fallback.',
215 |     chartSpec: {
216 |       title: metric && dimension ? `${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}` : 'Generated Chart',
217 |       type,
218 |       xKey: dimension?.name,
219 |       yKey: metric?.name,
220 |       aggregation: /average|avg|mean/.test(text) ? 'avg' : 'count',
221 |       limit: 10,
222 |     },
223 |   };
224 | }
225 | 
226 | function validatePlan(plan = {}) {
227 |   const allowedActions = new Set([
228 |     'GENERATE_CHART',
229 |     'MODIFY_CHART',
230 |     'DELETE_CHART',
231 |     'FILTER',
232 |     'CLEAR_FILTERS',
233 |     'GENERATE_KPI',
234 |     'ADD_KPI',
235 |     'ANSWER',
236 |   ]);
237 | 
238 |   const action = String(plan.action || 'ANSWER').toUpperCase();
239 | 
240 |   if (!allowedActions.has(action)) {
241 |     return {
242 |       action: 'ANSWER',
243 |       message: 'I understood the request, but could not map it to a dashboard action.',
244 |     };
245 |   }
246 | 
247 |   return {
248 |     action: action === 'ADD_KPI' ? 'GENERATE_KPI' : action,
249 |     message: plan.message || 'Dashboard updated.',
250 |     chartSpec: plan.chartSpec || plan.chart || null,
251 |     filters: plan.filters || {},
252 |   };
253 | }
254 | 
255 | function buildChartFromSpec(dataset, schema, chartSpec) {
256 |   const rows = cleanRows(dataset.rows || []);
257 | 
258 |   if (!chartSpec) return null;
259 | 
260 |   const chartType = chartSpec.type || 'bar';
261 |   const aggregation = chartSpec.aggregation || 'count';
262 | 
263 |   const xColumn =
264 |     findColumn(schema, [chartSpec.xKey, chartSpec.dimension].filter(Boolean), null) ||
265 |     findColumn(schema, [], chartType === 'line' ? 'date' : 'dimension');
266 | 
267 |   const yColumn =
268 |     findColumn(schema, [chartSpec.yKey, chartSpec.metric].filter(Boolean), 'metric') ||
269 |     findColumn(schema, [], 'metric');
270 | 
271 |   if (chartType === 'histogram') {
272 |     const metric = yColumn || xColumn;
273 |     if (!metric) return null;
274 | 
275 |     return {
276 |       id: randomUUID(),
277 |       type: 'histogram',
278 |       title: chartSpec.title || `${metric.name} Distribution`,
279 |       xKey: 'range',
280 |       yKey: 'count',
281 |       aggregation: 'count',
282 |       data: histogram(rows, metric.name, chartSpec.bins || 8),
283 |       provider: 'ollama',
284 |       model: OLLAMA_MODELS.dashboard,
285 |     };
286 |   }
287 | 
288 |   if (!xColumn) return null;
289 |   if (aggregation !== 'count' && aggregation !== 'split_count' && !yColumn) return null;
290 | 
291 |   const data =
292 |     aggregation === 'split_count'
293 |       ? splitCount(rows, xColumn.name, chartSpec.limit || 10)
294 |       : groupBy(
295 |         rows,
296 |         xColumn.name,
297 |         yColumn?.name || xColumn.name,
298 |         aggregation,
299 |         chartSpec.limit || 10,
300 |       );
301 | 
302 |   return {
303 |     id: randomUUID(),
304 |     type: chartType,
305 |     title:
306 |       chartSpec.title ||
307 |       `${aggregation === 'count' ? 'Count' : aggregation} by ${xColumn.name}`,
308 |     xKey: xColumn.name,
309 |     yKey: aggregation === 'count' || aggregation === 'split_count' ? 'count' : yColumn.name,
310 |     aggregation: aggregation === 'split_count' ? 'count' : aggregation,
311 |     data,
312 |     provider: 'ollama',
313 |     model: OLLAMA_MODELS.dashboard,
314 |   };
315 | }
316 | 
317 | async function planWithNeuralChat(query, schema) {
318 |   const prompt = `
319 | You are InsightFlow Dashboard AI.
320 | 
321 | You control a data analytics dashboard.
322 | 
323 | Rules:
324 | - You receive schema only.
325 | - Never return chart.data.
326 | - Never invent KPI values.
327 | - Use only existing column names from schema.
328 | - Backend code calculates all chart/KPI values.
329 | - Return JSON only.
330 | 
331 | Allowed actions:
332 | GENERATE_CHART, MODIFY_CHART, DELETE_CHART, FILTER, CLEAR_FILTERS, GENERATE_KPI, ANSWER
333 | 
334 | Allowed chart types:
335 | bar, line, area, pie, histogram
336 | 
337 | Allowed aggregations:
338 | count, sum, avg, min, max, median, split_count
339 | 
340 | Return this JSON:
341 | {
342 |   "action": "GENERATE_CHART",
343 |   "message": "short message",
344 |   "chartSpec": {
345 |     "title": "",
346 |     "type": "bar",
347 |     "xKey": "",
348 |     "yKey": "",
349 |     "aggregation": "avg",
350 |     "limit": 10
351 |   },
352 |   "filters": {}
353 | }
354 | 
355 | User command:
356 | ${query}
357 | 
358 | Schema:
359 | ${JSON.stringify(schema, null, 2)}
360 | `;
361 | 
362 |   const result = await callDashboardPlanner([
363 |     {
364 |       role: 'user',
365 |       content: prompt,
366 |     },
367 |   ]);
368 | 
369 |   return result.json;
370 | }
371 | 
372 | export async function runDashboardAIAgent(dataset, query) {
373 |   const schema = buildSchemaSummary(dataset);
374 | 
375 |   let plan;
376 |   let aiError = null;
377 | 
378 |   try {
379 |     plan = await planWithNeuralChat(query, schema);
380 |   } catch (error) {
381 |     aiError = error.message;
382 |     plan = fallbackPlan(query, schema);
383 |   }
384 | 
385 |   const command = validatePlan(plan);
386 | 
387 |   if (command.action === 'GENERATE_CHART' || command.action === 'MODIFY_CHART') {
388 |     const chart = buildChartFromSpec(dataset, schema, command.chartSpec);
389 | 
390 |     if (!chart) {
391 |       return {
392 |         action: 'ANSWER',
393 |         message: 'I understood your request, but this chart is not possible with the current schema.',
394 |         provider: 'ollama',
395 |         model: OLLAMA_MODELS.dashboard,
396 |         schemaOnly: true,
397 |         aiError,
398 |       };
399 |     }
400 | 
401 |     return {
402 |       action: command.action,
403 |       message: command.message || `Created ${chart.title}.`,
404 |       chart,
405 |       provider: 'ollama',
406 |       model: OLLAMA_MODELS.dashboard,
407 |       schemaOnly: true,
408 |       aiError,
409 |     };
410 |   }
411 | 
412 |   if (command.action === 'GENERATE_KPI') {
413 |     return {
414 |       action: 'GENERATE_KPI',
415 |       message: command.message || 'Generated KPI summary.',
416 |       kpis: buildKpis(dataset, schema),
417 |       provider: 'ollama',
418 |       model: OLLAMA_MODELS.dashboard,
419 |       schemaOnly: true,
420 |       aiError,
421 |     };
422 |   }
423 | 
424 |   return {
425 |     action: command.action,
426 |     message: command.message,
427 |     filters: command.filters,
428 |     provider: 'ollama',
429 |     model: OLLAMA_MODELS.dashboard,
430 |     schemaOnly: true,
431 |     aiError,
432 |   };
433 | }
434 | 
```

```js
  1 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  2 | 
  3 | function normalizeName(value = "") {
  4 |   return String(value)
  5 |     .toLowerCase()
  6 |     .trim()
  7 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_")
  8 |     .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
  9 | }
 10 | 
 11 | function isMissing(value) {
 12 |   return value === null || value === undefined || value === "";
 13 | }
 14 | 
 15 | export function safeNumber(value) {
 16 |   if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
 17 | 
 18 |   const cleaned = String(value ?? "")
 19 |     .replace(/[,$₹%\s]/g, "")
 20 |     .trim();
 21 | 
 22 |   const parsed = Number(cleaned);
 23 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
 24 | }
 25 | 
 26 | function isDateLike(value) {
 27 |   if (value instanceof Date) return true;
 28 |   if (typeof value !== "string") return false;
 29 |   if (!/\d/.test(value)) return false;
 30 |   return Number.isFinite(Date.parse(value));
 31 | }
 32 | 
 33 | function isPositiveLabel(value) {
 34 |   if (typeof value === "number") return value === 1;
 35 | 
 36 |   const text = String(value ?? "").toLowerCase().trim();
 37 | 
 38 |   return ["1", "yes", "true", "positive", "depressed", "high"].includes(text);
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | export function cleanRows(rows = []) {
 42 |   return rows.filter((row) => {
 43 |     const keys = Object.keys(row || {}).map(normalizeName);
 44 |     const source = String(row?._sourceFile || row?.source || "").toLowerCase();
 45 | 
 46 |     const dictionaryShape =
 47 |       keys.includes("column") &&
 48 |       keys.includes("type") &&
 49 |       keys.includes("description");
 50 | 
 51 |     return !source.includes("dictionary") && !dictionaryShape;
 52 |   });
 53 | }
 54 | 
 55 | export function inferColumns(rows = []) {
 56 |   const names = [...new Set(rows.flatMap((row) => Object.keys(row || {})))].filter(
 57 |     (name) => !String(name).startsWith("__")
 58 |   );
 59 | 
 60 |   return names.map((name) => {
 61 |     const values = rows.map((row) => row[name]);
 62 |     const present = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value)).slice(0, 250);
 63 | 
 64 |     let type = "string";
 65 | 
 66 |     if (present.length) {
 67 |       const numericCount = present.filter((value) => safeNumber(value) !== null).length;
 68 |       const dateCount = present.filter(isDateLike).length;
 69 | 
 70 |       if (numericCount / present.length >= 0.8) type = "number";
 71 |       else if (dateCount / present.length >= 0.8) type = "date";
 72 |     }
 73 | 
 74 |     return {
 75 |       name,
 76 |       normalizedName: normalizeName(name),
 77 |       type,
 78 |       role: type === "number" ? "metric" : type === "date" ? "date" : "dimension",
 79 |       uniqueCount: new Set(values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value)).map(String)).size,
 80 |       nullCount: values.filter(isMissing).length,
 81 |     };
 82 |   });
 83 | }
 84 | 
 85 | function findColumn(columns, aliases = [], role = null) {
 86 |   const normalizedAliases = aliases.map(normalizeName).filter(Boolean);
 87 | 
 88 |   const scored = columns
 89 |     .map((column) => {
 90 |       let score = 0;
 91 | 
 92 |       for (const alias of normalizedAliases) {
 93 |         if (column.normalizedName === alias) score += 20;
 94 |         else if (column.normalizedName.includes(alias)) score += 10;
 95 |         else if (alias.includes(column.normalizedName)) score += 4;
 96 |       }
 97 | 
 98 |       if (role && column.role === role) score += 2;
 99 | 
100 |       return { column, score };
101 |     })
102 |     .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
103 |     .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
104 | 
105 |   if (scored[0]) return scored[0].column;
106 |   if (role) return columns.find((column) => column.role === role) || null;
107 | 
108 |   return null;
109 | }
110 | 
111 | function round(value) {
112 |   return Number(Number(value || 0).toFixed(2));
113 | }
114 | 
115 | function aggregate(values = [], aggregation = "count") {
116 |   const present = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
117 | 
118 |   if (aggregation === "count") return present.length;
119 | 
120 |   const numbers = present.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
121 | 
122 |   if (!numbers.length) return 0;
123 | 
124 |   if (aggregation === "sum") return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
125 |   if (aggregation === "avg") return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / numbers.length;
126 |   if (aggregation === "min") return Math.min(...numbers);
127 |   if (aggregation === "max") return Math.max(...numbers);
128 | 
129 |   const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
130 |   const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
131 | 
132 |   return sorted.length % 2 ? sorted[mid] : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2;
133 | }
134 | 
135 | function groupAggregate(rows, xKey, yKey, aggregation = "count", limit = 12) {
136 |   const groups = new Map();
137 | 
138 |   for (const row of rows) {
139 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
140 | 
141 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
142 |     groups.get(label).push(aggregation === "count" ? label : row[yKey]);
143 |   }
144 | 
145 |   return [...groups.entries()]
146 |     .map(([label, values]) => ({
147 |       [xKey]: label,
148 |       [aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey]: round(aggregate(values, aggregation)),
149 |     }))
150 |     .sort((a, b) => Number(Object.values(b).at(-1)) - Number(Object.values(a).at(-1)))
151 |     .slice(0, limit);
152 | }
153 | 
154 | function groupPositiveRate(rows, xKey, yKey, limit = 12) {
155 |   const groups = new Map();
156 | 
157 |   for (const row of rows) {
158 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
159 | 
160 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
161 |     groups.get(label).push(row[yKey]);
162 |   }
163 | 
164 |   return [...groups.entries()]
165 |     .map(([label, values]) => {
166 |       const positives = values.filter(isPositiveLabel).length;
167 |       const rate = values.length ? (positives / values.length) * 100 : 0;
168 | 
169 |       return {
170 |         [xKey]: label,
171 |         rate: round(rate),
172 |       };
173 |     })
174 |     .sort((a, b) => b.rate - a.rate)
175 |     .slice(0, limit);
176 | }
177 | 
178 | function histogram(rows, key, bins = 7) {
179 |   const values = rows
180 |     .map((row) => safeNumber(row[key]))
181 |     .filter((value) => value !== null);
182 | 
183 |   if (!values.length) return [];
184 | 
185 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
186 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
187 | 
188 |   if (min === max) {
189 |     return [{ range: String(min), count: values.length }];
190 |   }
191 | 
192 |   const step = (max - min) / bins;
193 | 
194 |   const buckets = Array.from({ length: bins }, (_, index) => ({
195 |     start: min + index * step,
196 |     end: index === bins - 1 ? max : min + (index + 1) * step,
197 |     count: 0,
198 |   }));
199 | 
200 |   for (const value of values) {
201 |     const index = Math.min(Math.floor((value - min) / step), bins - 1);
202 |     buckets[index].count += 1;
203 |   }
204 | 
205 |   return buckets.map((bucket) => ({
206 |     range: `${Math.round(bucket.start)}-${Math.round(bucket.end)}`,
207 |     count: bucket.count,
208 |   }));
209 | }
210 | 
211 | function scatter(rows, xKey, yKey, limit = 300) {
212 |   return rows
213 |     .map((row) => ({
214 |       [xKey]: safeNumber(row[xKey]),
215 |       [yKey]: safeNumber(row[yKey]),
216 |     }))
217 |     .filter((row) => row[xKey] !== null && row[yKey] !== null)
218 |     .slice(0, limit);
219 | }
220 | 
221 | function makeChart({ id, title, type, xKey, yKey, aggregation, data, description }) {
222 |   return {
223 |     id: id || randomUUID(),
224 |     title,
225 |     type,
226 |     xKey,
227 |     yKey,
228 |     aggregation,
229 |     data,
230 |     description,
231 |     correctedBy: "dashboard-integrity-engine",
232 |   };
233 | }
234 | 
235 | function detectDomain(columns) {
236 |   const names = columns.map((column) => column.normalizedName).join(" ");
237 | 
238 |   if (
239 |     names.includes("daily_social_media_hours") ||
240 |     names.includes("sleep_hours") ||
241 |     names.includes("stress_level") ||
242 |     names.includes("anxiety_level") ||
243 |     names.includes("addiction_level") ||
244 |     names.includes("depression_label")
245 |   ) {
246 |     return "teen_mental_health";
247 |   }
248 | 
249 |   if (/salary|experience|education|company_size|framework|language/.test(names)) {
250 |     return "salary_jobs";
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   if (/sales|revenue|amount|product|quantity|order/.test(names)) {
254 |     return "sales";
255 |   }
256 | 
257 |   return "generic";
258 | }
259 | 
260 | function formatValue(value, suffix = "") {
261 |   if (suffix === "%") return `${round(value)}%`;
262 |   return round(value).toLocaleString();
263 | }
264 | 
265 | function buildMentalHealthKpis(rows, columns) {
266 |   const age = findColumn(columns, ["age"], "metric");
267 |   const dailySocial = findColumn(columns, ["daily_social_media_hours"], "metric");
268 |   const sleep = findColumn(columns, ["sleep_hours"], "metric");
269 |   const depression = findColumn(columns, ["depression_label"], null);
270 |   const gender = findColumn(columns, ["gender"], "dimension");

272 |   const kpis = [
273 |     {

311 |     );
312 |   }
313 | 
314 |   if (gender) {
315 |     const values = rows
316 |       .map((row) => row[gender.name])
317 |       .filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
318 | 
319 |     kpis.push({
320 |       id: "kpi-gender-categories",
321 |       title: "Gender Categories",
322 |       value: new Set(values.map(String)).size.toLocaleString(),
323 |       subtitle: "unique",
324 |       metric: gender.name,
325 |       aggregation: "unique",
326 |     });
327 |   }
328 | 
329 |   if (dailySocial) {
330 |     kpis.push({
331 |       id: "kpi-average-social-hours",
332 |       title: "Avg Social Media Hours",
333 |       value: formatValue(aggregate(rows.map((row) => row[dailySocial.name]), "avg")),
334 |       subtitle: "avg",

336 |       aggregation: "avg",

338 |   }

340 |   if (sleep) {

342 |       id: "kpi-average-sleep-hours",

344 |       value: formatValue(aggregate(rows.map((row) => row[sleep.name]), "avg")),

348 |     });
349 |   }
350 | 
351 |   if (depression) {
352 |     const positives = rows.filter((row) => isPositiveLabel(row[depression.name])).length;
353 |     const rate = rows.length ? (positives / rows.length) * 100 : 0;
354 | 
355 |     kpis.push({
356 |       id: "kpi-depression-rate",
357 |       title: "Depression Label Rate",
358 |       value: formatValue(rate, "%"),
359 |       subtitle: "positive label rate",
360 |       metric: depression.name,
361 |       aggregation: "rate",
362 |     });
363 |   }
364 | 
365 |   return kpis.slice(0, 8);
366 | }

368 | function buildGenericKpis(rows, columns) {

412 |         aggregation: "max",
413 |       }

420 |       .filter((value) => !isMissing(value));

426 |       subtitle: "unique",
427 |       metric: dimension.name,
428 |       aggregation: "unique",
429 |     });
430 |   }
431 | 
432 |   return kpis.slice(0, 8);
433 | }

435 | function buildMentalHealthCharts(rows, columns) {

459 |       })
460 |     );

462 |

471 |         aggregation: "count",

474 |       })
475 |     );
476 |   }
477 | 
478 |   if (gender) {
479 |     charts.push(
480 |       makeChart({

483 |         type: "pie",
484 |         xKey: gender.name,
485 |         yKey: "count",
486 |         aggregation: "count",
487 |         data: groupAggregate(rows, gender.name, gender.name, "count", 10),
488 |         description: "Gender category share.",
489 |       })
490 |     );
491 |   }
492 | 
493 |   if (platform && social) {
494 |     charts.push(

504 |       })

515 |         yKey: stress.name,

519 |       })
520 |     );
521 |   }
522 |

569 | 
570 | function buildGenericSevenCharts(rows, columns) {
571 |   const metrics = columns.filter((column) => column.role === "metric");
572 |   const dimensions = columns.filter((column) => column.role === "dimension");
573 |   const dates = columns.filter((column) => column.role === "date");
574 | 
575 |   const metric = metrics[0];
576 |   const secondMetric = metrics[1];
577 |   const dimension = dimensions[0];
578 |   const secondDimension = dimensions[1];
579 |   const date = dates[0];
580 | 
581 |   const charts = [];
582 | 
583 |   if (dimension && metric) {
584 |     charts.push(
585 |       makeChart({
586 |         title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
587 |         type: "bar",
588 |         xKey: dimension.name,
589 |         yKey: metric.name,
590 |         aggregation: "avg",
591 |         data: groupAggregate(rows, dimension.name, metric.name, "avg", 10),
592 |       })
593 |     );
594 |   }
595 | 
596 |   if (metric) {
597 |     charts.push(
598 |       makeChart({
599 |         title: `${metric.name} Distribution`,
600 |         type: "histogram",
601 |         xKey: "range",
602 |         yKey: "count",
603 |         aggregation: "count",
604 |         data: histogram(rows, metric.name, 7),
605 |       })
606 |     );
607 |   }
608 | 
609 |   if (dimension) {
610 |     charts.push(
611 |       makeChart({
612 |         title: `Records by ${dimension.name}`,
613 |         type: "pie",
614 |         xKey: dimension.name,
615 |         yKey: "count",
616 |         aggregation: "count",
617 |         data: groupAggregate(rows, dimension.name, dimension.name, "count", 10),
618 |       })
619 |     );
620 |   }
621 | 
622 |   if (secondDimension && metric) {
623 |     charts.push(
624 |       makeChart({
625 |         title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${secondDimension.name}`,
626 |         type: "bar",
627 |         xKey: secondDimension.name,
628 |         yKey: metric.name,
629 |         aggregation: "avg",
630 |         data: groupAggregate(rows, secondDimension.name, metric.name, "avg", 10),
631 |       })
632 |     );
633 |   }
634 | 
635 |   if (dimension && secondMetric) {
636 |     charts.push(
637 |       makeChart({
638 |         title: `Total ${secondMetric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
639 |         type: "bar",
640 |         xKey: dimension.name,
641 |         yKey: secondMetric.name,
642 |         aggregation: "sum",
643 |         data: groupAggregate(rows, dimension.name, secondMetric.name, "sum", 10),
644 |       })
645 |     );
646 |   }
647 | 
648 |   if (metric && secondMetric) {
649 |     charts.push(
650 |       makeChart({
651 |         title: `${metric.name} vs ${secondMetric.name}`,
652 |         type: "scatter",
653 |         xKey: metric.name,
654 |         yKey: secondMetric.name,
655 |         aggregation: "raw",
656 |         data: scatter(rows, metric.name, secondMetric.name, 300),
657 |       })
658 |     );
659 |   }
660 | 
661 |   if (date && metric) {
662 |     const groups = new Map();
663 | 
664 |     for (const row of rows) {
665 |       const dateValue = new Date(row[date.name]);
666 |       if (!Number.isFinite(dateValue.getTime())) continue;
667 | 
668 |       const label = dateValue.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
669 | 
670 |       if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
671 |       groups.get(label).push(row[metric.name]);
672 |     }
673 | 
674 |     charts.push(
675 |       makeChart({
676 |         title: `${metric.name} Trend`,
677 |         type: "line",
678 |         xKey: date.name,
679 |         yKey: metric.name,
680 |         aggregation: "sum",
681 |         data: [...groups.entries()]
682 |           .map(([label, values]) => ({
683 |             [date.name]: label,
684 |             [metric.name]: round(aggregate(values, "sum")),
685 |           }))
686 |           .sort((a, b) => String(a[date.name]).localeCompare(String(b[date.name]))),
687 |       })
688 |     );
689 |   }
690 | 
691 |   for (const dim of dimensions) {
692 |     if (charts.length >= 7) break;
693 | 
694 |     charts.push(
695 |       makeChart({
696 |         title: `Top ${dim.name}`,
697 |         type: "bar",
698 |         xKey: dim.name,
699 |         yKey: "count",
700 |         aggregation: "count",
701 |         data: groupAggregate(rows, dim.name, dim.name, "count", 10),
702 |       })
703 |     );
704 |   }
705 | 
706 |   while (charts.length < 7) {
707 |     charts.push(
708 |       makeChart({
709 |         title: `Rows Overview ${charts.length + 1}`,
710 |         type: "bar",
711 |         xKey: "bucket",
712 |         yKey: "count",
713 |         aggregation: "count",
714 |         data: [{ bucket: "All Rows", count: rows.length }],
715 |       })
716 |     );
717 |   }
718 | 
719 |   return charts.slice(0, 7);
720 | }
721 | 
722 | function buildCorrectDashboard(dataset) {
723 |   const rows = cleanRows(dataset.rows || []);
724 |   const columns = inferColumns(rows);
725 |   const domain = detectDomain(columns);
726 | 
727 |   const kpis =
728 |     domain === "teen_mental_health"
729 |       ? buildMentalHealthKpis(rows, columns)
730 |       : buildGenericKpis(rows, columns);
731 | 
732 |   const charts =
733 |     domain === "teen_mental_health"
734 |       ? buildMentalHealthCharts(rows, columns)
735 |       : buildGenericSevenCharts(rows, columns);
736 | 
737 |   return {
738 |     domain,
739 |     rowCount: rows.length,
740 |     columnCount: columns.length,
741 |     columns,
742 |     kpis,
743 |     charts,
744 |   };
745 | }
746 | 
747 | function parseComparableNumber(value) {
748 |   return safeNumber(String(value ?? "").replace("%", ""));
749 | }
750 | 
751 | function compareKpis(currentKpis = [], correctKpis = []) {
752 |   const issues = [];
753 |   const currentMap = new Map();
754 | 
755 |   for (const kpi of currentKpis) {
756 |     currentMap.set(normalizeName(kpi.title || ""), kpi);
757 |   }
758 | 
759 |   for (const expected of correctKpis) {
760 |     const current = currentMap.get(normalizeName(expected.title || ""));
761 | 
762 |     if (!current) {
763 |       issues.push({
764 |         type: "missing_kpi",
765 |         severity: "medium",
766 |         message: `Missing KPI: ${expected.title}`,
767 |         fix: expected,
768 |       });
769 |       continue;
770 |     }
771 | 
772 |     const currentNumber = parseComparableNumber(current.value);
773 |     const expectedNumber = parseComparableNumber(expected.value);
774 | 
775 |     if (
776 |       currentNumber !== null &&
777 |       expectedNumber !== null &&
778 |       Math.abs(currentNumber - expectedNumber) > 0.05
779 |     ) {
780 |       issues.push({
781 |         type: "incorrect_kpi_value",
782 |         severity: "high",
783 |         message: `KPI "${expected.title}" is incorrect. Current: ${current.value}, expected: ${expected.value}`,
784 |         fix: expected,
785 |       });
786 |     }
787 |   }
788 | 
789 |   return issues;
790 | }
791 | 
792 | function compareCharts(currentCharts = [], correctCharts = [], columns = []) {
793 |   const issues = [];
794 |   const columnNames = new Set(columns.map((column) => column.name));
795 | 
796 |   if (currentCharts.length !== 7) {
797 |     issues.push({
798 |       type: "wrong_chart_count",
799 |       severity: "medium",
800 |       message: `Dashboard should show 7 charts per dataset. Current: ${currentCharts.length}, expected: 7.`,
801 |     });
802 |   }
803 | 
804 |   for (const chart of currentCharts) {
805 |     if (!chart?.data?.length) {
806 |       issues.push({
807 |         type: "empty_chart",
808 |         severity: "high",
809 |         message: `Chart "${chart?.title || "Untitled"}" has no data.`,
810 |       });
811 |     }
812 | 
813 |     const xOk =
814 |       ["range", "bucket", "count"].includes(chart?.xKey) ||
815 |       columnNames.has(chart?.xKey);
816 | 
817 |     const yOk =
818 |       ["count", "missing", "rate"].includes(chart?.yKey) ||
819 |       columnNames.has(chart?.yKey);
820 | 
821 |     if (!xOk || !yOk) {
822 |       issues.push({
823 |         type: "invalid_chart_schema",
824 |         severity: "high",
825 |         message: `Chart "${chart?.title || "Untitled"}" uses invalid keys x=${chart?.xKey}, y=${chart?.yKey}.`,
826 |       });
827 |     }
828 | 
829 |     const title = String(chart?.title || "").toLowerCase();
830 | 
831 |     if (title.includes("age by platform") && chart?.type !== "bar") {
832 |       issues.push({
833 |         type: "bad_chart_type",
834 |         severity: "medium",
835 |         message: "Average age by platform should be a bar chart, not donut/line.",
836 |       });
837 |     }
838 |   }
839 | 
840 |   return issues;
841 | }
842 | 
843 | export function validateAndFixDashboard(dataset = {}, currentDashboard = {}) {
844 |   const correct = buildCorrectDashboard(dataset);
845 | 
846 |   const issues = [
847 |     ...compareKpis(currentDashboard.kpis || [], correct.kpis),
848 |     ...compareCharts(currentDashboard.charts || [], correct.charts, correct.columns),
849 |   ];
850 | 
851 |   const observations = [];
852 | 
853 |   if (correct.domain === "teen_mental_health") {
854 |     const rows = cleanRows(dataset.rows || []);
855 |     const depressionColumn = correct.columns.find(
856 |       (column) => column.normalizedName === "depression_label"
857 |     );
858 |     const stressColumn = correct.columns.find(
859 |       (column) => column.normalizedName === "stress_level"
860 |     );
861 | 
862 |     if (depressionColumn) {
863 |       const positives = rows.filter((row) => isPositiveLabel(row[depressionColumn.name])).length;
864 |       const rate = rows.length ? (positives / rows.length) * 100 : 0;
865 | 
866 |       observations.push(
867 |         `Depression positive-label rate is ${round(rate)}%. Do not show HIGH risk unless you define a separate risk formula.`
868 |       );
869 |     }
870 | 
871 |     if (stressColumn) {
872 |       observations.push(
873 |         `Average stress level is ${round(
874 |           aggregate(rows.map((row) => row[stressColumn.name]), "avg")
875 |         )} out of 10.`
876 |       );
877 |     }
878 |   }
879 | 
880 |   return {
881 |     isCorrect: issues.length === 0,
882 |     issues,
883 |     observations,
884 |     correctedDashboard: {
885 |       dataType: correct.domain,
886 |       rowCount: correct.rowCount,
887 |       columnCount: correct.columnCount,
888 |       kpis: correct.kpis,
889 |       charts: correct.charts,
890 |       chartRecommendations: correct.charts,
891 |     },
892 |     message:
893 |       issues.length === 0
894 |         ? "Dashboard is already correct for the uploaded schema."
895 |         : `Found ${issues.length} dashboard issue(s). Corrected KPIs and 7 charts were regenerated from the dataset.`,
896 |   };
897 | }
```

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/dashboard/dashboardAnalytics.js`

```js
  1 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  2 | import { cleanDatasetRows, safeNumber } from "./schemaProfiler.js";
  3 | 
  4 | function isMissing(value) {
  5 |   return value === null || value === undefined || value === "";
  6 | }
  7 | 
  8 | function round(value) {
  9 |   return Number(Number(value || 0).toFixed(2));
 10 | }
 11 | 
 12 | function formatNumber(value) {
 13 |   if (typeof value !== "number" || !Number.isFinite(value)) return "0";
 14 |   return value.toLocaleString(undefined, {
 15 |     maximumFractionDigits: 2,
 16 |   });
 17 | }
 18 | 
 19 | export function aggregate(values = [], aggregation = "count") {
 20 |   const present = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
 21 | 
 22 |   if (aggregation === "count") return present.length;
 23 | 
 24 |   if (aggregation === "count_unique") {
 25 |     return new Set(present.map((value) => String(value))).size;
 26 |   }
 27 | 
 28 |   const numbers = present
 29 |     .map(safeNumber)
 30 |     .filter((value) => value !== null);
 31 | 
 32 |   if (!numbers.length) return 0;
 33 | 
 34 |   if (aggregation === "sum") {
 35 |     return numbers.reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0);
 36 |   }
 37 | 
 38 |   if (aggregation === "avg") {
 39 |     return numbers.reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0) / numbers.length;
 40 |   }
 41 | 
 42 |   if (aggregation === "min") return Math.min(...numbers);
 43 |   if (aggregation === "max") return Math.max(...numbers);
 44 | 
 45 |   const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 46 |   const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
 47 | 
 48 |   return sorted.length % 2
 49 |     ? sorted[mid]
 50 |     : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2;
 51 | }
 52 | 
 53 | export function applyFilters(rows = [], filters = {}) {
 54 |   return rows.filter((row) => {
 55 |     for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filters || {})) {
 56 |       if (!value) continue;
 57 | 
 58 |       if (typeof value === "object" && (value.start || value.end)) {
 59 |         const rowTime = Date.parse(row[key]);
 60 |         if (!Number.isFinite(rowTime)) return false;
 61 | 
 62 |         if (value.start && rowTime < Date.parse(value.start)) return false;
 63 |         if (value.end && rowTime > Date.parse(value.end)) return false;
 64 | 
 65 |         continue;
 66 |       }
 67 | 
 68 |       if (String(row[key] ?? "").toLowerCase() !== String(value).toLowerCase()) {
 69 |         return false;
 70 |       }
 71 |     }
 72 | 
 73 |     return true;
 74 |   });
 75 | }
 76 | 
 77 | export function groupByAggregate({
 78 |   rows,
 79 |   xKey,
 80 |   yKey,
 81 |   aggregation = "count",
 82 |   limit = 10,
 83 | }) {
 84 |   const groups = new Map();
 85 | 
 86 |   for (const row of rows) {
 87 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
 88 | 
 89 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
 90 |     groups.get(label).push(aggregation === "count" ? label : row[yKey]);
 91 |   }
 92 | 
 93 |   const valueKey = aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey;
 94 | 
 95 |   return [...groups.entries()]
 96 |     .map(([label, values]) => ({
 97 |       [xKey]: label,
 98 |       [valueKey]: round(aggregate(values, aggregation)),
 99 |     }))
100 |     .sort((a, b) => Number(b[valueKey]) - Number(a[valueKey]))
101 |     .slice(0, limit);
102 | }
103 | 
104 | export function buildHistogram({ rows, key, bins = 8 }) {
105 |   const values = rows
106 |     .map((row) => safeNumber(row[key]))
107 |     .filter((value) => value !== null);
108 | 
109 |   if (!values.length) return [];
110 | 
111 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
112 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
113 | 
114 |   if (min === max) {
115 |     return [{ range: String(min), count: values.length }];
116 |   }
117 | 
118 |   const step = (max - min) / bins;
119 |   const buckets = Array.from({ length: bins }, (_, index) => ({
120 |     start: min + index * step,
121 |     end: index === bins - 1 ? max : min + (index + 1) * step,
122 |     count: 0,
123 |   }));
124 | 
125 |   for (const value of values) {
126 |     const index = Math.min(Math.floor((value - min) / step), bins - 1);
127 |     buckets[index].count += 1;
128 |   }
129 | 
130 |   return buckets.map((bucket) => ({
131 |     range: `${Math.round(bucket.start)}-${Math.round(bucket.end)}`,
132 |     count: bucket.count,
133 |   }));
134 | }
135 | 
136 | export function buildScatter({ rows, xKey, yKey, limit = 250 }) {
137 |   return rows
138 |     .map((row) => ({
139 |       [xKey]: safeNumber(row[xKey]),
140 |       [yKey]: safeNumber(row[yKey]),
141 |     }))
142 |     .filter((row) => row[xKey] !== null && row[yKey] !== null)
143 |     .slice(0, limit);
144 | }
145 | 
146 | export function buildTimeTrend({
147 |   rows,
148 |   xKey,
149 |   yKey,
150 |   aggregation = "sum",
151 |   limit = 30,
152 | }) {
153 |   const groups = new Map();
154 | 
155 |   for (const row of rows) {
156 |     const time = Date.parse(row[xKey]);
157 |     if (!Number.isFinite(time)) continue;
158 | 
159 |     const label = new Date(time).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
160 | 
161 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
162 |     groups.get(label).push(row[yKey]);
163 |   }
164 | 
165 |   return [...groups.entries()]
166 |     .map(([date, values]) => ({
167 |       [xKey]: date,
168 |       [yKey]: round(aggregate(values, aggregation)),
169 |     }))
170 |     .sort((a, b) => String(a[xKey]).localeCompare(String(b[xKey])))
171 |     .slice(-limit);
172 | }
173 | 
174 | export function buildKpiFromSpec(rows = [], kpiSpec = {}) {
175 |   const aggregation = kpiSpec.aggregation || "count";
176 | 
177 |   let value;
178 | 
179 |   if (aggregation === "count" && !kpiSpec.metric) {
180 |     value = rows.length;
181 |   } else {
182 |     value = aggregate(
183 |       rows.map((row) => row[kpiSpec.metric]),
184 |       aggregation
185 |     );
186 |   }
187 | 
188 |   return {
189 |     id: kpiSpec.id || randomUUID(),
190 |     title: kpiSpec.title || "KPI",
191 |     value: formatNumber(round(value)),
192 |     subtitle: aggregation,
193 |     metric: kpiSpec.metric || null,
194 |     aggregation,
195 |     format: kpiSpec.format || "number",
196 |   };
197 | }
198 | 
199 | export function buildChartFromSpec(rows = [], chartSpec = {}) {
200 |   const type = chartSpec.type || "bar";
201 |   const xKey = chartSpec.xKey;
202 |   const yKey = chartSpec.yKey;
203 |   const aggregation = chartSpec.aggregation || "count";
204 |   const limit = chartSpec.limit || 10;
205 | 
206 |   let data = [];
207 | 
208 |   if (type === "histogram") {
209 |     data = buildHistogram({
210 |       rows,
211 |       key: yKey || xKey,
212 |       bins: limit,
213 |     });
214 | 
215 |     return {
216 |       id: chartSpec.id || randomUUID(),
217 |       type,
218 |       title: chartSpec.title || `${xKey} Distribution`,
219 |       xKey: "range",
220 |       yKey: "count",
221 |       aggregation: "count",
222 |       data,
223 |     };
224 |   }
225 | 
226 |   if (type === "scatter" && xKey && yKey) {
227 |     data = buildScatter({
228 |       rows,
229 |       xKey,
230 |       yKey,
231 |       limit,
232 |     });
233 | 
234 |     return {
235 |       id: chartSpec.id || randomUUID(),
236 |       type,
237 |       title: chartSpec.title || `${xKey} vs ${yKey}`,
238 |       xKey,
239 |       yKey,
240 |       aggregation: "raw",
241 |       data,
242 |     };
243 |   }
244 | 
245 |   if ((type === "line" || type === "area") && xKey && yKey) {
246 |     data = buildTimeTrend({
247 |       rows,
248 |       xKey,
249 |       yKey,
250 |       aggregation,
251 |       limit,
252 |     });
253 | 
254 |     return {
255 |       id: chartSpec.id || randomUUID(),
256 |       type,
257 |       title: chartSpec.title || `${yKey} Trend`,
258 |       xKey,
259 |       yKey,
260 |       aggregation,
261 |       data,
262 |     };
263 |   }
264 | 
265 |   data = groupByAggregate({
266 |     rows,
267 |     xKey,
268 |     yKey: yKey || xKey,
269 |     aggregation,
270 |     limit,
271 |   });
272 | 
273 |   return {
274 |     id: chartSpec.id || randomUUID(),
275 |     type,
276 |     title: chartSpec.title || `${aggregation} by ${xKey}`,
277 |     xKey,
278 |     yKey: aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey,
279 |     aggregation,
280 |     data,
281 |   };
282 | }
283 | 
284 | export function buildDashboardFromPlan({
285 |   rows = [],
286 |   filters = {},
287 |   dashboardPlan = {},
288 | }) {
289 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
290 |   const filteredRows = applyFilters(cleanRows, filters);
291 | 
292 |   const kpis = (dashboardPlan.kpis || [])
293 |     .map((spec) => buildKpiFromSpec(filteredRows, spec))
294 |     .filter(Boolean);
295 | 
296 |   const charts = (dashboardPlan.charts || [])
297 |     .map((spec) => buildChartFromSpec(filteredRows, spec))
298 |     .filter((chart) => chart && chart.data && chart.data.length);
299 | 
300 |   return {
301 |     rows: filteredRows,
302 |     kpis,
303 |     charts,
304 |     filters,
305 |   };
306 | }
307 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/dashboard/dashboardFixEngine.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/dashboard/dashboardFixEngine.js`

```js
 1 | import { generateSchemaProfile } from "./schemaProfiler.js";
 2 | import { planDashboardWithAI } from "../ai/dashboardPlanner.js";
 3 | import { buildDashboardFromPlan } from "./dashboardAnalytics.js";
 4 | 
 5 | export async function validateAndFixDashboard({
 6 |   rows = [],
 7 |   dataDictionary = [],
 8 |   datasetName = "Uploaded Dataset",
 9 |   currentDashboard = {},
10 | }) {
11 |   const schemaProfile = generateSchemaProfile({
12 |     rows,
13 |     dataDictionary,
14 |     datasetName,
15 |   });
16 | 
17 |   const issues = [];
18 | 
19 |   if (!currentDashboard?.kpis?.length) {
20 |     issues.push({
21 |       type: "missing_kpis",
22 |       message: "Dashboard has no KPI cards.",
23 |     });
24 |   }
25 | 
26 |   if (!currentDashboard?.charts?.length) {
27 |     issues.push({
28 |       type: "missing_charts",
29 |       message: "Dashboard has no charts.",
30 |     });
31 |   }
32 | 
33 |   const hasChartDataFromAI = (currentDashboard?.charts || []).some((chart) =>
34 |     Array.isArray(chart?.data)
35 |   );
36 | 
37 |   if (hasChartDataFromAI) {
38 |     issues.push({
39 |       type: "unsafe_chart_data",
40 |       message:
41 |         "Dashboard contained chart data. It was regenerated locally from chart specs.",
42 |     });
43 |   }
44 | 
45 |   const aiPlan = await planDashboardWithAI({
46 |     schemaProfile,
47 |     userQuery:
48 |       "Validate and regenerate a correct dashboard. Use schema only. Create useful KPIs and up to 7 charts.",
49 |     currentDashboard: {
50 |       kpis: currentDashboard.kpis || [],
51 |       charts: (currentDashboard.charts || []).map((chart) => ({
52 |         id: chart.id,
53 |         type: chart.type,
54 |         title: chart.title,
55 |         xKey: chart.xKey,
56 |         yKey: chart.yKey,
57 |         aggregation: chart.aggregation,
58 |       })),
59 |       filters: currentDashboard.filters || {},
60 |     },
61 |   });
62 | 
63 |   const correctedDashboard = buildDashboardFromPlan({
64 |     rows,
65 |     filters: currentDashboard.filters || {},
66 |     dashboardPlan: aiPlan.dashboardPlan,
67 |   });
68 | 
69 |   return {
70 |     action: "FIX_DASHBOARD",
71 |     message: "Dashboard validated and regenerated from schema + local data.",
72 |     schemaOnly: false,
73 |     provider: "local-integrity-engine",
74 |     issues,
75 |     observations: [
76 |       `Rows used locally: ${correctedDashboard.rows.length}`,
77 |       `KPIs generated: ${correctedDashboard.kpis.length}`,
78 |       `Charts generated: ${correctedDashboard.charts.length}`,
79 |       "LLM did not receive raw rows.",
80 |     ],
81 |     correctedDashboard,
82 |   };
83 | }
84 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/dashboard/schemaProfiler.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/dashboard/schemaProfiler.js`

```js
  1 | function normalizeName(value = "") {
  2 |   return String(value)
  3 |     .trim()
  4 |     .toLowerCase()
  5 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_")
  6 |     .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
  7 | }
  8 | 
  9 | function isMissing(value) {
 10 |   return value === null || value === undefined || value === "";
 11 | }
 12 | 
 13 | export function safeNumber(value) {
 14 |   if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
 15 | 
 16 |   const parsed = Number(
 17 |     String(value ?? "")
 18 |       .replace(/[,$₹%\s]/g, "")
 19 |       .trim()
 20 |   );
 21 | 
 22 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
 23 | }
 24 | 
 25 | function isDateLike(value) {
 26 |   if (value instanceof Date) return true;
 27 |   if (typeof value !== "string") return false;
 28 |   if (!/\d/.test(value)) return false;
 29 | 
 30 |   const time = Date.parse(value);
 31 |   return Number.isFinite(time);
 32 | }
 33 | 
 34 | export function cleanDatasetRows(rows = []) {
 35 |   return rows.filter((row) => {
 36 |     const keys = Object.keys(row || {}).map(normalizeName);
 37 |     const source = String(
 38 |       row?._sourceFile || row?.source || row?.fileName || ""
 39 |     ).toLowerCase();
 40 | 
 41 |     const dictionaryShape =
 42 |       keys.includes("column") &&
 43 |       keys.includes("type") &&
 44 |       keys.includes("description");
 45 | 
 46 |     return !source.includes("dictionary") && !dictionaryShape;
 47 |   });
 48 | }
 49 | 
 50 | function getDictionaryMap(dataDictionary = []) {
 51 |   const map = new Map();
 52 | 
 53 |   for (const row of dataDictionary || []) {
 54 |     const column =
 55 |       row.column ||
 56 |       row.Column ||
 57 |       row.name ||
 58 |       row.Name ||
 59 |       row.field ||
 60 |       row.Field;
 61 | 
 62 |     if (!column) continue;
 63 | 
 64 |     map.set(String(column), {
 65 |       description:
 66 |         row.description ||
 67 |         row.Description ||
 68 |         row.meaning ||
 69 |         row.Meaning ||
 70 |         "",
 71 |       type: row.type || row.Type || "",
 72 |     });
 73 |   }
 74 | 
 75 |   return map;
 76 | }
 77 | 
 78 | function inferRole(name, type, uniqueCount, rowCount) {
 79 |   const lower = name.toLowerCase();
 80 | 
 81 |   if (/id$|_id$|uuid|identifier/.test(lower)) return "id";
 82 |   if (type === "date") return "date";
 83 | 
 84 |   if (
 85 |     type === "number" &&
 86 |     !/age|score|salary|sales|amount|price|revenue|profit|income|hours|level|rating|quantity/i.test(
 87 |       name
 88 |     ) &&
 89 |     uniqueCount > rowCount * 0.7
 90 |   ) {
 91 |     return "id";
 92 |   }
 93 | 
 94 |   if (type === "number") return "metric";
 95 | 
 96 |   if (/comment|review|text|description|summary|message/i.test(name)) {
 97 |     return "text";
 98 |   }
 99 | 
100 |   return "dimension";
101 | }
102 | 
103 | export function generateSchemaProfile({
104 |   rows = [],
105 |   dataDictionary = [],
106 |   datasetName = "Uploaded Dataset",
107 | }) {
108 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
109 |   const dictionary = getDictionaryMap(dataDictionary);
110 | 
111 |   const columnNames = [
112 |     ...new Set(cleanRows.flatMap((row) => Object.keys(row || {}))),
113 |   ].filter((key) => !key.startsWith("__"));
114 | 
115 |   const columns = columnNames.map((name) => {
116 |     const values = cleanRows.map((row) => row[name]);
117 |     const presentValues = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
118 |     const sample = presentValues.slice(0, 300);
119 | 
120 |     const numericCount = sample.filter((value) => safeNumber(value) !== null).length;
121 |     const dateCount = sample.filter(isDateLike).length;
122 | 
123 |     let type = "string";
124 | 
125 |     if (sample.length && numericCount / sample.length >= 0.85) {
126 |       type = "number";
127 |     } else if (sample.length && dateCount / sample.length >= 0.85) {
128 |       type = "date";
129 |     }
130 | 
131 |     const uniqueValues = [
132 |       ...new Set(presentValues.map((value) => String(value).trim())),
133 |     ].filter(Boolean);
134 | 
135 |     const numbers = presentValues
136 |       .map(safeNumber)
137 |       .filter((value) => value !== null)
138 |       .sort((a, b) => a - b);
139 | 
140 |     const stats =
141 |       type === "number" && numbers.length
142 |         ? {
143 |             min: numbers[0],
144 |             max: numbers[numbers.length - 1],
145 |             avg:
146 |               numbers.reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0) /
147 |               numbers.length,
148 |             median:
149 |               numbers.length % 2
150 |                 ? numbers[Math.floor(numbers.length / 2)]
151 |                 : (numbers[numbers.length / 2 - 1] +
152 |                     numbers[numbers.length / 2]) /
153 |                   2,
154 |           }
155 |         : null;
156 | 
157 |     return {
158 |       name,
159 |       type,
160 |       role: inferRole(name, type, uniqueValues.length, cleanRows.length),
161 |       description: dictionary.get(name)?.description || "",
162 |       uniqueCount: uniqueValues.length,
163 |       missingPct: cleanRows.length
164 |         ? Number(
165 |             (((values.length - presentValues.length) / cleanRows.length) * 100).toFixed(2)
166 |           )
167 |         : 0,
168 |       topValues: uniqueValues.slice(0, 12),
169 |       stats,
170 |     };
171 |   });
172 | 
173 |   return {
174 |     datasetName,
175 |     rowCount: cleanRows.length,
176 |     columnCount: columns.length,
177 |     columns,
178 |   };
179 | }
180 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/data-merger.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/data-merger.js`

```js
  1 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  2 | 
  3 | function normalizeColumnName(name) {
  4 |   if (!name || typeof name !== 'string') return name;
  5 |   return name.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/\s+/g, '_').replace(/[^a-z0-9_]/g, '');
  6 | }
  7 | 
  8 | function preprocessRow(row, columnMapping) {
  9 |   const normalized = {};
 10 |   for (const [originalKey, value] of Object.entries(row)) {
 11 |     const newKey = columnMapping[originalKey] || normalizeColumnName(originalKey) || originalKey;
 12 |     normalized[newKey] = value;
 13 |   }
 14 |   return normalized;
 15 | }
 16 | 
 17 | export function mergeDatasets(datasets) {
 18 |   if (!datasets || datasets.length === 0) {
 19 |     return null;
 20 |   }
 21 | 
 22 |   if (datasets.length === 1) {
 23 |     return preprocessSingleDataset(datasets[0]);
 24 |   }
 25 | 
 26 |   const columnMapping = {};
 27 |   const allNormalizedColumns = new Set();
 28 |   const columnTypes = {};
 29 |   
 30 |   datasets.forEach(ds => {
 31 |     (ds.columns || []).forEach(col => {
 32 |       const normalizedName = normalizeColumnName(col.name) || col.name;
 33 |       columnMapping[col.name] = normalizedName;
 34 |       allNormalizedColumns.add(normalizedName);
 35 |       if (!columnTypes[normalizedName]) {
 36 |         columnTypes[normalizedName] = col.type;
 37 |       } else if (columnTypes[normalizedName] !== col.type) {
 38 |         columnTypes[normalizedName] = inferMergedType(columnTypes[normalizedName], col.type);
 39 |       }
 40 |     });
 41 |   });
 42 | 
 43 |   const mergedColumns = Array.from(allNormalizedColumns).map(name => ({
 44 |     name,
 45 |     type: columnTypes[name] || 'string',
 46 |     sample: []
 47 |   }));
 48 | 
 49 |   if (datasets.length > 1) {
 50 |     mergedColumns.push({
 51 |       name: '__sourceFile',
 52 |       type: 'string',
 53 |       sample: datasets.slice(0, 3).map(d => d.name || 'unknown')
 54 |     });
 55 |   }
 56 | 
 57 |   const allRows = [];
 58 |   datasets.forEach(ds => {
 59 |     const sourceName = ds.name || 'unknown';
 60 |     (ds.rows || []).forEach(row => {
 61 |       const normalizedRow = preprocessRow(row, columnMapping);
 62 |       allRows.push({ ...normalizedRow, __sourceFile: sourceName });
 63 |     });
 64 |   });
 65 | 
 66 |   let rowId = 0;
 67 |   const finalRows = allRows.map(row => {
 68 |     const newRow = { __rowId: rowId++ };
 69 |     allNormalizedColumns.forEach(col => {
 70 |       newRow[col] = row[col] ?? null;
 71 |     });
 72 |     if (row.__sourceFile) {
 73 |       newRow.__sourceFile = row.__sourceFile;
 74 |     }
 75 |     return newRow;
 76 |   });
 77 | 
 78 |   const mergedName = datasets.length > 1 
 79 |     ? `Combined (${datasets.map(d => normalizeColumnName(d.name) || 'Data').join(', ')})`
 80 |     : normalizeColumnName(datasets[0]?.name) || 'Merged Dataset';
 81 | 
 82 |   return {
 83 |     id: randomUUID(),
 84 |     name: mergedName,
 85 |     columns: mergedColumns,
 86 |     rows: finalRows,
 87 |     rowCount: finalRows.length,
 88 |     sourceType: 'merged',
 89 |     uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 90 |     sourceFiles: datasets.map(d => d.name || 'Unknown'),
 91 |     _metadata: {
 92 |       originalDatasets: datasets.length,
 93 |       totalRows: finalRows.length,
 94 |       mergedAt: new Date().toISOString()
 95 |     }
 96 |   };
 97 | }
 98 | 
 99 | function preprocessSingleDataset(dataset) {
100 |   if (!dataset) return dataset;
101 |   const columnMapping = {};
102 |   const normalizedColumns = (dataset.columns || []).map(col => {
103 |     const normalizedName = normalizeColumnName(col.name) || col.name;
104 |     columnMapping[col.name] = normalizedName;
105 |     return { ...col, name: normalizedName };
106 |   });
107 |   const normalizedRows = (dataset.rows || []).map(row => preprocessRow(row, columnMapping));
108 |   return {
109 |     ...dataset,
110 |     columns: normalizedColumns,
111 |     rows: normalizedRows,
112 |     rowCount: normalizedRows.length
113 |   };
114 | }
115 | 
116 | function inferMergedType(type1, type2) {
117 |   if (type1 === type2) return type1;
118 |   if (type1 === 'number' || type2 === 'number') return 'number';
119 |   if (type1 === 'date' || type2 === 'date') return 'date';
120 |   return 'string';
121 | }
122 | 
123 | export function detectCompatibleColumns(datasets) {
124 |   const columnMap = new Map();
125 |   
126 |   datasets.forEach(ds => {
127 |     (ds.columns || []).forEach(col => {
128 |       if (!columnMap.has(col.name)) {
129 |         columnMap.set(col.name, {
130 |           name: col.name,
131 |           type: col.type,
132 |           sources: new Set()
133 |         });
134 |       }
135 |       const entry = columnMap.get(col.name);
136 |       entry.sources.add(ds.name || 'unknown');
137 |       if (entry.type !== col.type) {
138 |         entry.type = inferMergedType(entry.type, col.type);
139 |       }
140 |     });
141 |   });
142 | 
143 |   return Array.from(columnMap.values()).map(entry => ({
144 |     name: entry.name,
145 |     type: entry.type,
146 |     appearsIn: entry.sources.size,
147 |     isCommon: entry.sources.size === datasets.length
148 |   }));
149 | }
150 | 
151 | export function buildUnifiedSchema(datasets) {
152 |   if (!datasets || datasets.length === 0) {
153 |     return null;
154 |   }
155 | 
156 |   const merged = mergeDatasets(datasets);
157 |   const compatibleColumns = detectCompatibleColumns(datasets);
158 | 
159 |   return {
160 |     mergedDataset: merged,
161 |     columnAnalysis: compatibleColumns,
162 |     summary: {
163 |       totalDatasets: datasets.length,
164 |       totalColumns: compatibleColumns.length,
165 |       commonColumns: compatibleColumns.filter(c => c.isCommon).length,
166 |       uniqueColumns: compatibleColumns.filter(c => !c.isCommon).length
167 |     },
168 |     detectedDataTypes: detectDataTypes(compatibleColumns, merged.rows)
169 |   };
170 | }
171 | 
172 | function detectDataTypes(columns, rows) {
173 |   const types = {
174 |     SALES: ['revenue', 'sales', 'profit', 'amount', 'quantity', 'units', 'orders', 'customer', 'region', 'category', 'product'],
175 |     INVENTORY: ['inventory', 'stock', 'sku', 'warehouse', 'reorder'],
176 |     MARKETING: ['campaign', 'impression', 'click', 'conversion', 'ctr', 'cost', 'lead'],
177 |     HR: ['employee', 'salary', 'department', 'hire', 'performance'],
178 |     FINANCE: ['expense', 'budget', 'income', 'balance', 'asset', 'liability']
179 |   };
180 | 
181 |   const columnNames = columns.map(c => c.name.toLowerCase());
182 |   const detected = [];
183 | 
184 |   for (const [dataType, keywords] of Object.entries(types)) {
185 |     const matches = keywords.filter(kw => columnNames.some(cn => cn.includes(kw)));
186 |     if (matches.length >= 2) {
187 |       detected.push({ type: dataType, confidence: matches.length / keywords.length, matches });
188 |     }
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   return detected.sort((a, b) => b.confidence - a.confidence);
192 | }
193 | 
194 | export default { mergeDatasets, detectCompatibleColumns, buildUnifiedSchema };
195 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/data-sampling-service.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/data-sampling-service.js`

```js
 1 | /**
 2 |  * Data Sampling Service
 3 |  * Efficient sampling for large datasets
 4 |  */
 5 | 
 6 | export function stratifiedSample(rows, sampleSize = 1000) {
 7 |   if (rows.length <= sampleSize) return rows;
 8 | 
 9 |   const sampled = [];
10 |   const step = Math.floor(rows.length / sampleSize);
11 | 
12 |   for (let i = 0; i < rows.length; i += step) {
13 |     if (sampled.length < sampleSize) {
14 |       sampled.push(rows[i]);
15 |     }
16 |   }
17 | 
18 |   return sampled;
19 | }
20 | 
21 | export function randomSample(rows, sampleSize = 1000) {
22 |   if (rows.length <= sampleSize) return rows;
23 | 
24 |   const sampled = [];
25 |   const indices = new Set();
26 | 
27 |   while (sampled.length < sampleSize) {
28 |     const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * rows.length);
29 |     if (!indices.has(idx)) {
30 |       indices.add(idx);
31 |       sampled.push(rows[idx]);
32 |     }
33 |   }
34 | 
35 |   return sampled;
36 | }
37 | 
38 | export function clusteredSample(rows, columns, sampleSize = 1000) {
39 |   if (rows.length <= sampleSize) return rows;
40 | 
41 |   const groups = {};
42 |   const catCol = columns.find(c => c.type === "string");
43 | 
44 |   if (!catCol) return randomSample(rows, sampleSize);
45 | 
46 |   rows.forEach((row, idx) => {
47 |     const key = row[catCol.name];
48 |     if (!groups[key]) groups[key] = [];
49 |     groups[key].push(idx);
50 |   });
51 | 
52 |   const groupSize = Math.floor(sampleSize / Object.keys(groups).length);
53 |   const sampled = [];
54 | 
55 |   for (const groupIndices of Object.values(groups)) {
56 |     for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(groupSize, groupIndices.length); i++) {
57 |       sampled.push(rows[groupIndices[i]]);
58 |     }
59 |   }
60 | 
61 |   return sampled.slice(0, sampleSize);
62 | }
```
