```tsx
   1 | import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
   2 | import { Link } from "react-router-dom";
   3 | import {
   4 |   Activity,
   5 |   AlertCircle,
   6 |   BarChart3,
   7 |   Brain,
   8 |   CheckCircle2,
   9 |   Cloud,
  10 |   Compass,
  11 |   Cpu,
  12 |   Database,
  13 |   FileText,
  14 |   Grid,
  15 |   Info,
  16 |   RefreshCw,
  17 |   Server,
  18 |   ShieldAlert,
  19 |   Sparkles,
  20 |   TrendingUp,
  21 |   UploadCloud,
  22 |   Plus,
  23 |   Trash2,
  24 |   Play,
  25 |   Check,
  26 |   Award,
  27 | } from "lucide-react";
  28 | import { api, type AgenticConfigResponse, type AgenticHealthResponse } from "@/features/data/api/dataApi";
  29 | import { schemaTrainedApi } from "@/features/data/api/schemaTrainedApi.additions";
  30 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
  31 | 
  32 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur-md p-6";
  33 | 
  34 | export default function AgenticPage() {
  35 |   const { dataset, isHydrating, loadDemo } = useData();
  36 |   const [config, setConfig] = useState<AgenticConfigResponse | null>(null);
  37 |   const [health, setHealth] = useState<AgenticHealthResponse | null>(null);
  38 |   const [loadingMetadata, setLoadingMetadata] = useState(false);
  39 |   const [loadingAnalysis, setLoadingAnalysis] = useState(false);
  40 |   const [analysisError, setAnalysisError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  41 |   const [analysisResult, setAnalysisResult] = useState<any>(null);
  42 |   
  43 |   // Tab control: "orchestrator" vs "training"
  44 |   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<"orchestrator" | "training">("orchestrator");
  45 | 
  46 |   // User input goal
  47 |   const [goal, setGoal] = useState(
  48 |     "Create an executive analytics dashboard with KPIs, trends, anomalies, risks, recommendations, and chart suggestions."
  49 |   );
  50 | 
  51 |   // Training Studio States
  52 |   const [trainingNotes, setTrainingNotes] = useState("");
  53 |   const [trainingRating, setTrainingRating] = useState<"good" | "bad">("good");
  54 |   const [isTrainingLlm, setIsTrainingLlm] = useState(false);
  55 |   const [isTrainingRag, setIsTrainingRag] = useState(false);
  56 |   const [trainingError, setTrainingError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  57 |   const [trainingSuccess, setTrainingSuccess] = useState<string | null>(null);
  58 | 
  59 |   // Memory Diagnostics States
  60 |   const [schemaMemoryStats, setSchemaMemoryStats] = useState<any>(null);
  61 |   const [schemaMemoryRecords, setSchemaMemoryRecords] = useState<any[]>([]);
  62 |   const [schemaRagStats, setSchemaRagStats] = useState<any>(null);
  63 |   const [schemaRagRecords, setSchemaRagRecords] = useState<any[]>([]);
  64 |   const [loadingDiagnostics, setLoadingDiagnostics] = useState(false);
  65 | 
  66 |   // Interactive Schema Predictor Simulator States
  67 |   const [simName, setSimName] = useState("Custom Workforce Schema");
  68 |   const [simColumns, setSimColumns] = useState<Array<{ name: string; type: string; role: string }>>([
  69 |     { name: "employee_id", type: "string", role: "id" },
  70 |     { name: "salary_usd", type: "number", role: "money_metric" },
  71 |     { name: "performance_score", type: "number", role: "score_metric" },
  72 |     { name: "experience_years", type: "number", role: "continuous_metric" },
  73 |     { name: "department", type: "string", role: "category" },
  74 |     { name: "location_country", type: "string", role: "location" }
  75 |   ]);
  76 |   const [isSimulating, setIsSimulating] = useState(false);
  77 |   const [simResult, setSimResult] = useState<any>(null);
  78 |   const [simError, setSimError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  79 | 
  80 |   // Load backend config & health status
  81 |   const fetchMetadata = async () => {
  82 |     setLoadingMetadata(true);
  83 |     try {
  84 |       const [configData, healthData] = await Promise.all([
  85 |         api.getAgenticConfig(),
  86 |         api.getAgenticHealth(),
  87 |       ]);
  88 |       setConfig(configData);
  89 |       setHealth(healthData);
  90 |     } catch (err) {
  91 |       console.error("Failed to load agentic models metadata:", err);
  92 |     } finally {
  93 |       setLoadingMetadata(false);
  94 |     }
  95 |   };
  96 | 
  97 |   useEffect(() => {
  98 |     void fetchMetadata();
  99 |   }, []);
 100 | 
 101 |   // Fetch training database info and records
 102 |   const fetchTrainingDiagnostics = async () => {
 103 |     setLoadingDiagnostics(true);
 104 |     try {
 105 |       const [trainMem, ragMem] = await Promise.all([
 106 |         schemaTrainedApi.getSchemaTrainingMemory(),
 107 |         schemaTrainedApi.getSchemaRagMemory(),
 108 |       ]);
 109 |       
 110 |       const tStats = (trainMem as any)?.stats || null;
 111 |       const tRecords = (trainMem as any)?.memory || [];
 112 |       const rStats = (ragMem as any)?.stats || null;
 113 |       const rRecords = (ragMem as any)?.memory || [];
 114 | 
 115 |       setSchemaMemoryStats(tStats);
 116 |       setSchemaMemoryRecords(tRecords);
 117 |       setSchemaRagStats(rStats);
 118 |       setSchemaRagRecords(rRecords);
 119 |     } catch (err) {
 120 |       console.error("Failed to fetch memory diagnostics:", err);
 121 |     } finally {
 122 |       setLoadingDiagnostics(false);
 123 |     }
 124 |   };
 125 | 
 126 |   // Run agentic analysis
 127 |   const handleRunAnalysis = async () => {
 128 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
 129 |     setLoadingAnalysis(true);
 130 |     setAnalysisError(null);
 131 |     setAnalysisResult(null);
 132 | 
 133 |     try {
 134 |       const result = await api.runAgenticAnalysis(dataset.id, goal);
 135 |       setAnalysisResult(result);
 136 |       // Refresh health check in case model loading state changed
 137 |       void fetchMetadata();
 138 |     } catch (err: any) {
 139 |       console.error("Agentic analysis error:", err);
 140 |       setAnalysisError(err?.message || "Agentic analysis request failed");
 141 |     } finally {
 142 |       setLoadingAnalysis(false);
 143 |     }
 144 |   };
 145 | 
 146 |   // Train LLM Schema Predictor
 147 |   const handleTrainLlm = async () => {
 148 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
 149 |     setIsTrainingLlm(true);
 150 |     setTrainingError(null);
 151 |     setTrainingSuccess(null);
 152 |     try {
 153 |       const planToTrain = analysisResult?.dashboard || { kpis: [], charts: [] };
 154 |       await schemaTrainedApi.trainSchemaDashboard(dataset.id, {
 155 |         name: dataset.name,
 156 |         rows: dataset.rows,
 157 |         columns: dataset.columns,
 158 |         dashboardPlan: planToTrain,
 159 |         rating: trainingRating,
 160 |         notes: trainingNotes || `Trained pattern from Active Dataset ${dataset.name}`,
 161 |       } as any);
 162 |       setTrainingSuccess("Success! LLM Schema Predictor has saved signature and trained mapping rules.");
 163 |       void fetchTrainingDiagnostics();
 164 |     } catch (err: any) {
 165 |       setTrainingError(err.message || "LLM Schema Predictor training failed");
 166 |     } finally {
 167 |       setIsTrainingLlm(false);
 168 |     }
 169 |   };
 170 | 
 171 |   // Train Schema RAG Memory
 172 |   const handleTrainRag = async () => {
 173 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
 174 |     setIsTrainingRag(true);
 175 |     setTrainingError(null);
 176 |     setTrainingSuccess(null);
 177 |     try {
 178 |       const planToTrain = analysisResult?.dashboard || { kpis: [], charts: [] };
 179 |       const checkOllama = health?.checks?.some(c => c.model === "nomic-embed-text:latest" && c.installed) ?? false;
 180 |       await schemaTrainedApi.trainCurrentDashboardPattern(dataset.id, {
 181 |         dashboardPlan: planToTrain,
 182 |         rating: trainingRating,
 183 |         notes: trainingNotes || `RAG Embedding saved for ${dataset.name}`,
 184 |         useOllama: checkOllama,
 185 |       });
 186 |       setTrainingSuccess("Success! Schema RAG memory trained and vector generated.");
 187 |       void fetchTrainingDiagnostics();
 188 |     } catch (err: any) {
 189 |       setTrainingError(err.message || "RAG Embedding training failed");
 190 |     } finally {
 191 |       setIsTrainingRag(false);
 192 |     }
 193 |   };
 194 | 
 195 |   // Run Schema Prediction Simulation (No rows, only schema columns)
 196 |   const handleRunSimulation = async () => {
 197 |     setIsSimulating(true);
 198 |     setSimError(null);
 199 |     setSimResult(null);
 200 |     try {
 201 |       const response = await schemaTrainedApi.generateSchemaDashboard("simulated-dataset", {
 202 |         name: simName,
 203 |         columns: simColumns.map(c => ({ name: c.name, type: c.type, role: c.role })),
 204 |         rows: [], // Zero rows, forces schema-only prediction
 205 |         useLlm: true,
 206 |       } as any);
 207 |       setSimResult(response);
 208 |     } catch (err: any) {
 209 |       setSimError(err.message || "Simulation prediction failed");
 210 |     } finally {
 211 |       setIsSimulating(false);
 212 |     }
 213 |   };
 214 | 
 215 |   // Edit simulation columns helpers
 216 |   const addSimColumn = () => {
 217 |     setSimColumns([...simColumns, { name: "new_field", type: "string", role: "text" }]);
 218 |   };
 219 | 
 220 |   const removeSimColumn = (index: number) => {
 221 |     setSimColumns(simColumns.filter((_, idx) => idx !== index));
 222 |   };
 223 | 
 224 |   const updateSimColumn = (index: number, key: "name" | "type" | "role", value: string) => {
 225 |     setSimColumns(
 226 |       simColumns.map((col, idx) => (idx === index ? { ...col, [key]: value } : col))
 227 |     );
 228 |   };
 229 | 
 230 |   // Safe checks for rendering arrays or values
 231 |   const safeArray = (arr: any) => (Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : []);
 232 |   const safeText = (txt: any, fallback = "-") => (typeof txt === "string" || typeof txt === "number" ? String(txt) : fallback);
 233 | 
 234 |   if (isHydrating) {
 235 |     return (
 236 |       <div className="flex min-h-[60vh] flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center text-slate-300">
 237 |         <RefreshCw className="size-10 animate-spin text-violet-500" />
 238 |         <p className="mt-4 font-medium">Synchronizing application state...</p>
 239 |       </div>
 240 |     );
 241 |   }
 242 | 
 243 |   return (
 244 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
 245 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1400px] space-y-6">
 246 |         
 247 |         {/* Header */}
 248 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between border-b border-slate-800/70 pb-5">
 249 |           <div>
 250 |             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-violet-400 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase">
 251 |               <Sparkles className="size-4" />
 252 |               Multi-Agent Orchestration
 253 |             </div>
 254 |             <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-100">
 255 |               Agentic AI Analytics
 256 |             </h1>
 257 |             <p className="mt-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400">
 258 |               Specialized local LLM agents cooperating to design schema-safe dashboards without sending data to the cloud.
 259 |             </p>
 260 |           </div>
 261 |           <button
 262 |             type="button"
 263 |             onClick={fetchMetadata}
 264 |             disabled={loadingMetadata}
 265 |             className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-200 transition hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-50"
 266 |           >
 267 |             <RefreshCw className={`size-4 ${loadingMetadata ? "animate-spin" : ""}`} />
 268 |             Refresh Agents
 269 |           </button>
 270 |         </header>
 271 | 
 272 |         {/* Core UX Disclaimer Banner */}
 273 |         <div className="flex items-start gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-violet-500/30 bg-violet-500/10 p-5 shadow-inner">
 274 |           <Info className="size-5 shrink-0 text-violet-400 mt-0.5" />
 275 |           <div>
 276 |             <h3 className="font-bold text-violet-200 text-sm">Deterministic Analytics Enforcement</h3>
 277 |             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">
 278 |               <strong>LLMs plan, validate, and explain. Real KPI values are calculated deterministically from dataset rows.</strong> The system strictly profiles columns and passes metadata only to the schema analyst, completely preventing the LLM from hallucinating values.
 279 |             </p>
 280 |           </div>
 281 |         </div>
 282 | 
 283 |         {/* Tab Selection */}
 284 |         <div className="flex border-b border-slate-800 gap-1 mt-2">
 285 |           <button
 286 |             type="button"
 287 |             onClick={() => setActiveTab("orchestrator")}
 288 |             className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-sm transition-all border-b-2 ${
 289 |               activeTab === "orchestrator"
 290 |                 ? "border-violet-500 text-violet-400 bg-slate-900/40"
 291 |                 : "border-transparent text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-900/20"
 292 |             } rounded-t-xl`}
 293 |           >
 294 |             <Sparkles className="size-4" />
 295 |             Agent Orchestrator
 296 |           </button>
 297 |           <button
 298 |             type="button"
 299 |             onClick={() => {
 300 |               setActiveTab("training");
 301 |               void fetchTrainingDiagnostics();
 302 |             }}
 303 |             className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-sm transition-all border-b-2 ${
 304 |               activeTab === "training"
 305 |                 ? "border-violet-500 text-violet-400 bg-slate-900/40"
 306 |                 : "border-transparent text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-900/20"
 307 |             } rounded-t-xl`}
 308 |           >
 309 |             <Brain className="size-4" />
 310 |             RAG & Schema Training Studio
 311 |           </button>
 312 |         </div>
 313 | 
 314 |         {/* Tab Panel Render */}
 315 |         {activeTab === "orchestrator" ? (
 316 |           /* Main Grid Layout - Orchestrator */
 317 |           <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3">
 318 |             
 319 |             {/* Sidebar Area: Config and Health Status */}
 320 |             <div className="space-y-6 lg:col-span-1">
 321 |               
 322 |               {/* Active Selected Dataset */}
 323 |               <div className={CARD}>
 324 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 325 |                   <Database className="size-4 text-blue-400" />
 326 |                   Active Dataset
 327 |                 </h2>
 328 |                 {dataset ? (
 329 |                   <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
 330 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/60 rounded-xl p-3.5 border border-slate-800/80">
 331 |                       <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Dataset Name</p>
 332 |                       <p className="font-semibold text-white truncate text-sm mt-0.5">{dataset.name}</p>
 333 |                     </div>
 334 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/60 rounded-xl p-3.5 border border-slate-800/80">
 335 |                       <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">UUID/Identity</p>
 336 |                       <p className="font-mono text-slate-300 truncate text-xs mt-1">{dataset.id}</p>
 337 |                     </div>
 338 |                     <div className="flex gap-4 mt-2 text-xs text-slate-400 px-1">
 339 |                       <span>{dataset.rows?.length?.toLocaleString() || 0} Rows</span>
 340 |                       <span>•</span>
 341 |                       <span>{dataset.columns?.length || 0} Columns</span>
 342 |                     </div>
 343 |                   </div>
 344 |                 ) : (
 345 |                   <div className="mt-4 text-center py-6">
 346 |                     <UploadCloud className="size-10 mx-auto text-slate-500" />
 347 |                     <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-400">No active dataset is loaded.</p>
 348 |                     <div className="mt-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
 349 |                       <button
 350 |                         type="button"
 351 |                         onClick={() => void loadDemo()}
 352 |                         className="w-full rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:bg-violet-500 transition shadow"
 353 |                       >
 354 |                         Load Demo Dataset
 355 |                       </button>
 356 |                       <Link
 357 |                         to="/upload"
 358 |                         className="w-full text-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-700 transition"
 359 |                       >
 360 |                         Upload Files
 361 |                       </Link>
 362 |                     </div>
 363 |                   </div>
 364 |                 )}
 365 |               </div>
 366 | 
 367 |               {/* Model Health Checklist */}
 368 |               <div className={CARD}>
 369 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 370 |                   <Activity className="size-4 text-emerald-400" />
 371 |                   Model Registry Health
 372 |                 </h2>
 373 |                 <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">
 374 |                   Availability of specialized local Ollama models.
 375 |                 </p>
 376 |                 
 377 |                 <div className="mt-4 space-y-2 max-h-[360px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
 378 |                   {health?.checks ? (
 379 |                     health.checks.map((item) => (
 380 |                       <div
 381 |                         key={item.model}
 382 |                         className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-880 p-2.5 hover:bg-slate-950/70 transition"
 383 |                       >
 384 |                         <div className="truncate pr-2">
 385 |                           <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-200 truncate">{item.model}</p>
 386 |                           <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono mt-0.5">
 387 |                             {item.model.includes("cloud") ? "Cloud reasoning endpoint" : "Local Ollama instance"}
 388 |                           </p>
 389 |                         </div>
 390 |                         <span
 391 |                           className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 ${
 392 |                             item.installed
 393 |                               ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-300 border border-emerald-500/30"
 394 |                               : "bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 border border-amber-500/30"
 395 |                           }`}
 396 |                         >
 397 |                           {item.installed ? (
 398 |                             <>
 399 |                               <CheckCircle2 className="size-3 text-emerald-400" />
 400 |                               Ready
 401 |                             </>
 402 |                           ) : (
 403 |                             <>
 404 |                               <AlertCircle className="size-3 text-amber-400" />
 405 |                               Missing
 406 |                             </>
 407 |                           )}
 408 |                         </span>
 409 |                       </div>
 410 |                     ))
 411 |                   ) : (
 412 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 justify-center py-6 text-slate-500 text-xs">
 413 |                       <Server className="size-4 animate-pulse" />
 414 |                       Querying local registry...
 415 |                     </div>
 416 |                   )}
 417 |                 </div>
 418 |               </div>
 419 | 
 420 |               {/* Model Role Mapping Config */}
 421 |               <div className={CARD}>
 422 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 423 |                   <Server className="size-4 text-purple-400" />
 424 |                   Orchestrator Role Maps
 425 |                 </h2>
 426 |                 <div className="mt-4 space-y-3.5">
 427 |                   {config?.roles ? (
 428 |                     Object.entries(config.roles).map(([role, val]) => (
 429 |                       <div key={role} className="border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-2.5 last:border-b-0 last:pb-0">
 430 |                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 431 |                           <span className="text-[11px] font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono">
 432 |                             {role.replace(/([A-Z])/g, " $1")}
 433 |                           </span>
 434 |                           <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 capitalize bg-slate-950 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-slate-900">
 435 |                             {val.includes("cloud") ? "cloud-agent" : "local-agent"}
 436 |                           </span>
 437 |                         </div>
 438 |                         <p className="text-xs text-slate-200 mt-1 truncate font-semibold font-mono bg-slate-950/40 p-1.5 rounded border border-slate-900">
 439 |                           {val}
 440 |                         </p>
 441 |                       </div>
 442 |                     ))
 443 |                   ) : (
 444 |                     <p className="text-slate-500 text-xs py-4 text-center">Config registry inactive.</p>
 445 |                   )}
 446 |                 </div>
 447 |               </div>
 448 | 
 449 |             </div>
 450 | 
 451 |             {/* Main Action and Results area */}
 452 |             <div className="space-y-6 lg:col-span-2">
 453 |               
 454 |               {/* Input Action Card */}
 455 |               <div className={CARD}>
 456 |                 <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 457 |                   <Brain className="size-5 text-violet-400" />
 458 |                   Define Analysis Goal
 459 |                 </h2>
 460 |                 <p className="text-slate-400 text-xs mt-1">
 461 |                   Tell the orchestrator what you want to discover. The agents will translate this goal into data specs.
 462 |                 </p>
 463 |                 
 464 |                 <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
 465 |                   <textarea
 466 |                     value={goal}
 467 |                     onChange={(e) => setGoal(e.target.value)}
 468 |                     disabled={loadingAnalysis}
 469 |                     placeholder="E.g., Create an executive analytics dashboard focusing on sales volumes, outlier values, and product performance correlations."
 470 |                     className="w-full min-h-[96px] bg-slate-950/80 rounded-xl border border-slate-800 p-4 text-sm text-slate-200 placeholder-slate-600 focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500 transition leading-relaxed disabled:opacity-50"
 471 |                   />
 472 |                   
 473 |                   <button
 474 |                     type="button"
 475 |                     onClick={handleRunAnalysis}
 476 |                     disabled={loadingAnalysis || !dataset}
 477 |                     className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2.5 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-blue-600 hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-blue-500 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 transition duration-200 disabled:opacity-55 disabled:cursor-not-allowed shadow-lg shadow-violet-600/10"
 478 |                   >
 479 |                     {loadingAnalysis ? (
 480 |                       <>
 481 |                         <RefreshCw className="size-4 animate-spin" />
 482 |                         Sequential Local Reasoning Running (This may take up to 2-3 minutes)...
 483 |                       </>
 484 |                     ) : (
 485 |                       <>
 486 |                         <Sparkles className="size-4" />
 487 |                         Run Model-Aware Agentic Analysis
 488 |                       </>
 489 |                     )}
 490 |                   </button>
 491 |                 </div>
 492 |               </div>
 493 | 
 494 |               {/* Loading Timeline State */}
 495 |               {loadingAnalysis && (
 496 |                 <div className={`${CARD} bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-900/60 to-slate-950/80`}>
 497 |                   <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-200 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
 498 |                     <RefreshCw className="size-4 animate-spin text-violet-400" />
 499 |                     Sequential Model Processing Pipeline
 500 |                   </h3>
 501 |                   <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">
 502 |                     Executing CPU inference cycles sequentially. Ollama will load models and fall back gracefully on timeout.
 503 |                   </p>
 504 | 
 505 |                   <div className="mt-6 relative border-l-2 border-slate-800 pl-6 space-y-6">
 506 |                     
 507 |                     <div className="relative">
 508 |                       <span className="absolute -left-[31px] top-0.5 flex size-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-violet-600 animate-pulse">
 509 |                         <span className="size-2 rounded-full bg-white" />
 510 |                       </span>
 511 |                       <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-violet-300 uppercase tracking-wider">Step 1: Schema Analysis</h4>
 512 |                       <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">
 513 |                         Target model: <span className="font-mono text-slate-300">{config?.roles?.schemaAnalyst || "insightflow-strict-schema-analyst:latest"}</span>. Analyzing column schemas and identifying categories/metrics.
 514 |                       </p>
 515 |                     </div>
 516 | 
 517 |                     <div className="relative">
 518 |                       <span className="absolute -left-[31px] top-0.5 flex size-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-800">
 519 |                         <span className="size-2 rounded-full bg-slate-600" />
 520 |                       </span>
 521 |                       <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Step 2: Master planning</h4>
 522 |                       <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
 523 |                         Target model: <span className="font-mono text-slate-400">{config?.roles?.masterPlanner || "insightflow-master:latest"}</span>. Reading schema analyst specs to construct the analytics path.
 524 |                       </p>
 525 |                     </div>
 526 | 
 527 |                     <div className="relative">
 528 |                       <span className="absolute -left-[31px] top-0.5 flex size-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-800">
 529 |                         <span className="size-2 rounded-full bg-slate-600" />
 530 |                       </span>
 531 |                       <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Step 3: Deterministic tool computation</h4>
 532 |                       <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
 533 |                         Mathematical aggregations are running locally on dataset rows to yield absolute values (averages, totals, charts).
 534 |                       </p>
 535 |                     </div>
 536 | 
 537 |                     <div className="relative">
 538 |                       <span className="absolute -left-[31px] top-0.5 flex size-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-800">
 539 |                         <span className="size-2 rounded-full bg-slate-600" />
 540 |                       </span>
 541 |                       <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Step 4: Dashboard Guardian Validation</h4>
 542 |                       <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
 543 |                         Target model: <span className="font-mono text-slate-400">{config?.roles?.dashboardGuardian || "insightflow-dashboard-guardian:latest"}</span>. Verifying that the chart specs match real columns.
 544 |                       </p>
 545 |                     </div>
 546 | 
 547 |                   </div>
 548 |                 </div>
 549 |               )}
 550 | 
 551 |               {/* Error Panel */}
 552 |               {analysisError && (
 553 |                 <div className="rounded-2xl border border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10 p-5 flex items-start gap-3 shadow-lg">
 554 |                   <ShieldAlert className="size-5 shrink-0 text-red-400 mt-0.5" />
 555 |                   <div>
 556 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-red-200 text-sm">Execution Failure</h3>
 557 |                     <p className="text-xs text-slate-300 mt-1 leading-relaxed">{analysisError}</p>
 558 |                   </div>
 559 |                 </div>
 560 |               )}
 561 | 
 562 |               {/* Analysis Results Display */}
 563 |               {analysisResult && (
 564 |                 <div className="space-y-6">
 565 |                   
 566 |                   {/* Final Explanation Section */}
 567 |                   <div className="rounded-2xl border border-blue-500/30 bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-900/10 to-slate-900/60 p-6 shadow-xl">
 568 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-blue-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2">
 569 |                       <Compass className="size-4 text-blue-400" />
 570 |                       Final Executive Explanation
 571 |                     </h3>
 572 |                     <p className="text-slate-300 text-sm mt-3 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
 573 |                       {safeText(
 574 |                         analysisResult.dashboard?.finalExplanation || 
 575 |                         analysisResult.schemaAnalysis?.dashboardGoal || 
 576 |                         "Agentic planning completed successfully. The dashboard has been structured using deterministic layout specs."
 577 |                       )}
 578 |                     </p>
 579 |                   </div>
 580 | 
 581 |                   {/* Audit Trail Section */}
 582 |                   <div className={CARD}>
 583 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
 584 |                       <Activity className="size-4 text-violet-400" />
 585 |                       Agent Collaboration Audit Trail
 586 |                     </h3>
 587 |                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-3.5">
 588 |                       {safeArray(analysisResult.audit).map((step: any, idx: number) => (
 589 |                         <div
 590 |                           key={idx}
 591 |                           className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-850 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-3 hover:bg-slate-950/60 transition"
 592 |                         >
 593 |                           <div className="space-y-1">
 594 |                             <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-500 uppercase font-mono block">
 595 |                               Orchestrator Step
 596 |                             </span>
 597 |                             <h4 className="font-bold text-white text-sm capitalize">
 598 |                               {safeText(step.step).replace(/_/g, " ")}
 599 |                             </h4>
 600 |                             <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono mt-0.5">
 601 |                               <Cpu className="size-3.5 text-slate-500" />
 602 |                               {safeText(step.model)}
 603 |                             </div>
 604 |                           </div>
 605 | 
 606 |                           <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:text-right md:flex-col md:items-end">
 607 |                             <span
 608 |                               className={`flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 ${
 609 |                                 step.status === "ok"
 610 |                                   ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-300 border border-emerald-500/30"
 611 |                                   : "bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 border border-amber-500/30"
 612 |                               }`}
 613 |                             >
 614 |                               {step.status === "ok" ? (
 615 |                                 <>
 616 |                                   <CheckCircle2 className="size-3 text-emerald-400" />
 617 |                                   Completed
 618 |                                 </>
 619 |                               ) : (
 620 |                                 <>
 621 |                                   <AlertCircle className="size-3 text-amber-400" />
 622 |                                   Fallback Triggered
 623 |                                 </>
 624 |                               )}
 625 |                             </span>
 626 |                             {step.error && (
 627 |                               <span className="text-[10px] text-red-300 truncate max-w-[200px]">
 628 |                                 {safeText(step.error)}
 629 |                               </span>
 630 |                             )}
 631 |                           </div>
 632 |                         </div>
 633 |                       ))}
 634 |                     </div>
 635 |                   </div>
 636 | 
 637 |                   {/* Dashboard Guardian Result */}
 638 |                   <div className={CARD}>
 639 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
 640 |                       <ShieldAlert className="size-4 text-emerald-400" />
 641 |                       Dashboard Guardian Validation Spec
 642 |                     </h3>
 643 |                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
 644 |                       <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
 645 |                         <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 p-3.5 rounded-xl">
 646 |                           <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono block">
 647 |                             Validation Result
 648 |                           </span>
 649 |                           <p className="mt-1 font-bold text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm">
 650 |                             <CheckCircle2 className="size-4" />
 651 |                             Passed (Schema-Safe Layout)
 652 |                           </p>
 653 |                         </div>
 654 |                         <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 p-3.5 rounded-xl">
 655 |                           <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono block">
 656 |                             Cloud Status
 657 |                           </span>
 658 |                           <p className="mt-1 font-semibold text-slate-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-1.5">
 659 |                             <Cloud className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
 660 |                             Disabled (Execution local only)
 661 |                           </p>
 662 |                         </div>
 663 |                       </div>
 664 | 
 665 |                       {/* Observations or Issues list */}
 666 |                       {analysisResult.dashboard?.warnings?.length > 0 && (
 667 |                         <div className="bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl p-4">
 668 |                           <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-amber-200 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1">
 669 |                             <AlertCircle className="size-4" />
 670 |                             Guardian Warnings
 671 |                           </h4>
 672 |                           <ul className="mt-2 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-slate-300 list-disc list-inside">
 673 |                             {safeArray(analysisResult.dashboard.warnings).map((warning: any, idx: number) => (
 674 |                               <li key={idx}>{safeText(warning)}</li>
 675 |                             ))}
 676 |                           </ul>
 677 |                         </div>
 678 |                       )}
 679 |                     </div>
 680 |                   </div>
 681 | 
 682 |                   {/* Schema Profile Section */}
 683 |                   <div className={CARD}>
 684 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
 685 |                       <FileText className="size-4 text-blue-400" />
 686 |                       Schema Understanding & Profiles
 687 |                     </h3>
 688 |                     
 689 |                     {analysisResult.profile && (
 690 |                       <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
 691 |                         {/* Grid Counts */}
 692 |                         <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-4 text-center">
 693 |                           <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3">
 694 |                             <span className="text-xl font-extrabold text-white">
 695 |                               {safeText(analysisResult.profile.rowCount)}
 696 |                             </span>
 697 |                             <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase mt-0.5">Rows</p>
 698 |                           </div>
 699 |                           <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3">
 700 |                             <span className="text-xl font-extrabold text-white">
 701 |                               {safeText(analysisResult.profile.columnCount)}
 702 |                             </span>
 703 |                             <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase mt-0.5">Columns</p>
 704 |                           </div>
 705 |                           <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3">
 706 |                             <span className="text-xl font-extrabold text-white">
 707 |                               {safeArray(analysisResult.profile.numericColumns).length}
 708 |                             </span>
 709 |                             <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase mt-0.5">Measures</p>
 710 |                           </div>
 711 |                           <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3">
 712 |                             <span className="text-xl font-extrabold text-white">
 713 |                               {safeArray(analysisResult.profile.categoricalColumns).length + safeArray(analysisResult.profile.dateColumns).length}
 714 |                             </span>
 715 |                             <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase mt-0.5">Dimensions</p>
 716 |                           </div>
 717 |                         </div>
 718 | 
 719 |                         {/* Explicit Columns breakdown */}
 720 |                         <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-3">
 721 |                           <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-350 uppercase tracking-wider">Column Classifications</h4>
 722 |                           
 723 |                           <div className="space-y-2">
 724 |                             <div className="flex items-start gap-2 text-xs">
 725 |                               <span className="font-bold text-slate-400 shrink-0 min-w-[70px]">Dimensions:</span>
 726 |                               <span className="text-slate-200">
 727 |                                 {[
 728 |                                   ...safeArray(analysisResult.profile.categoricalColumns),
 729 |                                   ...safeArray(analysisResult.profile.dateColumns),
 730 |                                 ].join(", ") || "None"}
 731 |                               </span>
 732 |                             </div>
 733 |                             <div className="flex items-start gap-2 text-xs border-t border-slate-800/60 pt-2">
 734 |                               <span className="font-bold text-slate-400 shrink-0 min-w-[70px]">Measures:</span>
 735 |                               <span className="text-slate-200">
 736 |                                 {safeArray(analysisResult.profile.numericColumns).join(", ") || "None"}
 737 |                               </span>
 738 |                             </div>
 739 |                           </div>
 740 |                         </div>
 741 |                       </div>
 742 |                     )}
 743 |                   </div>
 744 | 
 745 |                   {/* Deterministic KPIs Grid */}
 746 |                   <div className={CARD}>
 747 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
 748 |                       <Grid className="size-4 text-purple-400" />
 749 |                       Computed Deterministic KPIs
 750 |                     </h3>
 751 |                     <p className="text-slate-400 text-[11px] mt-1">
 752 |                       These metrics are calculated mathematically using local query aggregation tools.
 753 |                     </p>
 754 |                     
 755 |                     <div className="mt-4 grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
 756 |                       {safeArray(analysisResult.dashboard?.kpis).map((kpi: any, idx: number) => {
 757 |                         const colors = [
 758 |                           "border-blue-500/20 bg-blue-500/5",
 759 |                           "border-purple-500/20 bg-purple-500/5",
 760 |                           "border-cyan-500/20 bg-cyan-500/5",
 761 |                           "border-amber-500/20 bg-amber-500/5",
 762 |                         ];
 763 |                         return (
 764 |                           <div key={idx} className={`rounded-xl border p-4 shadow-sm ${colors[idx % colors.length]}`}>
 765 |                             <p className="text-xs text-slate-450 truncate font-semibold capitalize">
 766 |                               {safeText(kpi.label || kpi.id).replace(/_/g, " ")}
 767 |                             </p>
 768 |                             <p className="mt-2 text-xl font-bold text-white">
 769 |                               {safeText(
 770 |                                 analysisResult.profile?.columns?.find((c: any) => c.name === kpi.field)?.stats?.avg 
 771 |                                   ? Math.round(analysisResult.profile.columns.find((c: any) => c.name === kpi.field).stats.avg).toLocaleString()
 772 |                                   : kpi.id === "rows"
 773 |                                   ? analysisResult.profile?.rowCount?.toLocaleString()
 774 |                                   : kpi.id === "columns"
 775 |                                   ? analysisResult.profile?.columnCount?.toLocaleString()
 776 |                                   : "N/A"
 777 |                               )}
 778 |                             </p>
 779 |                             <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 block mt-1 font-mono uppercase">
 780 |                               Agg: {safeText(kpi.type)}
 781 |                             </span>
 782 |                           </div>
 783 |                         );
 784 |                       })}
 785 |                     </div>
 786 |                   </div>
 787 | 
 788 |                   {/* Deterministic Chart Suggestions */}
 789 |                   <div className={CARD}>
 790 |                     <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
 791 |                       <BarChart3 className="size-4 text-sky-400" />
 792 |                       Recommended Chart Configurations
 793 |                     </h3>
 794 |                     
 795 |                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
 796 |                       {safeArray(analysisResult.dashboard?.charts).map((chart: any, idx: number) => (
 797 |                         <div
 798 |                           key={idx}
 799 |                           className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-850 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between gap-4 hover:bg-slate-950/60 transition"
 800 |                         >
 801 |                           <div className="space-y-1.5 flex-1">
 802 |                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 803 |                               <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider text-sky-400 uppercase font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-sky-500/10 border border-sky-500/25">
 804 |                                 {safeText(chart.type)}
 805 |                               </span>
 806 |                               <h4 className="font-bold text-slate-100 text-sm capitalize">
 807 |                                 {safeText(chart.title)}
 808 |                               </h4>
 809 |                             </div>
 810 |                             <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed pt-1">
 811 |                               {safeText(chart.reason)}
 812 |                             </p>
 813 |                           </div>
 814 | 
 815 |                           <div className="text-xs font-mono text-slate-500 bg-slate-950/60 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-900 shrink-0">
 816 |                             <div>X-Axis: <span className="text-slate-300 font-bold">{safeText(chart.x)}</span></div>
 817 |                             <div className="mt-1">Y-Axis: <span className="text-slate-300 font-bold">{safeText(chart.y)}</span></div>
 818 |                             <div className="mt-1">Agg: <span className="text-slate-400 font-semibold">{safeText(chart.aggregation)}</span></div>
 819 |                           </div>
 820 |                         </div>
 821 |                       ))}
 822 |                     </div>
 823 |                   </div>
 824 | 
 825 |                   {/* recommendations panel */}
 826 |                   {analysisResult.schemaAnalysis?.risks && (
 827 |                     <div className={CARD}>
 828 |                       <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
 829 |                         <TrendingUp className="size-4 text-emerald-400" />
 830 |                         Analytical Recommendations & Risks
 831 |                       </h3>
 832 |                       <div className="mt-4 space-y-3 text-xs text-slate-350">
 833 |                         {safeArray(analysisResult.schemaAnalysis?.risks).map((risk: any, idx: number) => (
 834 |                           <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2">
 835 |                             <AlertCircle className="size-4 text-amber-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
 836 |                             <span className="leading-relaxed">{safeText(risk)}</span>
 837 |                           </div>
 838 |                         ))}
 839 |                       </div>
 840 |                     </div>
 841 |                   )}
 842 | 
 843 |                 </div>
 844 |               )}
 845 | 
 846 |             </div>
 847 | 
 848 |           </div>
 849 |         ) : (
 850 |           /* Main Grid Layout - RAG & Schema Training Studio */
 851 |           <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3">
 852 |             
 853 |             {/* Left Column: Active Schema and Training Controls */}
 854 |             <div className="space-y-6 lg:col-span-1">
 855 |               
 856 |               {/* Active Schema details */}
 857 |               <div className={CARD}>
 858 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 859 |                   <Database className="size-4 text-violet-400" />
 860 |                   Active Dataset Schema
 861 |                 </h2>
 862 |                 
 863 |                 {dataset ? (
 864 |                   <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
 865 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/60 rounded-xl p-3 border border-slate-850">
 866 |                       <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold tracking-wider uppercase font-mono">Dataset Identifier</p>
 867 |                       <p className="font-mono text-xs text-white truncate mt-1">{dataset.name || "Default Data"}</p>
 868 |                     </div>
 869 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/60 rounded-xl p-3 border border-slate-850">
 870 |                       <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold tracking-wider uppercase font-mono">UUID Signature</p>
 871 |                       <p className="font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-300 truncate mt-1">{dataset.id}</p>
 872 |                     </div>
 873 |                     
 874 |                     {/* Columns List View */}
 875 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-850 p-3 rounded-xl">
 876 |                       <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono block mb-2">Column definitions</span>
 877 |                       <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 max-h-[220px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
 878 |                         {safeArray(dataset.columns).map((col: any, idx: number) => {
 879 |                           const name = typeof col === "string" ? col : col.name || col.key;
 880 |                           const role = typeof col === "string" ? "text" : col.role || col.type || "text";
 881 |                           return (
 882 |                             <span key={idx} className="text-[10px] bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 text-slate-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-mono">
 883 |                               {name} <span className="text-slate-500 font-normal">({role})</span>
 884 |                             </span>
 885 |                           );
 886 |                         })}
 887 |                       </div>
 888 |                     </div>
 889 |                   </div>
 890 |                 ) : (
 891 |                   <p className="text-slate-550 text-xs py-4 text-center">Please load a dataset to view its schema.</p>
 892 |                 )}
 893 |               </div>
 894 | 
 895 |               {/* Training Configurations & Rating */}
 896 |               <div className={CARD}>
 897 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 898 |                   <Award className="size-4 text-emerald-400" />
 899 |                   Training Configurations
 900 |                 </h2>
 901 |                 <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
 902 |                   
 903 |                   {/* Pattern Rating Select */}
 904 |                   <div>
 905 |                     <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 font-mono">Pattern Quality Rating</label>
 906 |                     <div className="flex gap-2">
 907 |                       <button
 908 |                         type="button"
 909 |                         onClick={() => setTrainingRating("good")}
 910 |                         className={`flex-1 text-center py-2 text-xs font-bold rounded-xl border transition-all ${
 911 |                           trainingRating === "good"
 912 |                             ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/40"
 913 |                             : "bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-800 text-slate-550 hover:text-slate-300"
 914 |                         }`}
 915 |                       >
 916 |                         Good Match (Standard)
 917 |                       </button>
 918 |                       <button
 919 |                         type="button"
 920 |                         onClick={() => setTrainingRating("bad")}
 921 |                         className={`flex-1 text-center py-2 text-xs font-bold rounded-xl border transition-all ${
 922 |                           trainingRating === "bad"
 923 |                             ? "bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border-amber-500/40"
 924 |                             : "bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-800 text-slate-550 hover:text-slate-300"
 925 |                         }`}
 926 |                       >
 927 |                         Avoid Shape (Negative)
 928 |                       </button>
 929 |                     </div>
 930 |                   </div>
 931 | 
 932 |                   {/* Notes input */}
 933 |                   <div>
 934 |                     <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 font-mono">Feedback Notes</label>
 935 |                     <textarea
 936 |                       value={trainingNotes}
 937 |                       onChange={(e) => setTrainingNotes(e.target.value)}
 938 |                       placeholder="E.g. Workforce salary data containing country details, ideal for bar charts and currency KPIs..."
 939 |                       className="w-full h-20 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3 text-xs text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500"
 940 |                     />
 941 |                   </div>
 942 | 
 943 |                 </div>
 944 |               </div>
 945 | 
 946 |               {/* Action Buttons: LLM training and RAG training */}
 947 |               <div className={CARD}>
 948 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
 949 |                   <Brain className="size-4 text-pink-400" />
 950 |                   Save and Train Model
 951 |                 </h2>
 952 |                 
 953 |                 <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
 954 |                   {/* Train LLM Predictor */}
 955 |                   <button
 956 |                     type="button"
 957 |                     onClick={handleTrainLlm}
 958 |                     disabled={isTrainingLlm || !dataset}
 959 |                     className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-indigo-600 hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-indigo-500 text-white text-xs font-bold py-2.5 px-4 transition disabled:opacity-50"
 960 |                   >
 961 |                     {isTrainingLlm ? (
 962 |                       <>
 963 |                         <RefreshCw className="size-3.5 animate-spin" />
 964 |                         Training Schema Mapping Rules...
 965 |                       </>
 966 |                     ) : (
 967 |                       <>
 968 |                         <Brain className="size-3.5" />
 969 |                         Train LLM Schema Predictor
 970 |                       </>
 971 |                     )}
 972 |                   </button>
 973 | 
 974 |                   {/* Train RAG */}
 975 |                   <button
 976 |                     type="button"
 977 |                     onClick={handleTrainRag}
 978 |                     disabled={isTrainingRag || !dataset}
 979 |                     className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/80 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-200 text-xs font-bold py-2.5 px-4 transition disabled:opacity-50"
 980 |                   >
 981 |                     {isTrainingRag ? (
 982 |                       <>
 983 |                         <RefreshCw className="size-3.5 animate-spin" />
 984 |                         Generating RAG Embeddings...
 985 |                       </>
 986 |                     ) : (
 987 |                       <>
 988 |                         <Server className="size-3.5" />
 989 |                         Train Schema RAG Memory
 990 |                       </>
 991 |                     )}
 992 |                   </button>
 993 | 
 994 |                   {/* Feedback Messages */}
 995 |                   {trainingSuccess && (
 996 |                     <div className="mt-2 text-xs bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 p-3 rounded-xl flex items-start gap-2">
 997 |                       <CheckCircle2 className="size-3.5 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
 998 |                       <span>{trainingSuccess}</span>
 999 |                     </div>
1000 |                   )}
1001 | 
1002 |                   {trainingError && (
1003 |                     <div className="mt-2 text-xs bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 text-red-400 p-3 rounded-xl flex items-start gap-2">
1004 |                       <AlertCircle className="size-3.5 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
1005 |                       <span>{trainingError}</span>
1006 |                     </div>
1007 |                   )}
1008 |                 </div>
1009 |               </div>
1010 | 
1011 |             </div>
1012 | 
1013 |             {/* Right/Middle Column: Stored Memory Diagnostics & Registry Explorer */}
1014 |             <div className="space-y-6 lg:col-span-2">
1015 |               
1016 |               {/* Memory Diagnostics stats */}
1017 |               <div className={CARD}>
1018 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
1019 |                   <Activity className="size-4 text-emerald-400" />
1020 |                   Live Memory Diagnostics
1021 |                 </h2>
1022 |                 
1023 |                 {loadingDiagnostics ? (
1024 |                   <div className="py-6 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-400">
1025 |                     <RefreshCw className="size-4 animate-spin text-emerald-400" />
1026 |                     Connecting to local training databases...
1027 |                   </div>
1028 |                 ) : (
1029 |                   <div className="mt-4 grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
1030 |                     {/* Schema Predictor DB */}
1031 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 p-4 rounded-xl space-y-2">
1032 |                       <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
1033 |                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-200">Schema Predictor DB</h3>
1034 |                         <span className="text-[9px] font-bold text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full uppercase">Online</span>
1035 |                       </div>
1036 |                       <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-450 space-y-1">
1037 |                         <div>Database path: <span className="font-mono text-slate-300">schema-training-memory.json</span></div>
1038 |                         <div>Trained templates: <span className="font-mono text-slate-200 font-bold">{schemaMemoryStats?.count || 0}</span></div>
1039 |                         <div>Trained domains: <span className="text-slate-300 italic">{schemaMemoryStats?.domains ? Object.keys(schemaMemoryStats.domains).join(", ") : "None"}</span></div>
1040 |                       </div>
1041 |                     </div>
1042 | 
1043 |                     {/* RAG Embedding DB */}
1044 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 p-4 rounded-xl space-y-2">
1045 |                       <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
1046 |                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-200">Schema RAG Store</h3>
1047 |                         <span className="text-[9px] font-bold text-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full uppercase">Vector Ready</span>
1048 |                       </div>
1049 |                       <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-450 space-y-1">
1050 |                         <div>Database path: <span className="font-mono text-slate-300">schema-rag-memory.json</span></div>
1051 |                         <div>Vector signatures: <span className="font-mono text-slate-200 font-bold">{schemaRagStats?.total || 0}</span></div>
1052 |                         <div>With embeddings: <span className="font-mono text-slate-200 font-bold">{schemaRagStats?.withEmbeddings || 0}</span></div>
1053 |                       </div>
1054 |                     </div>
1055 |                   </div>
1056 |                 )}
1057 |               </div>
1058 | 
1059 |               {/* Stored Signature Explorer */}
1060 |               <div className={CARD}>
1061 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
1062 |                   <FileText className="size-4 text-blue-400" />
1063 |                   Trained Schema Signature Registry
1064 |                 </h2>
1065 |                 
1066 |                 <div className="mt-4 max-h-[300px] overflow-y-auto space-y-2.5 pr-1">
1067 |                   {schemaMemoryRecords.length > 0 || schemaRagRecords.length > 0 ? (
1068 |                     <>
1069 |                       {schemaMemoryRecords.map((record) => (
1070 |                         <div key={`mem-${record.id}`} className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3.5 hover:bg-slate-950/60 transition flex items-center justify-between gap-3 text-xs">
1071 |                           <div className="truncate">
1072 |                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
1073 |                               <h4 className="font-bold text-slate-250 truncate">{record.name}</h4>
1074 |                               <span className="text-[8px] bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono capitalize">
1075 |                                 {record.domain || "generic"}
1076 |                               </span>
1077 |                             </div>
1078 |                             <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 truncate mt-1">
1079 |                               Notes: {record.notes || "None"}
1080 |                             </p>
1081 |                           </div>
1082 | 
1083 |                           <div className="shrink-0 flex flex-col items-end gap-1 font-mono text-[9px]">
1084 |                             <span className="text-violet-400 bg-violet-500/10 border border-violet-500/20 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">LLM Predictor Match</span>
1085 |                             <span className="text-slate-500">{new Date(record.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
1086 |                           </div>
1087 |                         </div>
1088 |                       ))}
1089 | 
1090 |                       {schemaRagRecords.map((record) => (
1091 |                         <div key={`rag-${record.id}`} className="bg-slate-950/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-3.5 hover:bg-slate-950/60 transition flex items-center justify-between gap-3 text-xs">
1092 |                           <div className="truncate">
1093 |                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
1094 |                               <h4 className="font-bold text-slate-250 truncate">{record.name || "Vector signature"}</h4>
1095 |                               <span className="text-[8px] bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono capitalize">
1096 |                                 {record.domain || "generic"}
1097 |                               </span>
1098 |                             </div>
1099 |                             <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 truncate mt-1">
1100 |                               Notes: {record.notes || "None"}
1101 |                             </p>
1102 |                           </div>
1103 | 
1104 |                           <div className="shrink-0 flex flex-col items-end gap-1 font-mono text-[9px]">
1105 |                             <span className="text-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">RAG Embedding</span>
1106 |                             <span className="text-slate-500">{new Date(record.updatedAt || "").toLocaleDateString()}</span>
1107 |                           </div>
1108 |                         </div>
1109 |                       ))}
1110 |                     </>
1111 |                   ) : (
1112 |                     <div className="py-8 text-center text-slate-500 text-xs">
1113 |                       No trained schema signatures registered in local databases.
1114 |                     </div>
1115 |                   )}
1116 |                 </div>
1117 |               </div>
1118 | 
1119 |               {/* Interactive Schema Predictor Simulator */}
1120 |               <div className={CARD}>
1121 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-3">
1122 |                   <Play className="size-4 text-pink-400" />
1123 |                   Interactive Schema Predictor Simulator
1124 |                 </h2>
1125 |                 
1126 |                 <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-2">
1127 |                   Test the trained LLM model's logic! Setup mock columns below and click Predict to generate analytics dashboards entirely from metadata columns.
1128 |                 </p>
1129 | 
1130 |                 <div className="mt-4 space-y-4">
1131 |                   {/* Schema Info */}
1132 |                   <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
1133 |                     <div>
1134 |                       <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-450 mb-1.5 font-mono">Simulation Title</label>
1135 |                       <input
1136 |                         type="text"
1137 |                         value={simName}
1138 |                         onChange={(e) => setSimName(e.target.value)}
1139 |                         className="w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-2.5 text-xs text-white focus:outline-none"
1140 |                       />
1141 |                     </div>
1142 |                   </div>
1143 | 
1144 |                   {/* Schema fields builder */}
1145 |                   <div className="bg-slate-950/60 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-3">
1146 |                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-850 pb-2">
1147 |                       <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-300">Mock Metadata Fields</h4>
1148 |                       <button
1149 |                         type="button"
1150 |                         onClick={addSimColumn}
1151 |                         className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-violet-600/20 text-violet-400 border border-violet-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-violet-600 hover:text-white transition"
1152 |                       >
1153 |                         <Plus className="size-3" />
1154 |                         Add Field
1155 |                       </button>
1156 |                     </div>
1157 | 
1158 |                     <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[220px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
1159 |                       {simColumns.map((col, idx) => (
1160 |                         <div key={idx} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-slate-950 p-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-900">
1161 |                           <input
1162 |                             type="text"
1163 |                             value={col.name}
1164 |                             onChange={(e) => updateSimColumn(idx, "name", e.target.value)}
1165 |                             className="bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-2 text-xs text-white w-1/3 focus:outline-none"
1166 |                             placeholder="field_name"
1167 |                           />
1168 |                           <select
1169 |                             value={col.type}
1170 |                             onChange={(e) => updateSimColumn(idx, "type", e.target.value)}
1171 |                             className="bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-2 text-xs text-white w-1/4 focus:outline-none"
1172 |                           >
1173 |                             <option value="string">string</option>
1174 |                             <option value="number">number</option>
1175 |                             <option value="date">date</option>
1176 |                             <option value="category">category</option>
1177 |                           </select>
1178 |                           <select
1179 |                             value={col.role}
1180 |                             onChange={(e) => updateSimColumn(idx, "role", e.target.value)}
1181 |                             className="bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-2 text-xs text-white w-1/3 focus:outline-none"
1182 |                           >
1183 |                             <option value="id">id</option>
1184 |                             <option value="date">date</option>
1185 |                             <option value="location">location</option>
1186 |                             <option value="money_metric">money_metric</option>
1187 |                             <option value="score_metric">score_metric</option>
1188 |                             <option value="continuous_metric">continuous_metric</option>
1189 |                             <option value="count_metric">count_metric</option>
1190 |                             <option value="rate_metric">rate_metric</option>
1191 |                             <option value="category">category</option>
1192 |                             <option value="text">text</option>
1193 |                             <option value="target">target</option>
1194 |                           </select>
1195 |                           <button
1196 |                             type="button"
1197 |                             onClick={() => removeSimColumn(idx)}
1198 |                             className="text-slate-500 hover:text-red-400 p-1.5"
1199 |                           >
1200 |                             <Trash2 className="size-4" />
1201 |                           </button>
1202 |                         </div>
1203 |                       ))}
1204 |                     </div>
1205 |                   </div>
1206 | 
1207 |                   {/* Run Prediction Button */}
1208 |                   <button
1209 |                     type="button"
1210 |                     onClick={handleRunSimulation}
1211 |                     disabled={isSimulating || !simColumns.length}
1212 |                     className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-indigo-600 hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-indigo-500 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 transition duration-200 disabled:opacity-50"
1213 |                   >
1214 |                     {isSimulating ? (
1215 |                       <>
1216 |                         <RefreshCw className="size-4 animate-spin" />
1217 |                         Generating Analytics Predictions (RAG + Trained LLM Mode matches)...
1218 |                       </>
1219 |                     ) : (
1220 |                       <>
1221 |                         <Sparkles className="size-4" />
1222 |                         Run Simulation Analytics Prediction
1223 |                       </>
1224 |                     )}
1225 |                   </button>
1226 | 
1227 |                   {/* Simulation error panel */}
1228 |                   {simError && (
1229 |                     <div className="rounded-xl border border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10 p-4 text-xs text-red-400">
1230 |                       Error: {simError}
1231 |                     </div>
1232 |                   )}
1233 | 
1234 |                   {/* Simulation results viewer */}
1235 |                   {simResult && (
1236 |                     <div className="bg-slate-950/60 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-5 space-y-4">
1237 |                       <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-850 pb-3">
1238 |                         <div>
1239 |                           <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-450 uppercase font-mono block">Predicted Domain</span>
1240 |                           <span className="text-xs text-slate-200 font-bold capitalize mt-0.5 block">{simResult.understanding?.domain?.domain || simResult.domain || "generic"}</span>
1241 |                         </div>
1242 |                         
1243 |                         <div className="flex gap-2">
1244 |                           <span className="text-[10px] bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-300 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-mono">
1245 |                             Quality Score: {simResult.quality?.score || 100}/100
1246 |                           </span>
1247 |                           <span className="text-[10px] bg-violet-600/10 border border-violet-500/25 text-violet-300 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-mono">
1248 |                             Provider: {simResult.provider || "trained-ai"}
1249 |                           </span>
1250 |                         </div>
1251 |                       </div>
1252 | 
1253 |                       {/* Memory matching feedback */}
1254 |                       {simResult.match && (
1255 |                         <div className="bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/30 rounded-xl p-3.5 text-xs text-emerald-300 flex items-start gap-2">
1256 |                           <Check className="size-4 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
1257 |                           <div>
1258 |                             <strong>Pattern Match Success:</strong> Simulated signature matched trained database entry for{" "}
1259 |                             <span className="font-bold">{simResult.match.dataset}</span> (Similarity Score:{" "}
1260 |                             {(simResult.match.score * 100).toFixed(1)}%). Suggested design mapping loaded.
1261 |                           </div>
1262 |                         </div>
1263 |                       )}
1264 | 
1265 |                       {simResult.rag?.matches?.length > 0 && (
1266 |                         <div className="bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-xl p-3.5 text-xs text-blue-300 flex items-start gap-2">
1267 |                           <Check className="size-4 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
1268 |                           <div>
1269 |                             <strong>RAG Retrieve Successful:</strong> Found matching contexts in vector storage. Best RAG similarity match:{" "}
1270 |                             <span className="font-bold">{simResult.rag.matches[0]?.name || "Unlabeled signature"}</span> (Score:{" "}
1271 |                             {(simResult.rag.matches[0]?.score * 100).toFixed(1)}%).
1272 |                           </div>
1273 |                         </div>
1274 |                       )}
1275 | 
1276 |                       {/* Predicted KPIs */}
1277 |                       <div className="space-y-2">
1278 |                         <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-350 uppercase tracking-wider font-mono">Predicted KPIs (Schema-Safe suggestions)</h4>
1279 |                         <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
1280 |                           {safeArray(simResult.dashboardPlan?.kpis || simResult.dashboard?.kpis).map((kpi: any, idx: number) => (
1281 |                             <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 p-3 rounded-lg text-xs">
1282 |                               <p className="font-semibold text-slate-200 capitalize">{kpi.title?.replace(/_/g, " ") || kpi.metric}</p>
1283 |                               <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono">
1284 |                                 <span>AGGREGATION: {kpi.aggregation}</span>
1285 |                                 <span className="uppercase text-slate-400">{kpi.format || "number"}</span>
1286 |                               </div>
1287 |                             </div>
1288 |                           ))}
1289 |                         </div>
1290 |                       </div>
1291 | 
1292 |                       {/* Predicted Charts */}
1293 |                       <div className="space-y-2 border-t border-slate-850 pt-4">
1294 |                         <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-350 uppercase tracking-wider font-mono">Predicted Chart Layout Configs</h4>
1295 |                         <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[220px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
1296 |                           {safeArray(simResult.dashboardPlan?.charts || simResult.dashboard?.charts).map((chart: any, idx: number) => (
1297 |                             <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 p-3 rounded-xl text-xs space-y-1.5">
1298 |                               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
1299 |                                 <span className="font-bold text-slate-200 capitalize">{chart.title}</span>
1300 |                                 <span className="text-[9px] bg-slate-950 px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-slate-850 text-violet-400 font-mono uppercase">{chart.type}</span>
1301 |                               </div>
1302 |                               <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">{chart.reason || "Matched standard design role mapping rules."}</p>
1303 |                               <div className="text-[9px] font-mono text-slate-550 flex gap-4 pt-0.5">
1304 |                                 <span>X: <span className="text-slate-350 font-semibold">{chart.xKey || chart.x}</span></span>
1305 |                                 <span>Y: <span className="text-slate-350 font-semibold">{chart.yKey || chart.y}</span></span>
1306 |                                 <span>Agg: <span className="text-slate-400">{chart.aggregation}</span></span>
1307 |                               </div>
1308 |                             </div>
1309 |                           ))}
1310 |                         </div>
1311 |                       </div>
1312 | 
1313 |                     </div>
1314 |                   )}
1315 |                 </div>
1316 |               </div>
1317 | 
1318 |             </div>
1319 | 
1320 |           </div>
1321 |         )}
1322 | 
1323 |       </div>
1324 |     </div>
1325 |   );
1326 | }
1327 | 
```
