### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/chat/components/LocalAIChatInterface.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/chat/components/LocalAIChatInterface.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2 | import { AnimatePresence, motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { Send, User, Settings, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { useLocalData } from '@/features/data/context/localDataContext';
  5 | 
  6 | const suggestedQueries = [
  7 |   'Show me the data summary',
  8 |   'What are the top values?',
  9 |   'Count records by category',
 10 |   'Calculate average values',
 11 | ];
 12 | 
 13 | const LocalAIChatInterface = () => {
 14 |   const { localDataset, chatMessages, isProcessing, sendLocalQuery } = useLocalData();
 15 |   const [input, setInput] = useState('');
 16 |   const bottomRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 17 | 
 18 |   useEffect(() => {
 19 |     bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
 20 |   }, [chatMessages]);
 21 | 
 22 |   const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 23 |     e.preventDefault();
 24 |     if (!input.trim() || isProcessing) return;
 25 |     void sendLocalQuery(input.trim());
 26 |     setInput('');
 27 |   };
 28 | 
 29 |   return (
 30 |     <div className="mx-10 my-10 flex h-[calc(100vh-14rem)] flex-col overflow-hidden border border-border bg-card">
 31 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border px-6 py-4">
 32 |         <div>
 33 |           <div>
 34 |             <h2 className="text-2xl uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-foreground">Local AI Interface</h2>
 35 |             <p className="mt-2 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-muted-foreground">
 36 |               {localDataset ? `Analyzing: ${localDataset.name} (${localDataset.rowCount.toLocaleString()} rows)` : 'Upload data to start'}
 37 |             </p>
 38 |           </div>
 39 |         </div>
 40 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 41 |           <div className="flex items-center gap-2 border border-success bg-success/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-success">
 42 |             <Shield className="size-4" />
 43 |             <span>Data Never Leaves Your System</span>
 44 |           </div>
 45 |           <Settings className="size-5 text-muted-foreground" />
 46 |         </div>
 47 |       </div>
 48 | 
 49 |       <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-8 py-6 space-y-8">
 50 |         {chatMessages.length === 0 && (
 51 |           <motion.div
 52 |             initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
 53 |             animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
 54 |             className="flex h-full flex-col items-center justify-center text-center"
 55 |           >
 56 |             <h3 className="text-3xl uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-foreground mb-4">Local AI Ready</h3>
 57 |             <p className="mb-6 max-w-3xl text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-muted-foreground">
 58 |               Your data stays on your system. Only the schema is sent to AI for SQL generation.
 59 |             </p>
 60 |             {localDataset && (
 61 |               <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-center max-w-lg">
 62 |                 {suggestedQueries.map((query) => (
 63 |                   <button type="button"
 64 |                     key={query}
 65 |                     onClick={() => {
 66 |                       void sendLocalQuery(query);
 67 |                     }}
 68 |                     className="border border-border px-4 py-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-foreground transition-colors hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground"
 69 |                   >
 70 |                     {query}
 71 |                   </button>
 72 |                 ))}
 73 |               </div>
 74 |             )}
 75 |           </motion.div>
 76 |         )}
 77 | 
 78 |         <AnimatePresence>
 79 |           {chatMessages.map((msg) => (
 80 |             <motion.div
 81 |               key={msg.id}
 82 |               initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
 83 |               animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 84 |               className={`flex gap-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : ''}`}
 85 |             >
 86 |               <div className={`max-w-2xl space-y-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-right' : ''}`}>
 87 |                 <div className={`text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.12em] ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-accent' : 'text-muted-foreground'}`}>
 88 |                   {msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : 'Local AI'}
 89 |                 </div>
 90 |                 <div
 91 |                   className={`inline-block border border-border px-6 py-5 text-left text-sm leading-8 ${
 92 |                     msg.role === 'user'
 93 |                       ? 'bg-card text-foreground'
 94 |                       : 'bg-card text-foreground'
 95 |                   }`}
 96 |                 >
 97 |                   {msg.content}
 98 |                 </div>
 99 |                 {msg.sql && (
100 |                   <div className="w-full border border-border bg-secondary/50 p-4 text-xs font-mono text-foreground">
101 |                     <p className="terminal-label mb-2">Generated SQL</p>
102 |                     <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.sql}</pre>
103 |                   </div>
104 |                 )}
105 |               </div>
106 |               {msg.role === 'user' && (
107 |                 <div className="mt-1 flex size-7 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center border border-border bg-secondary">
108 |                   <User className="size-3.5 text-secondary-foreground" />
109 |                 </div>
110 |               )}
111 |             </motion.div>
112 |           ))}
113 |         </AnimatePresence>
114 | 
115 |         {isProcessing && (
116 |           <motion.div
117 |             initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
118 |             animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
119 |             className="flex gap-3"
120 |           >
121 |             <div className="border border-border bg-secondary px-4 py-2.5">
122 |               <div className="flex gap-1">
123 |                 <span className="size-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0ms' }} />
124 |                 <span className="size-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '150ms' }} />
125 |                 <span className="size-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '300ms' }} />
126 |               </div>
127 |             </div>
128 |           </motion.div>
129 |         )}
130 | 
131 |         <div ref={bottomRef} />
132 |       </div>
133 | 
134 |       <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="border-t border-border px-8 py-6">
135 |         <div className="flex gap-3">
136 |           <input
137 |             value={input}
138 |             onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
139 |             placeholder={localDataset ? "Enter query about your data..." : 'Upload a dataset first'}
140 |             disabled={!localDataset || isProcessing}
141 |             className="terminal-input flex-1 disabled:opacity-50"
142 |           />
143 |           <button
144 |             type="submit"
145 |             disabled={!input.trim() || !localDataset || isProcessing}
146 |             className="flex h-14 w-16 items-center justify-center border border-border bg-primary text-primary-foreground transition-colors hover:bg-secondary hover:text-secondary-foreground disabled:opacity-50"
147 |           >
148 |             <Send className="size-4" />
149 |           </button>
150 |         </div>
151 |         <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-muted-foreground">
152 |           <span>Schema-only AI processing</span>
153 |           <span className="text-success">Privacy: Data never transmitted</span>
154 |         </div>
155 |       </form>
156 |     </div>
157 |   );
158 | };
159 | 
160 | export default LocalAIChatInterface;
161 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/chat/pages/ChatPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/chat/pages/ChatPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useEffect } from 'react';
 2 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
 3 | import ChatInterface from '@/features/chat/components/ChatInterface';
 4 | import StatusPanel from '@/shared/layout/StatusPanel';
 5 | 
 6 | const ChatPage = () => {
 7 |   const { dataset, isHydrating, apiError, loadDemo, retryHydrate } = useData();
 8 | 
 9 |   useEffect(() => {
10 |     if (!dataset && !isHydrating) {
11 |       void loadDemo().catch(() => undefined);
12 |     }
13 |   }, [dataset, isHydrating, loadDemo]);
14 | 
15 |   if (isHydrating) {
16 |     return (
17 |       <StatusPanel
18 |         title="Loading chat"
19 |         message="Preparing the local analytics service before opening the chat interface."
20 |       />
21 |     );
22 |   }
23 | 
24 |   if (apiError) {
25 |     return (
26 |       <StatusPanel
27 |         title="Chat unavailable"
28 |         message={apiError}
29 |         actionLabel="Retry"
30 |         onAction={() => {
31 |           void retryHydrate();
32 |         }}
33 |       />
34 |     );
35 |   }
36 | 
37 |   if (!dataset) {
38 |     return (
39 |       <StatusPanel
40 |         title="No dataset loaded"
41 |         message="Load the demo dataset or upload a file before opening chat."
42 |         actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset"
43 |         onAction={() => {
44 |           void loadDemo().catch(() => undefined);
45 |         }}
46 |       />
47 |     );
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   return <ChatInterface />;
51 | };
52 | 
53 | export default ChatPage;
54 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AgenticAuditTrail.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AgenticAuditTrail.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | type AuditStep = {
 2 |   agent: string;
 3 |   model?: string;
 4 |   action: string;
 5 |   status?: string;
 6 | };
 7 | 
 8 | export function AgenticAuditTrail({ steps = [] }: { steps?: AuditStep[] }) {
 9 |   if (!steps.length) return null;
10 | 
11 |   return (
12 |     <section className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
13 |       <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between">
14 |         <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-slate-950">Agent Audit Trail</h2>
15 |         <span className="rounded-full bg-slate-100 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-slate-600">
16 |           {steps.length} steps
17 |         </span>
18 |       </div>
19 |       <div className="space-y-2">
20 |         {steps.map((step, index) => (
21 |           <div key={`${step.agent}-${index}`} className="rounded-md border border-slate-200 p-3">
22 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
23 |               <div>
24 |                 <p className="font-medium text-slate-900">
25 |                   {index + 1}. {step.agent}
26 |                 </p>
27 |                 <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{step.action}</p>
28 |               </div>
29 |               <div className="text-right text-xs text-slate-500">
30 |                 <p>{step.model || "deterministic-tool"}</p>
31 |                 <p className="uppercase">{step.status || "success"}</p>
32 |               </div>
33 |             </div>
34 |           </div>
35 |         ))}
36 |       </div>
37 |     </section>
38 |   );
39 | }
40 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AgenticThinkingPanel.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AgenticThinkingPanel.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import React from 'react';
  2 | import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
  3 | import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
  4 | import { AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Brain, Workflow, ShieldCheck, Network, TextSelect } from 'lucide-react';
  5 | 
  6 | interface AgenticThinkingPanelProps {
  7 |   agentPlan?: any;
  8 |   agentTools?: string[];
  9 |   critic?: {
 10 |     score: number;
 11 |     status: string;
 12 |     issues: string[];
 13 |     improvements: string[];
 14 |   };
 15 |   ontologyMapping?: {
 16 |     inferredDomain: string;
 17 |     canonicalTerms: string[];
 18 |     mapping: Record<string, string>;
 19 |   };
 20 |   dashboardSpec?: any;
 21 | }
 22 | 
 23 | export function AgenticThinkingPanel({ agentPlan, agentTools, critic, ontologyMapping, dashboardSpec }: AgenticThinkingPanelProps) {
 24 |   if (!agentPlan && !critic) return null;
 25 | 
 26 |   return (
 27 |     <Card className="mb-6 bg-slate-900 border-slate-800 text-slate-100 shadow-xl">
 28 |       <CardHeader className="border-b border-slate-800 pb-4">
 29 |         <CardTitle className="text-lg flex items-center gap-2 text-indigo-400">
 30 |           <Brain className="w-5 h-5" /> Agentic AI Thinking Process
 31 |         </CardTitle>
 32 |       </CardHeader>
 33 |       <CardContent className="pt-4 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
 34 |         
 35 |         {/* Agent Plan Section */}
 36 |         {agentPlan && (
 37 |           <div className="space-y-3">
 38 |             <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 flex items-center gap-2">
 39 |               <Workflow className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-400" /> Planner Execution
 40 |             </h3>
 41 |             <div className="text-xs text-slate-400">
 42 |               <span className="font-medium text-slate-200">Goal:</span> {agentPlan.goal}
 43 |             </div>
 44 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
 45 |               {agentPlan.tasks?.map((task: string) => (
 46 |                 <Badge key={task} variant="secondary" className="bg-slate-800 text-emerald-300 border-emerald-900/50">
 47 |                   {task}
 48 |                 </Badge>
 49 |               ))}
 50 |             </div>
 51 |           </div>
 52 |         )}
 53 | 
 54 |         {/* Tools Section */}
 55 |         {agentTools && agentTools.length > 0 && (
 56 |           <div className="space-y-3">
 57 |             <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 flex items-center gap-2">
 58 |               <Workflow className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" /> Tools Routed
 59 |             </h3>
 60 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
 61 |               {agentTools.map((tool) => (
 62 |                 <Badge key={tool} variant="outline" className="text-blue-300 border-blue-900/50">
 63 |                   {tool}
 64 |                 </Badge>
 65 |               ))}
 66 |             </div>
 67 |           </div>
 68 |         )}
 69 | 
 70 |         {/* Critic Loop Section */}
 71 |         {critic && (
 72 |           <div className="space-y-3">
 73 |             <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 flex items-center gap-2">
 74 |               <ShieldCheck className="w-4 h-4 text-rose-400" /> Critic Evaluation
 75 |             </h3>
 76 |             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 77 |               <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{critic.score}/100</div>
 78 |               {critic.status === 'excellent' ? (
 79 |                 <Badge className="bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/30">Excellent</Badge>
 80 |               ) : (
 81 |                 <Badge className="bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 hover:bg-amber-500/30">Needs Improvement</Badge>
 82 |               )}
 83 |             </div>
 84 | 
 85 |             {critic.issues?.length > 0 && (
 86 |               <div className="mt-2 space-y-1">
 87 |                 <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-rose-400">Detected Issues:</div>
 88 |                 <ul className="text-xs text-slate-400 list-disc pl-4 space-y-1">
 89 |                   {critic.issues.map((i, idx) => <li key={idx}>{i}</li>)}
 90 |                 </ul>
 91 |               </div>
 92 |             )}
 93 |             
 94 |             {critic.improvements?.length > 0 && (
 95 |               <div className="mt-2 space-y-1">
 96 |                 <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-400">Auto-Fixes Suggested:</div>
 97 |                 <ul className="text-xs text-slate-400 list-disc pl-4 space-y-1">
 98 |                   {critic.improvements.map((i, idx) => <li key={idx}>{i}</li>)}
 99 |                 </ul>
100 |               </div>
101 |             )}
102 |           </div>
103 |         )}
104 |         
105 |         {/* Semantic Ontology Section */}
106 |         {ontologyMapping && (
107 |           <div className="space-y-3">
108 |             <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 flex items-center gap-2">
109 |               <Network className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" /> Semantic Ontology Map
110 |             </h3>
111 |             <div className="text-xs text-slate-400">
112 |               <span className="font-medium text-slate-200">Inferred Domain:</span>{' '}
113 |               <Badge variant="outline" className="text-purple-300 border-purple-900/50">
114 |                 {ontologyMapping.inferredDomain}
115 |               </Badge>
116 |             </div>
117 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2">
118 |               {ontologyMapping.canonicalTerms.map((term: string) => (
119 |                 <Badge key={term} variant="secondary" className="bg-slate-800 text-purple-300 border-purple-900/50">
120 |                   {term}
121 |                 </Badge>
122 |               ))}
123 |             </div>
124 |           </div>
125 |         )}
126 | 
127 |       </CardContent>
128 | 
129 |       {/* Storytelling Agent Section */}
130 |       {dashboardSpec?.executiveSummary?.length > 0 && (
131 |         <div className="border-t border-slate-800 p-4 mt-4 bg-slate-900/50 rounded-b-xl">
132 |           <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
133 |             <TextSelect className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" /> Executive Summary
134 |           </h3>
135 |           <ul className="space-y-2">
136 |             {dashboardSpec.executiveSummary.map((sentence: string, idx: number) => (
137 |               <li key={idx} className="text-sm text-slate-300 flex items-start gap-2">
138 |                 <span className="text-amber-500 mt-1">•</span>
139 |                 <span>{sentence}</span>
140 |               </li>
141 |             ))}
142 |           </ul>
143 |         </div>
144 |       )}
145 | 
146 |     </Card>
147 |   );
148 | }
149 | 
```

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { Download, SlidersHorizontal } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { toPng } from 'html-to-image';
  5 | import {
  6 |   ResponsiveContainer, AreaChart, Area, BarChart, Bar, LineChart, Line,
  7 |   XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, PieChart, Pie, Cell, ScatterChart,
  8 |   Scatter, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar,
  9 |   ComposedChart, Legend,
 10 | } from 'recharts';
 11 | import { ChartConfig } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
 12 | import { Input } from '@/shared/components/ui/input';
 13 | import {
 14 |   Sheet,
 15 |   SheetContent,
 16 |   SheetDescription,
 17 |   SheetHeader,
 18 |   SheetTitle,
 19 |   SheetTrigger,
 20 | } from '@/shared/components/ui/sheet';
 21 | import { Switch } from '@/shared/components/ui/switch';
 22 | 
 23 | const PALETTES = {
 24 |   blue: ['#dbeafe', '#93c5fd', '#60a5fa', '#3b82f6', '#1d4ed8'],
 25 |   green: ['#dcfce7', '#86efac', '#4ade80', '#22c55e', '#15803d'],
 26 |   purple: ['#f3e8ff', '#d8b4fe', '#c084fc', '#a855f7', '#7e22ce'],
 27 |   orange: ['#ffedd5', '#fdba74', '#fb923c', '#f97316', '#c2410c'],
 28 | } as const;
 29 | 
 30 | type PaletteKey = keyof typeof PALETTES;
 31 | type LocalChartType = ChartConfig['type'];
 32 | 
 33 | interface CustomTooltipProps {
 34 |   active?: boolean;
 35 |   payload?: Array<{ value?: string | number; dataKey?: string; color?: string }>;
 36 |   label?: string | number;
 37 | }
 38 | 
 39 | const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }: CustomTooltipProps) => {
 40 |   if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
 41 |   return (
 42 |     <div className="rounded-lg border border-border bg-card px-3 py-2 shadow-md">
 43 |       <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{label}</p>
 44 |       {payload.map((p, i) => (
 45 |         <p key={i} className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
 46 |           {typeof p.value === 'number' ? p.value.toLocaleString() : p.value}
 47 |         </p>
 48 |       ))}
 49 |     </div>
 50 |   );
 51 | };
 52 | 
 53 | interface AnalyticsChartProps {
 54 |   config: ChartConfig;
 55 |   index: number;
 56 | }
 57 | 
 58 | const AnalyticsChart = ({ config, index }: AnalyticsChartProps) => {
 59 |   const chartRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 60 |   const [chartType, setChartType] = useState<LocalChartType>(config.type);
 61 |   const [xLabel, setXLabel] = useState(config.xLabel || config.xKey);
 62 |   const [yLabel, setYLabel] = useState(config.yLabel || config.yKey);
 63 |   const [palette, setPalette] = useState<PaletteKey>('blue');
 64 |   const [showGrid, setShowGrid] = useState(true);
 65 |   const [showLegend, setShowLegend] = useState(chartType === 'pie');
 66 |   const [curved, setCurved] = useState(true);
 67 | 
 68 |   const colors = PALETTES[palette];
 69 |   const isPieChart = chartType === 'pie';
 70 |   const chartData = useMemo(() => {
 71 |     const data = config.data || [];
 72 |     if (chartType === 'bar' || chartType === 'pie') {
 73 |       return [...data].sort((a, b) => Number(b[config.yKey] ?? 0) - Number(a[config.yKey] ?? 0));
 74 |     }
 75 |     return data;
 76 |   }, [config.data, chartType, config.yKey]);
 77 |   const hasRenderableChart = Array.isArray(chartData) && chartData.length > 0 && Boolean(config.xKey) && Boolean(config.yKey);
 78 | 
 79 |   useEffect(() => {
 80 |     setShowLegend(chartType === 'pie');
 81 |   }, [chartType]);
 82 | 
 83 |   const exportPng = async () => {
 84 |     if (!chartRef.current) return;
 85 |     try {
 86 |       const url = await toPng(chartRef.current, { backgroundColor: '#ffffff', pixelRatio: 2 });
 87 |       const a = document.createElement('a');
 88 |       a.href = url;
 89 |       a.download = `${config.title.replace(/\s+/g, '_').toLowerCase()}.png`;
 90 |       a.click();
 91 |     } catch (e) {
 92 |       const errorMsg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'Unknown error occurred';
 93 |       console.error('Export failed:', errorMsg);
 94 |       alert(`Failed to export chart: ${errorMsg}`);
 95 |     }
 96 |   };
 97 | 
 98 |   const renderChart = () => {
 99 |     const commonProps = { data: chartData };
100 |     const curveType = curved ? 'monotone' : 'linear';
101 |     const grid = showGrid ? <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="hsl(215 20% 90%)" vertical={false} /> : null;
102 |     const legend = showLegend ? (
103 |       <Legend
104 |         wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: '12px', paddingTop: '16px' }}
105 |         iconSize={16}
106 |         iconType="circle"
107 |         align="center"
108 |         verticalAlign="bottom"
109 |       />
110 |     ) : null;
111 | 
112 |     const axisStyle = { fontSize: 12, fill: 'hsl(215 16% 47%)' };
113 | 
114 |     switch (chartType) {
115 |       case 'area':
116 |         return (
117 |           <AreaChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
118 |             <defs>
119 |               <linearGradient id={`gradient-${index}`} x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
120 |                 <stop offset="5%" stopColor={colors[3]} stopOpacity={0.4} />
121 |                 <stop offset="95%" stopColor={colors[3]} stopOpacity={0.05} />
122 |               </linearGradient>
123 |             </defs>
124 |             {grid}
125 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
126 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
127 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
128 |             {legend}
129 |             <Area type={curveType} dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} fill={`url(#gradient-${index})`} strokeWidth={2} />
130 |           </AreaChart>
131 |         );
132 |       case 'histogram':
133 |       case 'bar':
134 |         return (
135 |           <BarChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
136 |             {grid}
137 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
138 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
139 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
140 |             {legend}
141 |             <Bar dataKey={config.yKey} fill={colors[3]} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
142 |           </BarChart>
143 |         );
144 |       case 'line':
145 |         return (
146 |           <LineChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
147 |             {grid}
148 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
149 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
150 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
151 |             {legend}
152 |             <Line type={curveType} dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} strokeWidth={2} dot={{ fill: colors[3], strokeWidth: 0, r: 4 }} />
153 |           </LineChart>
154 |         );
155 |       case 'scatter':
156 |         return (
157 |           <ScatterChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
158 |             {grid}
159 |             <XAxis type="number" dataKey={config.xKey} name={xLabel} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
160 |             <YAxis type="number" dataKey={config.yKey} name={yLabel} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
161 |             <Tooltip cursor={{ strokeDasharray: '3 3' }} content={<CustomTooltip />} />
162 |             {legend}
163 |             <Scatter data={chartData} fill={colors[3]} />
164 |           </ScatterChart>
165 |         );
166 |       case 'radar':
167 |         return (
168 |           <RadarChart outerRadius="70%" data={chartData} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 }}>
169 |             <PolarGrid stroke="hsl(215 20% 90%)" />
170 |             <PolarAngleAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={{ fill: 'hsl(215 16% 47%)', fontSize: 12 }} />
171 |             <PolarRadiusAxis tick={{ fill: 'hsl(215 16% 47%)', fontSize: 11 }} />
172 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
173 |             {legend}
174 |             <Radar dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} fill={colors[3]} fillOpacity={0.3} />
175 |           </RadarChart>
176 |         );
177 |       case 'composed':
178 |         return (
179 |           <ComposedChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
180 |             {grid}
181 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
182 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
183 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
184 |             {legend}
185 |             <Bar dataKey={config.yKey} fill={colors[2]} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
186 |             <Line type={curveType} dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} strokeWidth={2} dot={false} />
187 |           </ComposedChart>
188 |         );
189 |       case 'pie':
190 |         return (
191 |           <PieChart margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 }}>
192 |             <Pie data={chartData} dataKey={config.yKey} nameKey={config.xKey} cx="50%" cy="50%" innerRadius={50} outerRadius={80}>
193 |               {chartData.map((_, i) => (
194 |                 <Cell key={i} fill={colors[i % colors.length]} />
195 |               ))}
196 |             </Pie>
197 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
198 |             {legend}
199 |           </PieChart>
200 |         );
201 |       default:
202 |         return (
203 |           <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
204 |             Unsupported chart type: {chartType}
205 |           </div>
206 |         );
207 |     }
208 |   };
209 | 
210 |   const renderedChart = renderChart();
211 | 
212 |   if (!renderedChart || !chartData || chartData.length === 0) {
213 |     return (
214 |       <motion.div
215 |         initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
216 |         animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
217 |         whileHover={{ y: -2 }}
218 |         transition={{ delay: index * 0.05, duration: 0.3 }}
219 |         className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card p-5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md"
220 |         ref={chartRef}
221 |       >
222 |         <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
223 |           <div>
224 |             <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider">Chart</p>
225 |             <h3 className="mt-1 text-base font-semibold text-foreground">{config.title}</h3>
226 |           </div>
227 |         </div>
228 |         <div className="h-72 flex items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground">
229 |           No data available for this chart
230 |         </div>
231 |       </motion.div>
232 |     );
233 |   }
234 | 
235 |   return (
236 |     hasRenderableChart ? (
237 |     <motion.div
238 |       initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
239 |       animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
240 |       whileHover={{ y: -2 }}
241 |       transition={{ delay: index * 0.05, duration: 0.3 }}
242 |       className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card p-5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md"
243 |       ref={chartRef}
244 |     >
245 |       <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
246 |         <div>
247 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider">Chart</p>
248 |           <h3 className="mt-1 text-base font-semibold text-foreground">{config.title}</h3>
249 |         </div>
250 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
251 |           <Sheet>
252 |             <SheetTrigger asChild>
253 |               <button
254 |                 type="button"
255 |                 className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
256 |                 title="Customize chart"
257 |               >
258 |                 <SlidersHorizontal className="size-4" />
259 |               </button>
260 |             </SheetTrigger>
261 |             <SheetContent side="right" className="w-full overflow-y-auto sm:max-w-md">
262 |               <SheetHeader className="pb-4">
263 |                 <SheetTitle className="text-lg font-semibold">Chart Settings</SheetTitle>
264 |                 <SheetDescription className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
265 |                   Customize chart type, colors, and display options.
266 |                 </SheetDescription>
267 |               </SheetHeader>
268 | 
269 |               <div className="space-y-6">
270 |                 <div className="space-y-3">
271 |                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">Chart Type</p>
272 |                   <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
273 |                     {(['bar', 'line', 'area', 'pie', 'scatter', 'radar', 'composed'] as LocalChartType[]).map((type) => (
274 |                       <button
275 |                         key={type}
276 |                         type="button"
277 |                         onClick={() => setChartType(type)}
278 |                         className={`rounded-lg border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
279 |                           chartType === type 
280 |                             ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary' 
281 |                             : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'
282 |                         }`}
283 |                       >
284 |                         {type}
285 |                       </button>
286 |                     ))}
287 |                   </div>
288 |                 </div>
289 | 
290 |                 <div className="space-y-3">
291 |                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">Color Palette</p>
292 |                   <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
293 |                     {(Object.keys(PALETTES) as PaletteKey[]).map((key) => (
294 |                       <button
295 |                         key={key}
296 |                         type="button"
297 |                         onClick={() => setPalette(key)}
298 |                         className={`flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
299 |                           palette === key 
300 |                             ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-foreground' 
301 |                             : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'
302 |                         }`}
303 |                       >
304 |                         <span className="flex gap-1">
305 |                           {PALETTES[key].slice(0, 3).map((color) => (
306 |                             <span key={color} className="size-3 rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />
307 |                           ))}
308 |                         </span>
309 |                         <span className="capitalize">{key}</span>
310 |                       </button>
311 |                     ))}
312 |                   </div>
313 |                 </div>
314 | 
315 |                 <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
316 |                   <div className="space-y-2">
317 |                     <p className="text-sm font-medium">X Label</p>
318 |                     <Input
319 |                       value={xLabel}
320 |                       onChange={(e) => setXLabel(e.target.value)}
321 |                       className="rounded-lg border-border"
322 |                     />
323 |                   </div>
324 |                   <div className="space-y-2">
325 |                     <p className="text-sm font-medium">Y Label</p>
326 |                     <Input
327 |                       value={yLabel}
328 |                       onChange={(e) => setYLabel(e.target.value)}
329 |                       className="rounded-lg border-border"
330 |                     />
331 |                   </div>
332 |                 </div>
333 | 
334 |                 <div className="space-y-3">
335 |                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">Display Options</p>
336 |                   <div className="space-y-3">
337 |                     <label className="flex items-center justify-between">
338 |                       <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Show Grid</span>
339 |                       <Switch checked={showGrid} onCheckedChange={setShowGrid} />
340 |                     </label>
341 |                     <label className="flex items-center justify-between">
342 |                       <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Show Legend</span>
343 |                       <Switch checked={showLegend} onCheckedChange={setShowLegend} />
344 |                     </label>
345 |                     <label className="flex items-center justify-between">
346 |                       <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Smooth Curves</span>
347 |                       <Switch checked={curved} onCheckedChange={setCurved} />
348 |                     </label>
349 |                   </div>
350 |                 </div>
351 |               </div>
352 |             </SheetContent>
353 |           </Sheet>
354 | 
355 |           <button
356 |             type="button"
357 |             onClick={exportPng}
358 |             className="rounded-lg p-2 text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
359 |             title="Download as PNG"
360 |           >
361 |             <Download className="size-4" />
362 |           </button>
363 |         </div>
364 |       </div>
365 |       <div className="h-72">
366 |         <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
367 |           {renderedChart}
368 |         </ResponsiveContainer>
369 |       </div>
370 |     </motion.div>
371 |     ) : null
372 |   );
373 | };
374 | 
375 | export default AnalyticsChart;
376 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsSidebar.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsSidebar.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
  2 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { X, Send, Bot, BarChart3, Loader2, RefreshCw, Filter, PieChart, LineChart, BarChart3 as BarIcon } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { ChartConfig, Dataset } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
  5 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
  6 | 
  7 | interface AnalyticsSidebarProps {
  8 |   isOpen: boolean;
  9 |   onClose: () => void;
 10 |   dataset: Dataset | null;
 11 |   charts: ChartConfig[];
 12 |   onAddChart?: (chart: ChartConfig) => void;
 13 |   onReplaceLatestChart?: (chart: ChartConfig) => void;
 14 |   onRemoveLatestChart?: () => void;
 15 |   onFilterChange?: (filters: Record<string, string>) => void;
 16 | }
 17 | 
 18 | interface ChatMessage {
 19 |   id: string;
 20 |   role: 'user' | 'assistant';
 21 |   content: string;
 22 |   type?: 'text' | 'chart' | 'insight' | 'action' | 'error';
 23 |   chartConfig?: ChartConfig;
 24 |   chartAction?: 'generate' | 'modify' | 'delete';
 25 |   insightData?: InsightData;
 26 |   model?: string;
 27 |   provider?: string;
 28 | }
 29 | 
 30 | interface InsightData {
 31 |   metric?: string;
 32 |   value?: string | number;
 33 |   change?: number;
 34 |   trend?: 'up' | 'down' | 'stable';
 35 |   comparisons?: string[];
 36 | }
 37 | 
 38 | const DEFAULT_ANALYTICS_MESSAGES: ChatMessage[] = [
 39 |   {
 40 |     id: '1',
 41 |     role: 'assistant',
 42 |     content: `Hi! I'm your AI analytics assistant with full dashboard control. I use neural-chat:7b when available and can:
 43 | 
 44 | Chart Commands:
 45 | - "Create a bar chart for salary by country"
 46 | - "Change chart to line"
 47 | - "Show scatter plot"
 48 | - "Delete last chart"
 49 | 
 50 | Data Commands:
 51 | - "Filter by country = USA"
 52 | - "Show only senior roles"
 53 | - "Clear all filters"
 54 | 
 55 | Analysis Commands:
 56 | - "Show top 5 by revenue"
 57 | - "Compare metrics"
 58 | - "What are the trends?"
 59 | 
 60 | What would you like to do?`,
 61 |     type: 'text',
 62 |   },
 63 | ];
 64 | 
 65 | const AnalyticsSidebar = ({ isOpen, onClose, dataset, charts: _charts, onAddChart, onReplaceLatestChart, onRemoveLatestChart, onFilterChange }: AnalyticsSidebarProps) => {
 66 |   const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>(DEFAULT_ANALYTICS_MESSAGES);
 67 |   const [input, setInput] = useState('');
 68 |   const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
 69 |   const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 70 | 
 71 |   const scrollToBottom = () => {
 72 |     messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
 73 |   };
 74 | 
 75 |   useEffect(() => {
 76 |     scrollToBottom();
 77 |   }, [messages]);
 78 | 
 79 |   const applyDashboardCommand = async (query: string) => {
 80 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
 81 | 
 82 |     const userMessage: ChatMessage = {
 83 |       id: Date.now().toString(),
 84 |       role: "user",
 85 |       content: query,
 86 |       type: "text",
 87 |     };
 88 | 
 89 |     setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMessage]);
 90 |     setIsProcessing(true);
 91 | 
 92 |     try {
 93 |       const command = await api.sendDashboardCommand(dataset.id, query);
 94 | 
 95 |       let type: ChatMessage["type"] = "text";
 96 | 
 97 |       if (command.action === "GENERATE_CHART" && command.chart) {
 98 |         onAddChart?.(command.chart);
 99 |         type = "chart";
100 |       }
101 | 
102 |       if (command.action === "MODIFY_CHART" && command.chart) {
103 |         onReplaceLatestChart?.(command.chart);
104 |         type = "chart";
105 |       }
106 | 
107 |       if (command.action === "DELETE_CHART") {
108 |         onRemoveLatestChart?.();
109 |         type = "action";
110 |       }
111 | 
112 |       if (command.action === "FILTER" && command.filters) {
113 |         onFilterChange?.(command.filters);
114 |         type = "action";
115 |       }
116 | 
117 |       if (command.action === "CLEAR_FILTERS") {
118 |         onFilterChange?.({});
119 |         type = "action";
120 |       }
121 | 
122 |       if (command.action === "GENERATE_KPI") {
123 |         type = "insight";
124 |       }
125 | 
126 |       const kpiText = command.kpis?.length
127 |         ? "\n\n" + command.kpis.map((k) => `• ${k.title}: ${k.value}`).join("\n")
128 |         : "";
129 | 
130 |       const assistantMessage: ChatMessage = {
131 |         id: (Date.now() + 1).toString(),
132 |         role: "assistant",
133 |         type,
134 |         content: [
135 |           command.message,
136 |           kpiText,
137 |           command.schemaOnly ? "\n\nSchema-only mode: raw rows were not sent to AI." : "",
138 |           command.model ? `\nModel: ${command.model}` : "",
139 |           command.aiError ? `\nFallback used: ${command.aiError}` : "",
140 |         ].join(""),
141 |         chartConfig: command.chart,
142 |       };
143 | 
144 |       setMessages((prev) => [...prev, assistantMessage]);
145 |     } catch (error) {
146 |       setMessages((prev) => [
147 |         ...prev,
148 |         {
149 |           id: (Date.now() + 1).toString(),
150 |           role: "assistant",
151 |           type: "text",
152 |           content: "Sorry, I could not control the dashboard for that request.",
153 |         },
154 |       ]);
155 |     } finally {
156 |       setIsProcessing(false);
157 |     }
158 |   };
159 | 
160 |   const handleQuery = useCallback(async () => {
161 |     if (!input.trim() || !dataset) return;
162 |     const q = input.trim();
163 |     setInput('');
164 |     await applyDashboardCommand(q);
165 |   }, [input, dataset]);
166 | 
167 |   const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
168 |     if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
169 |       e.preventDefault();
170 |       handleQuery();
171 |     }
172 |   };
173 | 
174 |   if (!isOpen) return null;
175 | 
176 |   return (
177 |     <motion.div
178 |       initial={{ x: '100%' }}
179 |       animate={{ x: 0 }}
180 |       exit={{ x: '100%' }}
181 |       transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }}
182 |       className="fixed right-4 top-4 h-[calc(100vh-2rem)] w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-border/50 bg-card z-50 flex flex-col shadow-xl"
183 |     >
184 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border/50 p-4">
185 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
186 |           <div className="flex size-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10">
187 |             <Bot className="size-5 text-primary" />
188 |           </div>
189 |           <div>
190 |             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">AI Assistant</p>
191 |             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
192 |               <span className="size-2 rounded-full bg-green-500 animate-pulse"></span>
193 |               <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Online</p>
194 |             </div>
195 |           </div>
196 |         </div>
197 |         <button type="button"
198 |           onClick={onClose}
199 |           className="rounded-full p-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted transition-all"
200 |         >
201 |           <X className="size-5" />
202 |         </button>
203 |       </div>
204 | 
205 |       <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
206 |         {messages.map((msg) => (
207 |           <motion.div
208 |             key={msg.id}
209 |             initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
210 |             animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
211 |             className={`flex gap-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}
212 |           >
213 |             {msg.role === 'assistant' && (
214 |               <div className="flex size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10 shrink-0">
215 |                 <Bot className="size-4 text-primary" />
216 |               </div>
217 |             )}
218 |             <div
219 |               className={`max-w-[85%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
220 |                 msg.role === 'user'
221 |                   ? 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground'
222 |                   : 'border border-border/50 bg-muted/30'
223 |               }`}
224 |             >
225 |               <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm">{msg.content}</div>
226 |               {msg.chartConfig && (
227 |                 <div className="mt-2 pt-2 border-t border-border/30">
228 |                   <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-primary">
229 |                     <BarChart3 className="size-3" />
230 |                     Chart generated
231 |                   </div>
232 |                 </div>
233 |               )}
234 |               {msg.model && (
235 |                 <div className="mt-2 text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
236 |                   Model: {msg.model}
237 |                 </div>
238 |               )}
239 |             </div>
240 |             {msg.role === 'user' && (
241 |               <div className="flex size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0">
242 |                 <span className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">You</span>
243 |               </div>
244 |             )}
245 |           </motion.div>
246 |         ))}
247 |         
248 |         {isProcessing && (
249 |           <div className="flex gap-3 justify-start">
250 |             <div className="flex size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10">
251 |               <Bot className="size-4 text-primary" />
252 |             </div>
253 |             <div className="border border-border/50 bg-muted/30 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
254 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
255 |                 <Loader2 className="size-4 animate-spin" />
256 |                 Processing...
257 |               </div>
258 |             </div>
259 |           </div>
260 |         )}
261 |         
262 |         <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
263 |       </div>
264 | 
265 |       <div className="border-t border-border/50 p-4">
266 |         <div className="flex gap-3 items-center">
267 |           <input
268 |             type="text"
269 |             value={input}
270 |             onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
271 |             onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
272 |             placeholder="Ask anything..."
273 |             className="flex-1 bg-muted/50 border border-border/50 rounded-full px-4 py-2.5 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all"
274 |             disabled={isProcessing}
275 |           />
276 |           <button type="button"
277 |             onClick={handleQuery}
278 |             disabled={!input.trim() || isProcessing || !dataset}
279 |             className="rounded-full size-10 bg-primary flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
280 |           >
281 |             {isProcessing ? (
282 |               <Loader2 className="size-4 animate-spin" />
283 |             ) : (
284 |               <Send className="size-4" />
285 |             )}
286 |           </button>
287 |         </div>
288 |         
289 |         {dataset && (
290 |           <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
291 |             <button type="button"
292 |               onClick={() => setInput('Create bar chart')}
293 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
294 |             >
295 |               <BarIcon className="size-3" /> Bar
296 |             </button>
297 |             <button type="button"
298 |               onClick={() => setInput('Create line chart')}
299 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
300 |             >
301 |               <LineChart className="size-3" /> Line
302 |             </button>
303 |             <button type="button"
304 |               onClick={() => setInput('Create pie chart')}
305 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
306 |             >
307 |               <PieChart className="size-3" /> Pie
308 |             </button>
309 |             <button type="button"
310 |               onClick={() => setInput('Filter by country = USA')}
311 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
312 |             >
313 |               <Filter className="size-3" /> Filter
314 |             </button>
315 |             <button type="button"
316 |               onClick={() => setInput('Clear filters')}
317 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
318 |             >
319 |               <RefreshCw className="size-3" /> Clear
320 |             </button>
321 |           </div>
322 |         )}
323 |       </div>
324 |     </motion.div>
325 |   );
326 | };
327 | 
328 | export default AnalyticsSidebar;
329 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DashboardFilters.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DashboardFilters.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useMemo } from 'react';
  2 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { X, CalendarIcon } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { format } from 'date-fns';
  5 | import { Button } from '@/shared/components/ui/button';
  6 | import { Calendar } from '@/shared/components/ui/calendar';
  7 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/shared/components/ui/popover';
  8 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/shared/components/ui/select';
  9 | import { Badge } from '@/shared/components/ui/badge';
 10 | import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/utils';
 11 | import { Dataset } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
 12 | 
 13 | export interface FilterState {
 14 |   dateRange: { from?: Date; to?: Date };
 15 |   columns: Record<string, string>;
 16 | }
 17 | 
 18 | interface DashboardFiltersProps {
 19 |   dataset: Dataset;
 20 |   filters: FilterState;
 21 |   onChange: (filters: FilterState) => void;
 22 | }
 23 | 
 24 | const DashboardFilters = ({ dataset, filters, onChange }: DashboardFiltersProps) => {
 25 |   const stringColumns = useMemo(
 26 |     () => dataset.columns.filter((column) => column.type === 'string'),
 27 |     [dataset.columns],
 28 |   );
 29 | 
 30 |   const uniqueValues = useMemo(() => {
 31 |     const map: Record<string, string[]> = {};
 32 | 
 33 |     stringColumns.forEach((column) => {
 34 |       map[column.name] = [...new Set(dataset.rows.map((row) => String(row[column.name] ?? '')))]
 35 |         .filter(Boolean)
 36 |         .sort();
 37 |     });
 38 | 
 39 |     return map;
 40 |   }, [dataset.rows, stringColumns]);
 41 | 
 42 |   const activeCount =
 43 |     (filters.dateRange.from || filters.dateRange.to ? 1 : 0) +
 44 |     Object.values(filters.columns).filter(Boolean).length;
 45 | 
 46 |   const clearAll = () => onChange({ dateRange: { from: undefined, to: undefined }, columns: {} });
 47 | 
 48 |   const setColumnFilter = (columnName: string, value: string) =>
 49 |     onChange({ ...filters, columns: { ...filters.columns, [columnName]: value } });
 50 | 
 51 |   const removeColumnFilter = (columnName: string) => {
 52 |     const nextColumns = { ...filters.columns };
 53 |     delete nextColumns[columnName];
 54 |     onChange({ ...filters, columns: nextColumns });
 55 |   };
 56 | 
 57 |   return (
 58 |     <motion.div
 59 |       initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -8 }}
 60 |       animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 61 |       className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card/50 p-3"
 62 |     >
 63 |       <Popover>
 64 |         <PopoverTrigger asChild>
 65 |           <Button
 66 |             variant="outline"
 67 |             size="sm"
 68 |             className={cn(
 69 |               'h-9 gap-2 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm border-border/50 bg-background/80 hover:bg-muted transition-all',
 70 |               filters.dateRange.from && 'border-primary/50 text-primary bg-primary/5',
 71 |             )}
 72 |           >
 73 |             <CalendarIcon className="size-4" />
 74 |             {filters.dateRange.from
 75 |               ? `${format(filters.dateRange.from, 'MMM d')}${filters.dateRange.to ? ` - ${format(filters.dateRange.to, 'MMM d')}` : ''}`
 76 |               : 'Date range'}
 77 |           </Button>
 78 |         </PopoverTrigger>
 79 |         <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
 80 |           <Calendar
 81 |             mode="range"
 82 |             selected={{ from: filters.dateRange.from, to: filters.dateRange.to }}
 83 |             onSelect={(range) =>
 84 |               onChange({ ...filters, dateRange: { from: range?.from, to: range?.to } })
 85 |             }
 86 |             numberOfMonths={2}
 87 |             className="p-2"
 88 |           />
 89 |         </PopoverContent>
 90 |       </Popover>
 91 | 
 92 |       {stringColumns.map((column) => (
 93 |         <Select
 94 |           key={column.name}
 95 |           value={filters.columns[column.name] || ''}
 96 |           onValueChange={(value) => setColumnFilter(column.name, value)}
 97 |         >
 98 |           <SelectTrigger
 99 |             className={cn(
100 |               'h-9 w-auto min-w-[130px] gap-2 font-medium text-sm border-border/50 bg-background/80 rounded-lg',
101 |               filters.columns[column.name] && 'border-primary/50 text-primary bg-primary/5',
102 |             )}
103 |           >
104 |             <SelectValue placeholder={column.name} />
105 |           </SelectTrigger>
106 |           <SelectContent>
107 |             {uniqueValues[column.name]?.map((value) => (
108 |               <SelectItem key={value} value={value} className="text-sm">
109 |                 {value}
110 |               </SelectItem>
111 |             ))}
112 |           </SelectContent>
113 |         </Select>
114 |       ))}
115 | 
116 |       {activeCount > 0 && (
117 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-2">
118 |           {Object.entries(filters.columns)
119 |             .filter(([, value]) => value)
120 |             .map(([columnName, value]) => (
121 |               <Badge
122 |                 key={columnName}
123 |                 variant="secondary"
124 |                 className="gap-1.5 rounded-full border border-border/50 bg-background/80 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/80"
125 |                 onClick={() => removeColumnFilter(columnName)}
126 |               >
127 |                 <span className="text-muted-foreground">{columnName}:</span> {value}
128 |                 <X className="size-3" />
129 |               </Badge>
130 |             ))}
131 |           <Button
132 |             variant="ghost"
133 |             size="sm"
134 |             onClick={clearAll}
135 |             className="h-8 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted rounded-lg"
136 |           >
137 |             Clear
138 |           </Button>
139 |         </div>
140 |       )}
141 |     </motion.div>
142 |   );
143 | };
144 | 
145 | export default DashboardFilters;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DataQualityPanel.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DataQualityPanel.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { AlertTriangle, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, XCircle, ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, ShieldX } from 'lucide-react';
  2 | import { DataQualityReport } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
  3 | import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/utils';
  4 | 
  5 | interface DataQualityPanelProps {
  6 |   qualityReport: DataQualityReport | null;
  7 | }
  8 | 
  9 | const DataQualityPanel = ({ qualityReport }: DataQualityPanelProps) => {
 10 |   if (!qualityReport) return null;
 11 | 
 12 |   const { summary, issues, columnStats } = qualityReport;
 13 | 
 14 |   const getSeverityIcon = (severity: string) => {
 15 |     switch (severity) {
 16 |       case 'critical': return <XCircle className="size-4 text-red-500" />;
 17 |       case 'high': return <AlertCircle className="size-4 text-amber-500" />;
 18 |       case 'medium': return <AlertTriangle className="size-4 text-yellow-500" />;
 19 |       default: return <AlertCircle className="size-4 text-muted-foreground" />;
 20 |     }
 21 |   };
 22 | 
 23 |   const getScoreColor = (score: number) => {
 24 |     if (score >= 90) return 'text-green-600';
 25 |     if (score >= 70) return 'text-amber-600';
 26 |     return 'text-red-600';
 27 |   };
 28 | 
 29 |   const getScoreIcon = (score: number) => {
 30 |     if (score >= 90) return <ShieldCheck className="size-5 text-green-600" />;
 31 |     if (score >= 70) return <ShieldAlert className="size-5 text-amber-600" />;
 32 |     return <ShieldX className="size-5 text-red-600" />;
 33 |   };
 34 | 
 35 |   return (
 36 |     <div className="rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card p-5 shadow-sm">
 37 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between pb-4 border-b border-border/50">
 38 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 39 |           {getScoreIcon(summary.qualityScore)}
 40 |           <div>
 41 |             <p className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Data Quality Report</p>
 42 |             <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Automated validation results</p>
 43 |           </div>
 44 |         </div>
 45 |         <div className="text-right">
 46 |           <p className={cn('text-3xl font-bold', getScoreColor(summary.qualityScore))}>
 47 |             {summary.qualityScore}%
 48 |           </p>
 49 |           <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Quality Score</p>
 50 |         </div>
 51 |       </div>
 52 | 
 53 |       <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 py-4">
 54 |         <div className={cn(
 55 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 56 |           summary.duplicates > 0 ? 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 57 |         )}>
 58 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Duplicates</p>
 59 |           <p className={cn(
 60 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 61 |             summary.duplicates > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'
 62 |           )}>
 63 |             {summary.duplicates}
 64 |           </p>
 65 |         </div>
 66 |         <div className={cn(
 67 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 68 |           summary.outliers > 0 ? 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 69 |         )}>
 70 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Outliers</p>
 71 |           <p className={cn(
 72 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 73 |             summary.outliers > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'
 74 |           )}>
 75 |             {summary.outliers}
 76 |           </p>
 77 |         </div>
 78 |         <div className={cn(
 79 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 80 |           summary.missingValues > 0 ? 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 81 |         )}>
 82 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Missing</p>
 83 |           <p className={cn(
 84 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 85 |             summary.missingValues > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'
 86 |           )}>
 87 |             {summary.missingValues}
 88 |           </p>
 89 |         </div>
 90 |         <div className={cn(
 91 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 92 |           summary.invalidValues > 0 ? 'border-red-200 bg-red-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 93 |         )}>
 94 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Invalid</p>
 95 |           <p className={cn(
 96 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 97 |             summary.invalidValues > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-green-600'
 98 |           )}>
 99 |             {summary.invalidValues}
100 |           </p>
101 |         </div>
102 |       </div>
103 | 
104 |       {issues.length > 0 && (
105 |         <div className="pt-4 border-t border-border/50">
106 |           <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-3">Detected Issues</p>
107 |           <div className="space-y-2">
108 |             {issues.slice(0, 6).map((issue, idx) => (
109 |               <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-3 text-sm">
110 |                 {getSeverityIcon(issue.severity)}
111 |                 <span className="text-foreground flex-1">{issue.message}</span>
112 |                 <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">({issue.count})</span>
113 |               </div>
114 |             ))}
115 |             {issues.length > 6 && (
116 |               <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center pt-2">+{issues.length - 6} more issues</p>
117 |             )}
118 |           </div>
119 |         </div>
120 |       )}
121 | 
122 |       {columnStats.some(c => c.missing > 0 || c.outliers > 0 || c.invalid > 0) && (
123 |         <div className="pt-4 border-t border-border/50 mt-4">
124 |           <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-3">Column Statistics</p>
125 |           <div className="overflow-x-auto">
126 |             <table className="w-full text-sm">
127 |               <thead>
128 |                 <tr className="text-left text-muted-foreground">
129 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Column</th>
130 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Type</th>
131 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Missing</th>
132 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Outliers</th>
133 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Invalid</th>
134 |                 </tr>
135 |               </thead>
136 |               <tbody>
137 |                 {columnStats.filter(c => c.missing > 0 || c.outliers > 0 || c.invalid > 0).map((col, idx) => (
138 |                   <tr key={idx} className="border-t border-border/50">
139 |                     <td className="py-2 text-foreground font-medium">{col.name}</td>
140 |                     <td className="py-2 text-muted-foreground">{col.type}</td>
141 |                     <td className={col.missing > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'}>{col.missing}</td>
142 |                     <td className={col.outliers > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'}>{col.outliers}</td>
143 |                     <td className={col.invalid > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-green-600'}>{col.invalid}</td>
144 |                   </tr>
145 |                 ))}
146 |               </tbody>
147 |             </table>
148 |           </div>
149 |         </div>
150 |       )}
151 |     </div>
152 |   );
153 | };
154 | 
155 | export default DataQualityPanel;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DataScienceSummaryCards.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DataScienceSummaryCards.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import type { ReactNode } from "react";
 2 | 
 3 | function Card({ label, value, hint }: { label: string; value: ReactNode; hint?: string }) {
 4 |   return (
 5 |     <div className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
 6 |       <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">{label}</p>
 7 |       <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-slate-900">{value}</p>
 8 |       {hint ? <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs text-slate-500">{hint}</p> : null}
 9 |     </div>
10 |   );
11 | }
12 | 
13 | export function DataScienceSummaryCards({ profile, anomalies, correlations, model }: any) {
14 |   const anomalyCount = anomalies?.summary?.anomalyCount ?? anomalies?.summary?.count ?? "-";
15 |   const modelScore = model?.metrics ? Object.values(model.metrics)[0] : null;
16 | 
17 |   return (
18 |     <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
19 |       <Card label="Rows" value={profile?.rowCount ?? "-"} />
20 |       <Card label="Columns" value={profile?.columnCount ?? "-"} />
21 |       <Card label="Quality Score" value={profile?.qualityScore ?? "-"} />
22 |       <Card label="Anomalies" value={anomalyCount} hint={anomalies?.method ?? "auto"} />
23 |       <Card label="Measures" value={profile?.measures?.length ?? 0} hint={(profile?.measures ?? []).slice(0, 3).join(", ")} />
24 |       <Card label="Dimensions" value={profile?.dimensions?.length ?? 0} hint={(profile?.dimensions ?? []).slice(0, 3).join(", ")} />
25 |       <Card label="Strong Correlations" value={correlations?.strongPairs?.length ?? 0} />
26 |       <Card
27 |         label="Model Score"
28 |         value={typeof modelScore === "number" ? modelScore.toFixed(3) : "-"}
29 |         hint={model?.modelType ?? "select target"}
30 |       />
31 |     </div>
32 |   );
33 | }
34 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/ExportMenu.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/ExportMenu.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { Download, FileText, FileSpreadsheet, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { Button } from '@/shared/components/ui/button';
 4 | import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuSeparator } from '@/shared/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
 5 | import { toast } from 'sonner';
 6 | 
 7 | export function ExportMenu({ dataset, charts, insights, disabled }) {
 8 |   const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(null);
 9 | 
10 |   const exportToFormat = async (format) => {
11 |     if (!dataset) {
12 |       toast.error('No data to export');
13 |       return;
14 |     }
15 | 
16 |     setExporting(format);
17 |     
18 |     try {
19 |       const response = await fetch('/api/automation/report', {
20 |         method: 'POST',
21 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
22 |         body: JSON.stringify({
23 |           name: dataset.name,
24 |           rows: dataset.rows,
25 |           columns: dataset.columns,
26 |           insights,
27 |           charts,
28 |           format
29 |         })
30 |       });
31 | 
32 |       if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Export failed');
33 | 
34 |       const blob = await response.blob();
35 |       const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
36 |       const a = document.createElement('a');
37 |       a.href = url;
38 |       a.download = `${dataset.name || 'report'}.${format}`;
39 |       a.click();
40 |       URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
41 |       
42 |       toast.success(`Exported as ${format.toUpperCase()}`);
43 |     } catch (error) {
44 |       console.error('Export error:', error);
45 |       toast.error('Export failed');
46 |     } finally {
47 |       setExporting(null);
48 |     }
49 |   };
50 | 
51 |   return (
52 |     <DropdownMenu>
53 |       <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
54 |         <Button variant="outline" size="sm" disabled={disabled || exporting !== null}>
55 |           {exporting ? <Loader2 className="mr-2 size-4 animate-spin" /> : <Download className="mr-2 size-4" />}
56 |           Export
57 |         </Button>
58 |       </DropdownMenuTrigger>
59 |       <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
60 |         <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => exportToFormat('html')}>
61 |           <FileText className="mr-2 size-4" />
62 |           HTML Report
63 |         </DropdownMenuItem>
64 |         <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => exportToFormat('pdf')}>
65 |           <FileText className="mr-2 size-4" />
66 |           PDF Document
67 |         </DropdownMenuItem>
68 |         <DropdownMenuSeparator />
69 |         <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => exportToFormat('excel')}>
70 |           <FileSpreadsheet className="mr-2 size-4" />
71 |           Excel Spreadsheet
72 |         </DropdownMenuItem>
73 |       </DropdownMenuContent>
74 |     </DropdownMenu>
75 |   );
76 | }
77 | 
78 | export default ExportMenu;
```

---

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/KPICard.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/KPICard.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
 2 | import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, DollarSign, Package, Percent, Star, Table2, Columns3, BarChart3, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight, Shield, Globe, Code, AlertTriangle, Siren } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { KPI } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
 4 | import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/utils';
 5 | 
 6 | const iconMap: Record<string, React.ElementType> = {
 7 |   dollar: DollarSign,
 8 |   package: Package,
 9 |   percent: Percent,
10 |   star: Star,
11 |   rows: Table2,
12 |   columns: Columns3,
13 |   chart: BarChart3,
14 |   shield: Shield,
15 |   globe: Globe,
16 |   code: Code,
17 |   alert: AlertTriangle,
18 |   risk: Siren,
19 | };
20 | 
21 | const statusColors: Record<string, string> = {
22 |   good: 'border-success/40 bg-success/10 text-success',
23 |   warning: 'border-yellow-500/40 bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500',
24 |   critical: 'border-destructive/40 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive',
25 | };
26 | 
27 | const trendColors: Record<string, string> = {
28 |   up: 'text-success',
29 |   down: 'text-destructive',
30 |   stable: 'text-muted-foreground',
31 | };
32 | 
33 | interface KPICardProps {
34 |   kpi: KPI;
35 |   index: number;
36 | }
37 | 
38 | const KPICard = ({ kpi, index }: KPICardProps) => {
39 |   const Icon = iconMap[kpi.icon] || DollarSign;
40 |   const trend = kpi.trend ?? 'stable';
41 |   const TrendIcon = trend === 'up' ? TrendingUp : trend === 'down' ? TrendingDown : Minus;
42 |   const isPositive = (kpi.change ?? 0) >= 0;
43 |   const sparklineValues = kpi.sparkline ?? [];
44 |   const maxValue = sparklineValues.length > 0 ? Math.max(...sparklineValues) : 0;
45 |   const minValue = sparklineValues.length > 0 ? Math.min(...sparklineValues) : 0;
46 |   const range = maxValue - minValue || 1;
47 |   const points = sparklineValues.map((value, pointIndex) => {
48 |     const x = sparklineValues.length === 1 ? 100 : (pointIndex / Math.max(sparklineValues.length - 1, 1)) * 100;
49 |     const y = 28 - (((value - minValue) / range) * 24);
50 |     return `${x},${y}`;
51 |   }).join(' ');
52 | 
53 |   const colorSchemes = [
54 |     { bg: 'bg-blue-50', border: 'border-blue-100', icon: 'text-blue-600', trend: 'text-blue-600', trendBg: 'bg-blue-50' },
55 |     { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', border: 'border-emerald-100', icon: 'text-emerald-600', trend: 'text-emerald-600', trendBg: 'bg-emerald-50' },
56 |     { bg: 'bg-violet-50', border: 'border-violet-100', icon: 'text-violet-600', trend: 'text-violet-600', trendBg: 'bg-violet-50' },
57 |     { bg: 'bg-amber-50', border: 'border-amber-100', icon: 'text-amber-600', trend: 'text-amber-600', trendBg: 'bg-amber-50' },
58 |   ];
59 |   const scheme = colorSchemes[index % colorSchemes.length];
60 | 
61 |   return (
62 |     <motion.div
63 |       initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
64 |       animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
65 |       transition={{ delay: index * 0.05, duration: 0.3 }}
66 |       whileHover={{ y: -2 }}
67 |       className={cn(
68 |         'group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card p-5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md',
69 |         scheme.border
70 |       )}
71 |     >
72 |       <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
73 |         <div className={cn('flex size-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg', scheme.bg)}>
74 |           <Icon className={cn('size-5', scheme.icon)} />
75 |         </div>
76 |         {kpi.change !== undefined && (
77 |           <div className={cn('flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium', scheme.trendBg, scheme.trend)}>
78 |             {isPositive ? (
79 |               <ArrowUpRight className="size-3" />
80 |             ) : (
81 |               <ArrowDownRight className="size-3" />
82 |             )}
83 |             <span>{Math.abs(kpi.change ?? 0)}%</span>
84 |           </div>
85 |         )}
86 |       </div>
87 |       
88 |       <div className="mt-4">
89 |         <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">{kpi.title}</p>
90 |         <p className="mt-1 text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground">{kpi.value}</p>
91 |       </div>
92 |     </motion.div>
93 |   );
94 | };
95 | 
96 | export default KPICard;
```
