  1 | import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
  2 | import {
  3 |   AlertTriangle,
  4 |   ArrowDown,
  5 |   ArrowUp,
  6 |   ArrowUpDown,
  7 |   Bot,
  8 |   CheckCircle2,
  9 |   ChevronLeft,
 10 |   ChevronRight,
 11 |   Columns3,
 12 |   Download,
 13 |   FileSpreadsheet,
 14 |   Filter,
 15 |   MoreVertical,
 16 |   Pencil,
 17 |   RefreshCw,
 18 |   Search,
 19 |   Send,
 20 |   Sparkles,
 21 |   Table2,
 22 |   Trash2,
 23 |   Wand2,
 24 |   X,
 25 | } from "lucide-react";
 26 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
 27 | import type { Dataset } from "@/features/data/model/dataStore";
 28 | import {
 29 |   applyFilters,
 30 |   buildDataQualityScore,
 31 |   buildDatasetProfile,
 32 |   cleanDatasetRows,
 33 |   exportRowsToCsv,
 34 |   safeNumber,
 35 |   type DashboardFilterCondition,
 36 |   type DashboardFilters,
 37 |   type FilterOperator,
 38 |   type Row,
 39 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 40 | import StatusPanel from "@/shared/layout/StatusPanel";
 41 | 
 42 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur";
 43 | const PAGE_SIZES = [10, 25, 50, 100];
 44 | const OPERATORS: Array<{ value: FilterOperator; label: string }> = [
 45 |   { value: "equals", label: "Equals" },
 46 |   { value: "not_equals", label: "Not equals" },
 47 |   { value: "contains", label: "Contains" },
 48 |   { value: "gt", label: "Greater than" },
 49 |   { value: "gte", label: "Greater or equal" },
 50 |   { value: "lt", label: "Less than" },
 51 |   { value: "lte", label: "Less or equal" },
 52 | ];
 53 | 
 54 | function downloadFile(fileName: string, content: string, mime: string) {
 55 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mime });
 56 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 57 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 58 |   link.href = url;
 59 |   link.download = fileName;
 60 |   link.click();
 61 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 62 | }
 63 | 
 64 | function QualityRing({ score }: { score: number }) {
 65 |   return (
 66 |     <div
 67 |       className="grid size-24 place-items-center rounded-full"
 68 |       style={{ background: `conic-gradient(#22c55e ${score * 3.6}deg, rgba(51,65,85,0.9) 0deg)` }}
 69 |     >
 70 |       <div className="grid size-16 place-items-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-center">
 71 |         <span className="text-xl font-bold text-white">{Math.round(score)}%</span>
 72 |       </div>
 73 |     </div>
 74 |   );
 75 | }
 76 | 
 77 | function normalizeText(value: unknown) {
 78 |   return String(value ?? "").trim().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
 79 | }
 80 | 
 81 | function cleanRowsForPreview(rows: Row[]) {
 82 |   const cleaned: Row[] = [];
 83 |   let trimmedCells = 0;
 84 |   let removedEmptyRows = 0;
 85 | 
 86 |   rows.forEach((row) => {
 87 |     const next: Row = {};
 88 |     let hasValue = false;
 89 | 
 90 |     Object.entries(row).forEach(([key, value]) => {
 91 |       if (key.startsWith("__")) {
 92 |         next[key] = value;
 93 |         return;
 94 |       }
 95 |       const nextValue = typeof value === "string" ? normalizeText(value) : value;
 96 |       if (typeof value === "string" && nextValue !== value) trimmedCells += 1;
 97 |       if (nextValue !== null && nextValue !== undefined && String(nextValue).trim()) hasValue = true;
 98 |       next[key] = nextValue;
 99 |     });
100 | 
101 |     if (hasValue) cleaned.push(next);
102 |     else removedEmptyRows += 1;
103 |   });
104 | 
105 |   return { rows: cleaned, trimmedCells, removedEmptyRows };
106 | }
107 | 
108 | export default function DataTablePage() {
109 |   const {
110 |     dataset,
111 |     isHydrating,
112 |     apiError,
113 |     loadDemo,
114 |     retryHydrate,
115 |     replaceDatasetLocally,
116 |   } = useData();
117 | 
118 |   const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
119 |   const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState("");
120 |   const [sortCol, setSortCol] = useState<string | null>(null);
121 |   const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState<"asc" | "desc">("asc");
122 |   const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
123 |   const [pageSize, setPageSize] = useState(25);
124 |   const [selectedRows, setSelectedRows] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
125 |   const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
126 |   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<"all" | "flagged" | "cleaned" | "schema">("all");
127 |   const [showAdvancedFilter, setShowAdvancedFilter] = useState(false);
128 |   const [showColumns, setShowColumns] = useState(false);
129 |   const [filterDraft, setFilterDraft] = useState({ column: "", operator: "equals" as FilterOperator, value: "" });
130 |   const [filters, setFilters] = useState<DashboardFilters>({ conditions: [] });
131 |   const [cleanPreview, setCleanPreview] = useState<ReturnType<typeof cleanRowsForPreview> | null>(null);
132 |   const [assistantNote, setAssistantNote] = useState("Ready to inspect this table.");
133 | 
134 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows((dataset?.rows || []) as Row[]), [dataset?.rows]);
135 |   const indexedRows = useMemo(
136 |     () => rows.map((row, index) => ({ ...row, __displayId: String(row.__rowId ?? index), __displayIndex: index + 1 })),
137 |     [rows],
138 |   );
139 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
140 |   const quality = useMemo(() => buildDataQualityScore(rows), [rows]);
141 |   const columns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name);
142 | 
143 |   useEffect(() => {
144 |     setVisibleColumns(new Set(columns));
145 |     setSelectedRows(new Set());
146 |     setFilters({ conditions: [] });
147 |     setPage(0);
148 |   }, [dataset?.id]);
149 | 
150 |   useEffect(() => {
151 |     const timer = window.setTimeout(() => setDebouncedSearch(search), 200);
152 |     return () => window.clearTimeout(timer);
153 |   }, [search]);
154 | 
155 |   const filteredRows = useMemo(() => {
156 |     const tableFilters = activeTab === "flagged"
157 |       ? {
158 |           ...filters,
159 |           conditions: [
160 |             ...((filters.conditions || []) as DashboardFilterCondition[]),
161 |           ],
162 |         }
163 |       : filters;
164 | 
165 |     let next = applyFilters(indexedRows, tableFilters);
166 | 
167 |     if (activeTab === "flagged") {
168 |       next = next.filter((row) => columns.some((column) => row[column] === null || row[column] === undefined || String(row[column]).trim() === ""));
169 |     }
170 | 
171 |     if (debouncedSearch.trim()) {
172 |       const query = debouncedSearch.trim().toLowerCase();
173 |       next = next.filter((row) => columns.some((column) => String(row[column] ?? "").toLowerCase().includes(query)));
174 |     }
175 | 
176 |     return next;
177 |   }, [activeTab, columns, filters, indexedRows, debouncedSearch]);
178 | 
179 |   const sortedRows = useMemo(() => {
180 |     if (!sortCol) return filteredRows;
181 |     return [...filteredRows].sort((left, right) => {
182 |       const leftNumber = safeNumber(left[sortCol]);
183 |       const rightNumber = safeNumber(right[sortCol]);
184 |       const comparison =
185 |         leftNumber !== null && rightNumber !== null
186 |           ? leftNumber - rightNumber
187 |           : String(left[sortCol] ?? "").localeCompare(String(right[sortCol] ?? ""));
188 |       return sortDir === "asc" ? comparison : -comparison;
189 |     });
190 |   }, [filteredRows, sortCol, sortDir]);
191 | 
192 |   const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(sortedRows.length / pageSize));
193 |   const pageRows = sortedRows.slice(page * pageSize, (page + 1) * pageSize);
194 |   const visibleColumnList = columns.filter((column) => visibleColumns.has(column));
195 |   const duplicateCount = useMemo(() => {
196 |     const seen = new Map<string, number>();
197 |     rows.forEach((row) => {
198 |       const signature = JSON.stringify(row);
199 |       seen.set(signature, (seen.get(signature) || 0) + 1);
200 |     });
201 |     return Array.from(seen.values()).reduce((total, count) => total + Math.max(count - 1, 0), 0);
202 |   }, [rows]);
203 | 
204 |   if (isHydrating) {
205 |     return <StatusPanel title="Loading table" message="Preparing your dataset rows." />;
206 |   }
207 | 
208 |   if (apiError) {
209 |     return <StatusPanel title="Table unavailable" message={apiError} actionLabel="Retry" onAction={() => void retryHydrate()} />;
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   if (!dataset) {
213 |     return <StatusPanel title="No dataset loaded" message="Upload a file or load demo data before opening the table." actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset" onAction={() => void loadDemo()} />;
214 |   }
215 | 
216 |   function setSort(column: string) {
217 |     if (sortCol === column) {
218 |       setSortDir((current) => (current === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc"));
219 |     } else {
220 |       setSortCol(column);
221 |       setSortDir("asc");
222 |     }
223 |     setPage(0);
224 |   }
225 | 
226 |   function rowKey(row: Row) {
227 |     return String(row.__displayId);
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   function toggleSelect(row: Row) {
231 |     const key = rowKey(row);
232 |     setSelectedRows((current) => {
233 |       const next = new Set(current);
234 |       if (next.has(key)) next.delete(key);
235 |       else next.add(key);
236 |       return next;
237 |     });
238 |   }
239 | 
240 |   function selectPageRows(checked: boolean) {
241 |     setSelectedRows((current) => {
242 |       const next = new Set(current);
243 |       pageRows.forEach((row) => {
244 |         if (checked) next.add(rowKey(row));
245 |         else next.delete(rowKey(row));
246 |       });
247 |       return next;
248 |     });
249 |   }
250 | 
251 |   function applyAdvancedFilter() {
252 |     if (!filterDraft.column || !filterDraft.value.trim()) return;
253 |     const condition: DashboardFilterCondition = {
254 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
255 |       column: filterDraft.column,
256 |       operator: filterDraft.operator,
257 |       value: filterDraft.value.trim(),
258 |     };
259 |     setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, conditions: [...(current.conditions || []), condition] }));
260 |     setFilterDraft({ column: columns[0] || "", operator: "equals", value: "" });
261 |     setShowAdvancedFilter(false);
262 |     setPage(0);
263 |   }
264 | 
265 |   function removeCondition(id: string) {
266 |     setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, conditions: (current.conditions || []).filter((condition) => condition.id !== id) }));
267 |   }
268 | 
269 |   function exportVisibleRows() {
270 |     const rowsToExport = sortedRows.map((row) =>
271 |       Object.fromEntries(visibleColumnList.map((column) => [column, row[column]])),
272 |     );
273 |     downloadFile(`${dataset.name || "dataset"}-table.csv`, exportRowsToCsv(rowsToExport as Row[]), "text/csv;charset=utf-8");
274 |   }
275 | 
276 |   function deleteSelectedRows() {
277 |     if (!selectedRows.size) return;
278 |     if (!window.confirm(`Delete ${selectedRows.size} selected row(s) from the current table view?`)) return;
279 |     const nextRows = indexedRows.filter((row) => !selectedRows.has(rowKey(row))).map(({ __displayId, __displayIndex, ...row }) => row);
280 |     const nextDataset: Dataset = { ...dataset, rows: nextRows as Dataset["rows"], rowCount: nextRows.length };
281 |     replaceDatasetLocally(nextDataset);
282 |     setSelectedRows(new Set());
283 |   }
284 | 
285 |   function applyCleanPreview() {
286 |     if (!cleanPreview) return;
287 |     const nextDataset: Dataset = { ...dataset, rows: cleanPreview.rows as Dataset["rows"], rowCount: cleanPreview.rows.length };
288 |     replaceDatasetLocally(nextDataset);
289 |     setCleanPreview(null);
290 |     setAssistantNote(`Applied cleaning: trimmed ${cleanPreview.trimmedCells} cells and removed ${cleanPreview.removedEmptyRows} empty rows.`);
291 |   }
292 | 
293 |   const typeCounts = {
294 |     numeric: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "number").length,
295 |     text: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "string").length,
296 |     date: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "date").length,
297 |     boolean: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "boolean").length,
298 |   };
299 | 
300 |   return (
301 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
302 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
303 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
304 |           <div>
305 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
306 |               <span className="font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</span>
307 |               <span>-</span>
308 |               <span>{rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
309 |             </div>
310 |             <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-semibold text-white">Data Table</h1>
311 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Explore, clean, filter, and manage your data.</p>
312 |           </div>
313 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
314 |             <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
315 |               <Sparkles className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
316 |               Ask AI
317 |             </button>
318 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportVisibleRows} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
319 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
320 |               Export
321 |             </button>
322 |             <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2 hover:bg-slate-800">
323 |               <MoreVertical className="size-5" />
324 |             </button>
325 |           </div>
326 |         </header>
327 | 
328 |         <div className="grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[1fr_350px]">
329 |           <main className="space-y-5">
330 |             <section className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
331 |               <div className="grid gap-5 xl:grid-cols-[1fr_280px_120px] xl:items-center">
332 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-5">
333 |                   <div className="grid size-24 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-blue-600">
334 |                     <FileSpreadsheet className="size-11 text-white" />
335 |                   </div>
336 |                   <div>
337 |                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
338 |                       <h2 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</h2>
339 |                       <Pencil className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
340 |                       <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-green-300">Ready</span>
341 |                     </div>
342 |                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
343 |                       CSV - {rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows - {columns.length.toLocaleString()} columns - Uploaded {new Date(dataset.uploadedAt).toLocaleString()}
344 |                     </p>
345 |                     <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-400">Manage this dataset with table operations and local analytics checks.</p>
346 |                   </div>
347 |                 </div>
348 | 
349 |                 <div className="space-y-2">
350 |                   {[
351 |                     ["Numeric", typeCounts.numeric, "#2563eb"],
352 |                     ["Text", typeCounts.text, "#7c3aed"],
353 |                     ["Date", typeCounts.date, "#06b6d4"],
354 |                     ["Boolean", typeCounts.boolean, "#22c55e"],
355 |                   ].map(([label, value, color]) => (
356 |                     <div key={label as string} className="grid grid-cols-[72px_1fr_44px] items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-300">
357 |                       <span>{label}</span>
358 |                       <div className="h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-800">
359 |                         <div
360 |                           className="h-2 rounded-full"
361 |                           style={{ width: `${columns.length ? (Number(value) / columns.length) * 100 : 0}%`, background: String(color) }}
362 |                         />
363 |                       </div>
364 |                       <span>{Number(value)}</span>
365 |                     </div>
366 |                   ))}
367 |                 </div>
368 | 
369 |                 <QualityRing score={quality.finalScore} />
370 |               </div>
371 |             </section>
372 | 
373 |             <section className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-6">
374 |               {[
375 |                 ["Total Rows", rows.length, "100% valid"],
376 |                 ["Columns", columns.length, "Detected"],
377 |                 ["Numeric Columns", typeCounts.numeric, `${columns.length ? Math.round((typeCounts.numeric / columns.length) * 100) : 0}%`],
378 |                 ["Text Columns", typeCounts.text, `${columns.length ? Math.round((typeCounts.text / columns.length) * 100) : 0}%`],
379 |                 ["Missing Values", quality.missingCells, `${quality.completeness}% complete`],
380 |                 ["Data Quality", `${quality.finalScore}%`, "Excellent"],
381 |               ].map(([title, value, subtitle], index) => (
382 |                 <div key={String(title)} className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
383 |                   <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
384 |                     <div>
385 |                       <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{title}</p>
386 |                       <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{String(value)}</p>
387 |                       <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500">{subtitle}</p>
388 |                     </div>
389 |                     <div className={`rounded-2xl p-3 ${index === 4 ? "bg-red-500/20 text-red-300" : "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300"}`}>
390 |                       {index === 4 ? <AlertTriangle className="size-5" /> : <Table2 className="size-5" />}
391 |                     </div>
392 |                   </div>
393 |                 </div>
394 |               ))}
395 |             </section>
396 | 
397 |             <section className={`${CARD} overflow-hidden`}>
398 |               <div className="border-b border-slate-700/60 p-2">
399 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
400 |                   {[
401 |                     ["all", "All Rows", sortedRows.length],
402 |                     ["flagged", "Flagged", quality.missingCells],
403 |                     ["cleaned", "Cleaned", cleanPreview?.rows.length || rows.length],
404 |                     ["schema", "Schema", columns.length],
405 |                   ].map(([key, label, count]) => (
406 |                     <button type="button"
407 |                       key={String(key)}
408 |                       onClick={() => setActiveTab(key as typeof activeTab)}
409 |                       className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm transition ${
410 |                         activeTab === key ? "bg-violet-600 text-white" : "text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white"
411 |                       }`}
412 |                     >
413 |                       {label} <span className="ml-2 rounded-full bg-slate-800 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs">{String(count)}</span>
414 |                     </button>
415 |                   ))}
416 |                 </div>
417 |               </div>
418 | 
419 |               <div className="space-y-3 border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4">
420 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
421 |                   <div className="relative min-w-[260px] flex-1">
422 |                     <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 size-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-500" />
423 |                     <input
424 |                       value={search}
425 |                       onChange={(event) => {
426 |                         setSearch(event.target.value);
427 |                         setPage(0);
428 |                       }}
429 |                       placeholder="Search all columns..."
430 |                       className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm text-white outline-none"
431 |                     />
432 |                   </div>
433 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowAdvancedFilter((current) => !current)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
434 |                     <Filter className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
435 |                     Advanced Filter
436 |                   </button>
437 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setSort(columns[0] || "")} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
438 |                     <ArrowUpDown className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
439 |                     Sort
440 |                   </button>
441 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowColumns((current) => !current)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
442 |                     <Columns3 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
443 |                     Columns
444 |                   </button>
445 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setCleanPreview(cleanRowsForPreview(rows))} className="rounded-xl border border-violet-500/50 bg-violet-500/15 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-violet-100 hover:bg-violet-500/25">
446 |                     <Wand2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
447 |                     AI Clean / Enrich
448 |                   </button>
449 |                   <button type="button" onClick={deleteSelectedRows} className="rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-200 hover:bg-red-500/20">
450 |                     <Trash2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
451 |                     Row Actions
452 |                   </button>
453 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => { setSearch(""); setFilters({ conditions: [] }); setSelectedRows(new Set()); setPage(0); }} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
454 |                     <RefreshCw className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
455 |                     Reset
456 |                   </button>
457 |                 </div>
458 | 
459 |                 {showAdvancedFilter && (
460 |                   <div className="grid gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 p-3 md:grid-cols-[1fr_180px_1fr_auto]">
461 |                     <select value={filterDraft.column} onChange={(event) => setFilterDraft((current) => ({ ...current, column: event.target.value }))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none">
462 |                       <option value="">Column</option>
463 |                       {columns.map((column) => <option key={column} value={column}>{column}</option>)}
464 |                     </select>
465 |                     <select value={filterDraft.operator} onChange={(event) => setFilterDraft((current) => ({ ...current, operator: event.target.value as FilterOperator }))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none">
466 |                       {OPERATORS.map((operator) => <option key={operator.value} value={operator.value}>{operator.label}</option>)}
467 |                     </select>
468 |                     <input value={filterDraft.value} onChange={(event) => setFilterDraft((current) => ({ ...current, value: event.target.value }))} placeholder="Value" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none" />
469 |                     <button type="button" onClick={applyAdvancedFilter} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Apply</button>
470 |                   </div>
471 |                 )}
472 | 
473 |                 {showColumns && (
474 |                   <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 p-3">
475 |                     {columns.map((column) => (
476 |                       <label key={column} className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-200">
477 |                         <input
478 |                           type="checkbox"
479 |                           checked={visibleColumns.has(column)}
480 |                           onChange={(event) => {
481 |                             setVisibleColumns((current) => {
482 |                               const next = new Set(current);
483 |                               if (event.target.checked) next.add(column);
484 |                               else next.delete(column);
485 |                               return next;
486 |                             });
487 |                           }}
488 |                         />
489 |                         {column}
490 |                       </label>
491 |                     ))}
492 |                   </div>
493 |                 )}
494 | 
495 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
496 |                   <span>Active Filters:</span>
497 |                   {(filters.conditions || []).length ? (
498 |                     filters.conditions?.map((condition) => (
499 |                       <button type="button" key={condition.id} onClick={() => removeCondition(condition.id)} className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-slate-200">
500 |                         {condition.column} {condition.operator} {condition.value}
501 |                         <X className="ml-2 inline size-3" />
502 |                       </button>
503 |                     ))
504 |                   ) : (
505 |                     <span className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-1 text-xs">No filters applied</span>
506 |                   )}
507 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setFilters({ conditions: [] })} className="rounded-full border border-violet-500/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-violet-200">Clear all</button>
508 |                 </div>
509 |               </div>
510 | 
511 |               {activeTab === "schema" ? (
512 |                 <div className="overflow-x-auto">
513 |                   <table className="w-full min-w-[800px] text-left text-sm">
514 |                     <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
515 |                       <tr>
516 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Column</th>
517 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Type</th>
518 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Role</th>
519 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Missing %</th>
520 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Unique</th>
521 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Sample Values</th>
522 |                       </tr>
523 |                     </thead>
524 |                     <tbody>
525 |                       {profile.columns.map((column) => (
526 |                         <tr key={column.name} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200">
527 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{column.name}</td>
528 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.type}</td>
529 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.role}</td>
530 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.missingPct}%</td>
531 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.uniqueCount}</td>
532 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-400">{column.sampleValues.join(", ") || "-"}</td>
533 |                         </tr>
534 |                       ))}
535 |                     </tbody>
536 |                   </table>
537 |                 </div>
538 |               ) : (
539 |                 <>
540 |                   <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-700/60 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
541 |                     <label className="flex items-center gap-3">
542 |                       <input
543 |                         type="checkbox"
544 |                         checked={pageRows.length > 0 && pageRows.every((row) => selectedRows.has(rowKey(row)))}
545 |                         onChange={(event) => selectPageRows(event.target.checked)}
546 |                       />
547 |                       {selectedRows.size} of {sortedRows.length} rows selected
548 |                     </label>
549 |                     <span>{sortedRows.length.toLocaleString()} rows - {visibleColumnList.length} columns</span>
550 |                   </div>
551 |                   <div className="overflow-x-auto">
552 |                     <table className="w-full min-w-[900px] text-left text-sm">
553 |                       <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
554 |                         <tr>
555 |                           <th className="px-4 py-3"></th>
556 |                           <th className="px-4 py-3">#</th>
557 |                           {visibleColumnList.map((column) => {
558 |                             const columnProfile = profile.columns.find((item) => item.name === column);
559 |                             return (
560 |                               <th key={column} className="px-4 py-3">
561 |                                 <button type="button" onClick={() => setSort(column)} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-left">
562 |                                   {column}
563 |                                   <span className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px]">{columnProfile?.type || "string"}</span>
564 |                                   {sortCol === column ? (sortDir === "asc" ? <ArrowUp className="size-3" /> : <ArrowDown className="size-3" />) : <ArrowUpDown className="size-3" />}
565 |                                 </button>
566 |                               </th>
567 |                             );
568 |                           })}
569 |                           <th className="px-4 py-3"></th>
570 |                         </tr>
571 |                       </thead>
572 |                       <tbody>
573 |                         {pageRows.map((row) => (
574 |                           <tr key={rowKey(row)} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800/40">
575 |                             <td className="px-4 py-3"><input type="checkbox" checked={selectedRows.has(rowKey(row))} onChange={() => toggleSelect(row)} /></td>
576 |                             <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-500">{String(row.__displayIndex)}</td>
577 |                             {visibleColumnList.map((column) => (
578 |                               <td key={column} className="max-w-[240px] truncate px-4 py-3">{String(row[column] ?? "") || "-"}</td>
579 |                             ))}
580 |                             <td className="px-4 py-3"><MoreVertical className="size-4 text-slate-500" /></td>
581 |                           </tr>
582 |                         ))}
583 |                       </tbody>
584 |                     </table>
585 |                   </div>
586 |                   <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 border-t border-slate-700/60 p-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
587 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
588 |                       <span>Rows per page</span>
589 |                       <select value={pageSize} onChange={(event) => { setPageSize(Number(event.target.value)); setPage(0); }} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-2 text-slate-100">
590 |                         {PAGE_SIZES.map((size) => <option key={size} value={size}>{size}</option>)}
591 |                       </select>
592 |                     </div>
593 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
594 |                       <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">Showing {sortedRows.length ? page * pageSize + 1 : 0} to {Math.min((page + 1) * pageSize, sortedRows.length)} of {sortedRows.length}</span>
595 |                       <button type="button" disabled={page === 0} onClick={() => setPage((current) => Math.max(current - 1, 0))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2 disabled:opacity-40"><ChevronLeft className="size-4" /></button>
596 |                       <span className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm">{page + 1}</span>
597 |                       <button type="button" disabled={page >= totalPages - 1} onClick={() => setPage((current) => Math.min(current + 1, totalPages - 1))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2 disabled:opacity-40"><ChevronRight className="size-4" /></button>
598 |                     </div>
599 |                   </div>
600 |                 </>
601 |               )}
602 |             </section>
603 |           </main>
604 | 
605 |           <aside className={`${CARD} h-fit p-5`}>
606 |             <div className="mb-5 flex items-start justify-between">
607 |               <div>
608 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
609 |                   <Bot className="size-5 text-violet-300" />
610 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">AI Table Assistant</h2>
611 |                   <span className="rounded-full bg-violet-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase text-violet-200">Beta</span>
612 |                 </div>
613 |                 <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">Smart insights and actions for the current visible table.</p>
614 |               </div>
615 |             </div>
616 | 
617 |             <div className="space-y-2">
618 |               {[
619 |                 ["Find duplicates", `${duplicateCount} duplicate rows found`],
620 |                 ["Detect missing values", `${quality.missingCells} missing cells detected`],
621 |                 ["Summarize columns", `${columns.length} columns profiled`],
622 |                 ["Create chart from selected rows", `${selectedRows.size} rows selected`],
623 |                 ["Clean text values", "Trim and normalize whitespace"],
624 |               ].map(([label, note]) => (
625 |                 <button type="button" key={label} onClick={() => setAssistantNote(note)} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800">
626 |                   {label}
627 |                 </button>
628 |               ))}
629 |             </div>
630 | 
631 |             <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
632 |               <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Quick Insights</h3>
633 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-green-500/25 bg-green-500/10 p-4 text-sm text-green-100">
634 |                 <CheckCircle2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
635 |                 {quality.missingCells ? `${quality.missingCells} missing cells need review.` : "No missing values detected."}
636 |               </div>
637 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-blue-500/25 bg-blue-500/10 p-4 text-sm text-blue-100">
638 |                 {profile.primaryCategory ? `${profile.primaryCategory.uniqueCount} unique ${profile.primaryCategory.name} values found.` : "No categorical column detected."}
639 |               </div>
640 |             </div>
641 | 
642 |             <div className="mt-5">
643 |               <div className="mb-2 flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
644 |                 <span className="text-white">Data Health</span>
645 |                 <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-green-300">Excellent</span>
646 |               </div>
647 |               <div className="h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-800">
648 |                 <div className="h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" style={{ width: `${quality.finalScore}%` }} />
649 |               </div>
650 |               <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500">{assistantNote}</p>
651 |             </div>
652 | 
653 |             <div className="mt-8 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 p-2">
654 |               <input aria-label="Ask anything about this table..." placeholder="Ask anything about this table..." className="min-w-0 flex-1 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500" />
655 |               <button type="button" className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 p-3"><Send className="size-4" /></button>
656 |             </div>
657 |             <p className="mt-4 text-center text-xs text-slate-500">AI can make mistakes. Verify important results.</p>
658 |           </aside>
659 |         </div>
660 |       </div>
661 | 
662 |       {cleanPreview && (
663 |         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/60 p-4">
664 |           <div className={`${CARD} w-full max-w-xl p-5`}>
665 |             <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
666 |               <div>
667 |                 <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white">Cleaning Preview</h2>
668 |                 <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Review local cleaning operations before applying them.</p>
669 |               </div>
670 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => setCleanPreview(null)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2"><X className="size-4" /></button>
671 |             </div>
672 |             <div className="mt-5 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3">
673 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-4"><p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Trimmed cells</p><p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold">{cleanPreview.trimmedCells}</p></div>
674 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-4"><p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Empty rows</p><p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold">{cleanPreview.removedEmptyRows}</p></div>
675 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-4"><p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Result rows</p><p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold">{cleanPreview.rows.length}</p></div>
676 |             </div>
677 |             <div className="mt-5 flex justify-end gap-2">
678 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => setCleanPreview(null)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Cancel</button>
679 |               <button type="button" onClick={applyCleanPreview} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Apply Cleaning</button>
680 |             </div>
681 |           </div>
682 |         </div>
683 |       )}
684 |     </div>
685 |   );
686 | }
687 | 
```

 60 | function downloadFile(fileName: string, content: string, mime: string) {
 61 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mime });
 62 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 63 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 64 |   link.href = url;
 65 |   link.download = fileName;
 66 |   link.click();
 67 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 68 | }
 69 | 
 70 | function formatDate(value?: Date | string | null) {
 71 |   if (!value) return "Just now";
 72 |   const date = new Date(value);
 73 |   return Number.isFinite(date.getTime()) ? date.toLocaleString() : "Just now";
 74 | }
 75 | 
 76 | function fileType(datasetName?: string, sourceType?: string) {
 77 |   if (sourceType === "pdf") return "PDF";
 78 |   const ext = datasetName?.split(".").pop()?.toUpperCase();
 79 |   return ext && ext.length <= 5 ? ext : "CSV";
 80 | }
 81 | 
 82 | function QualityRing({ score }: { score: number }) {
 83 |   return (
 84 |     <div
 85 |       className="grid size-20 place-items-center rounded-full"
 86 |       style={{
 87 |         background: `conic-gradient(#22c55e ${score * 3.6}deg, rgba(51,65,85,0.9) 0deg)`,
 88 |       }}
 89 |     >
 90 |       <div className="grid size-14 place-items-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-center">
 91 |         <span className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{Math.round(score)}%</span>
 92 |       </div>
 93 |     </div>
 94 |   );
 95 | }

110 |         </div>

116 | export default function EliteDashboardPage() {
117 |   const { dataset, isHydrating, apiError, loadDemo, retryHydrate, deleteDataset } = useData();
118 |   const [filters, setFilters] = useState<DashboardFilters>({});
119 |   const [manualCharts, setManualCharts] = useState<DashboardChart[]>([]);
120 |   const [manualKpis, setManualKpis] = useState<DashboardKpi[]>([]);
121 |   const [hiddenChartIds, setHiddenChartIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
122 |   const [chartTypeOverrides, setChartTypeOverrides] = useState<Record<string, ChartType>>({});
123 |   const [showSchema, setShowSchema] = useState(false);
124 |   const [dashboardMode, setDashboardMode] = useState<"Executive" | "Analyst" | "Story">("Executive");
125 | 
126 |   const rawRows = useMemo<Row[]>(() => (dataset?.rows || []) as Row[], [dataset?.rows]);
127 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows(rawRows), [rawRows]);
128 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
129 |   const quality = useMemo(() => buildDataQualityScore(rows), [rows]);
130 |   const filteredRows = useMemo(() => applyFilters(rows, filters), [rows, filters]);
131 |   const defaultKpis = useMemo(() => buildKpis(filteredRows), [filteredRows]);
132 |   const tableColumns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name);
133 |   const schemaDashboard = useSchemaTrainedDashboard({
134 |     datasetId: dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
135 |     datasetName: dataset?.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
136 |     rows,
137 |     columns: dataset?.columns || tableColumns,
138 |     dictionaryRows: (dataset as any)?.dictionaryRows || (dataset as any)?.dataDictionary || [],
139 |     autoLoad: Boolean(rows.length),
140 |   });
141 |   const aiController = useDashboardAiController({
142 |     dataset: {
143 |       id: dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
144 |       name: dataset?.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
145 |       rows,
146 |       columns: dataset?.columns || tableColumns,
147 |     },
148 |     initialDashboard: {
149 |       kpis: schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs as any,
150 |       charts: schemaDashboard.chartSpecs as any,
151 |       source: schemaDashboard.provider,
152 |     },
153 |     initialFilters: filters,
154 |   });
155 | 
156 |   useEffect(() => {
157 |     const current = JSON.stringify(filters);
158 |     const next = JSON.stringify(aiController.filters);
159 |     if (current !== next) setFilters(aiController.filters);
160 |   }, [aiController.filters, filters]);
161 | 
162 |   useEffect(() => {
163 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
164 |     const stored = loadDashboardState(dataset.id);
165 |     setFilters(stored.filters);
166 |     setManualCharts(stored.manualCharts);
167 |     setManualKpis(stored.manualKpis);
168 |     setHiddenChartIds(new Set());
169 |     setChartTypeOverrides({});
170 |   }, [dataset?.id]);
171 | 
172 |   useEffect(() => {
173 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
174 |     saveDashboardState(dataset.id, { filters, manualCharts, manualKpis });
175 |   }, [dataset?.id, filters, manualCharts, manualKpis]);
176 | 
177 |   const trainedCharts = useMemo(
178 |     () =>
179 |       schemaDashboard.chartSpecs
180 |         .map((spec) =>
181 |           buildChartFromSpec(filteredRows, {
182 |             ...spec,
183 |             type: chartTypeOverrides[spec.id || spec.title] || spec.type,
184 |           } as any),
185 |         )
186 |         .filter(Boolean),
187 |     [chartTypeOverrides, filteredRows, schemaDashboard.chartSpecs],
188 |   );
189 | 
190 |   const charts = useMemo(() => {
191 |     const aiCharts = aiController.charts.length ? aiController.charts : trainedCharts;
192 |     const merged = [...manualCharts, ...aiCharts]
193 |       .filter(Boolean)
194 |       .filter((chart) => !hiddenChartIds.has(chart.id));
195 | 
196 |     const seen = new Set<string>();
197 | 
198 |     return merged
199 |       .filter((chart) => {
200 |         const key = `${chart.title}|${chart.type}|${chart.xKey}|${chart.yKey}`;
201 |         if (seen.has(key)) return false;
202 |         seen.add(key);
203 |         return true;
204 |       })
205 |       .slice(0, 7);
206 |   }, [aiController.charts, hiddenChartIds, manualCharts, trainedCharts]);
207 | 
208 |   const trainedKpis = useMemo(
209 |     () =>
210 |       schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs
211 |         .map((spec) => buildKpiFromSpec(filteredRows, spec as any))
212 |         .filter(Boolean),
213 |     [filteredRows, schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs],
214 |   );
215 | 
216 |   const kpis = useMemo(
217 |     () => [...(aiController.kpis.length ? aiController.kpis : trainedKpis.length ? trainedKpis : defaultKpis), ...manualKpis].slice(0, 8),
218 |     [aiController.kpis, defaultKpis, manualKpis, trainedKpis],
219 |   );
220 |   const primaryFilter = profile.primaryCategory;
221 |   const dateColumn = profile.dateColumn;
222 | 
223 |   if (isHydrating) {
224 |     return <StatusPanel title="Loading dashboard" message="Preparing your analytics workspace." />;
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   if (apiError) {
228 |     return <StatusPanel title="Dashboard unavailable" message={apiError} actionLabel="Retry" onAction={() => void retryHydrate()} />;
229 |   }
230 | 
231 |   if (!dataset) {
232 |     return (
233 |       <StatusPanel
234 |         title="No dataset loaded"
235 |         message="Upload a dataset to build a schema-aware dashboard, or load the demo dataset to explore the interface."
236 |         actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset"
237 |         onAction={() => void loadDemo()}
238 |       />
239 |     );
240 |   }
241 | 
242 |   function updateChartType(chart: DashboardChart, type: ChartType) {
243 |     const converted = buildChartFromSpec(filteredRows, { ...chart, type });
244 |     aiController.convertChart(chart.id, type);
245 |     setManualCharts((current) =>
246 |       current.some((item) => item.id === chart.id)
247 |         ? current.map((item) => (item.id === chart.id ? converted : item))
248 |         : current,
249 |     );
250 |     setChartTypeOverrides((current) => ({ ...current, [chart.id]: type }));
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   function removeChart(chart: DashboardChart) {
254 |     setManualCharts((current) => current.filter((item) => item.id !== chart.id));
255 |     setHiddenChartIds((current) => new Set([...current, chart.id]));
256 |   }
257 | 
258 |   function duplicateChart(chart: DashboardChart) {
259 |     setManualCharts((current) => [{ ...chart, id: crypto.randomUUID(), title: `${chart.title} Copy` }, ...current]);
260 |   }
261 | 
262 |   function exportCsv() {
263 |     downloadFile(`${dataset.name || "dataset"}-filtered.csv`, exportRowsToCsv(filteredRows), "text/csv;charset=utf-8");
264 |   }
265 | 
266 |   function exportJson() {
267 |     downloadFile(
268 |       `${dataset.name || "dashboard"}-dashboard.json`,
269 |       exportDashboardToJson({
270 |         datasetName: dataset.name,
271 |         filters,
272 |         kpis,
273 |         charts,
274 |       }),
275 |       "application/json;charset=utf-8",
276 |     );
277 |   }
278 | 
279 |   async function shareDashboard() {
280 |     const summary = [
281 |       `Dataset: ${dataset.name}`,
282 |       `Rows: ${filteredRows.length}/${rows.length}`,
283 |       `Columns: ${profile.columns.length}`,
284 |       `Quality: ${quality.finalScore}%`,
285 |       `Filters: ${Object.entries(filters).filter(([key, value]) => key !== "conditions" && value).map(([key, value]) => `${key}=${String(value)}`).join(", ") || "none"}`,
286 |       `Charts: ${charts.map((chart) => chart.title).join(", ") || "none"}`,
287 |     ].join("\n");
288 | 
289 |     await navigator.clipboard?.writeText(summary);
290 |   }
291 | 
292 |   function resetDashboard() {
293 |     setFilters({});
294 |     aiController.setFilters({});
295 |     setManualCharts([]);
296 |     setManualKpis([]);
297 |     setHiddenChartIds(new Set());
298 |     setChartTypeOverrides({});
299 |   }
300 | 
301 |   function applyAiDashboardCommand(command: any) {
302 |     if (!command) return;
303 | 
304 |     if (command.action === "GENERATE_DASHBOARD") {
305 |       const plan = command.dashboardPlan || command.dashboard;
306 | 
307 |       if (plan?.charts?.length || plan?.kpis?.length) {
308 |         schemaDashboard.applyCommand(command);
309 | 
310 |         setManualCharts([]);
311 |         setManualKpis([]);
312 |         setHiddenChartIds(new Set());
313 | 
314 |         return;
315 |       }
316 |     }
317 | 
318 |     schemaDashboard.applyCommand(command);
319 |     aiController.applyCommand(command);
320 |   }
321 | 
322 |   return (
323 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
324 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
325 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
326 |           <div>
327 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
328 |               <span className="font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</span>
329 |               <span>-</span>
330 |               <span className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-2 py-1 text-xs">{filteredRows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
331 |             </div>
332 |             <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-normal text-white">Dashboard</h1>
333 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Auto-generated insights from your current dataset schema.</p>
334 |           </div>
335 | 
336 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
337 |             <button type="button" onClick={shareDashboard} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
338 |               <Share2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
339 |               Share
340 |             </button>
341 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportCsv} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
342 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
343 |               Export CSV
344 |             </button>
345 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportJson} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
346 |               <FileText className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
347 |               JSON
348 |             </button>
349 |             <button type="button" onClick={() => void deleteDataset()} className="rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-200 hover:bg-red-500/20">
350 |               <Trash2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
351 |               Delete
352 |             </button>
353 |             <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2 text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
354 |               <MoreVertical className="size-5" />
355 |             </button>
356 |           </div>
357 |         </header>
358 | 
359 |         <section className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-3">
360 |           <div className="flex rounded-xl border border-slate-700/70 bg-slate-950/70 p-1">
361 |             {(["Executive", "Analyst", "Story"] as const).map((mode) => (
362 |               <button
363 |                 key={mode}
364 |                 type="button"
365 |                 onClick={() => setDashboardMode(mode)}
366 |                 className={[
367 |                   "min-w-24 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition",
368 |                   dashboardMode === mode
369 |                     ? "bg-violet-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-900/30"

371 |                 ].join(" ")}
372 |               >
373 |                 {mode}
374 |               </button>
375 |             ))}
376 |           </div>
377 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-400">
378 |             <span className="rounded-full border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 px-3 py-1 text-emerald-200">
379 |               {schemaDashboard.chartSpecs.length || charts.length} charts
380 |             </span>
381 |             {schemaDashboard.memoryMatch && (
382 |               <span className="rounded-full border border-cyan-500/30 bg-cyan-500/10 px-3 py-1 text-cyan-200">
383 |                 trained memory matched
384 |               </span>
385 |             )}
386 |             {schemaDashboard.loading && <span>Training dashboard...</span>}
387 |           </div>
388 |         </section>
389 | 
390 |         <div className="grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_460px]">
391 |           <main className="space-y-5">
392 |             <section className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
393 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-200">
394 |                 <Calendar className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
395 |                 {dateColumn ? (
396 |                   <>
397 |                     <input
398 |                       type="date"
399 |                       value={String(filters.dateStart || "")}
400 |                       onChange={(event) => {
401 |                         const next = { ...filters, dateStart: event.target.value };
402 |                         setFilters(next);
403 |                         aiController.setFilters(next);
404 |                       }}
405 |                       className="bg-transparent outline-none"
406 |                     />
407 |                     <span className="text-slate-500">to</span>
408 |                     <input
409 |                       type="date"
410 |                       value={String(filters.dateEnd || "")}
411 |                       onChange={(event) => {
412 |                         const next = { ...filters, dateEnd: event.target.value };
413 |                         setFilters(next);
414 |                         aiController.setFilters(next);
415 |                       }}
416 |                       className="bg-transparent outline-none"
417 |                     />
418 |                   </>
419 |                 ) : (
420 |                   <span>All rows</span>
421 |                 )}
422 |               </div>
423 | 
424 |               {primaryFilter && (
425 |                 <select
426 |                   value={String(filters[primaryFilter.name] || "")}
427 |                   onChange={(event) => {
428 |                     const next = { ...filters, [primaryFilter.name]: event.target.value || undefined };
429 |                     setFilters(next);
430 |                     aiController.setFilters(next);
431 |                   }}
432 |                   className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 outline-none"
433 |                 >
434 |                   <option value="">All {primaryFilter.name}</option>
435 |                   {getUniqueValues(rows, primaryFilter.name, 50).map((value) => (
436 |                     <option key={value} value={value}>
437 |                       {value}
438 |                     </option>
439 |                   ))}
440 |                 </select>
441 |               )}
442 | 
443 |               <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
444 |                 <Plus className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
445 |                 Add Filter
446 |               </button>
447 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => { setFilters({}); aiController.setFilters({}); }} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
448 |                 <RefreshCw className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
449 |                 Reset
450 |               </button>
451 |             </section>
452 | 
453 |             <section className={`${CARD} border-violet-500/60 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600/25 via-slate-900/80 to-blue-600/10 p-5`}>
454 |               <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
455 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
456 |                   <div className="grid size-20 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-blue-600 shadow-lg shadow-violet-600/20">
457 |                     <FileSpreadsheet className="size-9 text-white" />
458 |                   </div>
459 |                   <div>
460 |                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
461 |                       <h2 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</h2>
462 |                       <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-green-300">Ready</span>
463 |                     </div>
464 |                     <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-3 text-sm text-slate-300">
465 |                       <span>{rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
466 |                       <span>{profile.columns.length.toLocaleString()} columns</span>
467 |                       <span>{fileType(dataset.fileName || dataset.name, dataset.sourceType)}</span>
468 |                       <span>Uploaded {formatDate(dataset.uploadedAt)}</span>
469 |                     </div>
470 |                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">Schema-aware dashboard with locally calculated values.</p>
471 |                   </div>
472 |                 </div>
473 | 
474 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
475 |                   <div>
476 |                     <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Data Quality Score</p>
477 |                     <QualityRing score={quality.finalScore} />
478 |                   </div>
479 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowSchema(true)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
480 |                     <Table2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
481 |                     View Schema
482 |                   </button>
483 |                 </div>
484 |               </div>
485 |             </section>
486 | 
487 |             <section className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 2xl:grid-cols-6">
488 |               {kpis.slice(0, 6).map((kpi, index) => (
489 |                 <KpiCard key={`${kpi.id}-${index}`} kpi={kpi} index={index} />
490 |               ))}
491 |             </section>
492 | 
493 |             <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-2 2xl:grid-cols-3">
494 |               {charts.length ? (
495 |                 charts.slice(0, 9).map((chart) => (
496 |                   <SmartChartCard
497 |                     key={chart.id}
498 |                     chart={chart}
499 |                     availableTypes={CHART_TYPES}
500 |                     onTypeChange={(type) => updateChartType(chart, type)}
501 |                     onRemove={() => removeChart(chart)}
502 |                     onDuplicate={() => duplicateChart(chart)}
503 |                   />
504 |                 ))
505 |               ) : (
506 |                 <div className={`${CARD} col-span-full p-10 text-center text-slate-400`}>
507 |                   Not enough data to render charts yet.
508 |                 </div>
509 |               )}
510 |             </section>
511 | 
512 |             <section className={`${CARD} overflow-hidden`}>
513 |               <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
514 |                 <div>
515 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Data Preview</h2>
516 |                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{filteredRows.length.toLocaleString()} filtered rows x {tableColumns.length} columns</p>
517 |                 </div>
518 |                 <div className="flex gap-2">
519 |                   <Link to="/data" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
520 |                     <Table2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
521 |                     View Full Table
522 |                   </Link>
523 |                   <button type="button" onClick={exportCsv} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
524 |                     <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
525 |                     Download
526 |                   </button>
527 |                 </div>
528 |               </div>
529 | 
530 |               <div className="overflow-x-auto">
531 |                 <table className="w-full min-w-[760px] text-left text-sm">
532 |                   <thead className="bg-slate-950/60 text-xs text-slate-400">
533 |                     <tr>
534 |                       <th className="px-4 py-3">#</th>
535 |                       {tableColumns.slice(0, 7).map((column) => (
536 |                         <th key={column} className="px-4 py-3">
537 |                           {column}
538 |                         </th>
539 |                       ))}
540 |                     </tr>
541 |                   </thead>
542 |                   <tbody>
543 |                     {filteredRows.slice(0, 8).map((row, index) => (
544 |                       <tr key={index} className="border-t border-slate-800/80 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800/40">
545 |                         <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-500">{index + 1}</td>
546 |                         {tableColumns.slice(0, 7).map((column) => (
547 |                           <td key={column} className="max-w-[220px] truncate px-4 py-3">
548 |                             {String(row[column] ?? "") || "-"}
549 |                           </td>
550 |                         ))}
551 |                       </tr>
552 |                     ))}
553 |                   </tbody>
554 |                 </table>
555 |               </div>
556 |             </section>
557 |           </main>
558 | 
559 |           <SchemaDashboardChat
560 |             dataset={{
561 |               id: dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
562 |               name: dataset?.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
563 |               rows,
564 |               columns: dataset?.columns || tableColumns,
565 |             }}
566 |             currentDashboard={{
567 |               kpis: schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs,
568 |               charts: schemaDashboard.chartSpecs,
569 |               filters: schemaDashboard.filters,
570 |             }}
571 |             controller={aiController}
572 |             onCommand={applyAiDashboardCommand}
573 |             onSend={(query) => {
574 |               if (/explain|why|summary|describe/i.test(query)) {
575 |                 void schemaDashboard.sendChat(query);
576 |               } else {
577 |                 void schemaDashboard.sendCommand(query);
578 |               }
579 |             }}
580 |           />
581 |         </div>
582 |       </div>
583 | 
584 |       {showSchema && (
585 |         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/60 p-4">
586 |           <div className={`${CARD} max-h-[80vh] w-full max-w-4xl overflow-hidden`}>
587 |             <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4">
588 |               <div>
589 |                 <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white">Dataset Schema</h2>
590 |                 <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Column types, inferred roles, missing values, and examples.</p>
591 |               </div>
592 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowSchema(false)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2 text-slate-200">
593 |                 <X className="size-4" />
594 |               </button>
595 |             </div>
596 |             <div className="max-h-[65vh] overflow-auto">
597 |               <table className="w-full min-w-[720px] text-left text-sm">
598 |                 <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
599 |                   <tr>
600 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Column</th>
601 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Type</th>
602 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Role</th>
603 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Missing</th>
604 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Unique</th>
605 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Samples</th>
606 |                   </tr>
607 |                 </thead>
608 |                 <tbody>
609 |                   {profile.columns.map((column) => (
610 |                     <tr key={column.name} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200">
611 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{column.name}</td>
612 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.type}</td>
613 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.role}</td>
614 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.missingPct}%</td>
615 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.uniqueCount}</td>
616 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-400">{column.sampleValues.join(", ") || "-"}</td>
617 |                     </tr>
618 |                   ))}
619 |                 </tbody>
620 |               </table>
621 |             </div>
622 |           </div>
623 |         </div>
624 |       )}
625 | 
626 |       <div className="fixed bottom-4 right-4 hidden items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/90 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-400 shadow-xl backdrop-blur md:flex">
627 |         <ShieldCheck className="size-4 text-green-400" />
628 |         Schema-only AI enabled
629 |       </div>
630 |     </div>
631 |   );
632 | }
633 | 
```

  1 | export type Aggregation =
  2 |   | "count"
  3 |   | "sum"
  4 |   | "avg"
  5 |   | "min"
  6 |   | "max"
  7 |   | "median"
  8 |   | "count_unique";
  9 | 
 10 | export type DashboardTheme = "dark" | "light";
 11 | 
 12 | export type ChartType =
 13 |   | "bar"
 14 |   | "horizontalBar"
 15 |   | "line"
 16 |   | "area"
 17 |   | "pie"
 18 |   | "donut"
 19 |   | "histogram"
 20 |   | "scatter"
 21 |   | "radar"
 22 |   | "composed"
 23 |   | "heatmap";
 24 | 
 25 | export interface DashboardFilters {
 26 |   [key: string]: unknown;
 27 |   dateStart?: string;
 28 |   dateEnd?: string;
 29 |   conditions?: Array<{
 30 |     id: string;
 31 |     column: string;
 32 |     operator: string;
 33 |     value: string;
 34 |   }>;
 35 | }
 36 | 
 37 | export interface ChartSpec {
 38 |   type: ChartType;
 39 |   title: string;
 40 |   xKey: string;
 41 |   yKey: string;
 42 |   aggregation: Exclude<Aggregation, "count_unique">;
 43 |   limit?: number;
 44 |   splitValues?: boolean;
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | export interface ChartConfig extends ChartSpec {
 48 |   id: string;
 49 |   data: Array<Record<string, string | number>>;
 50 |   subtitle?: string;
 51 | }
 52 | 
 53 | export interface KpiSpec {
 54 |   title: string;
 55 |   metric?: string;
 56 |   aggregation?: Aggregation;
 57 |   format?: "number" | "currency" | "percent" | "text";
 58 | }
 59 | 
 60 | export interface KpiConfig extends KpiSpec {
 61 |   id: string;
 62 |   value: string;
 63 |   rawValue?: number | string;
 64 | }
 65 | 
 66 | export interface DashboardState {
 67 |   filters: DashboardFilters;
 68 |   charts: ChartConfig[];
 69 |   extraKpis: KpiConfig[];
 70 |   theme: DashboardTheme;
 71 |   selectedChartId?: string;
 72 | }
 73 | 
 74 | export interface SchemaColumn {
 75 |   name: string;
 76 |   type: "string" | "number" | "date" | "boolean" | "unknown";
 77 |   role?: "category" | "metric" | "date" | "id" | "location" | "boolean" | "text";
 78 |   description?: string;
 79 |   uniqueValues?: string[];
 80 | }
 81 | 
 82 | export interface DashboardSchema {
 83 |   columns: SchemaColumn[];
 84 |   rowCount: number;
 85 |   dictionary?: Record<string, string>;
 86 | }
 87 | 
 88 | export interface DashboardCommand {
 89 |   action:
 90 |     | "GENERATE_CHART"
 91 |     | "MODIFY_CHART"
 92 |     | "DELETE_CHART"
 93 |     | "ADD_KPI"
 94 |     | "GENERATE_KPI"
 95 |     | "FILTER"
 96 |     | "CLEAR_FILTERS"
 97 |     | "ANSWER"
 98 |     | "FIX_DASHBOARD";
 99 |   message: string;

101 |   kpiSpec?: KpiSpec;
102 |   filters?: Record<string, string>;
103 |   schemaOnly: true;
104 |   model?: string;
105 |   provider?: string;

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics.test.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics.test.ts`

```ts
  1 | import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
  2 | import {
  3 |   applyFilters,
  4 |   buildChartFromSpec,
  5 |   buildDatasetProfile,
  6 |   buildDefaultCharts,
  7 |   buildKpiFromSpec,
  8 |   cleanDatasetRows,
  9 | } from "./dashboardAnalytics";
 10 | 
 11 | const rows = [
 12 |   { country: "India", education: "Bachelors", salary_usd: 100, experience: 2, languages: "Rust, JavaScript", frameworks: "React, Vue" },
 13 |   { country: "India", education: "Masters", salary_usd: 200, experience: 4, languages: "Rust, Python", frameworks: "React" },
 14 |   { country: "USA", education: "Masters", salary_usd: 300, experience: 6, languages: "JavaScript", frameworks: "Django, React" },
 15 |   { column: "salary_usd", type: "number", description: "dictionary row", _sourceFile: "data_dictionary.csv" },
 16 | ];
 17 | 
 18 | describe("dashboardAnalytics", () => {
 19 |   it("removes dictionary rows and calculates KPI values locally", () => {
 20 |     const clean = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 21 | 
 22 |     expect(clean.length).toBe(3);
 23 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Total Rows", metric: "__row_count__", aggregation: "count" }).rawValue).toBe(3);
 24 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Median Salary", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "median" }).rawValue).toBe(200);
 25 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Highest Salary", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "max" }).rawValue).toBe(300);
 26 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Countries", metric: "country", aggregation: "count_unique" }).rawValue).toBe(2);
 27 |   });
 28 | 
 29 |   it("calculates average salary by country correctly", () => {
 30 |     const chart = buildChartFromSpec(cleanDatasetRows(rows), {
 31 |       title: "Average Salary by Country",
 32 |       type: "bar",
 33 |       xKey: "country",
 34 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 35 |       aggregation: "avg",
 36 |       limit: 10,
 37 |     });
 38 | 
 39 |     expect(chart.data.find((item) => item.country === "India")?.salary_usd).toBe(150);
 40 |     expect(chart.data.find((item) => item.country === "USA")?.salary_usd).toBe(300);
 41 |   });
 42 | 
 43 |   it("builds histogram and scatter chart data", () => {
 44 |     const clean = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 45 |     const histogram = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 46 |       title: "Salary Distribution",
 47 |       type: "histogram",
 48 |       xKey: "salary_usd",
 49 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 50 |       aggregation: "count",
 51 |       limit: 4,
 52 |     });
 53 |     const scatter = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 54 |       title: "Salary vs Experience",
 55 |       type: "scatter",
 56 |       xKey: "experience",
 57 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 58 |       aggregation: "count",
 59 |       limit: 10,
 60 |     });
 61 | 
 62 |     expect(histogram.data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item.count || 0), 0)).toBe(3);
 63 |     expect(scatter.data).toHaveLength(3);
 64 |   });
 65 | 
 66 |   it("splits multi-value languages and frameworks", () => {
 67 |     const clean = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 68 |     const languages = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 69 |       title: "Average Salary by Language",
 70 |       type: "bar",
 71 |       xKey: "languages",
 72 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 73 |       aggregation: "avg",
 74 |       splitValues: true,
 75 |       limit: 10,
 76 |     });
 77 |     const frameworks = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 78 |       title: "Average Salary by Framework",
 79 |       type: "bar",
 80 |       xKey: "frameworks",
 81 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 82 |       aggregation: "avg",
 83 |       splitValues: true,
 84 |       limit: 10,
 85 |     });
 86 | 
 87 |     expect(languages.data.find((item) => item.languages === "Rust")?.salary_usd).toBe(150);
 88 |     expect(languages.data.find((item) => item.languages === "JavaScript")?.salary_usd).toBe(200);
 89 |     expect(frameworks.data.find((item) => item.frameworks === "React")?.salary_usd).toBe(200);
 90 |   });
 91 | 
 92 |   it("filters rows before chart calculation", () => {
 93 |     const filtered = applyFilters(cleanDatasetRows(rows), { country: "India" });
 94 |     const chart = buildChartFromSpec(filtered, {
 95 |       title: "Average Salary by Country",
 96 |       type: "bar",
 97 |       xKey: "country",
 98 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 99 |       aggregation: "avg",
100 |       limit: 10,
101 |     });
102 | 
103 |     expect(filtered.length).toBe(2);
104 |     expect(chart.data).toHaveLength(1);
105 |     expect(chart.data[0].salary_usd).toBe(150);
106 |   });
107 | 
108 |   it("keeps sales metrics numeric in small datasets", () => {
109 |     const salesRows = [
110 |       { month: "Jan", category: "Electronics", region: "North", revenue: 1200, units_sold: 12, profit_margin: 24 },
111 |       { month: "Feb", category: "Furniture", region: "South", revenue: 850, units_sold: 8, profit_margin: 18 },
112 |       { month: "Mar", category: "Electronics", region: "West", revenue: 1500, units_sold: 15, profit_margin: 30 },
113 |       { month: "Apr", category: "Office", region: "North", revenue: 620, units_sold: 7, profit_margin: 16 },
114 |       { month: "May", category: "Furniture", region: "East", revenue: 930, units_sold: 9, profit_margin: 21 },
115 |     ];
116 | 
117 |     const profile = buildDatasetProfile(salesRows);
118 |     const charts = buildDefaultCharts(salesRows);
119 | 
120 |     expect(profile.numericColumns.map((column) => column.name)).toEqual([
121 |       "revenue",
122 |       "units_sold",
123 |       "profit_margin",
124 |     ]);
125 |     expect(profile.primaryMetric?.name).toBe("revenue");
126 |     expect(profile.primaryCategory?.name).toBe("category");
127 |     expect(charts.some((chart) => chart.title === "Average Revenue by Category")).toBe(true);
128 |   });
129 | });
130 | 
```

   1 | import type {
   2 |   Aggregation,
   3 |   ChartSpec,
   4 |   ChartType,
   5 |   KpiSpec,
   6 | } from "@/features/dashboard/types/dashboardTypes";
   7 | 
   8 | export type RowValue = string | number | boolean | null | undefined;
   9 | export type Row = Record<string, RowValue>;
  10 | 
  11 | export type ColumnType = "number" | "string" | "date" | "boolean" | "unknown";
  12 | export type ColumnRole =
  13 |   | "metric"
  14 |   | "category"
  15 |   | "date"
  16 |   | "id"
  17 |   | "location"
  18 |   | "boolean"
  19 |   | "text";

  29 |

  36 |

  43 |

  82 | 
  83 | export interface DataQualityScore {

  89 |   numericColumns: number;

 101 | 
 102 | export interface InsightCard {

 104 |   title: string;
 105 |   description: string;
 106 |   tone: "good" | "warning" | "critical" | "info";
 107 | }
 108 | 
 109 | const METRIC_HINTS = [
 110 |   "salary",
 111 |   "revenue",
 112 |   "amount",
 113 |   "value",
 114 |   "score",
 115 |   "marks",
 116 |   "stress",
