### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/pdf/pages/PdfUploadPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/pdf/pages/PdfUploadPage.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
  2 | import { Link } from "react-router-dom";
  3 | import {
  4 |   BarChart3,
  5 |   ChevronLeft,
  6 |   ChevronRight,
  7 |   Download,
  8 |   FileText,
  9 |   Loader2,
 10 |   Maximize2,
 11 |   Search,
 12 |   Send,
 13 |   Share2,
 14 |   Sparkles,
 15 |   Table2,
 16 |   Upload,
 17 | } from "lucide-react";
 18 | import { api, type PdfAskResult, type PdfImportResult } from "@/features/data/api/dataApi";
 19 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
 20 | import SmartChartCard from "@/features/dashboard/components/SmartChartCard";
 21 | import {
 22 |   buildDefaultCharts,
 23 |   buildDatasetProfile,
 24 |   cleanDatasetRows,
 25 |   exportRowsToCsv,
 26 |   generateDynamicInsights,
 27 |   type Row,
 28 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 29 | 
 30 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur";
 31 | 
 32 | type PdfMessage = {
 33 |   role: "user" | "assistant";
 34 |   content: string;
 35 |   sources?: PdfAskResult["sources"];
 36 | };
 37 | 
 38 | function downloadFile(fileName: string, content: string, mime: string) {
 39 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mime });
 40 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 41 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 42 |   link.href = url;
 43 |   link.download = fileName;
 44 |   link.click();
 45 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 46 | }
 47 | 
 48 | function formatBytes(size?: number) {
 49 |   if (!size) return "Unknown size";
 50 |   if (size < 1024 * 1024) return `${(size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`;
 51 |   return `${(size / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} MB`;
 52 | }
 53 | 
 54 | export default function PdfUploadPage() {
 55 |   const { importPdfFile, isProcessing, dataset } = useData();
 56 |   const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
 57 |   const [file, setFile] = useState<File | null>(null);
 58 |   const [result, setResult] = useState<PdfImportResult | null>(null);
 59 |   const [dragging, setDragging] = useState(false);
 60 |   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("Overview");
 61 |   const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
 62 |   const [query, setQuery] = useState("");
 63 |   const [asking, setAsking] = useState(false);
 64 |   const [messages, setMessages] = useState<PdfMessage[]>([]);
 65 |   const [error, setError] = useState("");
 66 |   const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
 67 | 
 68 |   const activeDataset = result?.dataset || (dataset?.sourceType === "pdf" ? dataset : null);
 69 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows((activeDataset?.rows || []) as Row[]), [activeDataset?.rows]);
 70 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
 71 |   const charts = useMemo(() => buildDefaultCharts(rows).slice(0, 4), [rows]);
 72 |   const insights = useMemo(() => generateDynamicInsights(rows), [rows]);
 73 |   const tableGroups = useMemo(() => {
 74 |     const groups = new Map<string, Row[]>();
 75 |     rows.forEach((row, index) => {
 76 |       const tableId = String(row.__tableId || row.__source_table || `table_${Math.floor(index / Math.max(rows.length, 1)) + 1}`);
 77 |       if (!groups.has(tableId)) groups.set(tableId, []);
 78 |       groups.get(tableId)?.push(row);
 79 |     });
 80 |     return Array.from(groups.entries()).map(([id, tableRows]) => ({ id, rows: tableRows }));
 81 |   }, [rows]);
 82 |   const pageNumbers = rows
 83 |     .map((row) => Number(row.__pageNumber))
 84 |     .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
 85 |   const pageCount = Math.max(...pageNumbers, result?.knowledgeBaseSummary?.chunkCount ? 1 : 0, 1);
 86 |   const visibleColumns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name).filter((column) => !column.startsWith("__"));
 87 |   const filteredTableRows = rows.filter((row) =>
 88 |     search.trim()
 89 |       ? visibleColumns.some((column) => String(row[column] ?? "").toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()))
 90 |       : true,
 91 |   );
 92 | 
 93 |   async function uploadPdf(selectedFile = file) {
 94 |     if (!selectedFile || isProcessing) return;
 95 |     setError("");
 96 |     setMessages([]);
 97 | 
 98 |     try {
 99 |       const data = await importPdfFile(selectedFile);
100 |       setResult(data);
101 |       setPage(1);
102 |       setMessages([
103 |         {
104 |           role: "assistant",
105 |           content: `Processed ${data.pdf.fileName}. Extracted ${data.pdf.tableCount} table(s) and ${data.pdf.textElementCount} text element(s).`,
106 |         },
107 |       ]);
108 |     } catch (err) {
109 |       setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "PDF upload failed.");
110 |     }
111 |   }
112 | 
113 |   function handleFiles(files: FileList | File[]) {
114 |     const nextFile = Array.from(files)[0];
115 |     if (!nextFile) return;
116 |     setFile(nextFile);
117 |     void uploadPdf(nextFile);
118 |   }
119 | 
120 |   function exportJson() {
121 |     downloadFile(
122 |       `${activeDataset?.name || "pdf-extraction"}.json`,
123 |       JSON.stringify({ pdf: result?.pdf, dataset: activeDataset, insights }, null, 2),
124 |       "application/json;charset=utf-8",
125 |     );
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   function exportCsv() {
129 |     downloadFile(`${activeDataset?.name || "pdf-extraction"}.csv`, exportRowsToCsv(rows), "text/csv;charset=utf-8");
130 |   }
131 | 
132 |   function exportMarkdown() {
133 |     const report = [
134 |       `# ${result?.pdf.fileName || activeDataset?.name || "PDF Intelligence Report"}`,
135 |       "",
136 |       `Rows: ${rows.length}`,
137 |       `Tables: ${tableGroups.length}`,
138 |       `Columns: ${visibleColumns.length}`,
139 |       "",
140 |       "## Insights",
141 |       ...insights.map((insight) => `- ${insight.title}: ${insight.description}`),
142 |     ].join("\n");
143 |     downloadFile(`${activeDataset?.name || "pdf-report"}.md`, report, "text/markdown;charset=utf-8");
144 |   }
145 | 
146 |   async function shareSummary() {
147 |     const summary = `PDF: ${result?.pdf.fileName || activeDataset?.name || "No PDF"}\nRows: ${rows.length}\nTables: ${tableGroups.length}\nColumns: ${visibleColumns.length}`;
148 |     await navigator.clipboard?.writeText(summary);
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   async function askPdf(prompt = query) {
152 |     const text = prompt.trim();
153 |     if (!text || asking) return;
154 | 
155 |     if (/export all data/i.test(text)) {
156 |       exportJson();
157 |       setMessages((current) => [...current, { role: "user", content: text }, { role: "assistant", content: "Exported extracted PDF data as JSON from the local dataset." }]);
158 |       setQuery("");
159 |       return;
160 |     }
161 | 
162 |     if (!result?.pdf?.id) {
163 |       setMessages((current) => [...current, { role: "assistant", content: "Upload and process a PDF before asking questions about it." }]);
164 |       return;
165 |     }
166 | 
167 |     setAsking(true);
168 |     setQuery("");
169 |     setMessages((current) => [...current, { role: "user", content: text }]);
170 | 
171 |     try {
172 |       const response = await api.askPdf(result.pdf.id, text);
173 |       setMessages((current) => [...current, { role: "assistant", content: response.answer, sources: response.sources }]);
174 |     } catch (err) {
175 |       setMessages((current) => [...current, { role: "assistant", content: err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Could not answer PDF question.", sources: [] }]);
176 |     } finally {
177 |       setAsking(false);
178 |     }
179 |   }
180 | 
181 |   const promptChips = [
182 |     "List all tables",
183 |     "What are the key insights?",
184 |     "Export all data",
185 |     profile.primaryMetric ? `Show ${profile.primaryMetric.name} trend` : "",
186 |   ].filter(Boolean);
187 | 
188 |   return (
189 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
190 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
191 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 xl:flex-row xl:items-start xl:justify-between">
192 |           <div>
193 |             <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-white">PDF Intelligence</h1>
194 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Extract, analyze and visualize data from your PDF documents.</p>
195 |           </div>
196 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
197 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportCsv} disabled={!rows.length} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm disabled:opacity-50">
198 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
199 |               Export Data
200 |             </button>
201 |             <button type="button" onClick={shareSummary} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm">
202 |               <Share2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
203 |               Share
204 |             </button>
205 |             <button type="button" onClick={() => inputRef.current?.click()} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm">
206 |               <Upload className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
207 |               Upload New PDF
208 |             </button>
209 |           </div>
210 |         </header>
211 | 
212 |         <section className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
213 |           <div className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-[1.4fr_1fr_repeat(4,180px)]">
214 |             <div className="flex items-center gap-4 rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/40 p-5">
215 |               <div className="grid size-20 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-blue-600">
216 |                 <FileText className="size-10 text-white" />
217 |               </div>
218 |               <div>
219 |                 <p className="font-semibold text-white">{file?.name || result?.pdf.fileName || activeDataset?.fileName || "No PDF selected"}</p>
220 |                 <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">{formatBytes(file?.size)} - {pageCount} page(s)</p>
221 |                 {activeDataset && <span className="mt-3 inline-block rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-green-300">Processed</span>}
222 |               </div>
223 |             </div>
224 | 
225 |             <button type="button"
226 |               onDragOver={(event) => { event.preventDefault(); setDragging(true); }}
227 |               onDragLeave={() => setDragging(false)}
228 |               onDrop={(event) => { event.preventDefault(); setDragging(false); handleFiles(event.dataTransfer.files); }}
229 |               onClick={() => inputRef.current?.click()}
230 |               className={`rounded-2xl border border-dashed p-5 text-center text-sm ${dragging ? "border-violet-400 bg-violet-500/10" : "border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/40"}`}
231 |             >
232 |               {isProcessing ? <Loader2 className="mx-auto mb-2 size-6 animate-spin" /> : <Upload className="mx-auto mb-2 size-6" />}
233 |               Drag and drop PDF here or click to browse
234 |             </button>
235 | 
236 |             {[
237 |               ["Total Pages", pageCount],
238 |               ["Tables Found", tableGroups.length || result?.pdf.tableCount || 0],
239 |               ["Charts Found", charts.length],
240 |               ["Data Points", rows.length * Math.max(visibleColumns.length, 1)],
241 |             ].map(([label, value], index) => (
242 |               <div key={String(label)} className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/40 p-5">
243 |                 <div className={`mb-4 grid size-10 place-items-center rounded-xl ${index === 0 ? "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300" : index === 1 ? "bg-green-500/20 text-green-300" : index === 2 ? "bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-300" : "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300"}`}>
244 |                   {index === 1 ? <Table2 className="size-5" /> : <BarChart3 className="size-5" />}
245 |                 </div>
246 |                 <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{label}</p>
247 |                 <p className="mt-1 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{String(value)}</p>
248 |               </div>
249 |             ))}
250 |           </div>
251 | 
252 |           <input ref={inputRef} type="file" accept="application/pdf" className="hidden" onChange={(event) => event.target.files && handleFiles(event.target.files)} />
253 |           {error && <p className="mt-4 rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 bg-red-500/10 p-3 text-sm text-red-200">{error}</p>}
254 |         </section>
255 | 
256 |         <div className="grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[1fr_350px]">
257 |           <main className="space-y-5">
258 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 border-b border-slate-800 pb-2">
259 |               {["Overview", "Extracted Data", "Visualizations", "Pages", "Insights"].map((tab) => (
260 |                 <button type="button" key={tab} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)} className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm ${activeTab === tab ? "bg-violet-600 text-white" : "text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white"}`}>
261 |                   {tab}
262 |                 </button>
263 |               ))}
264 |             </div>
265 | 
266 |             <section className="grid gap-5 xl:grid-cols-[0.7fr_1.2fr_0.8fr]">
267 |               <div className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
268 |                 <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Document Information</h2>
269 |                 <div className="mt-5 space-y-3 text-sm">
270 |                   {[
271 |                     ["File Name", result?.pdf.fileName || activeDataset?.fileName || "-"],
272 |                     ["File Size", formatBytes(file?.size)],
273 |                     ["Pages", String(pageCount)],
274 |                     ["Uploaded", activeDataset?.uploadedAt ? new Date(activeDataset.uploadedAt).toLocaleString() : "-"],
275 |                     ["Status", activeDataset ? "Processed Successfully" : "Waiting for upload"],
276 |                     ["OCR", activeDataset ? "High Accuracy" : "-"],
277 |                   ].map(([label, value]) => (
278 |                     <div key={label} className="flex justify-between gap-4">
279 |                       <span className="text-slate-400">{label}</span>
280 |                       <span className="text-right text-slate-100">{value}</span>
281 |                     </div>
282 |                   ))}
283 |                 </div>
284 |               </div>
285 | 
286 |               <div className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
287 |                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
288 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Key Insights</h2>
289 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => void askPdf("What are the key insights?")} disabled={!result?.pdf.id || asking} className="rounded-xl border border-violet-500/50 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-violet-200 disabled:opacity-50">
290 |                     Summarize
291 |                   </button>
292 |                 </div>
293 |                 <div className="mt-5 space-y-3 text-sm text-slate-300">
294 |                   {insights.length ? insights.map((insight) => <p key={insight.id}>{insight.description}</p>) : <p>Upload a PDF to extract insights from its tables and text.</p>}
295 |                 </div>
296 |                 <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
297 |                   {insights.map((insight) => (
298 |                     <span key={insight.id} className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-slate-300">{insight.title}</span>
299 |                   ))}
300 |                 </div>
301 |               </div>
302 | 
303 |               <div className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
304 |                 <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
305 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Page Preview</h2>
306 |                   <Maximize2 className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
307 |                 </div>
308 |                 <div className="grid h-64 place-items-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/50">
309 |                   <div className="w-36 rounded-xl bg-slate-200 p-4 text-slate-900 shadow-xl">
310 |                     <p className="text-xs font-semibold">PDF Page</p>
311 |                     <p className="mt-2 text-lg font-bold">{page}</p>
312 |                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
313 |                       <div className="h-2 rounded bg-slate-400" />
314 |                       <div className="size-2/3 rounded bg-slate-400" />
315 |                       <div className="h-16 rounded bg-slate-300" />
316 |                     </div>
317 |                   </div>
318 |                 </div>
319 |                 <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4 text-sm text-slate-300">
320 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))}><ChevronLeft className="size-5" /></button>
321 |                   <span>{page} / {pageCount}</span>
322 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setPage((current) => Math.min(pageCount, current + 1))}><ChevronRight className="size-5" /></button>
323 |                 </div>
324 |               </div>
325 |             </section>
326 | 
327 |             <section className="grid gap-5 xl:grid-cols-2">
328 |               <div className={`${CARD} overflow-hidden`}>
329 |                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4">
330 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Extracted Tables</h2>
331 |                   <div className="relative w-64">
332 |                     <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 size-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-500" />
333 |                     <input value={search} onChange={(event) => setSearch(event.target.value)} placeholder="Search tables..." className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 py-2 pl-10 pr-3 text-sm outline-none" />
334 |                   </div>
335 |                 </div>
336 |                 <div className="max-h-[28rem] overflow-auto">
337 |                   <table className="w-full min-w-[680px] text-left text-sm">
338 |                     <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
339 |                       <tr>
340 |                         {visibleColumns.slice(0, 6).map((column) => <th key={column} className="px-4 py-3">{column}</th>)}
341 |                       </tr>
342 |                     </thead>
343 |                     <tbody>
344 |                       {filteredTableRows.slice(0, 12).map((row, index) => (
345 |                         <tr key={index} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200">
346 |                           {visibleColumns.slice(0, 6).map((column) => <td key={column} className="max-w-[180px] truncate px-4 py-3">{String(row[column] ?? "") || "-"}</td>)}
347 |                         </tr>
348 |                       ))}
349 |                     </tbody>
350 |                   </table>
351 |                 </div>
352 |                 <div className="border-t border-slate-700/60 p-4">
353 |                   <Link to="/dashboard" className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Use Extracted Data in Dashboard</Link>
354 |                 </div>
355 |               </div>
356 | 
357 |               <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
358 |                 <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
359 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Extracted Charts</h2>
360 |                   <button type="button" onClick={exportMarkdown} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-xs">Markdown Report</button>
361 |                 </div>
362 |                 <div className="grid gap-4">
363 |                   {charts.length ? charts.slice(0, 2).map((chart) => <SmartChartCard key={chart.id} chart={chart} />) : <div className="rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-slate-700 p-8 text-center text-sm text-slate-400">No extracted table data available for charts.</div>}
364 |                 </div>
365 |               </div>
366 |             </section>
367 |           </main>
368 | 
369 |           <aside className={`${CARD} h-fit p-5`}>
370 |             <div className="mb-5 flex items-center gap-2">
371 |               <Sparkles className="size-5 text-violet-300" />
372 |               <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">AI Assistant</h2>
373 |               <span className="rounded-full bg-violet-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase text-violet-200">Beta</span>
374 |             </div>
375 |             <p className="mb-4 text-sm text-slate-400">Ask questions about your PDF document and get cited answers from extracted content.</p>
376 | 
377 |             <div className="space-y-3">
378 |               {messages.map((message, index) => (
379 |                 <div key={index} className={message.role === "user" ? "ml-8 rounded-2xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-3 text-sm" : "mr-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-200"}>
380 |                   <p className="whitespace-pre-line">{message.content}</p>
381 |                   {message.sources?.length ? (
382 |                     <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
383 |                       {message.sources.map((source) => (
384 |                         <div key={source.id} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-2 text-xs text-slate-400">
385 |                           Source {source.source}: {source.preview}
386 |                         </div>
387 |                       ))}
388 |                     </div>
389 |                   ) : null}
390 |                 </div>
391 |               ))}
392 |               {asking && <div className="mr-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-3 text-sm"><Loader2 className="mr-2 inline size-4 animate-spin" />Reading PDF sources...</div>}
393 |             </div>
394 | 
395 |             <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
396 |               {promptChips.map((prompt) => (
397 |                 <button type="button" key={prompt} onClick={() => void askPdf(prompt)} className="rounded-full border border-violet-500/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-violet-200">
398 |                   {prompt}
399 |                 </button>
400 |               ))}
401 |             </div>
402 | 
403 |             <div className="mt-5 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950/70 p-2">
404 |               <input value={query} onChange={(event) => setQuery(event.target.value)} onKeyDown={(event) => event.key === "Enter" && void askPdf()} placeholder="Ask anything about this PDF..." className="min-w-0 flex-1 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500" />
405 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => void askPdf()} disabled={!query.trim() || asking} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 p-3 disabled:opacity-50"><Send className="size-4" /></button>
406 |             </div>
407 |             <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end gap-2">
408 |               <button type="button" onClick={exportJson} disabled={!rows.length} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-xs disabled:opacity-50">JSON</button>
409 |               <button type="button" onClick={exportCsv} disabled={!rows.length} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-xs disabled:opacity-50">CSV</button>
410 |               <button type="button" onClick={exportMarkdown} disabled={!rows.length} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-xs disabled:opacity-50">Report</button>
411 |             </div>
412 |             <p className="mt-5 text-center text-xs text-slate-500">All answers are generated from extracted content. Verify important data.</p>
413 |           </aside>
414 |         </div>
415 |       </div>
416 |     </div>
417 |   );
418 | }
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/hooks/useAutoTrainSchema.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/hooks/useAutoTrainSchema.ts`

```ts
 1 | import { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { schemaAgentApi, SchemaTrainResponse } from '../api/schemaAgentApi';
 3 | 
 4 | export function useAutoTrainSchema() {
 5 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 6 |   const [result, setResult] = useState<SchemaTrainResponse | null>(null);
 7 |   const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 8 | 
 9 |   const trainAndBuild = useCallback(async (datasetId: string) => {
10 |     setLoading(true);
11 |     setError(null);
12 | 
13 |     try {
14 |       const trainResult = await schemaAgentApi.trainSchema(datasetId);
15 |       const dashboardResult = await schemaAgentApi.buildDashboardSpec(datasetId);
16 |       setResult(dashboardResult);
17 |       return {
18 |         trainResult,
19 |         dashboardResult,
20 |       };
21 |     } catch (err) {
22 |       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Schema training failed';
23 |       setError(message);
24 |       throw err;
25 |     } finally {
26 |       setLoading(false);
27 |     }
28 |   }, []);
29 | 
30 |   return {
31 |     loading,
32 |     result,
33 |     error,
34 |     trainAndBuild,
35 |   };
36 | }
37 | 
```

```css
135 |   *::before,

138 |     animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/pages/SchemaAgentTrainerPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/pages/SchemaAgentTrainerPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { useAutoTrainSchema } from '../hooks/useAutoTrainSchema';
 3 | import { SchemaTrainingStatus } from '../components/SchemaTrainingStatus';
 4 | import { AgenticThinkingPanel } from '../features/dashboard/components/AgenticThinkingPanel';
 5 | 
 6 | export default function SchemaAgentTrainerPage() {
 7 |   const [datasetId, setDatasetId] = useState('');
 8 |   const { loading, error, result, trainAndBuild } = useAutoTrainSchema();
 9 | 
10 |   async function handleSubmit(event: React.FormEvent) {
11 |     event.preventDefault();
12 |     if (!datasetId.trim()) return;
13 |     await trainAndBuild(datasetId.trim());
14 |   }
15 | 
16 |   return (
17 |     <main className="mx-auto max-w-6xl p-6">
18 |       <section className="rounded-2xl border p-6 shadow-sm">
19 |         <p className="text-sm uppercase tracking-wide opacity-60">InsightFlow</p>
20 |         <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold">Schema Agent Trainer</h1>
21 |         <p className="mt-2 opacity-80">
22 |           Train schema memory and generate a real analytics dashboard every time a dataset is uploaded.
23 |         </p>
24 | 
25 |         <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="mt-5 flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row">
26 |           <input
27 |             value={datasetId}
28 |             onChange={(event) => setDatasetId(event.target.value)}
29 |             placeholder="Enter datasetId"
30 |             className="flex-1 rounded-xl border px-4 py-3"
31 |           />
32 |           <button className="rounded-xl border px-5 py-3 font-semibold shadow-sm">
33 |             Train Schema
34 |           </button>
35 |         </form>
36 |       </section>
37 | 
38 |       <div className="mt-5">
39 |         <SchemaTrainingStatus loading={loading} error={error} result={result} />
40 |       </div>
41 | 
42 |       {result && (result.agentPlan || result.critic || result.ontologyMapping) && (
43 |         <div className="mt-5">
44 |           <AgenticThinkingPanel 
45 |             agentPlan={result.agentPlan} 
46 |             agentTools={result.agentTools} 
47 |             critic={result.critic} 
48 |             ontologyMapping={result.ontologyMapping}
49 |             dashboardSpec={result.dashboardSpec}
50 |           />
51 |         </div>
52 |       )}
53 | 
54 |       {result?.calculatedDashboard && (
55 |         <section className="mt-5 rounded-2xl border p-6 shadow-sm">
56 |           <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Generated Dashboard Spec</h2>
57 |           <pre className="mt-3 max-h-[560px] overflow-auto rounded-xl border p-4 text-xs">
58 |             {JSON.stringify(result.calculatedDashboard, null, 2)}
59 |           </pre>
60 |         </section>
61 |       )}
62 |     </main>
63 |   );
64 | }
65 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { Component, ReactNode } from 'react';
 2 | 
 3 | interface Props {
 4 |   children: ReactNode;
 5 | }
 6 | 
 7 | interface State {
 8 |   hasError: boolean;
 9 |   error: Error | null;
10 | }
11 | 
12 | export class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
13 |   constructor(props: Props) {
14 |     super(props);
15 |     this.state = { hasError: false, error: null };
16 |   }
17 | 
18 |   static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {
19 |     return { hasError: true, error };
20 |   }
21 | 
22 |   componentDidCatch(error: Error) {
23 |     console.error("Error caught by boundary:", error);
24 |   }
25 | 
26 |   render() {
27 |     if (this.state.hasError) {
28 |       return (
29 |         <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg">
30 |           <h3 className="font-semibold text-red-800 mb-2">Something went wrong</h3>
31 |           <p className="text-sm text-red-700">{this.state.error?.message}</p>
32 |           <button type="button"
33 |             onClick={() => this.setState({ hasError: false, error: null })}
34 |             className="mt-3 px-3 py-1 bg-red-600 text-white text-sm rounded hover:bg-red-700"
35 |           >
36 |             Try again
37 |           </button>
38 |         </div>
39 |       );
40 |     }
41 | 
42 |     return this.props.children;
43 |   }
44 | }
45 | 
```

```tsx
 1 | import { NavLink as RouterNavLink, NavLinkProps } from "react-router-dom";
 2 | import { forwardRef } from "react";
 3 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
 4 | 
 5 | interface NavLinkCompatProps extends Omit<NavLinkProps, "className"> {
 6 |   className?: string;
 7 |   activeClassName?: string;
 8 |   pendingClassName?: string;
 9 | }
10 | 
11 | const NavLink = forwardRef<HTMLAnchorElement, NavLinkCompatProps>(
12 |   ({ className, activeClassName, pendingClassName, to, ...props }, ref) => {
13 |     return (
14 |       <RouterNavLink
15 |         ref={ref}
16 |         to={to}
17 |         className={({ isActive, isPending }) =>
18 |           cn(className, isActive && activeClassName, isPending && pendingClassName)
19 |         }
20 |         {...props}
21 |       />
22 |     );
23 |   },
24 | );
25 | 
26 | NavLink.displayName = "NavLink";
27 | 
28 | export { NavLink };
29 | 
```

```tsx
12 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (

16 |

22 |     <AccordionPrimitive.Trigger
23 |       ref={ref}
24 |       className={cn(
25 |         "flex flex-1 items-center justify-between py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:underline [&[data-state=open]>svg]:rotate-180",
26 |         className,
27 |       )}
28 |       {...props}
29 |     >
30 |       {children}
31 |       <ChevronDown className="size-4 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-200" />
32 |     </AccordionPrimitive.Trigger>
33 |   </AccordionPrimitive.Header>
34 | ));
35 | AccordionTrigger.displayName = AccordionPrimitive.Trigger.displayName;
36 | 
37 | const AccordionContent = React.forwardRef<
38 |   React.ElementRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Content>,
39 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Content>
40 | >(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
41 |   <AccordionPrimitive.Content
42 |     ref={ref}
43 |     className="overflow-hidden text-sm transition-all data-[state=closed]:animate-accordion-up data-[state=open]:animate-accordion-down"
44 |     {...props}
45 |   >
46 |     <div className={cn("pb-4 pt-0", className)}>{children}</div>
47 |   </AccordionPrimitive.Content>
48 | ));
49 | 
50 | AccordionContent.displayName = AccordionPrimitive.Content.displayName;
51 | 
52 | export { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent };
53 |
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/alert.tsx

```tsx
 1 | import * as React from "react";
 2 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
 3 | 
 4 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
 5 | 
 6 | const alertVariants = cva(
 7 |   "relative w-full rounded-lg border p-4 [&>svg~*]:pl-7 [&>svg+div]:translate-y-[-3px] [&>svg]:absolute [&>svg]:left-4 [&>svg]:top-4 [&>svg]:text-foreground",
 8 |   {
 9 |     variants: {
10 |       variant: {
11 |         default: "bg-background text-foreground",
12 |         destructive: "border-destructive/50 text-destructive dark:border-destructive [&>svg]:text-destructive",
13 |       },
14 |     },
15 |     defaultVariants: {
16 |       variant: "default",
17 |     },
18 |   },
19 | );
20 | 
21 | const Alert = React.forwardRef<
22 |   HTMLDivElement,
23 |   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & VariantProps<typeof alertVariants>
24 | >(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => (
25 |   <div ref={ref} role="alert" className={cn(alertVariants({ variant }), className)} {...props} />
26 | ));
27 | Alert.displayName = "Alert";
28 | 
29 | const AlertTitle = React.forwardRef<HTMLParagraphElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>>(
30 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
31 |     <h5 ref={ref} className={cn("mb-1 font-medium leading-none tracking-tight", className)} {...props} />
32 |   ),
33 | );
34 | AlertTitle.displayName = "AlertTitle";
35 | 
36 | const AlertDescription = React.forwardRef<HTMLParagraphElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>>(
37 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
38 |     <div ref={ref} className={cn("text-sm [&_p]:leading-relaxed", className)} {...props} />
39 |   ),
40 | );
41 | AlertDescription.displayName = "AlertDescription";
42 | 
43 | export { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription };
44 | 
```

```tsx
34 |   />
35 | ));
```

```tsx
28 |         head_row: "flex",
29 |         head_cell: "text-muted-foreground rounded-md w-9 font-normal text-[0.8rem]",
30 |         row: "flex w-full mt-2",
31 |         cell: "size-9 text-center text-sm p-0 relative [&:has([aria-selected].day-range-end)]:rounded-r-md [&:has([aria-selected].day-outside)]:bg-accent/50 [&:has([aria-selected])]:bg-accent first:[&:has([aria-selected])]:rounded-l-md last:[&:has([aria-selected])]:rounded-r-md focus-within:relative focus-within:z-20",
32 |         day: cn(buttonVariants({ variant: "ghost" }), "size-9 p-0 font-normal aria-selected:opacity-100"),
33 |         day_range_end: "day-range-end",
34 |         day_selected:
35 |           "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground focus:bg-primary focus:text-primary-foreground",
36 |         day_today: "bg-accent text-accent-foreground",
37 |         day_outside:

39 |         day_disabled: "text-muted-foreground opacity-50",
40 |         day_range_middle: "aria-selected:bg-accent aria-selected:text-accent-foreground",
41 |         day_hidden: "invisible",
42 |         ...classNames,
43 |       }}
44 |       components={{
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/carousel.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/carousel.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import * as React from "react";
  2 | import useEmblaCarousel, { type UseEmblaCarouselType } from "embla-carousel-react";
  3 | import { ArrowLeft, ArrowRight } from "lucide-react";
  4 | 
  5 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
  6 | import { Button } from "@/shared/components/ui/button";
  7 | 
  8 | type CarouselApi = UseEmblaCarouselType[1];
  9 | type UseCarouselParameters = Parameters<typeof useEmblaCarousel>;
 10 | type CarouselOptions = UseCarouselParameters[0];
 11 | type CarouselPlugin = UseCarouselParameters[1];
 12 | 
 13 | type CarouselProps = {
 14 |   opts?: CarouselOptions;
 15 |   plugins?: CarouselPlugin;
 16 |   orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical";
 17 |   setApi?: (api: CarouselApi) => void;
 18 | };
 19 | 
 20 | type CarouselContextProps = {
 21 |   carouselRef: ReturnType<typeof useEmblaCarousel>[0];
 22 |   api: ReturnType<typeof useEmblaCarousel>[1];
 23 |   scrollPrev: () => void;
 24 |   scrollNext: () => void;
 25 |   canScrollPrev: boolean;
 26 |   canScrollNext: boolean;
 27 | } & CarouselProps;
 28 | 
 29 | const CarouselContext = React.createContext<CarouselContextProps | null>(null);
 30 | 
 31 | function useCarousel() {
 32 |   const context = React.useContext(CarouselContext);
 33 | 
 34 |   if (!context) {
 35 |     throw new Error("useCarousel must be used within a <Carousel />");
 36 |   }
 37 | 
 38 |   return context;
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | const Carousel = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & CarouselProps>(
 42 |   ({ orientation = "horizontal", opts, setApi, plugins, className, children, ...props }, ref) => {
 43 |     const [carouselRef, api] = useEmblaCarousel(
 44 |       {
 45 |         ...opts,
 46 |         axis: orientation === "horizontal" ? "x" : "y",
 47 |       },
 48 |       plugins,
 49 |     );
 50 |     const [canScrollPrev, setCanScrollPrev] = React.useState(false);
 51 |     const [canScrollNext, setCanScrollNext] = React.useState(false);
 52 | 
 53 |     const onSelect = React.useCallback((api: CarouselApi) => {
 54 |       if (!api) {
 55 |         return;
 56 |       }
 57 | 
 58 |       setCanScrollPrev(api.canScrollPrev());
 59 |       setCanScrollNext(api.canScrollNext());
 60 |     }, []);
 61 | 
 62 |     const scrollPrev = React.useCallback(() => {
 63 |       api?.scrollPrev();
 64 |     }, [api]);
 65 | 
 66 |     const scrollNext = React.useCallback(() => {
 67 |       api?.scrollNext();
 68 |     }, [api]);
 69 | 
 70 |     const handleKeyDown = React.useCallback(
 71 |       (event: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
 72 |         if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") {
 73 |           event.preventDefault();
 74 |           scrollPrev();
 75 |         } else if (event.key === "ArrowRight") {
 76 |           event.preventDefault();
 77 |           scrollNext();
 78 |         }
 79 |       },
 80 |       [scrollPrev, scrollNext],
 81 |     );
 82 | 
 83 |     React.useEffect(() => {
 84 |       if (!api || !setApi) {
 85 |         return;
 86 |       }
 87 | 
 88 |       setApi(api);
 89 |     }, [api, setApi]);
 90 | 
 91 |     React.useEffect(() => {
 92 |       if (!api) {
 93 |         return;
 94 |       }
 95 | 
 96 |       onSelect(api);
 97 |       api.on("reInit", onSelect);
 98 |       api.on("select", onSelect);
 99 | 
100 |       return () => {
101 |         api?.off("select", onSelect);
102 |       };
103 |     }, [api, onSelect]);
104 | 
105 |     return (
106 |       <CarouselContext.Provider
107 |         value={{
108 |           carouselRef,
109 |           api: api,
110 |           opts,
111 |           orientation: orientation || (opts?.axis === "y" ? "vertical" : "horizontal"),
112 |           scrollPrev,
113 |           scrollNext,
114 |           canScrollPrev,
115 |           canScrollNext,
116 |         }}
117 |       >
118 |         <div
119 |           ref={ref}
120 |           onKeyDownCapture={handleKeyDown}
121 |           className={cn("relative", className)}
122 |           role="region"
123 |           aria-roledescription="carousel"
124 |           {...props}
125 |         >
126 |           {children}
127 |         </div>
128 |       </CarouselContext.Provider>
129 |     );
130 |   },
131 | );
132 | Carousel.displayName = "Carousel";
133 | 
134 | const CarouselContent = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>(
135 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
136 |     const { carouselRef, orientation } = useCarousel();
137 | 
138 |     return (
139 |       <div ref={carouselRef} className="overflow-hidden">
140 |         <div
141 |           ref={ref}
142 |           className={cn("flex", orientation === "horizontal" ? "-ml-4" : "-mt-4 flex-col", className)}
143 |           {...props}
144 |         />
145 |       </div>
146 |     );
147 |   },
148 | );
149 | CarouselContent.displayName = "CarouselContent";
150 | 
151 | const CarouselItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>(
152 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
153 |     const { orientation } = useCarousel();
154 | 
155 |     return (
156 |       <div
157 |         ref={ref}
158 |         role="group"
159 |         aria-roledescription="slide"
160 |         className={cn("min-w-0 shrink-0 grow-0 basis-full", orientation === "horizontal" ? "pl-4" : "pt-4", className)}
161 |         {...props}
162 |       />
163 |     );
164 |   },
165 | );
166 | CarouselItem.displayName = "CarouselItem";
167 | 
168 | const CarouselPrevious = React.forwardRef<HTMLButtonElement, React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>>(
169 |   ({ className, variant = "outline", size = "icon", ...props }, ref) => {
170 |     const { orientation, scrollPrev, canScrollPrev } = useCarousel();
171 | 
172 |     return (
173 |       <Button
174 |         ref={ref}
175 |         variant={variant}
176 |         size={size}
177 |         className={cn(
178 |           "absolute size-8 rounded-full",
179 |           orientation === "horizontal"
180 |             ? "-left-12 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2"
181 |             : "-top-12 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 rotate-90",
182 |           className,
183 |         )}
184 |         disabled={!canScrollPrev}
185 |         onClick={scrollPrev}
186 |         {...props}
187 |       >
188 |         <ArrowLeft className="size-4" />
189 |         <span className="sr-only">Previous slide</span>
190 |       </Button>
191 |     );
192 |   },
193 | );
194 | CarouselPrevious.displayName = "CarouselPrevious";
195 | 
196 | const CarouselNext = React.forwardRef<HTMLButtonElement, React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>>(
197 |   ({ className, variant = "outline", size = "icon", ...props }, ref) => {
198 |     const { orientation, scrollNext, canScrollNext } = useCarousel();
199 | 
200 |     return (
201 |       <Button
202 |         ref={ref}
203 |         variant={variant}
204 |         size={size}
205 |         className={cn(
206 |           "absolute size-8 rounded-full",
207 |           orientation === "horizontal"
208 |             ? "-right-12 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2"
209 |             : "-bottom-12 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 rotate-90",
210 |           className,
211 |         )}
212 |         disabled={!canScrollNext}
213 |         onClick={scrollNext}
214 |         {...props}
215 |       >
216 |         <ArrowRight className="size-4" />
217 |         <span className="sr-only">Next slide</span>
218 |       </Button>
219 |     );
220 |   },
221 | );
222 | CarouselNext.displayName = "CarouselNext";
223 | 
224 | export { type CarouselApi, Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext };
225 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/chart.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/chart.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import * as React from "react";
  2 | import * as RechartsPrimitive from "recharts";
  3 | 
  4 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
  5 | 
  6 | // Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }
  7 | const THEMES = { light: "", dark: ".dark" } as const;
  8 | 
  9 | export type ChartConfig = {
 10 |   [k in string]: {
 11 |     label?: React.ReactNode;
 12 |     icon?: React.ComponentType;
 13 |   } & ({ color?: string; theme?: never } | { color?: never; theme: Record<keyof typeof THEMES, string> });
 14 | };
 15 | 
 16 | type ChartContextProps = {
 17 |   config: ChartConfig;
 18 | };
 19 | 
 20 | const ChartContext = React.createContext<ChartContextProps | null>(null);
 21 | 
 22 | function useChart() {
 23 |   const context = React.useContext(ChartContext);
 24 | 
 25 |   if (!context) {
 26 |     throw new Error("useChart must be used within a <ChartContainer />");
 27 |   }
 28 | 
 29 |   return context;
 30 | }
 31 | 
 32 | const ChartContainer = React.forwardRef<
 33 |   HTMLDivElement,
 34 |   React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 35 |     config: ChartConfig;
 36 |     children: React.ComponentProps<typeof RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>["children"];
 37 |   }
 38 | >(({ id, className, children, config, ...props }, ref) => {
 39 |   const uniqueId = React.useId();
 40 |   const chartId = `chart-${id || uniqueId.replace(/:/g, "")}`;
 41 | 
 42 |   return (
 43 |     <ChartContext.Provider value={{ config }}>
 44 |       <div
 45 |         data-chart={chartId}
 46 |         ref={ref}
 47 |         className={cn(
 48 |           "flex aspect-video justify-center text-xs [&_.recharts-cartesian-axis-tick_text]:fill-muted-foreground [&_.recharts-cartesian-grid_line[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border/50 [&_.recharts-curve.recharts-tooltip-cursor]:stroke-border [&_.recharts-dot[stroke='#fff']]:stroke-transparent [&_.recharts-layer]:outline-none [&_.recharts-polar-grid_[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border [&_.recharts-radial-bar-background-sector]:fill-muted [&_.recharts-rectangle.recharts-tooltip-cursor]:fill-muted [&_.recharts-reference-line_[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border [&_.recharts-sector[stroke='#fff']]:stroke-transparent [&_.recharts-sector]:outline-none [&_.recharts-surface]:outline-none",
 49 |           className,
 50 |         )}
 51 |         {...props}
 52 |       >
 53 |         <ChartStyle id={chartId} config={config} />
 54 |         <RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>{children}</RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>
 55 |       </div>
 56 |     </ChartContext.Provider>
 57 |   );
 58 | });
 59 | ChartContainer.displayName = "Chart";
 60 | 
 61 | const ChartStyle = ({ id, config }: { id: string; config: ChartConfig }) => {
 62 |   const colorConfig = Object.entries(config).filter(([_, config]) => config.theme || config.color);
 63 | 
 64 |   if (!colorConfig.length) {
 65 |     return null;
 66 |   }
 67 | 
 68 |   const css = Object.entries(THEMES)
 69 |     .map(
 70 |       ([theme, prefix]) => `
 71 | ${prefix} [data-chart=${id}] {
 72 | ${colorConfig
 73 |   .map(([key, itemConfig]) => {
 74 |     const color = itemConfig.theme?.[theme as keyof typeof itemConfig.theme] || itemConfig.color;
 75 |     return color ? `  --color-${key}: ${color};` : null;
 76 |   })
 77 |   .join("\n")}
 78 | }
 79 | `,
 80 |     )
 81 |     .join("\n");
 82 | 
 83 |   return (
 84 |     <style>{css}</style>
 85 |   );
 86 | };
 87 | 
 88 | const ChartTooltip = RechartsPrimitive.Tooltip;
 89 | 
 90 | const ChartTooltipContent = React.forwardRef<
 91 |   HTMLDivElement,
 92 |   React.ComponentProps<typeof RechartsPrimitive.Tooltip> &
 93 |     React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 94 |       hideLabel?: boolean;
 95 |       hideIndicator?: boolean;
 96 |       indicator?: "line" | "dot" | "dashed";
 97 |       nameKey?: string;
 98 |       labelKey?: string;
 99 |     }
100 | >(
101 |   (
102 |     {
103 |       active,
104 |       payload,
105 |       className,
106 |       indicator = "dot",
107 |       hideLabel = false,
108 |       hideIndicator = false,
109 |       label,
110 |       labelFormatter,
111 |       labelClassName,
112 |       formatter,
113 |       color,
114 |       nameKey,
115 |       labelKey,
116 |     },
117 |     ref,
118 |   ) => {
119 |     const { config } = useChart();
120 | 
121 |     const tooltipLabel = React.useMemo(() => {
122 |       if (hideLabel || !payload?.length) {
123 |         return null;
124 |       }
125 | 
126 |       const [item] = payload;
127 |       const key = `${labelKey || item.dataKey || item.name || "value"}`;
128 |       const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key);
129 |       const value =
130 |         !labelKey && typeof label === "string"
131 |           ? config[label as keyof typeof config]?.label || label
132 |           : itemConfig?.label;
133 | 
134 |       if (labelFormatter) {
135 |         return <div className={cn("font-medium", labelClassName)}>{labelFormatter(value, payload)}</div>;
136 |       }
137 | 
138 |       if (!value) {
139 |         return null;
140 |       }
141 | 
142 |       return <div className={cn("font-medium", labelClassName)}>{value}</div>;
143 |     }, [label, labelFormatter, payload, hideLabel, labelClassName, config, labelKey]);
144 | 
145 |     if (!active || !payload?.length) {
146 |       return null;
147 |     }
148 | 
149 |     const nestLabel = payload.length === 1 && indicator !== "dot";
150 | 
151 |     return (
152 |       <div
153 |         ref={ref}
154 |         className={cn(
155 |           "grid min-w-[8rem] items-start gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border/50 bg-background px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs shadow-xl",
156 |           className,
157 |         )}
158 |       >
159 |         {!nestLabel ? tooltipLabel : null}
160 |         <div className="grid gap-1.5">
161 |           {payload.map((item, index) => {
162 |             const key = `${nameKey || item.name || item.dataKey || "value"}`;
163 |             const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key);
164 |             const indicatorColor = color || item.payload.fill || item.color;
165 | 
166 |             return (
167 |               <div
168 |                 key={item.dataKey}
169 |                 className={cn(
170 |                   "flex w-full flex-wrap items-stretch gap-2 [&>svg]:h-2.5 [&>svg]:w-2.5 [&>svg]:text-muted-foreground",
171 |                   indicator === "dot" && "items-center",
172 |                 )}
173 |               >
174 |                 {formatter && item?.value !== undefined && item.name ? (
175 |                   formatter(item.value, item.name, item, index, item.payload)
176 |                 ) : (
177 |                   <>
178 |                     {itemConfig?.icon ? (
179 |                       <itemConfig.icon />
180 |                     ) : (
181 |                       !hideIndicator && (
182 |                         <div
183 |                           className={cn("shrink-0 rounded-[2px] border-[--color-border] bg-[--color-bg]", {
184 |                             "size-2.5": indicator === "dot",
185 |                             "w-1": indicator === "line",
186 |                             "w-0 border-[1.5px] border-dashed bg-transparent": indicator === "dashed",
187 |                             "my-0.5": nestLabel && indicator === "dashed",
188 |                           })}
189 |                           style={
190 |                             {
191 |                               "--color-bg": indicatorColor,
192 |                               "--color-border": indicatorColor,
193 |                             } as React.CSSProperties
194 |                           }
195 |                         />
196 |                       )
197 |                     )}
198 |                     <div
199 |                       className={cn(
200 |                         "flex flex-1 justify-between leading-none",
201 |                         nestLabel ? "items-end" : "items-center",
202 |                       )}
203 |                     >
204 |                       <div className="grid gap-1.5">
205 |                         {nestLabel ? tooltipLabel : null}
206 |                         <span className="text-muted-foreground">{itemConfig?.label || item.name}</span>
207 |                       </div>
208 |                       {item.value && (
209 |                         <span className="font-mono font-medium tabular-nums text-foreground">
210 |                           {item.value.toLocaleString()}
211 |                         </span>
212 |                       )}
213 |                     </div>
214 |                   </>
215 |                 )}
216 |               </div>
217 |             );
218 |           })}
219 |         </div>
220 |       </div>
221 |     );
222 |   },
223 | );
224 | ChartTooltipContent.displayName = "ChartTooltip";
225 | 
226 | const ChartLegend = RechartsPrimitive.Legend;
227 | 
228 | const ChartLegendContent = React.forwardRef<
229 |   HTMLDivElement,
230 |   React.ComponentProps<"div"> &
231 |     Pick<RechartsPrimitive.LegendProps, "payload" | "verticalAlign"> & {
232 |       hideIcon?: boolean;
233 |       nameKey?: string;
234 |     }
235 | >(({ className, hideIcon = false, payload, verticalAlign = "bottom", nameKey }, ref) => {
236 |   const { config } = useChart();
237 | 
238 |   if (!payload?.length) {
239 |     return null;
240 |   }
241 | 
242 |   return (
243 |     <div
244 |       ref={ref}
245 |       className={cn("flex items-center justify-center gap-4", verticalAlign === "top" ? "pb-3" : "pt-3", className)}
246 |     >
247 |       {payload.map((item) => {
248 |         const key = `${nameKey || item.dataKey || "value"}`;
249 |         const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key);
250 | 
251 |         return (
252 |           <div
253 |             key={item.value}
254 |             className={cn("flex items-center gap-1.5 [&>svg]:h-3 [&>svg]:w-3 [&>svg]:text-muted-foreground")}
255 |           >
256 |             {itemConfig?.icon && !hideIcon ? (
257 |               <itemConfig.icon />
258 |             ) : (
259 |               <div
260 |                 className="size-2 shrink-0 rounded-[2px]"
261 |                 style={{
262 |                   backgroundColor: item.color,
263 |                 }}
264 |               />
265 |             )}
266 |             {itemConfig?.label}
267 |           </div>
268 |         );
269 |       })}
270 |     </div>
271 |   );
272 | });
273 | ChartLegendContent.displayName = "ChartLegend";
274 | 
275 | // Helper to extract item config from a payload.
276 | function getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config: ChartConfig, payload: unknown, key: string) {
277 |   if (typeof payload !== "object" || payload === null) {
278 |     return undefined;
279 |   }
280 | 
281 |   const payloadPayload =
282 |     "payload" in payload && typeof payload.payload === "object" && payload.payload !== null
283 |       ? payload.payload
284 |       : undefined;
285 | 
286 |   let configLabelKey: string = key;
287 | 
288 |   if (key in payload && typeof payload[key as keyof typeof payload] === "string") {
289 |     configLabelKey = payload[key as keyof typeof payload] as string;
290 |   } else if (
291 |     payloadPayload &&
292 |     key in payloadPayload &&
293 |     typeof payloadPayload[key as keyof typeof payloadPayload] === "string"
294 |   ) {
295 |     configLabelKey = payloadPayload[key as keyof typeof payloadPayload] as string;
296 |   }
297 | 
298 |   return configLabelKey in config ? config[configLabelKey] : config[key as keyof typeof config];
299 | }
300 | 
301 | export { ChartContainer, ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent, ChartLegend, ChartLegendContent, ChartStyle };
302 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/form.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/form.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import * as React from "react";
  2 | import * as LabelPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-label";
  3 | import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot";
  4 | import { Controller, ControllerProps, FieldPath, FieldValues, FormProvider, useFormContext } from "react-hook-form";
  5 | 
  6 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
  7 | import { Label } from "@/shared/components/ui/label";
  8 | 
  9 | const Form = FormProvider;
 10 | 
 11 | type FormFieldContextValue<
 12 |   TFieldValues extends FieldValues = FieldValues,
 13 |   TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues> = FieldPath<TFieldValues>,
 14 | > = {
 15 |   name: TName;
 16 | };
 17 | 
 18 | const FormFieldContext = React.createContext<FormFieldContextValue>({} as FormFieldContextValue);
 19 | 
 20 | const FormField = <
 21 |   TFieldValues extends FieldValues = FieldValues,
 22 |   TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues> = FieldPath<TFieldValues>,
 23 | >({
 24 |   ...props
 25 | }: ControllerProps<TFieldValues, TName>) => {
 26 |   return (
 27 |     <FormFieldContext.Provider value={{ name: props.name }}>
 28 |       <Controller {...props} />
 29 |     </FormFieldContext.Provider>
 30 |   );
 31 | };
 32 | 
 33 | const useFormField = () => {
 34 |   const fieldContext = React.useContext(FormFieldContext);
 35 |   const itemContext = React.useContext(FormItemContext);
 36 |   const { getFieldState, formState } = useFormContext();
 37 | 
 38 |   const fieldState = getFieldState(fieldContext.name, formState);
 39 | 
 40 |   if (!fieldContext) {
 41 |     throw new Error("useFormField should be used within <FormField>");
 42 |   }
 43 | 
 44 |   const { id } = itemContext;
 45 | 
 46 |   return {
 47 |     id,
 48 |     name: fieldContext.name,
 49 |     formItemId: `${id}-form-item`,
 50 |     formDescriptionId: `${id}-form-item-description`,
 51 |     formMessageId: `${id}-form-item-message`,
 52 |     ...fieldState,
 53 |   };
 54 | };
 55 | 
 56 | type FormItemContextValue = {
 57 |   id: string;
 58 | };
 59 | 
 60 | const FormItemContext = React.createContext<FormItemContextValue>({} as FormItemContextValue);
 61 | 
 62 | const FormItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>(
 63 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
 64 |     const id = React.useId();
 65 | 
 66 |     return (
 67 |       <FormItemContext.Provider value={{ id }}>
 68 |         <div ref={ref} className={cn("space-y-2", className)} {...props} />
 69 |       </FormItemContext.Provider>
 70 |     );
 71 |   },
 72 | );
 73 | FormItem.displayName = "FormItem";
 74 | 
 75 | const FormLabel = React.forwardRef<
 76 |   React.ElementRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>,
 77 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>
 78 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
 79 |   const { error, formItemId } = useFormField();
 80 | 
 81 |   return <Label ref={ref} className={cn(error && "text-destructive", className)} htmlFor={formItemId} {...props} />;
 82 | });
 83 | FormLabel.displayName = "FormLabel";
 84 | 
 85 | const FormControl = React.forwardRef<React.ElementRef<typeof Slot>, React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof Slot>>(
 86 |   ({ ...props }, ref) => {
 87 |     const { error, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId } = useFormField();
 88 | 
 89 |     return (
 90 |       <Slot
 91 |         ref={ref}
 92 |         id={formItemId}
 93 |         aria-describedby={!error ? `${formDescriptionId}` : `${formDescriptionId} ${formMessageId}`}
 94 |         aria-invalid={!!error}
 95 |         {...props}
 96 |       />
 97 |     );
 98 |   },
 99 | );
100 | FormControl.displayName = "FormControl";
101 | 
102 | const FormDescription = React.forwardRef<HTMLParagraphElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>>(
103 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
104 |     const { formDescriptionId } = useFormField();
105 | 
106 |     return <p ref={ref} id={formDescriptionId} className={cn("text-sm text-muted-foreground", className)} {...props} />;
107 |   },
108 | );
109 | FormDescription.displayName = "FormDescription";
110 | 
111 | const FormMessage = React.forwardRef<HTMLParagraphElement, React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>>(
112 |   ({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => {
113 |     const { error, formMessageId } = useFormField();
114 |     const body = error ? String(error?.message) : children;
115 | 
116 |     if (!body) {
117 |       return null;
118 |     }
119 | 
120 |     return (
121 |       <p ref={ref} id={formMessageId} className={cn("text-sm font-medium text-destructive", className)} {...props}>
122 |         {body}
123 |       </p>
124 |     );
125 |   },
126 | );
127 | FormMessage.displayName = "FormMessage";
128 | 
129 | export { Form, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage, FormField };
130 | 
```

```tsx
 7 | const InputOTP = React.forwardRef<React.ElementRef<typeof OTPInput>, React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof OTPInput>>(
 8 |   ({ className, containerClassName, ...props }, ref) => (
 9 |     <OTPInput
10 |       ref={ref}
11 |       containerClassName={cn("flex items-center gap-2 has-[:disabled]:opacity-50", containerClassName)}
12 |       className={cn("disabled:cursor-not-allowed", className)}
13 |       {...props}
14 |     />
15 |   ),
16 | );
17 | InputOTP.displayName = "InputOTP";
18 | 
19 | const InputOTPGroup = React.forwardRef<React.ElementRef<"div">, React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"div">>(
20 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => <div ref={ref} className={cn("flex items-center", className)} {...props} />,
21 | );
22 | InputOTPGroup.displayName = "InputOTPGroup";
23 | 
24 | const InputOTPSlot = React.forwardRef<
25 |   React.ElementRef<"div">,
26 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"div"> & { index: number }
27 | >(({ index, className, ...props }, ref) => {
28 |   const inputOTPContext = React.useContext(OTPInputContext);
29 |   const { char, hasFakeCaret, isActive } = inputOTPContext.slots[index];
30 | 
31 |   return (
32 |     <div
33 |       ref={ref}
34 |       className={cn(
35 |         "relative flex size-10 items-center justify-center border-y border-r border-input text-sm transition-all first:rounded-l-md first:border-l last:rounded-r-md",
36 |         isActive && "z-10 ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-background",
37 |         className,
38 |       )}
39 |       {...props}
40 |     >
41 |       {char}
42 |       {hasFakeCaret && (
43 |         <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
44 |           <div className="animate-caret-blink h-4 w-px bg-foreground duration-1000" />
45 |         </div>
46 |       )}
47 |     </div>
48 |   );
49 | });
50 | InputOTPSlot.displayName = "InputOTPSlot";
51 | 
52 | const InputOTPSeparator = React.forwardRef<React.ElementRef<"div">, React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"div">>(
53 |   ({ ...props }, ref) => (
54 |     <div ref={ref} role="separator" {...props}>
55 |       <Dot />
56 |     </div>
57 |   ),
58 | );
59 | InputOTPSeparator.displayName = "InputOTPSeparator";
60 | 
61 | export { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator };
62 | 
```

```tsx
 3 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
 4 | 
 5 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
 6 | 
 7 | const labelVariants = cva("text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70");
 8 | 
 9 | const Label = React.forwardRef<
10 |   React.ElementRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>,
11 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root> & VariantProps<typeof labelVariants>
12 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
13 |   <LabelPrimitive.Root ref={ref} className={cn(labelVariants(), className)} {...props} />
14 | ));
15 | Label.displayName = LabelPrimitive.Root.displayName;
16 | 
17 | export { Label };
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/pagination.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/pagination.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import * as React from "react";
 2 | import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, MoreHorizontal } from "lucide-react";
 3 | 
 4 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
 5 | import { ButtonProps } from "@/shared/components/ui/button";
 6 | import { buttonVariants } from "@/shared/components/ui/button-variants";
 7 | 
 8 | const Pagination = ({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"nav">) => (
 9 |   <nav
10 |     aria-label="pagination"
11 |     className={cn("mx-auto flex w-full justify-center", className)}
12 |     {...props}
13 |   />
14 | );
15 | Pagination.displayName = "Pagination";
16 | 
17 | const PaginationContent = React.forwardRef<HTMLUListElement, React.ComponentProps<"ul">>(
18 |   ({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
19 |     <ul ref={ref} className={cn("flex flex-row items-center gap-1", className)} {...props} />
20 |   ),
21 | );
22 | PaginationContent.displayName = "PaginationContent";
23 | 
24 | const PaginationItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLLIElement, React.ComponentProps<"li">>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
25 |   <li ref={ref} className={cn("", className)} {...props} />
26 | ));
27 | PaginationItem.displayName = "PaginationItem";
28 | 
29 | type PaginationLinkProps = {
30 |   isActive?: boolean;
31 | } & Pick<ButtonProps, "size"> &
32 |   React.ComponentProps<"a">;
33 | 
34 | const PaginationLink = ({ className, isActive, size = "icon", children, ...props }: PaginationLinkProps) => (
35 |   <a
36 |     aria-current={isActive ? "page" : undefined}
37 |     className={cn(
38 |       buttonVariants({
39 |         variant: isActive ? "outline" : "ghost",
40 |         size,
41 |       }),
42 |       className,
43 |     )}
44 |     {...props}
45 |   >
46 |     {children}
47 |   </a>
48 | );
49 | PaginationLink.displayName = "PaginationLink";
50 | 
51 | const PaginationPrevious = ({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof PaginationLink>) => (
52 |   <PaginationLink aria-label="Go to previous page" size="default" className={cn("gap-1 pl-2.5", className)} {...props}>
53 |     <ChevronLeft className="size-4" />
54 |     <span>Previous</span>
55 |   </PaginationLink>
56 | );
57 | PaginationPrevious.displayName = "PaginationPrevious";
58 | 
59 | const PaginationNext = ({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof PaginationLink>) => (
60 |   <PaginationLink aria-label="Go to next page" size="default" className={cn("gap-1 pr-2.5", className)} {...props}>
61 |     <span>Next</span>
62 |     <ChevronRight className="size-4" />
63 |   </PaginationLink>
64 | );
65 | PaginationNext.displayName = "PaginationNext";
66 | 
67 | const PaginationEllipsis = ({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"span">) => (
68 |   <span aria-hidden className={cn("flex size-9 items-center justify-center", className)} {...props}>
69 |     <MoreHorizontal className="size-4" />
70 |     <span className="sr-only">More pages</span>
71 |   </span>
72 | );
73 | PaginationEllipsis.displayName = "PaginationEllipsis";
74 | 
75 | export {
76 |   Pagination,
77 |   PaginationContent,
78 |   PaginationEllipsis,
79 |   PaginationItem,
80 |   PaginationLink,
81 |   PaginationNext,
82 |   PaginationPrevious,
83 | };
84 | 
```

```tsx
  1 | import * as SheetPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-dialog";
  2 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
  3 | import { X } from "lucide-react";
  4 | import * as React from "react";
  5 | 
  6 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
  7 | 
  8 | const Sheet = SheetPrimitive.Root;
  9 | 
 10 | const SheetTrigger = SheetPrimitive.Trigger;
 11 | 
 12 | const SheetClose = SheetPrimitive.Close;
 13 | 
 14 | const SheetPortal = SheetPrimitive.Portal;
 15 | 
 16 | const SheetOverlay = React.forwardRef<
 17 |   React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Overlay>,
 18 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Overlay>
 19 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
 20 |   <SheetPrimitive.Overlay
 21 |     className={cn(
 22 |       "fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80 data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0",
 23 |       className,
 24 |     )}
 25 |     {...props}
 26 |     ref={ref}
 27 |   />
 28 | ));
 29 | SheetOverlay.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Overlay.displayName;
 30 | 
 31 | const sheetVariants = cva(
 32 |   "fixed z-50 gap-4 bg-background p-6 shadow-lg transition ease-in-out data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:duration-300 data-[state=open]:duration-500",
 33 |   {
 34 |     variants: {
 35 |       side: {
 36 |         top: "inset-x-0 top-0 border-b data-[state=closed]:slide-out-to-top data-[state=open]:slide-in-from-top",
 37 |         bottom:
 38 |           "inset-x-0 bottom-0 border-t data-[state=closed]:slide-out-to-bottom data-[state=open]:slide-in-from-bottom",
 39 |         left: "inset-y-0 left-0 h-full w-3/4 border-r data-[state=closed]:slide-out-to-left data-[state=open]:slide-in-from-left sm:max-w-sm",
 40 |         right:
 41 |           "inset-y-0 right-0 h-full w-3/4  border-l data-[state=closed]:slide-out-to-right data-[state=open]:slide-in-from-right sm:max-w-sm",
 42 |       },
 43 |     },
 44 |     defaultVariants: {
 45 |       side: "right",
 46 |     },
 47 |   },
 48 | );
 49 | 
 50 | interface SheetContentProps
 51 |   extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Content>,
 52 |     VariantProps<typeof sheetVariants> {}
 53 | 
 54 | const SheetContent = React.forwardRef<React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Content>, SheetContentProps>(
 55 |   ({ side = "right", className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
 56 |     <SheetPortal>
 57 |       <SheetOverlay />
 58 |       <SheetPrimitive.Content ref={ref} className={cn(sheetVariants({ side }), className)} {...props}>
 59 |         {children}
 60 |         <SheetPrimitive.Close className="absolute right-4 top-4 rounded-sm opacity-70 ring-offset-background transition-opacity data-[state=open]:bg-secondary hover:opacity-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none">
 61 |           <X className="size-4" />
 62 |           <span className="sr-only">Close</span>
 63 |         </SheetPrimitive.Close>
 64 |       </SheetPrimitive.Content>
 65 |     </SheetPortal>
 66 |   ),
 67 | );
 68 | SheetContent.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Content.displayName;
 69 | 
 70 | const SheetHeader = ({ className, ...props }: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) => (
 71 |   <div className={cn("flex flex-col space-y-2 text-center sm:text-left", className)} {...props} />
 72 | );
 73 | SheetHeader.displayName = "SheetHeader";
 74 | 
 75 | const SheetFooter = ({ className, ...props }: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) => (
 76 |   <div className={cn("flex flex-col-reverse sm:flex-row sm:justify-end sm:space-x-2", className)} {...props} />
 77 | );
 78 | SheetFooter.displayName = "SheetFooter";
 79 | 
 80 | const SheetTitle = React.forwardRef<
 81 |   React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Title>,
 82 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Title>
 83 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
 84 |   <SheetPrimitive.Title ref={ref} className={cn("text-lg font-semibold text-foreground", className)} {...props} />
 85 | ));
 86 | SheetTitle.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Title.displayName;
 87 | 
 88 | const SheetDescription = React.forwardRef<
 89 |   React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Description>,
 90 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Description>
 91 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
 92 |   <SheetPrimitive.Description ref={ref} className={cn("text-sm text-muted-foreground", className)} {...props} />
 93 | ));
 94 | SheetDescription.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Description.displayName;
 95 |
```
