### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/sidebar.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/sidebar.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import * as React from "react";
  2 | import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot";
  3 | import { VariantProps, cva } from "class-variance-authority";
  4 | import { PanelLeft } from "lucide-react";
  5 | 
  6 | import { useIsMobile } from "@/shared/hooks/use-mobile";
  7 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
  8 | import { Button } from "@/shared/components/ui/button";
  9 | import { Input } from "@/shared/components/ui/input";
 10 | import { Separator } from "@/shared/components/ui/separator";
 11 | import { Sheet, SheetContent } from "@/shared/components/ui/sheet";
 12 | import { Skeleton } from "@/shared/components/ui/skeleton";
 13 | import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/shared/components/ui/tooltip";
 14 | 
 15 | const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME = "sidebar:state";
 16 | const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;
 17 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH = "16rem";
 18 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE = "18rem";
 19 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON = "3rem";
 20 | const SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT = "b";
 21 | 
 22 | type SidebarContext = {
 23 |   state: "expanded" | "collapsed";
 24 |   open: boolean;
 25 |   setOpen: (open: boolean) => void;
 26 |   openMobile: boolean;
 27 |   setOpenMobile: (open: boolean) => void;
 28 |   isMobile: boolean;
 29 |   toggleSidebar: () => void;
 30 | };
 31 | 
 32 | const SidebarContext = React.createContext<SidebarContext | null>(null);
 33 | 
 34 | function useSidebar() {
 35 |   const context = React.useContext(SidebarContext);
 36 |   if (!context) {
 37 |     throw new Error("useSidebar must be used within a SidebarProvider.");
 38 |   }
 39 | 
 40 |   return context;
 41 | }
 42 | 
 43 | const SidebarProvider = React.forwardRef<
 44 |   HTMLDivElement,
 45 |   React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 46 |     defaultOpen?: boolean;
 47 |     open?: boolean;
 48 |     onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;
 49 |   }
 50 | >(({ defaultOpen = true, open: openProp, onOpenChange: setOpenProp, className, style, children, ...props }, ref) => {
 51 |   const isMobile = useIsMobile();
 52 |   const [openMobile, setOpenMobile] = React.useState(false);
 53 | 
 54 |   // This is the internal state of the sidebar.
 55 |   // We use openProp and setOpenProp for control from outside the component.
 56 |   const [_open, _setOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen);
 57 |   const open = openProp ?? _open;
 58 |   const setOpen = React.useCallback(
 59 |     (value: boolean | ((value: boolean) => boolean)) => {
 60 |       const openState = typeof value === "function" ? value(open) : value;
 61 |       if (setOpenProp) {
 62 |         setOpenProp(openState);
 63 |       } else {
 64 |         _setOpen(openState);
 65 |       }
 66 | 
 67 |       // This sets the cookie to keep the sidebar state.
 68 |       document.cookie = `${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME}=${openState}; path=/; max-age=${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}`;
 69 |     },
 70 |     [setOpenProp, open],
 71 |   );
 72 | 
 73 |   // Helper to toggle the sidebar.
 74 |   const toggleSidebar = React.useCallback(() => {
 75 |     return isMobile ? setOpenMobile((open) => !open) : setOpen((open) => !open);
 76 |   }, [isMobile, setOpen, setOpenMobile]);
 77 | 
 78 |   // Adds a keyboard shortcut to toggle the sidebar.
 79 |   React.useEffect(() => {
 80 |     const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
 81 |       if (event.key === SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT && (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
 82 |         event.preventDefault();
 83 |         toggleSidebar();
 84 |       }
 85 |     };
 86 | 
 87 |     window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
 88 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
 89 |   }, [toggleSidebar]);
 90 | 
 91 |   // We add a state so that we can do data-state="expanded" or "collapsed".
 92 |   // This makes it easier to style the sidebar with Tailwind classes.
 93 |   const state = open ? "expanded" : "collapsed";
 94 | 
 95 |   const contextValue = React.useMemo<SidebarContext>(
 96 |     () => ({
 97 |       state,
 98 |       open,
 99 |       setOpen,
100 |       isMobile,
101 |       openMobile,
102 |       setOpenMobile,
103 |       toggleSidebar,
104 |     }),
105 |     [state, open, setOpen, isMobile, openMobile, setOpenMobile, toggleSidebar],
106 |   );
107 | 
108 |   return (
109 |     <SidebarContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
110 |       <TooltipProvider delayDuration={0}>
111 |         <div
112 |           style={
113 |             {
114 |               "--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH,
115 |               "--sidebar-width-icon": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON,
116 |               ...style,
117 |             } as React.CSSProperties
118 |           }
119 |           className={cn("group/sidebar-wrapper flex min-h-svh w-full has-[[data-variant=inset]]:bg-sidebar", className)}
120 |           ref={ref}
121 |           {...props}
122 |         >
123 |           {children}
124 |         </div>
125 |       </TooltipProvider>
126 |     </SidebarContext.Provider>
127 |   );
128 | });
129 | SidebarProvider.displayName = "SidebarProvider";
130 | 
131 | const Sidebar = React.forwardRef<
132 |   HTMLDivElement,
133 |   React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
134 |     side?: "left" | "right";
135 |     variant?: "sidebar" | "floating" | "inset";
136 |     collapsible?: "offcanvas" | "icon" | "none";
137 |   }
138 | >(({ side = "left", variant = "sidebar", collapsible = "offcanvas", className, children, ...props }, ref) => {
139 |   const { isMobile, state, openMobile, setOpenMobile } = useSidebar();
140 | 
141 |   if (collapsible === "none") {
142 |     return (
143 |       <div
144 |         className={cn("flex h-full w-[--sidebar-width] flex-col bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground", className)}
145 |         ref={ref}
146 |         {...props}
147 |       >
148 |         {children}
149 |       </div>
150 |     );
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   if (isMobile) {
154 |     return (
155 |       <Sheet open={openMobile} onOpenChange={setOpenMobile} {...props}>
156 |         <SheetContent
157 |           data-sidebar="sidebar"
158 |           data-mobile="true"
159 |           className="w-[--sidebar-width] bg-sidebar p-0 text-sidebar-foreground [&>button]:hidden"
160 |           style={
161 |             {
162 |               "--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE,
163 |             } as React.CSSProperties
164 |           }
165 |           side={side}
166 |         >
167 |           <div className="flex h-full w-full flex-col">{children}</div>
168 |         </SheetContent>
169 |       </Sheet>
170 |     );
171 |   }
172 | 
173 |   return (
174 |     <div
175 |       ref={ref}
176 |       className="group peer hidden text-sidebar-foreground md:block"
177 |       data-state={state}
178 |       data-collapsible={state === "collapsed" ? collapsible : ""}
179 |       data-variant={variant}
180 |       data-side={side}
181 |     >
182 |       {/* This is what handles the sidebar gap on desktop */}
183 |       <div
184 |         className={cn(
185 |           "relative h-svh w-[--sidebar-width] bg-transparent transition-[width] duration-200 ease-linear",
186 |           "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:w-0",
187 |           "group-data-[side=right]:rotate-180",
188 |           variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
189 |             ? "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)_+_theme(spacing.4))]"
190 |             : "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[--sidebar-width-icon]",
191 |         )}
192 |       />
193 |       <div
194 |         className={cn(
195 |           "fixed inset-y-0 z-10 hidden h-svh w-[--sidebar-width] transition-[left,right,width] duration-200 ease-linear md:flex",
196 |           side === "left"
197 |             ? "left-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:left-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)]"
198 |             : "right-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:right-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)]",
199 |           // Adjust the padding for floating and inset variants.
200 |           variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
201 |             ? "p-2 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)_+_theme(spacing.4)_+2px)]"
202 |             : "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[--sidebar-width-icon] group-data-[side=left]:border-r group-data-[side=right]:border-l",
203 |           className,
204 |         )}
205 |         {...props}
206 |       >
207 |         <div
208 |           data-sidebar="sidebar"
209 |           className="flex h-full w-full flex-col bg-sidebar group-data-[variant=floating]:rounded-lg group-data-[variant=floating]:border group-data-[variant=floating]:border-sidebar-border group-data-[variant=floating]:shadow"
210 |         >
211 |           {children}
212 |         </div>
213 |       </div>
214 |     </div>
215 |   );
216 | });
217 | Sidebar.displayName = "Sidebar";
218 | 
219 | const SidebarTrigger = React.forwardRef<React.ElementRef<typeof Button>, React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>>(
220 |   ({ className, onClick, ...props }, ref) => {
221 |     const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar();
222 | 
223 |     return (
224 |       <Button
225 |         ref={ref}
226 |         data-sidebar="trigger"
227 |         variant="ghost"
228 |         size="icon"
229 |         className={cn("size-7", className)}
230 |         onClick={(event) => {
231 |           onClick?.(event);
232 |           toggleSidebar();
233 |         }}
234 |         {...props}
235 |       >
236 |         <PanelLeft />
237 |         <span className="sr-only">Toggle Sidebar</span>
238 |       </Button>
239 |     );
240 |   },
241 | );
242 | SidebarTrigger.displayName = "SidebarTrigger";
243 |

255 |         title="Toggle Sidebar"
256 |         className={cn(

258 |           "[[data-side=left]_&]:cursor-w-resize [[data-side=right]_&]:cursor-e-resize",

260 |           "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:after:left-full group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:hover:bg-sidebar",

263 |           className,
264 |         )}
265 |         {...props}
266 |       />
267 |     );

436 | const SidebarMenuButton = React.forwardRef<
437 |   HTMLButtonElement,
438 |   React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
439 |     asChild?: boolean;
440 |     isActive?: boolean;
441 |     tooltip?: string | React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipContent>;
442 |   } & VariantProps<typeof sidebarMenuButtonVariants>
443 | >(({ asChild = false, isActive = false, variant = "default", size = "default", tooltip, className, ...props }, ref) => {
444 |   const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button";
445 |   const { isMobile, state } = useSidebar();
446 | 
447 |   const button = (
448 |     <Comp
449 |       ref={ref}
450 |       data-sidebar="menu-button"
451 |       data-size={size}
452 |       data-active={isActive}
453 |       className={cn(sidebarMenuButtonVariants({ variant, size }), className)}
454 |       {...props}
455 |     />
456 |   );
457 | 
458 |   if (!tooltip) {
459 |     return button;
460 |   }
461 | 
462 |   if (typeof tooltip === "string") {
463 |     tooltip = {
464 |       children: tooltip,
465 |     };
466 |   }
467 | 
468 |   return (
469 |     <Tooltip>
470 |       <TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
471 |       <TooltipContent side="right" align="center" hidden={state !== "collapsed" || isMobile} {...tooltip} />
472 |     </Tooltip>
473 |   );
474 | });
475 | SidebarMenuButton.displayName = "SidebarMenuButton";

500 |         className,
501 |       )}
502 |       {...props}
503 |     />
504 |   );
505 | });
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/skeleton.tsx

```tsx
1 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
```

```tsx
21 |       }}

23 |     />
24 |   );
25 | };
```

```tsx
  2 | import * as ToastPrimitives from "@radix-ui/react-toast";
  3 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
  4 | import { X } from "lucide-react";
  5 | 
  6 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
  7 | 
  8 | const ToastProvider = ToastPrimitives.Provider;
  9 | 
 10 | const ToastViewport = React.forwardRef<
 11 |   React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Viewport>,
 12 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Viewport>
 13 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
 14 |   <ToastPrimitives.Viewport
 15 |     ref={ref}
 16 |     className={cn(
 17 |       "fixed top-0 z-[100] flex max-h-screen w-full flex-col-reverse p-4 sm:bottom-0 sm:right-0 sm:top-auto sm:flex-col md:max-w-[420px]",
 18 |       className,
 19 |     )}
 20 |     {...props}
 21 |   />
 22 | ));
 23 | ToastViewport.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Viewport.displayName;
 24 | 
 25 | const toastVariants = cva(
 26 |   "group pointer-events-auto relative flex w-full items-center justify-between space-x-4 overflow-hidden rounded-md border p-6 pr-8 shadow-lg transition-all data-[swipe=cancel]:translate-x-0 data-[swipe=end]:translate-x-[var(--radix-toast-swipe-end-x)] data-[swipe=move]:translate-x-[var(--radix-toast-swipe-move-x)] data-[swipe=move]:transition-none data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[swipe=end]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-80 data-[state=closed]:slide-out-to-right-full data-[state=open]:slide-in-from-top-full data-[state=open]:sm:slide-in-from-bottom-full",
 27 |   {
 28 |     variants: {
 29 |       variant: {
 30 |         default: "border bg-background text-foreground",
 31 |         destructive: "destructive group border-destructive bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground",
 32 |       },
 33 |     },
 34 |     defaultVariants: {
 35 |       variant: "default",
 36 |     },
 37 |   },
 38 | );
 39 | 
 40 | const Toast = React.forwardRef<
 41 |   React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Root>,
 42 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Root> & VariantProps<typeof toastVariants>
 43 | >(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => {
 44 |   return <ToastPrimitives.Root ref={ref} className={cn(toastVariants({ variant }), className)} {...props} />;
 45 | });
 46 | Toast.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Root.displayName;
 47 | 
 48 | const ToastAction = React.forwardRef<
 49 |   React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Action>,
 50 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Action>
 51 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
 52 |   <ToastPrimitives.Action
 53 |     ref={ref}
 54 |     className={cn(
 55 |       "inline-flex h-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-md border bg-transparent px-3 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors group-[.destructive]:border-muted/40 hover:bg-secondary group-[.destructive]:hover:border-destructive/30 group-[.destructive]:hover:bg-destructive group-[.destructive]:hover:text-destructive-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 group-[.destructive]:focus:ring-destructive disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
 56 |       className,
 57 |     )}
 58 |     {...props}
 59 |   />
 60 | ));
 61 | ToastAction.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Action.displayName;
 62 | 
 63 | const ToastClose = React.forwardRef<
 64 |   React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Close>,
 65 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Close>
 66 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
 67 |   <ToastPrimitives.Close
 68 |     ref={ref}
 69 |     className={cn(
 70 |       "absolute right-2 top-2 rounded-md p-1 text-foreground/50 opacity-0 transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100 group-[.destructive]:text-red-300 hover:text-foreground group-[.destructive]:hover:text-red-50 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 group-[.destructive]:focus:ring-red-400 group-[.destructive]:focus:ring-offset-red-600",
 71 |       className,
 72 |     )}
 73 |     toast-close=""
 74 |     {...props}
 75 |   >
 76 |     <X className="size-4" />
 77 |   </ToastPrimitives.Close>

 79 | ToastClose.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Close.displayName;

 83 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Title>
 84 | >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (

 86 | ));
 87 | ToastTitle.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Title.displayName;

 94 | ));
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/toaster.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/toaster.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useToast } from "@/shared/hooks/use-toast";
 2 | import { Toast, ToastClose, ToastDescription, ToastProvider, ToastTitle, ToastViewport } from "@/shared/components/ui/toast";
 3 | 
 4 | export function Toaster() {
 5 |   const { toasts } = useToast();
 6 | 
 7 |   return (
 8 |     <ToastProvider>
 9 |       {toasts.map(function ({ id, title, description, action, ...props }) {
10 |         return (
11 |           <Toast key={id} {...props}>
12 |             <div className="grid gap-1">
13 |               {title && <ToastTitle>{title}</ToastTitle>}
14 |               {description && <ToastDescription>{description}</ToastDescription>}
15 |             </div>
16 |             {action}
17 |             <ToastClose />
18 |           </Toast>
19 |         );
20 |       })}
21 |       <ToastViewport />
22 |     </ToastProvider>
23 |   );
24 | }
25 | 
```

---

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/toggle-group.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/components/ui/toggle-group.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import * as React from "react";
 2 | import * as ToggleGroupPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-toggle-group";
 3 | 
 4 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
 5 | import { toggleVariants, type ToggleVariantProps } from "@/shared/components/ui/toggle-variants";
 6 | 
 7 | const ToggleGroupContext = React.createContext<ToggleVariantProps>({
 8 |   size: "default",
 9 |   variant: "default",
10 | });
11 | 
12 | const ToggleGroup = React.forwardRef<
13 |   React.ElementRef<typeof ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root>,
14 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root> & ToggleVariantProps
15 | >(({ className, variant, size, children, ...props }, ref) => (
16 |   <ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root ref={ref} className={cn("flex items-center justify-center gap-1", className)} {...props}>
17 |     <ToggleGroupContext.Provider value={{ variant, size }}>{children}</ToggleGroupContext.Provider>
18 |   </ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root>
19 | ));
20 | 
21 | ToggleGroup.displayName = ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root.displayName;
22 | 
23 | const ToggleGroupItem = React.forwardRef<
24 |   React.ElementRef<typeof ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item>,
25 |   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item> & ToggleVariantProps
26 | >(({ className, children, variant, size, ...props }, ref) => {
27 |   const context = React.useContext(ToggleGroupContext);
28 | 
29 |   return (
30 |     <ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item
31 |       ref={ref}
32 |       className={cn(
33 |         toggleVariants({
34 |           variant: context.variant || variant,
35 |           size: context.size || size,
36 |         }),
37 |         className,
38 |       )}
39 |       {...props}
40 |     >
41 |       {children}
42 |     </ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item>
43 |   );
44 | });
45 | 
46 | ToggleGroupItem.displayName = ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item.displayName;
47 | 
48 | export { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem };
49 | 
```

```tsx
 3 | const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768;
 4 | 
 5 | export function useIsMobile() {
 6 |   const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = React.useState(() =>
 7 |     typeof window === "undefined" ? false : window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT,
 8 |   );
 9 | 
10 |   React.useEffect(() => {
11 |     const mql = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${MOBILE_BREAKPOINT - 1}px)`);
12 |     const onChange = () => {
13 |       setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);
14 |     };
15 |     mql.addEventListener("change", onChange);
16 |     setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);
17 |     return () => mql.removeEventListener("change", onChange);
18 |   }, []);
19 | 
20 |   return !!isMobile;
21 | }
22 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/hooks/use-toast.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/hooks/use-toast.ts`

```ts
  1 | import * as React from "react";
  2 | 
  3 | import type { ToastActionElement, ToastProps } from "@/shared/components/ui/toast";
  4 | 
  5 | const TOAST_LIMIT = 1;
  6 | const TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY = 1000000;
  7 | 
  8 | type ToasterToast = ToastProps & {
  9 |   id: string;
 10 |   title?: React.ReactNode;
 11 |   description?: React.ReactNode;
 12 |   action?: ToastActionElement;
 13 | };
 14 | 
 15 | const actionTypes = {
 16 |   ADD_TOAST: "ADD_TOAST",
 17 |   UPDATE_TOAST: "UPDATE_TOAST",
 18 |   DISMISS_TOAST: "DISMISS_TOAST",
 19 |   REMOVE_TOAST: "REMOVE_TOAST",
 20 | } as const;
 21 | 
 22 | let count = 0;
 23 | 
 24 | function genId() {
 25 |   count = (count + 1) % Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
 26 |   return count.toString();
 27 | }
 28 | 
 29 | type ActionType = typeof actionTypes;
 30 | 
 31 | type Action =
 32 |   | {
 33 |       type: ActionType["ADD_TOAST"];
 34 |       toast: ToasterToast;
 35 |     }
 36 |   | {
 37 |       type: ActionType["UPDATE_TOAST"];
 38 |       toast: Partial<ToasterToast>;
 39 |     }
 40 |   | {
 41 |       type: ActionType["DISMISS_TOAST"];
 42 |       toastId?: ToasterToast["id"];
 43 |     }
 44 |   | {
 45 |       type: ActionType["REMOVE_TOAST"];
 46 |       toastId?: ToasterToast["id"];
 47 |     };
 48 | 
 49 | interface State {
 50 |   toasts: ToasterToast[];
 51 | }
 52 | 
 53 | const toastTimeouts = new Map<string, ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>();
 54 | 
 55 | const addToRemoveQueue = (toastId: string) => {
 56 |   if (toastTimeouts.has(toastId)) {
 57 |     return;
 58 |   }
 59 | 
 60 |   const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
 61 |     toastTimeouts.delete(toastId);
 62 |     dispatch({
 63 |       type: "REMOVE_TOAST",
 64 |       toastId: toastId,
 65 |     });
 66 |   }, TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY);
 67 | 
 68 |   toastTimeouts.set(toastId, timeout);
 69 | };
 70 | 
 71 | export const reducer = (state: State, action: Action): State => {
 72 |   switch (action.type) {
 73 |     case "ADD_TOAST":
 74 |       return {
 75 |         ...state,
 76 |         toasts: [action.toast, ...state.toasts].slice(0, TOAST_LIMIT),
 77 |       };
 78 | 
 79 |     case "UPDATE_TOAST":
 80 |       return {
 81 |         ...state,
 82 |         toasts: state.toasts.map((t) => (t.id === action.toast.id ? { ...t, ...action.toast } : t)),
 83 |       };
 84 | 
 85 |     case "DISMISS_TOAST": {
 86 |       const { toastId } = action;
 87 | 
 88 |       // ! Side effects ! - This could be extracted into a dismissToast() action,
 89 |       // but I'll keep it here for simplicity
 90 |       if (toastId) {
 91 |         addToRemoveQueue(toastId);
 92 |       } else {
 93 |         state.toasts.forEach((toast) => {
 94 |           addToRemoveQueue(toast.id);
 95 |         });
 96 |       }
 97 | 
 98 |       return {
 99 |         ...state,
100 |         toasts: state.toasts.map((t) =>
101 |           t.id === toastId || toastId === undefined
102 |             ? {
103 |                 ...t,
104 |                 open: false,
105 |               }
106 |             : t,
107 |         ),
108 |       };
109 |     }
110 |     case "REMOVE_TOAST":
111 |       if (action.toastId === undefined) {
112 |         return {
113 |           ...state,
114 |           toasts: [],
115 |         };
116 |       }
117 |       return {
118 |         ...state,
119 |         toasts: state.toasts.filter((t) => t.id !== action.toastId),
120 |       };
121 |   }
122 | };
123 | 
124 | const listeners: Array<(state: State) => void> = [];
125 | 
126 | let memoryState: State = { toasts: [] };
127 | 
128 | function dispatch(action: Action) {
129 |   memoryState = reducer(memoryState, action);
130 |   listeners.forEach((listener) => {
131 |     listener(memoryState);
132 |   });
133 | }
134 | 
135 | type Toast = Omit<ToasterToast, "id">;
136 | 
137 | function toast({ ...props }: Toast) {
138 |   const id = genId();
139 | 
140 |   const update = (props: ToasterToast) =>
141 |     dispatch({
142 |       type: "UPDATE_TOAST",
143 |       toast: { ...props, id },
144 |     });
145 |   const dismiss = () => dispatch({ type: "DISMISS_TOAST", toastId: id });
146 | 
147 |   dispatch({
148 |     type: "ADD_TOAST",
149 |     toast: {
150 |       ...props,
151 |       id,
152 |       open: true,
153 |       onOpenChange: (open) => {
154 |         if (!open) dismiss();
155 |       },
156 |     },
157 |   });
158 | 
159 |   return {
160 |     id: id,
161 |     dismiss,
162 |     update,
163 |   };
164 | }
165 | 
166 | function useToast() {
167 |   const [state, setState] = React.useState<State>(memoryState);
168 | 
169 |   React.useEffect(() => {
170 |     listeners.push(setState);
171 |     return () => {
172 |       const index = listeners.indexOf(setState);
173 |       if (index > -1) {
174 |         listeners.splice(index, 1);
175 |       }
176 |     };
177 |   }, [state]);
178 | 
179 |   return {
180 |     ...state,
181 |     toast,
182 |     dismiss: (toastId?: string) => dispatch({ type: "DISMISS_TOAST", toastId }),
183 |   };
184 | }
185 | 
186 | export { useToast, toast };
187 | 
```

```tsx
 1 | import { useState } from "react";
 2 | import { Outlet } from "react-router-dom";

 4 | import AppSidebar from "@/shared/layout/AppSidebar";
 5 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
 6 | 
 7 | export default function AppLayout() {
 8 |   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
 9 |   const { dataset } = useData();
10 | 
11 |   return (
12 |     <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#050d18] text-white">
13 |       <div className="fixed inset-0 -z-10 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(124,58,237,0.18),transparent_34%),radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(37,99,235,0.14),transparent_28%),linear-gradient(180deg,#040b16_0%,#07111f_100%)]" />

18 |

22 |           onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(true)}
23 |           className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2 text-slate-100"

27 |

32 |           </p>

34 | 
35 |         <div className="size-9" />
36 |       </div>
37 |

39 |         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 xl:hidden">
40 |           <button
41 |             type="button"
42 |             onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
43 |             className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60"
44 |             aria-label="Close sidebar"
45 |           />
46 |           <div className="relative h-full w-[18rem]">
47 |             <div className="absolute right-3 top-3 z-10">
48 |               <button
49 |                 type="button"
50 |                 onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
51 |                 className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2 text-slate-100"
52 |               >
53 |                 <X className="size-5" />
54 |               </button>
55 |             </div>
56 |             <AppSidebar onNavigate={() => setSidebarOpen(false)} />
57 |           </div>
58 |         </div>
59 |       )}
60 | 
61 |       <main className="min-h-screen xl:pl-72">
```

```tsx
  1 | import { Link, useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
  2 | import {
  3 |   FileText,
  4 |   LayoutDashboard,
  5 |   Upload,
  6 |   MessageSquare,
  7 |   Table2,
  8 |   LineChart,
  9 |   Sparkles,
 10 |   BrainCircuit,
 11 | } from "lucide-react";
 12 | import ThemeToggle from "@/shared/layout/ThemeToggle";
 13 | import { cn } from "@/shared/lib/utils";
 14 | 
 15 | const navItems = [
 16 |   { path: "/dashboard", label: "Dashboard", icon: LayoutDashboard },
 17 |   { path: "/data", label: "Data Table", icon: Table2 },
 18 |   { path: "/upload", label: "Upload", icon: Upload },
 19 |   { path: "/pdf", label: "PDF Intelligence", icon: FileText },
 20 |   { path: "/analytics", label: "Analytics", icon: LineChart },
 21 |   { path: "/chat", label: "AI Chat", icon: MessageSquare },
 22 |   { path: "/agentic", label: "Agentic AI", icon: Sparkles },
 23 |   { path: "/agentic-data-science", label: "Data Science", icon: BrainCircuit },
 24 | ];
 25 | 
 26 | type Props = {
 27 |   onNavigate?: () => void;
 28 |   className?: string;
 29 | };
 30 | 
 31 | export default function AppSidebar({ onNavigate, className }: Props) {
 32 |   const location = useLocation();
 33 | 
 34 |   return (
 35 |     <aside
 36 |       className={cn(
 37 |         "flex h-full w-72 flex-col border-r border-slate-800/70 bg-[#081121]/95 backdrop-blur",
 38 |         className,
 39 |       )}
 40 |     >
 41 |       <div className="border-b border-slate-800/70 p-5">
 42 |         <Link to="/dashboard" className="flex items-center gap-3" onClick={onNavigate}>
 43 |           <div className="flex size-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[#7c3aed] via-[#8b5cf6] to-[#2563eb] shadow-lg shadow-violet-500/25">
 44 |             <Sparkles className="size-5 text-white" />
 45 |           </div>
 46 |           <div>
 47 |             <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">InsightFlow</h1>
 48 |             <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Analytics Platform</p>
 49 |           </div>
 50 |         </Link>
 51 |       </div>
 52 | 
 53 |       <div className="px-4 py-5">
 54 |         <p className="px-3 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-slate-500">
 55 |           Menu
 56 |         </p>
 57 |       </div>
 58 | 
 59 |       <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1 px-3">
 60 |         {navItems.map((item) => {
 61 |           const isActive =
 62 |             location.pathname === item.path ||
 63 |             (item.path === "/dashboard" && location.pathname === "/");
 64 | 
 65 |           return (
 66 |             <Link key={item.path} to={item.path} onClick={onNavigate} className="block">
 67 |               <div
 68 |                 className={cn(
 69 |                   "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-all",
 70 |                   isActive
 71 |                     ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600/85 to-blue-600/70 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-500/10"
 72 |                     : "text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800/70 hover:text-white",
 73 |                 )}
 74 |               >
 75 |                 <item.icon className="size-5" />
 76 |                 <span>{item.label}</span>
 77 |               </div>
 78 |             </Link>
 79 |           );
 80 |         })}
 81 |       </nav>
 82 | 
 83 |       <div className="space-y-3 border-t border-slate-800/70 p-4">
 84 |         <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/60 p-3">
 85 |           <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-slate-400">
 86 |             <span>Theme</span>
 87 |             <span>Dark / Light</span>
 88 |           </div>
 89 |           <ThemeToggle />
 90 |         </div>
 91 | 
 92 |         <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/60 p-4">
 93 |           <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-200">
 94 |             <span className="size-2.5 rounded-full bg-green-400 shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(74,222,128,0.9)]" />
 95 |             All systems operational
 96 |           </div>
 97 |           <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500">Last checked: 2 min ago</p>
 98 |         </div>
 99 |       </div>
100 |     </aside>
101 |   );
102 | }
103 |
```

```tsx
 1 | import { Moon, Sun } from "lucide-react";
 2 | import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
 3 | 
 4 | const ThemeToggle = () => {
 5 |   const { resolvedTheme, setTheme } = useTheme();
 6 |   const isDark = resolvedTheme !== "light";
 7 | 
 8 |   return (
 9 |     <button
10 |       type="button"
11 |       onClick={() => setTheme(isDark ? "light" : "dark")}
12 |       className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-200 transition-all hover:bg-slate-900"
13 |       aria-label={`Switch to ${isDark ? "light" : "dark"} mode`}
14 |     >
15 |       <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
16 |         {isDark ? <Moon className="size-4" /> : <Sun className="size-4" />}
17 |         {isDark ? "Dark" : "Light"}
18 |       </span>
19 |       <span
20 |         className={`relative h-6 w-11 rounded-full transition ${
21 |           isDark ? "bg-violet-600" : "bg-slate-600"
22 |         }`}
23 |       >
24 |         <span
25 |           className={`absolute top-0.5 size-5 rounded-full bg-white transition ${
26 |             isDark ? "left-[22px]" : "left-0.5"
27 |           }`}
28 |         />
29 |       </span>
30 |     </button>
31 |   );
32 | };
33 | 
34 | export default ThemeToggle;
35 |
```

```ts
 1 | import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from "vitest";
 2 | import logger from "./logger";
 3 | 
 4 | describe("Logger", () => {
 5 |   beforeEach(() => {
 6 |     vi.restoreAllMocks();
 7 |   });
 8 | 
 9 |   it("should be a singleton", () => {
10 |     const instance1 = logger;
11 |     const instance2 = logger;
12 |     expect(instance1).toBe(instance2);
13 |   });
14 | 
15 |   it("should have error, warn, info, debug methods", () => {
16 |     expect(typeof logger.error).toBe("function");
17 |     expect(typeof logger.warn).toBe("function");
18 |     expect(typeof logger.info).toBe("function");
19 |     expect(typeof logger.debug).toBe("function");
20 |   });
21 | 
22 |   it("should log in correct format", () => {
23 |     const consoleSpy = vi.spyOn(console, "log").mockImplementation(() => {});
24 |     logger.info("test message", { key: "value" });
25 |     expect(consoleSpy).toHaveBeenCalled();
26 |     const logged = consoleSpy.mock.calls[0][0];
27 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(logged);
28 |     expect(parsed.message).toBe("test message");
29 |     expect(parsed.context.key).toBe("value");
30 |     expect(parsed.level).toBe("info");
31 |   });
32 | 
33 |   it("should log errors correctly", () => {
34 |     const consoleSpy = vi.spyOn(console, "error").mockImplementation(() => {});
35 |     const error = new Error("test error");
36 |     logger.error("error occurred", { id: 1 }, error);
37 |     expect(consoleSpy).toHaveBeenCalled();
38 |     const logged = consoleSpy.mock.calls[0][0];
39 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(logged);
40 |     expect(parsed.level).toBe("error");
41 |     expect(parsed.message).toBe("error occurred");
42 |     expect(parsed.error.message).toBe("test error");
43 |   });
44 | });
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/shared/lib/logger.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/shared/lib/logger.ts`

```ts
  1 | /// <reference types="vite/client" />
  2 | 
  3 | const LOG_LEVELS = {
  4 |   error: 0,
  5 |   warn: 1,
  6 |   info: 2,
  7 |   debug: 3,
  8 | } as const;
  9 | 
 10 | type LogLevel = keyof typeof LOG_LEVELS;
 11 | 
 12 | interface LogEntry {
 13 |   level: LogLevel;
 14 |   message: string;
 15 |   timestamp: string;
 16 |   context?: Record<string, unknown>;
 17 |   error?: {
 18 |     name: string;
 19 |     message: string;
 20 |     stack?: string;
 21 |   };
 22 | }
 23 | 
 24 | interface LoggerOptions {
 25 |   minLevel?: LogLevel;
 26 |   enableConsole?: boolean;
 27 |   remoteUrl?: string;
 28 | }
 29 | 
 30 | class Logger {
 31 |   private static instance: Logger;
 32 |   private minLevel: LogLevel;
 33 |   private enableConsole: boolean;
 34 |   private remoteUrl?: string;
 35 | 
 36 |   private constructor(options: LoggerOptions = {}) {
 37 |     this.minLevel = options.minLevel ?? this.getLogLevel();
 38 |     this.enableConsole = options.enableConsole ?? true;
 39 |     this.remoteUrl = options.remoteUrl;
 40 |   }
 41 | 
 42 |   private getLogLevel(): LogLevel {
 43 |     const env = import.meta.env as { PROD?: boolean; DEV?: boolean; VITE_LOG_LEVEL?: string };
 44 |     
 45 |     if (env.VITE_LOG_LEVEL) {
 46 |       const level = env.VITE_LOG_LEVEL.toLowerCase() as LogLevel;
 47 |       if (level in LOG_LEVELS) {
 48 |         return level;
 49 |       }
 50 |     }
 51 |     
 52 |     if (env.PROD) {
 53 |       return "error";
 54 |     }
 55 |     if (env.DEV) {
 56 |       return "debug";
 57 |     }
 58 |     return "info";
 59 |   }
 60 | 
 61 |   private shouldLog(level: LogLevel): boolean {
 62 |     const currentLevel = LOG_LEVELS[this.minLevel];
 63 |     const targetLevel = LOG_LEVELS[level];
 64 |     return targetLevel <= currentLevel;
 65 |   }
 66 | 
 67 |   private formatEntry(entry: LogEntry): string {
 68 |     return JSON.stringify(entry);
 69 |   }
 70 | 
 71 |   private serializeError(error: unknown): LogEntry["error"] | undefined {
 72 |     if (!error) return undefined;
 73 |     
 74 |     if (error instanceof Error) {
 75 |       return {
 76 |         name: error.name,
 77 |         message: error.message,
 78 |         stack: error.stack,
 79 |       };
 80 |     }
 81 |     
 82 |     if (typeof error === "object" && error !== null) {
 83 |       const err = error as Record<string, unknown>;
 84 |       return {
 85 |         name: String(err.name ?? "Error"),
 86 |         message: String(err.message ?? ""),
 87 |         stack: err.stack ? String(err.stack) : undefined,
 88 |       };
 89 |     }
 90 |     
 91 |     return {
 92 |       name: "Error",
 93 |       message: String(error),
 94 |     };
 95 |   }
 96 | 
 97 |   private async sendToRemote(entry: LogEntry): Promise<void> {
 98 |     if (!this.remoteUrl) return;
 99 |     
100 |     try {
101 |       await fetch(this.remoteUrl, {
102 |         method: "POST",
103 |         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
104 |         body: this.formatEntry(entry),
105 |       });
106 |     } catch {
107 |       console.warn("[Logger] Failed to send logs to remote");
108 |     }
109 |   }
110 | 
111 |   private log(level: LogLevel, message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>, error?: unknown) {
112 |     if (!this.shouldLog(level)) return;
113 | 
114 |     const entry: LogEntry = {
115 |       level,
116 |       message,
117 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
118 |       context: context && Object.keys(context).length > 0 ? context : undefined,
119 |       error: this.serializeError(error),
120 |     };
121 | 
122 |     const formatted = this.formatEntry(entry);
123 | 
124 |     if (this.enableConsole) {
125 |       if (level === "error" || level === "warn") {
126 |         console.error(formatted);
127 |       } else {
128 |         console.log(formatted);
129 |       }
130 |     }
131 | 
132 |     if (this.remoteUrl) {
133 |       this.sendToRemote(entry).catch(() => {});
134 |     }
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   error(message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>, error?: unknown) {
138 |     this.log("error", message, context, error);
139 |   }
140 | 
141 |   warn(message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>) {
142 |     this.log("warn", message, context);
143 |   }
144 | 
145 |   info(message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>) {
146 |     this.log("info", message, context);
147 |   }
148 | 
149 |   debug(message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>) {
150 |     this.log("debug", message, context);
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   setLevel(level: LogLevel): void {
154 |     this.minLevel = level;
155 |   }
156 | 
157 |   setRemoteUrl(url: string): void {
158 |     this.remoteUrl = url;
159 |   }
160 | 
161 |   enable(enabled: boolean): void {
162 |     this.enableConsole = enabled;
163 |   }
164 | 
165 |   static getInstance(options?: LoggerOptions): Logger {
166 |     if (!Logger.instance) {
167 |       Logger.instance = new Logger(options);
168 |     }
169 |     return Logger.instance;
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   static resetInstance(): void {
173 |     Logger.instance = undefined as unknown as Logger;
174 |   }
175 | }
176 | 
177 | const logger = Logger.getInstance();
178 | 
179 | export { logger, Logger, LOG_LEVELS, type LogLevel, type LogEntry, type LoggerOptions };
180 | export default logger;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/test/dataStore.test.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/test/dataStore.test.ts`

```ts
  1 | import { describe,expect,it } from "vitest";
  2 | import { renderHook } from "@testing-library/react";
  3 | import type { Dataset } from "@/features/data/model/dataStore";
  4 | import {
  5 |   aggregateAverageByDimension,
  6 |   aggregateEducationDistribution,
  7 |   aggregateMultivalueFrequency,
  8 |   buildAnalyticsDashboard,
  9 |   cleanDatasetForAnalytics,
 10 | } from "@/features/data/model/analyticsEngine";
 11 | import { useKPIEngine } from "@/features/dashboard/hooks/useKPIEngine";
 12 | 
 13 | const analyticsDataset:Dataset = {
 14 |   id:"salary-analytics-1",
 15 |   name:"Global Developer Compensation",
 16 |   uploadedAt:new Date("2026-04-22T00:00:00.000Z"),
 17 |   rowCount:11,
 18 |   columns:[
 19 |     { name:"country",type:"string",sample:["USA","India","Germany"] },
 20 |     { name:"salary_usd",type:"number",sample:["120000","40000","90000"] },
 21 |     { name:"experience",type:"number",sample:["3","8","6"] },
 22 |     { name:"education",type:"string",sample:["Bachelor","Master","PhD"] },
 23 |     { name:"languages",type:"string",sample:["Python, SQL","Python, R"] },
 24 |   ],
 25 |   rows:[
 26 |     { country:"USA",salary_usd:"120000",experience:"3",education:"Bachelor",languages:"Python, SQL" },
 27 |     { country:"USA",salary_usd:"150000",experience:"7",education:"Master",languages:"Python, SQL, JavaScript" },
 28 |     { country:"India",salary_usd:"40000",experience:"2",education:"Bachelor",languages:"Python, SQL" },
 29 |     { country:"India",salary_usd:"60000",experience:"5",education:"Master",languages:"Python, R" },
 30 |     { country:"Germany",salary_usd:"90000",experience:"6",education:"PhD",languages:"Python, SQL, Scala" },
 31 |     { country:"Germany",salary_usd:"95000",experience:"8",education:"Master",languages:"SQL, Scala" },
 32 |     { country:"Canada",salary_usd:"110000",experience:"9",education:"PhD",languages:"Python, SQL" },
 33 |     { country:"Canada",salary_usd:"115000",experience:"11",education:"Master",languages:"Python, Go" },
 34 |     { country:"USA",salary_usd:"150000",experience:"7",education:"Master",languages:"Python, SQL, JavaScript" },
 35 |     { country:"Brazil",salary_usd:null,experience:"4",education:"Bachelor",languages:null },
 36 |     { country:"USA",salary_usd:"9999999",experience:"65",education:"PhD",languages:"Cobol" },
 37 |   ],
 38 | };
 39 | 
 40 | describe("analytics engine",()=>{
 41 |   it("cleans datasets and reports missing values, duplicates, and outliers",()=>{
 42 |     const result = cleanDatasetForAnalytics(analyticsDataset);
 43 | 
 44 |     expect(result.validationSummary).toEqual({
 45 |       totalRows:11,
 46 |       validRows:8,
 47 |       missingPercentage:3.64,
 48 |       duplicateCount:1,
 49 |       outlierCount:2,
 50 |     });
 51 |     expect(result.missingByColumn.salary_usd).toBe(1);
 52 |     expect(result.missingByColumn.languages).toBe(1);
 53 |     expect(result.cleanedDataset.rows).toHaveLength(8);
 54 |   });
 55 | 
 56 |   it("aggregates salary by country using averages rather than totals",()=>{
 57 |     const { cleanedDataset } = cleanDatasetForAnalytics(analyticsDataset);
 58 |     const countryColumn = cleanedDataset.columns.find((column)=>column.name === "country");
 59 |     const salaryColumn = cleanedDataset.columns.find((column)=>column.name === "salary_usd");
 60 | 
 61 |     expect(countryColumn).toBeDefined();
 62 |     expect(salaryColumn).toBeDefined();
 63 | 
 64 |     const salaryByCountry = aggregateAverageByDimension(cleanedDataset.rows,countryColumn!,salaryColumn!,{ normalizeByTotalEntries:true });
 65 | 
 66 |     expect(salaryByCountry).toEqual([
 67 |       { country:"USA",salary_usd:135000,sampleSize:2,normalizedValue:16875 },
 68 |       { country:"Canada",salary_usd:112500,sampleSize:2,normalizedValue:14062.5 },
 69 |       { country:"Germany",salary_usd:92500,sampleSize:2,normalizedValue:11562.5 },
 70 |       { country:"India",salary_usd:60000,sampleSize:1,normalizedValue:7500 },
 71 |     ]);
 72 |   });
 73 | 
 74 |   it("parses multivalue language fields and sorts frequencies descending",()=>{
 75 |     const { cleanedDataset } = cleanDatasetForAnalytics(analyticsDataset);
 76 |     const languageColumn = cleanedDataset.columns.find((column)=>column.name === "languages");
 77 | 
 78 |     expect(languageColumn).toBeDefined();
 79 | 
 80 |     const languageFrequency = aggregateMultivalueFrequency(cleanedDataset.rows,languageColumn!);
 81 | 
 82 |     expect(languageFrequency.slice(0,5)).toEqual([
 83 |       { languages:"Python",count:6,percentage:37.5 },
 84 |       { languages:"SQL",count:5,percentage:31.25 },
 85 |       { languages:"Scala",count:2,percentage:12.5 },
 86 |       { languages:"JavaScript",count:1,percentage:6.25 },
 87 |       { languages:"R",count:1,percentage:6.25 },
 88 |     ]);
 89 |   });
 90 | 
 91 |   it("counts real education distribution and keeps logical education order",()=>{
 92 |     const { cleanedDataset } = cleanDatasetForAnalytics(analyticsDataset);
 93 |     const educationColumn = cleanedDataset.columns.find((column)=>column.name === "education");
 94 | 
 95 |     expect(educationColumn).toBeDefined();
 96 | 
 97 |     const educationDistribution = aggregateEducationDistribution(cleanedDataset.rows,educationColumn!);
 98 | 
 99 |     expect(educationDistribution).toEqual([
100 |       { education:"Bachelor",count:2,percentage:25 },
101 |       { education:"Master",count:4,percentage:50 },
102 |       { education:"PhD",count:2,percentage:25 },
103 |     ]);
104 |   });
105 | 
106 |   it("builds a memoizable dashboard bundle with statistically correct chart semantics",()=>{
107 |     const bundle = buildAnalyticsDashboard(analyticsDataset);
108 | 
109 |     expect(bundle.structuredData.salaryByCountry[0]).toMatchObject({ country:"USA",salary_usd:135000 });
110 |     expect(bundle.structuredData.experienceByCountry[0]).toMatchObject({ country:"Canada",experience:10 });
111 |     expect(bundle.charts.map((chart)=>chart.title)).toEqual([
112 |       "Average Salary Usd by Country",
113 |       "Average Experience by Country",
114 |       "Language Frequency",
115 |       "Education Distribution",
116 |       "Average Salary Usd by Education",
117 |       "Salary Usd vs Experience",
118 |     ]);
119 |     expect(bundle.charts[5]).toMatchObject({
120 |       type:"scatter",
121 |       xKey:"experience",
122 |       yKey:"salary_usd",
123 |     });
124 |     expect(bundle.insights.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
125 |   });
126 | 
127 |   it("returns dynamic, insight-driven KPIs from the KPI engine hook",()=>{
128 |     const { result } = renderHook(()=>useKPIEngine(analyticsDataset));
129 | 
130 |     expect(result.current.kpis.map((kpi)=>kpi.title)).toEqual([
131 |       "Data Quality",
132 |       "Avg Salary",
133 |       "Experience-Salary Correlation",
134 |       "Top Country",
135 |       "Most Popular Language",
136 |       "Education Impact",
137 |     ]);
138 |     expect(result.current.kpis[0]).toMatchObject({
139 |       title:"Data Quality",
140 |       value:"72.73%",
141 |       trend:"stable",
142 |       status:"critical",
143 |     });
144 |     expect(result.current.kpis[1]).toMatchObject({
145 |       title:"Avg Salary",
146 |       status:"good",
147 |     });
148 |     expect(result.current.kpis[2].insight).toContain("correlation");
149 |     expect(result.current.kpis[3]).toMatchObject({
150 |       title:"Top Country",
151 |       value:"USA",
152 |       status:"good",
153 |     });
154 |     expect(result.current.kpis[4]).toMatchObject({
155 |       title:"Most Popular Language",
156 |       value:"Python",
157 |     });
158 |     expect(result.current.kpis[5].value).toMatch(/%|N\/A/);
159 |   });
160 | });
161 | 
```
