### FILE: tools/qa/report-template.html

Source path: `tools/qa/report-template.html`

```html
 1 | <!doctype html>
 2 | <html lang="en">
 3 |   <head>
 4 |     <meta charset="utf-8" />
 5 |     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 6 |     <title>{{project}} Software Quality Report</title>
 7 |     <style>
 8 |       :root { color-scheme: dark; --bg:#07111f; --panel:#0d1b2e; --panel2:#10243d; --text:#e5edf7; --muted:#94a3b8; --ok:#22c55e; --bad:#ef4444; --warn:#f59e0b; --line:#1e3a5f; }
 9 |       body { margin:0; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#050b15,#081827); color:var(--text); font-family:Inter,Segoe UI,Arial,sans-serif; }
10 |       main { max-width:1180px; margin:0 auto; padding:32px 20px 56px; }
11 |       header { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:24px; align-items:flex-start; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); padding-bottom:24px; }
12 |       h1 { margin:0; font-size:30px; letter-spacing:0; }
13 |       h2 { margin:32px 0 14px; font-size:18px; }
14 |       p { color:var(--muted); }
15 |       .score { font-size:42px; font-weight:800; }
16 |       .grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)); gap:14px; margin-top:24px; }
17 |       .card { background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--panel2),var(--panel)); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px; padding:18px; box-shadow:0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.22); }
18 |       .metric { font-size:28px; font-weight:800; margin-top:6px; }
19 |       .label { color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; }
20 |       table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; overflow:hidden; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--line); }
21 |       th,td { padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); text-align:left; font-size:14px; }
22 |       th { background:#0b1a2c; color:#cbd5e1; }
23 |       tr:last-child td { border-bottom:0; }
24 |       .badge { display:inline-block; border-radius:999px; padding:4px 9px; font-size:12px; font-weight:800; }
25 |       .PASS { background:rgba(34,197,94,.15); color:#86efac; }
26 |       .FAIL { background:rgba(239,68,68,.15); color:#fca5a5; }
27 |       .WARNING { background:rgba(245,158,11,.15); color:#fcd34d; }
28 |       .bar { height:8px; background:#172a45; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; }
29 |       .bar span { display:block; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#22c55e,#06b6d4); }
30 |       @media (max-width:850px){ .grid{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); } header{ display:block; } }
31 |     </style>
32 |   </head>
33 |   <body>
34 |     <main>
35 |       {{content}}
36 |     </main>
37 |   </body>
38 | </html>
39 | 
```

### FILE: tools/qa/run-playwright-e2e.mjs

Source path: `tools/qa/run-playwright-e2e.mjs`

```js
 1 | import { spawn, spawnSync } from "node:child_process";
 2 | import path from "node:path";
 3 | import process from "node:process";
 4 | 
 5 | const root = process.cwd();
 6 | const frontendCwd = path.join(root, "apps", "frontend");
 7 | const url = "http://127.0.0.1:5173";
 8 | 
 9 | function wait(ms) {
10 |   return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
11 | }
12 | 
13 | async function isReady() {
14 |   try {
15 |     const response = await fetch(url);
16 |     return response.ok;
17 |   } catch {
18 |     return false;
19 |   }
20 | }
21 | 
22 | async function waitForServer() {
23 |   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 80; attempt += 1) {
24 |     if (await isReady()) return;
25 |     await wait(250);
26 |   }
27 |   throw new Error(`Frontend dev server did not become ready at ${url}`);
28 | }
29 | 
30 | function run(command, args, options = {}) {
31 |   return new Promise((resolve) => {
32 |     const child = spawn(command, args, {
33 |       stdio: "inherit",
34 |       shell: true,
35 |       ...options,
36 |     });
37 |     child.on("exit", (code) => resolve(code ?? 1));
38 |   });
39 | }
40 | 
41 | const serverAlreadyRunning = await isReady();
42 | const server = serverAlreadyRunning
43 |   ? null
44 |   : spawn("npx", ["vite", "--host", "127.0.0.1"], {
45 |       cwd: frontendCwd,
46 |       stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"],
47 |       shell: true,
48 |     });
49 | 
50 | if (server) {
51 |   server.stdout.on("data", (chunk) => process.stdout.write(`[vite] ${chunk}`));
52 |   server.stderr.on("data", (chunk) => process.stderr.write(`[vite] ${chunk}`));
53 | }
54 | 
55 | let exitCode = 1;
56 | try {
57 |   await waitForServer();
58 |   exitCode = await run("npx", ["playwright", "test", "--config", "playwright.config.ts"], { cwd: root });
59 | } finally {
60 |   if (server?.pid) {
61 |     if (process.platform === "win32") {
62 |       spawnSync("taskkill", ["/PID", String(server.pid), "/T", "/F"], { stdio: "ignore" });
63 |     } else {
64 |       server.kill("SIGTERM");
65 |     }
66 |   }
67 | }
68 | 
69 | process.exit(exitCode);
70 | 
```
